Matthew1:1 Jesus Christ wey dem born for David and Abraham family, naim story bi dis." 
Matthew1:2 Abraham born Isaak, Isaak kon born Jakob. Na Jakob born Judah and en brodas," 
Matthew1:3 Judah born Perez and Zera (wey en mama bi Tamar), Perez born Hezron and Hezron born Ram," 
Matthew1:4 Ram na Amminadab papa, Amminadab born Nashon, Nashon kon born Salmon," 
Matthew1:5 Salmon born Boaz (wey Rahab bi en mama), na Boaz bi Obed papa (wey Rut bi en mama), Obed kon born Jesse," 
Matthew1:6 Jesse born David wey bi Israel pipol king. David born Solomon (wey Uraya wife bi en mama)," 
Matthew1:7 Solomon born Rehoboam, Rehoboam naim bi Abijah papa and Abijah kon born Asa," 
Matthew1:8 Asa born Jehoshafat, Jehoshafat kon born Joram, Joram born Uzzaya," 
Matthew1:9 Uzzaya born Jotam, Jotam kon born Ahaz, wey born Hezekaya," 
Matthew1:10 Hezekaya born Manasseh, Manasseh naim bi Amnon papa and na Amon born Josaya." 
Matthew1:11 Josaya born Jekonaya and en brodas for di time wey dem karry Israel pipol go bi slave for Babilon. 
Matthew1:12 Afta dem karry Israel pipol go Babilon, Jekonaya kon born Shealtiel, Shealtiel kon bi Zerubabel papa," 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabel born Abiud, Abiud naim bi Eliakim papa, Eliakim kon born Azor," 
Matthew1:14 Azor born Zadok, Zadok naim bi Akim papa, Akim kon born Eliud," 
Matthew1:15 Eliud born Eleazar wey bi Matan papa, Matan kon born Jakob," 
Matthew1:16 Jakob born Josef wey bi Mary husband, dis Mary naim bi Jesus Christ mama." 
Matthew1:17 So, from Abraham go rish David time, na fourteen generashon dey and from David time go rish wen dem karry Israel pipol go Babilon, na fourteen too and from dat time go rish wen dem born Jesus Christ, na fourteen generashon e bi." 
Matthew1:18 Dis na how dem take born Jesus Christ. Wen Mary en mama don ready to marry Josef, before dem bigin sleep togeda, Mary kon si sey e don get belle with Holy Spirit pawa." 
Matthew1:19 Josef wey won marry am, na pesin wey dey fear God well-well and bikos e nor won disgrace am, e kon tink for en mind sey e nor go marry Mary again." 
Matthew1:20 As e dey tink how e go take leave am, God angel show ensef to am for dream kon tell am sey, “Josef, David pikin, make yu nor fear to marry Mary, bikos di pikin wey dey en belle, na Holy Spirit gi-am." 
Matthew1:21 E go born boy and yu go koll am ‘Jesus,’ bikos e go save en pipol from dia sin.”" 
Matthew1:22 Dis tins go happen as God profet tok: 
Matthew1:23 “Si! Di woman wey neva sleep with man before go get belle and e go born boy and dem go koll am, ‘Emmanuel’ wey mean, ‘God dey with us.’ ”" 
Matthew1:24 Wen Josef wake-up, e do wetin God angel tell am. So, e kon marry Mary," 
Matthew1:25 but e nor sleep with am until Mary born di pikin. Den e kon name am, Jesus." 
Matthew2:1 Afta dem born Jesus for Betlehem wey dey Judea, for di time wey Herod bi king, some wise men from east kon go Jerusalem" 
Matthew2:1 Afta dem born Jesus for Betlehem wey dey Judea, for di time wey Herod bi king, some wise men from east kon go Jerusalem" 
Matthew2:2 dey ask, “Where di Jew king wey dem just born? Wi si di star wey tok about am, so wi kom woship am.”" 
Matthew2:3 Wetin dem tok so, vex King Herod and Jerusalem pipol." 
Matthew2:4 So, di king gada all di priest oga dem and di pipol wey sabi di law kon ask dem, “Where una tink sey dem go for born Christ?”" 
Matthew2:5 Dem kon ansa, “Na for Betlehem, wey dey Judea, just as Profet Isaya rite sey:" 
Matthew2:5 Dem kon ansa, “Na for Betlehem, wey dey Judea, just as Profet Isaya rite sey:" 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Betlehem pipol, una wey small pass for all di pipol wey dey rule Judah, na from among una di pesin wey go lead all my pipol for Israel, go from kom.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Den Herod koll di wise men go korna, make dem for tell am wen dem si di star." 
Matthew2:8 E kon sey, “Make una go look for di pikin well-well. Wen una don si am, make una kom tell mi, so dat mi too, go-go woship am.”" 
Matthew2:9 Wen di king tok finish, di wise men kon dey go and di star wey dem si before, kon dey lead dem until e stop on-top di house where di pikin dey." 
Matthew2:10 Wen dem si di star, dem kon dey happy." 
Matthew2:11 Dem enter di house, si di pikin with en mama kon knee down woship am. Den dem open dia bag kon gi-am some gifts wey bi, gold, frankincense and myrrh." 
Matthew2:12 Bikos God warn dem for dream make dem nor go back go meet Herod, dem kon pass anoda road go dia house." 
Matthew2:13 Wen di wise men don go, God angel kon tell Josef for dream, “Get up, karry di pikin and en mama run go Egypt, make una stay der until I go tell yu wetin una go do, bikos Herod won kill di pikin.”" 
Matthew2:14 Dat same nite, Josef wake-up, karry di pikin and en mama kon run go Egypt." 
Matthew2:15 Dem stay der till Herod die. Dis tin make wetin God profet tok happen sey, “I koll my pikin komot from Egypt.”" 
Matthew2:16 Wen Herod si sey di wise men deceive am, e vex well-well, so e send sojas make dem go kill all di boys wey don rish two years kom down, bikos e don rish two years wen di wise men kom meet am sey, dem si di star." 
Matthew2:17 Dis one make wetin Profet Jeremaya tok happen sey," 
Matthew2:18 “Pipol hear kry and shaut for Rama. Rashel dey kry for en pikin dem wey don die and nor-tin wey pipol tok, fit make en heart strong.”" 
Matthew2:19 Afta Herod die, God angel appear to Josef for dream wen e still dey Egypt," 
Matthew2:20 kon tell am, “Make yu get up, karry di pikin and en mama go Israel, bikos di pesin wey won kill-am, don die.”" 
Matthew2:21 So, e karry di pikin and en mama go Israel back." 
Matthew2:22 But wen e hear sey Arkelaus dey rule for Judea, afta Herod en papa don die, Josef kon fear to go der. Afta God don warn am for dream, e kon go Galilee." 
Matthew2:22 But wen e hear sey Arkelaus dey rule for Judea, afta Herod en papa don die, Josef kon fear to go der. Afta God don warn am for dream, e kon go Galilee." 
Matthew2:23 Wen e rish Nazaret, e kon stay der. Dis one make wetin Profet Jeremaya tok happen sey, “Dem go sey Jesus, na Nazaret e from kom.”"

Matthew3:3 Na dis John Profet Isaya tok about sey, “One pesin dey shaut inside wildaness sey, ‘Make una make God road strait.’ ”"

Matthew3:4 John wear klot wey dem use kamel hair make, e use leda belt tie waist and na lokust and honey for bush, e dey chop."

Matthew3:5 Pipol from Jerusalem, Judea and all di town wey dey near Jordan River dey run go meet am" 
Matthew3:5 Pipol from Jerusalem, Judea and all di town wey dey near Jordan River dey run go meet am" 
Matthew3:6 and e kon baptize dem inside Jordan River, afta dem konfess dia sins." 
Matthew3:7 But wen e si many Farisee and Sadusi pipol dey kom make e baptize dem, e kon tell dem, “Una, snake shidren! Who warn una about God judgement wey dey kom?" 
Matthew3:8 Naw, make una do wetin go show sey una don turn from sin kom meet God," 
Matthew3:9 make una nor tink sey una don free bikos una sey, ‘Abraham na awa papa.’ Make I tell una, God fit turn all dis stone to Abraham shidren!" 
Matthew3:10 Naw sef, dem don put di axe for di tree bottom and any tree wey nor bear betta fruit, dem go kut am trow inside fire." 
Matthew3:11 “I dey baptize una with wota make una for turn from sin kom meet God, but di pesin wey go kom afta, strong pass mi. I nor big rish to luz di rope wey dey en shoe, na-im go baptize una with Holy Spirit and fire." 
Matthew3:12 Di fan wey e go take blow kanda komot from korn, dey en hand and e go gada and keep en korn inside store kon burn di dirty for faya wey nor dey kwensh.”" 
Matthew3:13 Jesus kom from Galilee make John for baptize am for Jordan River. 
Matthew3:13 Jesus kom from Galilee make John for baptize am for Jordan River. 
Matthew3:14 But John won kon stop am sey, “Na yu suppose baptize mi, instead yu kom meet mi make I baptize yu?”" 
Matthew3:14 But John won kon stop am sey, “Na yu suppose baptize mi, instead yu kom meet mi make I baptize yu?”" 
Matthew3:15 Jesus ansa, “Make e bi so naw, e betta make wi do evritin wey God wont.” So, John kon baptize am." 
Matthew3:15 Jesus ansa, “Make e bi so naw, e betta make wi do evritin wey God wont.” So, John kon baptize am." 
Matthew3:16 As Jesus dey kom out from di wota afta John don baptize am, heaven open and John kon si God Spirit wey bi like dove, stay on-top Jesus head." 
Matthew3:16 As Jesus dey kom out from di wota afta John don baptize am, heaven open and John kon si God Spirit wey bi like dove, stay on-top Jesus head." 
Matthew3:17 Naim one vois from heaven kon sey, “Dis na My pikin wey I love and e dey make belle sweet mi.”" 
Matthew4:1 Di Holy Spirit take Jesus go inside wildaness make devil for tempt am. 
Matthew4:2 Afta Jesus don fast for forty days and forty nites, e kon dey hongry." 
Matthew4:3 Den devil kon meet am sey, “If yu bi God pikin, kommand dis stone make e turn to bread.”" 
Matthew4:4 Jesus ansa, “God word sey, ‘Nor bi only food man go take survive, but na with evry word wey God tok.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Den, devil show Jesus di holy town kon make am stand on-top di place wey high pass for di temple" 
Matthew4:6 and e tell Jesus, “If yu really bi God pikin, jump go down, bikos dem rite for God word sey, “ ‘God go kommand en angels make dem do evritin for yu and dem go katch yu make yor leg nor nak stone.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Jesus ansa am, “God word sey, ‘Make yu nor try God wey bi yor Oga God.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Den devil take Jesus go one mountin wey high well-well kon show am all di kingdom for dis world and all di betta tins inside am. 
Matthew4:9 Devil kon tell am, “I go give yu all dis tins, if yu go bow down woship mi.”" 
Matthew4:10 Jesus ansa, “Komot here, devil! Bikos God word sey, ‘Na only God wi suppose to serve and woship.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 So, devil kon leave Jesus and God angels kon bigin help am." 
Matthew4:12 Wen Jesus hear sey dem don put John inside prison, e kon go back to Galilee." 
Matthew4:12 Wen Jesus hear sey dem don put John inside prison, e kon go back to Galilee." 
Matthew4:13 From der, Jesus komot from Nazaret go Kapanaum wey near di sea, where Zebulun and Naftali pipol dey stay," 
Matthew4:14 so dat wetin Profet Isaya tok, go happen:" 
Matthew4:15 “Zebulun and Naftali di place where river for cross Jordan River go Galilee, where pipol wey nor bi Jew dey stay," 
Matthew4:16 una wey dey darkness, don si big lite and una wey don nearly die, don get life.”" 
Matthew4:17 From dat time, Jesus bigin prish sey, “Make una turn from sin kom meet God, bikos God Kingdom don kom meet una.”" 
Matthew4:18 As Jesus dey waka for Galilee wotaside, e si two brodas, Simon wey dem dey koll Pita and Andru en broda, dem dey trow net inside di river dey katch fish." 
Matthew4:19 Jesus kon tell dem, “Make una follow mi and I go make una katch pipol.”" 
Matthew4:20 At wons, dem leave dia net kon follow Jesus." 
Matthew4:21 As Jesus komot from der, e kon si two brodas, James and John, with Zebedee dia papa, dey ripair net inside dia boat. Den Jesus koll di brodas." 
Matthew4:21 As Jesus komot from der, e kon si two brodas, James and John, with Zebedee dia papa, dey ripair net inside dia boat. Den Jesus koll di brodas." 
Matthew4:21 As Jesus komot from der, e kon si two brodas, James and John, with Zebedee dia papa, dey ripair net inside dia boat. Den Jesus koll di brodas." 
Matthew4:22 Kwik-kwik dem run leave dia papa inside di boat, kon follow Jesus." 
Matthew4:23 Jesus kon dey waka for Galilee dey tish inside dia sinagog. E prish about God Kingdom and dey heal pipol wey get difren-difren diziz and doz wey nor well. 
Matthew4:24 So di news about Jesus kon spread go evriwhere for Siria. Dem kon bring pipol wey nor well, wey nor fit waka, pipol wey devil dey worry and di pipol wey demon dey inside dem, kom meet am and e heal all of dem." 
Matthew4:25 Many pipol from Galilee, Dekapolis, Jerusalem, Judea and pipol wey dey stay near Jordan River, kon follow am." 
Matthew4:25 Many pipol from Galilee, Dekapolis, Jerusalem, Judea and pipol wey dey stay near Jordan River, kon follow am." 
Matthew5:1 Wen Jesus si di pipol, e klimb go di mountin and en disciples follow am. Afta e don sidan," 
Matthew5:2 e kon bigin tish dem sey; 
Matthew5:3 “God go bless una wey dey poor for spirit, na una go get heaven." 
Matthew5:4 God go bless una wey dey mourn, bikos E go make una happy." 
Matthew5:5 God go bless una wey nor dey karry body up, una go enjoy en promise for dis world." 
Matthew5:6 God go bless una wey dey like to do good tins, E go give una evritin wey una wont." 
Matthew5:7 God go bless una wey dey sorry for pipol, una go receive mesi." 
Matthew5:8 God go bless una wey get pure heart, na una go si God." 
Matthew5:9 God go bless una wey dey make peace, pipol go koll una God shidren." 
Matthew5:10 God go bless una wey dey sofa bikos una dey do wetin dey rite, na una go enjoy God Kingdom for heaven." 
Matthew5:11 “God go bless una wey pipol dey curse, dey sofa and lie for una head, bikos of mi," 
Matthew5:12 make una happy and make belle sweet una, bikos na big tin dey wait una for heaven. Make una remember sey, na so di profets wey kom before una, sofa too.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Na una bi salt for dis eart. But if salt nor get taste; how e go bi for pipol mout? E betta make dem trowey am and make pipol mash am. 
Matthew5:14 “Na una bi lite for dis world and town wey dey on-top mountin, nor dey hide." 
Matthew5:15 Pesin nor dey lite lamp kon kover am with basin, instead e go put am for where evribody wey dey inside di house go si am." 
Matthew5:16 Like dat too, make yor lite shine well-well for where pipol dey, so dat dem go si di good tins wey yu dey do, wey go make dem praiz yor Papa wey dey heaven.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Make una nor tink sey I kom spoil Moses Law and di tins wey di profets tish. Nor bi so, misef kom obey dem." 
Matthew5:18 I tell una true word, before dis world go end, evritin wey dey inside di Law, even di small-small ones, go happen." 
Matthew5:19 So anybody wey nor do wetin God kommand and dey tish odas to do as e dey do, naim go small pass for God Kingdom. But pesin wey obey God and tish odas to do wetin di Law tok, na big pesin e go bi for God Kingdom." 
Matthew5:20 I tell yu di trut, if di good wey yu do, nor betta pass wetin di Farisee and di pipol wey dey tish di Law do, yu nor go fit enter God Kingdom.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Yu hear as God tell awa papa dem before-before sey, ‘Nor kill and anybody wey kill, God go judge am.’" 
Matthew5:22 But I tell una, anybody wey vex for en broda, God go judge am too. Anybody wey curse en broda, go face di kansol and anybody wey koll pesin, ‘Mumu’, go-go hell-fire." 
Matthew5:23 “If yu take gift go altar and yu kon remember sey yor broda get bad belle for yu," 
Matthew5:24 make yu leave di gift for di altar, first go setol with yor broda, den yu go fit kom back kon give yor gift." 
Matthew5:25 “Kwik setol with who dey akuiz yu before una rish kourt, if not, e go give yu to di judge and di warda go trow yu inside prison." 
Matthew5:26 I tell una di trut, yu nor go komot from dat trobol until yu pay all di money!”" 
Matthew5:27 “Yu hear wey pipol sey, ‘Make yu nor sleep with who yu nor marry.’" 
Matthew5:28 But I dey tell una naw sey, ‘Anybody wey look woman kon get di mind to sleep with am, don already kommit sin for en heart.’" 
Matthew5:29 If yor rite eye go make yu sin, make yu plok am komot. E betta sey one part for yor body nor dey, dan sey all yor body enter hell-fire." 
Matthew5:30 If yor rite hand go make yu do bad tin, make yu kut am trowey! E betta sey one part for yor body nor dey, dan sey all yor body enter hell-fire.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Pipol dey sey, ‘Anybody wey drive en wife, must gi-am paper sey e nor won marry am again.’" 
Matthew5:32 But I dey tell una naw sey, anybody wey drive en wife komot from marriage, wey nor bi sey di woman sleep with anoda man, don make di woman kommit adultery and any man wey marry di woman, don kommit adultery too.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Again, yu don hear sey dem tell pipol before-before sey, ‘Make yu nor break yor promise, but do wetin yu promise God.’" 
Matthew5:34 But I dey tell una naw sey, make una nor ever use heaven swear at-all, bikos na God throne e bi," 
Matthew5:35 or with eart, bikos naim God dey put en leg, or use Jerusalem, bikos na di big king town" 
Matthew5:36 Nor even take yor head swear, bikos yu nor fit make one singol hair white or black." 
Matthew5:37 Wen yu sey, ‘Yes,’ make yu mean am and wen yu sey ‘No,’ make yu mean am too. Any oda tin wey yu tok pass dis, na devil e from kom.”" 
Matthew5:38 “Una hear sey, ‘Anytin anybody do una, make una do am back.’" 
Matthew5:39 But I tell una, make una nor fight, if anybody slap yor face, turn di oda side gi-am too." 
Matthew5:40 If anybody drag yor shirt with yu, make yu gi-am yor koat join." 
Matthew5:41 And if anybody force yu waka one mile, make yu follow am waka two mile." 
Matthew5:42 Give pipol anytin wey dem ask from yu and nor drive anybody wey kom borrow sometin from yu.” 
Matthew5:43 “Una hear sey, ‘Make una love una neighbour and hate una enemy.’" 
Matthew5:44 But I tell una naw sey, ‘Make una love una enemies and pray for pipol wey dey sofa una’," 
Matthew5:45 so dat una go bi like una Papa for heaven wey dey allow sun to shine and rain to fall on-top bad and good pipol. 
Matthew5:46 If una love only di pipol wey love una, wetin una go gain? Na so bad pipol dey do too, abi nor bi so?" 
Matthew5:47 If una dey greet only una brodas, una nor betta pass odas, bikos pipol wey nor know God still dey do like dat, abi nor bi so?" 
Matthew5:48 So make una dey pafet as una Papa wey dey for heaven, pafet.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Make una nor dey do good bikos una wont make pipol si una; if una do so, God nor go pay una for di good wey una do." 
Matthew6:2 “Anytime una give sometin to pipol, make una nor show unasef as pritendas dey do for dia sinagog and road, so dat oda pipol go praiz dem. I tell una true word, dem don already get dia reward." 
Matthew6:3 But wen una dey give, make una nor let una left hand know wetin una rite hand give." 
Matthew6:4 So dat una gift, go dey sekret and una Papa wey dey si for sekret, go reward una.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Anytime wey una dey pray, make una nor do like pipol wey dey pritend, wey like to dey stand pray inside sinagog and for road, so dat pipol go si dem. I tell una true word, dem don already get dia reward." 
Matthew6:6 But wen una dey pray, make una go inside room, klose di door and pray to una Papa for sekret. And una Papa wey dey si for sekret, go reward una for pipol present." 
Matthew6:7 Wen una dey pray, make una nor tok one word many times as pipol wey dey serve juju dey do, bikos dem tink sey dia juju go hear dem wen dia tok plenty." 
Matthew6:8 Make una nor bi like dem. Una Papa know wetin una nid before una bigin ask am. 
Matthew6:9 “So make una pray like dis: “ ‘Awa Papa wey dey for heaven, wi praiz yor name," 
Matthew6:10 make yor Kingdom kom, make wetin yu wont, happen for dis world as e bi for heaven." 
Matthew6:11 Give us di food wey wi go chop evriday," 
Matthew6:12 forgive us all di bad-bad tins wey wi don do, as wisef dey forgive odas di bad tins wey dem do us." 
Matthew6:13 Nor allow us enter temptashon, but make yu save us from bad tins.’" 
Matthew6:14 If una forgive oda pipol di bad tins wey dem do una, una Papa wey dey for heaven go forgive una too." 
Matthew6:15 But if una nor forgive odas, una Papa sef nor go forgive una.”" 
Matthew6:16 “Wen una dey fast, make una nor skwiz una face like pipol wey dey pritend, so dat pipol go si sey dem dey fast. I tell una true word, dem don already get dia full reward." 
Matthew6:17 But wen una dey fast, make una wosh and rub pomade for una face," 
Matthew6:18 so dat odas nor go know sey una dey fast, but only una Papa wey dey for sekret go know. And una Papa wey dey si for sekret, go reward una.”" 
Matthew6:19 “Make una nor just gada propaty for dis world, bikos siti-siti go chop dem or dem go rust or tif fit enter inside di house tif dem." 
Matthew6:20 But make una gada betta tins for unasef for heaven, where siti-siti nor go for fit chop dem and dem nor go rust and tif nor go fit enter tif dem," 
Matthew6:21 bikos, where una propaty dey, na der una heart go dey too." 
Matthew6:22 “Na eye bi di lite for pesin body. If pesin eye dey okay, lite go full en body." 
Matthew6:23 But if pesin eye blind, den darkness go full en body. If di lite wey dey inside una na darkness, di darkness big well-well!" 
Matthew6:24 “Nobody go fit serve two oga, e go hate one kon love di oda one, or e go serve one with all en heart and nor respet di oda one. Nobody go fit serve God and money for di same time." 
Matthew6:25 “So I tell una, make una nor worry about una life, wetin una go chop or drink and wetin una go wear for body. Life nor big pass food? Abi body nor betta pass klot?" 
Matthew6:26 Make una look di birds wey dey fly for sky, dem nor dey plant or put anytin wey dem gada inside store, but una Papa for heaven dey feed dem. Una nor betta pass dem?" 
Matthew6:27 Who among una wey dey worry go fit add one hour join en life? 
Matthew6:28 “Why una dey worry about klot wey una go wear? Make una tink how flower dey grow for field; dem nor dey work or make klot wey dem dey wear. 
Matthew6:29 I tell una true word, even Solomon, upon all di money wey e get, e nor wear klot wey fine rish di ones wey dis flower dem dey wear!" 
Matthew6:30 If God make grass fine like dis, grass wey una go si today and tumoro dem go trow am for fire, E nor go dress una pass dem? Una faith small well-well o-o." 
Matthew6:31 So make una nor worry kon dey sey, ‘Wetin wi go chop, drink or wear?’" 
Matthew6:32 Na dis kind tins pipol wey nor know God dey porshu and una Papa for heaven know sey una nid dem. 
Matthew6:33 But make una first do di good tins wey God wont and evry oda tin go bi una own. 
Matthew6:34 So make una nor worry about tumoro, bikos tumoro get en own wahala. Today trobol don do.”" 
Matthew7:1 “Make una nor dey judge pipol anyhow, so dat God nor go judge una." 
Matthew7:2 Bikos as una dey judge, na so God go take judge una. And as una dey do to oda pipol, na so dem go do una too." 
Matthew7:3 “Why yu dey si di small dirty wey dey yor broda eye, but yu nor dey si di big wood wey dey for yor own?" 
Matthew7:4 How yu won take tell yor broda sey, ‘Make I remove di dirty wey dey yor eye, wen big wood dey yor own?’" 
Matthew7:5 Yu wey dey pritend, first remove di big wood wey dey yor eye, den yu go fit si di small dirty for yor broda own." 
Matthew7:6 “Make una nor give dog tins wey dey holy or trow yor gold give pig, bikos dem go mash am with dia leg, turn face yu, den kon tear yu to pieces." 
Matthew7:7 “Wen yu ask for sometin, God go gi-am to yu; wen yu look for sometin, yu go si am and wen yu nok, di door go open for yu." 
Matthew7:8 Anybody wey ask for sometin, go get am; anybody wey dey find sometin, go si wetin e dey find and pesin wey nok door, dem go open for am." 
Matthew7:9 “E get any of una wey en pikin ask am for bread and e gi-am stone? 
Matthew7:10 Or if di pikin ask for fish, yu go gi-am snake?" 
Matthew7:11 If yu wey bad fit give yor pikin good tin, yu tink sey God wey dey heaven nor go give betta tin to pipol wey ask am?" 
Matthew7:12 Bikos of dis, make yu trit pipol as yu wont make dem trit yu, bikos na so dem rite am for di Profets and Moses Law." 
Matthew7:13 “Make yu pass di small gate enter, bikos di gate wey pipol go pass go sofa, wide well-well and many pipol dey waka enter." 
Matthew7:14 But di gate wey pipol dey pass enter life, small well-well and e hard to enter and na only few pipol go fit si am.”" 
Matthew7:15 “Make yu shine yor eye, bikos lie-lie profets go kom like sheep, but for inside dia heart, dem bi wiked animal wey dey kill." 
Matthew7:16 Yu go know dem with wetin dem dey do. Pipol nor dey gada grape or fig from shuku-shuku. 
Matthew7:17 So too, evry good tree go bear good fruit, but bad tree, go bear bad fruit." 
Matthew7:18 Good tree nor go fit bear bad fruit and bad tree nor go fit bear good fruit. 
Matthew7:19 Any tree wey nor bear good fruit, dem go kut am down kon trow am inside fire." 
Matthew7:20 So, yu go know di lie-lie profets with wetin dem dey do.”" 
Matthew7:21 “Nor bi evribody wey dey koll God, ‘Oga God, Oga God’, go enter God Kingdom, but na only di pipol wey dey do wetin my Papa for heaven wont." 
Matthew7:22 For dat day wey God go judge evribody, many pipol go sey, ‘Oga God, wi use yor name prish God message, drive many demon komot from pipol body and do many mirakle.’" 
Matthew7:23 Dat time, I go sey, ‘I nor know yu. Make yu komot from where I dey, yu wey wiked well-well.’ ”" 
Matthew7:24 “Pesin wey hear my word and do wetin I tok, e bi like wise man wey build en house on-top rock." 
Matthew7:25 Wen rain fall, wota kon full di groun, den strong breeze kon blow di house, e nor go fall, bikos dem build am on-top rock." 
Matthew7:26 But pesin wey hear my word and e nor do am, e bi like foolish man wey build en house on-top san." 
Matthew7:27 Wen rain fall, wota kon full di groun, den strong breeze kon blow di house, na wons e go fall skata for groun.”" 
Matthew7:28 Afta Jesus don tok all dis tins, di pipol sopraiz for di wey e dey tish," 
Matthew7:29 bikos e tish dem like pesin wey get authority and nor bi as dia law tishas dey do. 
Matthew8:1 Afta Jesus kom down from di mountin, plenty pipol kon follow am." 
Matthew8:2 One leper kon meet am, knee down for en front, kon sey, “Oga God, if yu wont, yu go fit heal mi, so dat my body go well.”" 
Matthew8:3 Jesus tosh di man kon sey, “Yes, I wont make yu well!” At wons, di sickness komot from di man body." 
Matthew8:4 Den, Jesus tell am, “Nor tell anybody, but go meet di priest, make e look yu. Afta, go give di ofrin wey Moses kommand to show sey yu don well.”" 
Matthew8:5 Wen Jesus enter Kapanaum, one Roman offisa kon meet am dey beg make e help am." 
Matthew8:6 Di offisa sey, “Oga God, my savant nor well for house, e nor fit get up and body dey pain am well-well.”" 
Matthew8:7 Jesus kon ansa, “I go kom heal am.”" 
Matthew8:8 But di offisa sey, “Oga God, I nor big rish who yu go enter en house, instead just tok and my savant go well." 
Matthew8:9 Misef, I bi man wey get oga and I still get sojas wey dey under mi. If I kommand one sey make e ‘Go’, e go-go, if I kommand anoda one sey make e ‘Kom’, e go kom and if I kommand my savant make e ‘Do dis tin’, e go do am.”" 
Matthew8:10 Wen Jesus hear wetin e tok, e sopraiz, den e tell di pipol wey dey follow am, “I tell una true word, I neva si anybody wey get dis kind faith for Israel!" 
Matthew8:11 Many pipol from east and west go kom follow Abraham, Isaak and Jakob chop inside God Kingdom." 
Matthew8:12 But dem go trow di pipol wey suppose enter di Kingdom for darkness, where dem go dey kry and grind dia tit.”" 
Matthew8:13 Den Jesus tell di offisa, “Go, since yu bilive, na so e go bi for yu.” Na dat same time di savant well." 
Matthew8:14 Wen Jesus enter Pita house, e kon si sey Pita wife mama nor well." 
Matthew8:15 Den e tosh di woman and di fever komot from en body. So, di woman get up kon bigin serve dem." 
Matthew8:16 Wen evening rish, dem karry many pipol wey demon dey inside dem kom meet Jesus. E drive di wiked spirits komot kon heal all di pipol wey nor well." 
Matthew8:17 Dis one make wetin Profet Isaya tok bi true, “E remove awa sickness and karry awa diziz komot.”" 
Matthew8:18 Wen Jesus si plenty pipol gada am, e kon kommand en disciples make dem cross go di oda side for di river." 
Matthew8:19 One law tish kon tell Jesus, “Tisha, I go follow yu go anywhere wey yu dey go.”" 
Matthew8:20 Jesus ansa am, “Rabbit and bird get dia own house, but Man Pikin nor get where e go fit rest en head.”" 
Matthew8:21 Anoda disciple kon sey, “Oga God, make I first go beri my papa.”" 
Matthew8:22 Jesus ansa am, “Follow mi, make doz wey don die beri dia dead body.”" 
Matthew8:23 As Jesus enter di boat, en disciples kon follow am." 
Matthew8:24 At wons, strong breeze kon dey blow for di sea and wave won sink di boat. But Jesus Christ dey sleep." 
Matthew8:25 So en disciples wake am kon sey, “Oga God, save us! Na die wi dey so o-o!”" 
Matthew8:26 Jesus ansa dem, “Una faith small o-o. Wetin make una dey fear?” Den e get up, kommand di breeze and di wave sey, make dem stop and evriwhere kon kwayet at wons." 
Matthew8:27 Di men sopraiz well-well kon dey ask each oda, “Wish kind man bi dis sef? Even breeze and wave dey obey am!”" 
Matthew8:28 Wen Jesus rish di oda side where Gadarenes pipol dey stay, two men wey get demon, run from di beri groun kom meet am. Nobody dey fit pass dat road, bikos di men wiked well-well." 
Matthew8:29 Di demons kon hala, “God Pikin, make yu leave us o-o, abi yu kom sofa us wen time neva rish?”" 
Matthew8:30 For where dem dey, plenty pig dey chop near der." 
Matthew8:31 Den di demons beg Jesus, “If yu drive us komot, make yu send us go enter inside di pigs.”" 
Matthew8:32 So Jesus tell dem, “Make una go!” At wons, dem kon komot enter inside di pigs and all di pigs rush go enter di river kon die." 
Matthew8:33 Di pipol wey dey look di pigs, run go di town kon tell pipol evritin wey happen to di men wey get demons." 
Matthew8:34 Den evribody for di town kon dey find Jesus. Wen dem si am, dem kon beg am make e komot from dia aria." 
Matthew9:1 Jesus enter boat kon cross go en home-town for di oda side. 
Matthew9:2 Some pipol kon bring one man wey nor fit waka kom meet am. Wen Jesus si as dia faith strong rish, e kon tell di man wey nor fit waka, “My pikin, make yu nor fear! God don forgive yu all yor sins.”" 
Matthew9:3 Den some law tishas kon dey tok to demsef sey, “Si as dis man dey shalenge God.”" 
Matthew9:4 Wen Jesus know wetin dem dey tok, e kon ask dem, “Wetin make una dey tink dis kind bad tin for una mind?" 
Matthew9:5 Wish one eazy pass to tok, ‘I forgive yu yor sins’ or ‘Stand up make yu waka?’" 
Matthew9:6 But make una know sey Man Pikin get pawa for dis world to forgive pipol dia sins.” So e kon tell di man wey nor fit waka, “Stand up, karry yor bed, make yu dey go yor house.”" 
Matthew9:7 Den di man stand up kon waka go en house. 
Matthew9:8 Wen di pipol si wetin happen, fear katch dem well-well and dem kon bigin praiz God wey give dis kind pawa to human being." 
Matthew9:9 As Jesus komot from der, e si one man wey na name bi Matiu, wey sidan for where dem for dey pay tax. Jesus kon tell am, “Follow mi.” At wons, di man kon get up follow am." 
Matthew9:10 As Jesus dey chop for Matiu house, many tax kollectors and sinnas follow en and en disciples dey chop too." 
Matthew9:11 Wen di Farisee si wetin dey happen, dem kon bigin ask di disciples, “Wetin make una tisha dey follow tax kollectors and sinnas dey chop?”" 
Matthew9:12 Wen Jesus hear wetin dem dey tok, e kon ansa dem, “Pesin wey well nor nid doctor to cure am, but na who nor well, nid am." 
Matthew9:13 Make una go learn wetin dis word mean: ‘Na mesi I wont, nor bi sakrifice, bikos na sinnas I kom save, nor bi good pipol.’ ”" 
Matthew9:14 John disciples kom meet Jesus kon ask am, “Why e bi sey wi and di Farisee pipol dey fast evritime and yor disciples nor dey fast?”" 
Matthew9:14 John disciples kom meet Jesus kon ask am, “Why e bi sey wi and di Farisee pipol dey fast evritime and yor disciples nor dey fast?”" 
Matthew9:15 Jesus ansa, “Pipol wey kom marriage nor fit mourn if di man wey dey marry dey with dem! Abi e dey happen like dat? But di day go kom wen dem go take di man wey dey marry komot from where dem dey, dat time, dem go fast." 
Matthew9:16 “Nobody dey take new klot pash di whole wey dey for old klot, bikos where dem pash for di old klot go tear more and di whole wey go dey der, go big pass di one wey dey before." 
Matthew9:17 Nobody go pour new wine inside old wine bag, bikos di bag go burst and di wine go pour trowey, den di wine bag go tear. Na dis make dem dey put new wine inside new wine bag, so dat di wine nor go trowey and di wine bag nor go tear.”" 
Matthew9:18 As Jesus dey tok dis tins, one oga kom knee down for en front sey, “My dota just die, make yu kom tosh am and e go wake-up.”" 
Matthew9:19 So Jesus and en disciples kon follow am. 
Matthew9:20 One woman wey blood dey rush komot for en body for twelf years kon kom Jesus back, den e tosh en klot korna." 
Matthew9:21 Bikos di woman don tink am for en mind sey, “If I go fit tosh en klot korna, I go well.”" 
Matthew9:22 Wen Jesus turn round si di woman, e kon tell am, “My pikin, make yu nor worry! Yor faith don make yu well.” From dat time, di woman kon well." 
Matthew9:23 Wen Jesus enter di oga house, e si pipol dey play music and plenty pipol dey make nois for der too." 
Matthew9:24 E kon tell dem, “Make evribody komot, di girl neva die, e just dey sleep.” Den, dem kon bigin laf am." 
Matthew9:25 Afta di pipol don go outside, Jesus go whole di girl for hand and di girl kon stand up!" 
Matthew9:26 Pipol kon bigin tok about wetin happen for evriwhere. 
Matthew9:27 As Jesus komot for der, two blind men kon follow am dey shaut, “David pikin, make yu sorry for us!”" 
Matthew9:28 Wen Jesus don enter di house, di two blind men kom meet am. Den e ask dem, “Una bilive sey I fit make una si?” Dem ansa, “Yes Oga God, yu fit.”" 
Matthew9:29 Den Jesus tosh dia eyes kon sey, “Make e happen to una as una faith strong rish.”" 
Matthew9:30 At wons, dia eyes kon open and dem kon bigin si. Jesus kon warn dem sey, “Make una nor tell anybody wetin happen so.”" 
Matthew9:31 But dem kon go evriwhere, bigin tok about di tin wey Jesus do for dem." 
Matthew9:32 As dem komot, some pipol bring one man wey get demon and e nor fit tok, kom meet Jesus." 
Matthew9:33 Wen Jesus don drive di demon komot, di man kon bigin tok. Di pipol wey gada for di place sopraiz well-well and dem kon sey, “Nobody don si dis kind tin for Israel before.”" 
Matthew9:34 But di Farisee pipol sey, “Na devil pawa Jesus dey use take drive demon komot from pipol body.”" 
Matthew9:35 Jesus waka go all di town and village, dey prish di Good News about God Kingdom for dia sinagog and dey heal difren diziz and pipol wey nor well." 
Matthew9:36 Wen e si how pipol plenty rish, e kon sorry for dem, bikos nobody dey to help dem and dem kon dey waka anyhow like sheep wey nor get who dey look dem." 
Matthew9:37 Den e tell en disciples, “Wetin pipol go harvest plenty well-well, but di pipol wey go do di work nor plenty rish.”" 
Matthew9:38 So, make una pray make di Oga God wey get di farm, send pipol wey go work for en farm, kom."

Matthew10:18 Bikos of mi, dem go drag una go meet rulers and kings, so dat una go tok about mi give dem and Gentile pipol." 
Matthew10:19 Make una nor worry about wetin una go tok wen dem drag una go kourt, bikos God go give una wetin to tok wen dat time rish." 
Matthew10:20 Nor bi una go dey tok, but na una Papa Spirit go dey tok thru una." 
Matthew10:21 “Broda go sell en own broda give pipol make dem kill-am and na so papa go sell en own pikin too. Shidren go fight and kill dia papa and mama. 
Matthew10:22 Evribody go hate una bikos of mi. But anybody wey fit bear rish di end, God go save am." 
Matthew10:23 Anytime dem sofa una for one town bikos of mi, make una run go anoda town. I tell una true word, una nor go run pass all di town for Israel, before Man Pikin go kom back." 
Matthew10:24 “Nobody big pass en tisha and know savant big pass en oga. 
Matthew10:25 E good make disciple bi like en tisha and savant bi like en oga. If dem dey koll oga for en house ‘Belzibub (wey mean demon oga),’ wot of di pipol wey dey di house? Dem nor go koll dem bad name too?”" 
Matthew10:26 “Make una nor fear man, bikos nor-tin wey hide wey nor go kom out and know sekret wey pipol nor go know."

Matthew10:28 Make una nor fear who go fit kill di body and nor fit kill di soul. Instead, make una fear God wey fit distroy pesin soul and body for hell-fire." 
Matthew10:29 Nor bi one penny dem dey sell two sparo bird? But no one go fall rish groun, escept God allow am." 
Matthew10:30 Si! God know how many hair dey for una head. 
Matthew10:31 So, make una nor fear, una betta pass many sparo." 
Matthew10:32 “Anybody wey tok for publik sey en know mi, na so mi too go tok about am give my Papa for heaven." 
Matthew10:33 But anybody wey deny mi for publik, misef go deny am for heaven.”"

Matthew10:36 and pesin worse enemy, go bi en own family pipol."

Matthew10:38 Anybody wey nor karry en cross follow mi, nor go fit bi my disciple." 
Matthew10:39 Pesin wey hold en life tait, go luz am, but anybody wey luz en life bikos of mi, go gain am.”"

Matthew10:42 And anybody wey give kold wota to di pesin wey small pass among my disciples, I tell una true word, e nor go ever luz en reward.”"

Matthew12:1 Dat time, Jesus waka pass one korn farm for Sabat Day. En disciples kon dey plok di korn chop, bikos dem dey hongry." 
Matthew12:2 But wen di Farisee pipol si dem, dem kon tell Jesus, “Si, yor disciples dey break di law for Sabat Day.”" 
Matthew12:3 Jesus ansa, “Una neva read wetin David do wen en and en pipol dey hongry," 
Matthew12:4 how dem enter God house kon chop di holy bread wey ordinary pipol nor suppose chop, bikos na only priests suppose to chop am?" 
Matthew12:5 Or una neva read for Moses Law sey, priests dey work for Sabat Day, but nobody dey sey dem kommit sin?" 
Matthew12:6 I tell una, pesin wey big pass di temple dey here with una naw." 
Matthew12:7 If to sey una know wetin dis tin mean: ‘Na mesi I wont, nor bi sakrifice’, una nor for kondemn pesin wey nor kommit sin." 
Matthew12:8 Man Pikin na-im bi Sabat Day Oga God.” 
Matthew12:9 Den Jesus komot der kon enter dia sinagog. 
Matthew12:10 One man wey en hand die dey der. Some pipol wey dey find as dem go take akuiz Jesus kon ask, “E dey rite to heal for Sabat Day?”" 
Matthew12:11 Jesus ansa, “If any of una get sheep wey fall inside pit for Sabat Day, e nor go-go karry am out?" 
Matthew12:12 Human being betta pass sheep! So, e dey rite to do good for Sabat Day.”" 
Matthew12:13 Den Jesus tell di man, “Stresh yor hand.” So di man stresh en hand and di hand kon strong like di oda one." 
Matthew12:14 But di Farisee pipol kon go plan as dem go take kill Jesus. 
Matthew12:15 Wen Jesus hear sey dem dey plan to kill-am, e kon komot from der. Many pipol follow am and e kon heal all of dem wey nor well." 
Matthew12:16 But e warn dem sey, make dem nor tell anybody who e bi." 
Matthew12:17 Dis make wetin Profet Isaya tok, happen:" 
Matthew12:18 “Na my savant wey I choose bi dis, di One wey I love, wey I dey happy with. I go put my Spirit inside am and e go judge di world." 
Matthew12:19 E nor go kworel or shaut, nobody go hear en vois for publik, e nor go tosh pesin wey weak," 
Matthew12:20 or kwensh di small hope wey pesin get, until dem go stop to opress pipol." 
Matthew12:21 And en name go give hope to Gentile and oda pipol for dis world.” 
Matthew12:22 So dem kon bring one blind man wey get demon and nor fit tok, kom meet Jesus. Jesus heal am and di man kon dey si and tok." 
Matthew12:23 Di pipol sopraiz well-well kon dey ask, “Dis nor bi David pikin wey wi dey wait for?”" 
Matthew12:24 But wen di Farisee pipol hear wetin dem dey tok, dem kon ansa, “Na Belzibub (wey bi demon oga) pawa e dey use take drive demons komot from pipol body.”" 
Matthew12:25 Wen Jesus know wetin dem dey tink for dia mind, e kon sey, “Evry kingdom wey dey fight with ensef go skata and know town or family wey dey fight demsef, go fit stand." 
Matthew12:26 So if Satan dey drive Satan komot, e don divide ensef bi dat, den how en kingdom go fit stand?" 
Matthew12:27 And if na Belzibub pawa I take dey drive demons komot, na wish pawa una shidren dey take drive demon too? Bikos of dis, una shidren go judge una." 
Matthew12:28 But if na God Spirit I take dey drive demons, den God Kingdom don already kom meet una." 
Matthew12:29 “How pesin go fit break enter strong man house kon tif en propaty, unless e first tie di strong man? Den, e go get shance tif wetin dey di house." 
Matthew12:30 “Anybody wey nor dey with mi, dey against mi and anybody wey nor join mi, dey skata my work." 
Matthew12:31 Naim make mi dey tell una sey, ‘God go forgive pipol dia sin and all di bad word wey dem tok, but anybody wey curse or tok bad word against di Holy Spirit, God nor go forgi-am.’" 
Matthew12:32 Anybody wey tok bad against Man Pikin, God go forgi-am. But anybody wey tok bad against di Holy Spirit, God nor go ever forgi-am, weda for dis life or di one wey dey kom.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Good tree dey bear good fruit and bad tree dey bear bad fruit. Na di fruit wey tree bear, naim pipol take dey know di kind tree wey e bi." 
Matthew12:34 Una, snake shidren! How una won take tok good word since una dey wiked? Na wetin full pesin heart, naim en mout dey tok." 
Matthew12:35 As good pesin dey bring good tins from en heart, na so bad pesin dey bring bad tins from en heart too." 
Matthew12:36 I tell una true word, for judgement day, pipol go ansa God for all di yeye word wey dem tok." 
Matthew12:37 Na di word wey yu dey tok, naim go fit free or kondemn yu for God present.”" 
Matthew12:38 Some of dem wey bi law tisha and Farisee pipol kon tell Jesus, “Tisha, wi wont make yu show us sign.”" 
Matthew12:39 Jesus ansa, “Si dis bad and wiked pipol for dis time wey dey ask for sign, I nor go show una any sign, escept Profet Jonah own." 
Matthew12:40 As Jonah dey inside big fish belle for three days and nites, na so Man Pikin go dey for grave for three days and nites too." 
Matthew12:41 For judgement day, Nineveh pipol go kondemn di pipol for dis time, bikos wen Jonah prish give dem, dem turn from sin kom meet God. And naw, somebody wey big pass Jonah dey here with una!" 
Matthew12:42 For judgement day, Sheba kween go kondemn di pipol for dis time, bikos e travel from far place kom hear Solomon wisdom. And naw, somebody wey big pass Solomon dey here with una!”" 
Matthew12:43 “Wen evil spirit don komot from pesin body, e dey pass where wota nor dey, dey find where e go rest, but if e nor si," 
Matthew12:44 e go tell ensef, ‘I go-go back to di house where I from komot.’ Wen e kom back kon si sey di house empty and dem don swip and arrange am," 
Matthew12:45 e go-go bring seven spirit wey wiked pass am, kom. Dem go enter di pesin kon sidan for der, so di pesin kondishon go kon bad pass as e bi before. Na like dis e go happen to evil pipol for dis time.”" 
Matthew12:46 As Jesus still dey tok, en mama and brodas kon stand for outside, bikos dem won si am." 
Matthew12:47 So somebody for der kon tell Jesus, “Si, yor mama and brodas dey outside and dem won tok to yu.”" 
Matthew12:48 Jesus kon ask di pesin, “Who bi my mama and brodas?”" 
Matthew12:49 Den Jesus point to en disciples kon sey, “Na dis pipol bi my mama and brodas." 
Matthew12:50 Pesin wey do wetin my Papa for heaven wont, na dat pesin bi my broda, sista and mama.”" 
Matthew13:1 Dat same day, Jesus komot from di house go sidan for Galilee wotaside." 
Matthew13:2 Many pipol gada round am, so e enter one boat and all di pipol sidan for groun near di wota." 
Matthew13:3 E kon use parabol tish dem many tins: “Si! E get one farmer wey go plant seed for en farm. 
Matthew13:4 As e dey plant, some seed fall for road and bird kon chop dem." 
Matthew13:5 Some fall for san wey get big-big stone. Di one wey fall for san, kwik grow bikos di san nor deep." 
Matthew13:6 So wen sun kom out, e burn dem and bikos dia rut nor deep well, dem kon die." 
Matthew13:7 Some seed fall for shuku-shuku. Dem grow kom out, but di shuku-shuku, shuk dem die." 
Matthew13:8 But some seed fall for betta groun. Dem grow well kon bear oda seeds, some bear rish hundred, some sixty and some thirty." 
Matthew13:9 Anybody wey get ear, make e hear!”" 
Matthew13:10 Den di disciples kom meet Jesus ask am, “Why yu dey tok to dis pipol with parabol?”" 
Matthew13:11 Jesus ansa dem, “God don make una know all di sekret tins about en kingdom, but dis pipol nor know." 
Matthew13:12 Pesin wey get sometin, dem go gi-am more and wetin e get go kon plenty. But pesin wey nor get anytin, even di small one wey e get, dem go take am from am." 
Matthew13:13 Naim make I dey tok with parabol sey: “ ‘Dis pipol get eye, but dem nor dey si, dem get ear, but dem nor dey hear or undastand.’" 
Matthew13:14 Na dis tin make wetin Profet Isaya tok happen, ‘Una go listin well-well, but una nor go undastand. Una go look well-well, but una nor go si anytin," 
Matthew13:15 Dis pipol nor go fit undastand; dem nor won hear anytin, dem klose dia eyes make dem nor for fit si and hear with dia ear. Dia mind don block, so dem nor go fit undastand, but if to sey dem fit turn kom meet mi, I for heal dem.’" 
Matthew13:16 But God go bless una eye, bikos dem dey si well and una ear, bikos dem dey hear word." 
Matthew13:17 I tell una true word, many profets and good-good pipol don wait taya make dem for hear and si wetin una dey si, but dem nor si or hear am." 
Matthew13:18 “So, make una undastand wetin di farmer parabol mean:" 
Matthew13:19 ‘Wen pesin hear God word and e nor undastand am, di devil go kom tif di word wey dem plant for en heart, dis na di seed wey fall for road." 
Matthew13:20 Di seed wey fall for san wey get big-big stone, na pesin wey hear God word kon receive am with joy," 
Matthew13:21 but di seed nor get rut, bikos di word wey e hear, nor strong for en heart, so wen trobol kom, e nor go fit bear-am." 
Matthew13:22 Di seed wey fall for shuku-shuku, na pesin wey hear God word, but wahala, long-trot and to kwik get money for dis world kon shuk di word die for en heart and e nor kon bear fruit." 
Matthew13:23 But di seed wey fall for betta groun, na pesin wey hear and undastand God word. E kom bear fruit wey rish hundred, sixty and thirty.’ ”" 
Matthew13:24 Jesus kon tell en disciples anoda parabol, “God Kingdom bi like wen pesin plant good seed for en land." 
Matthew13:25 But for nite wen evribody dey sleep, di enemy kon go plant grass join dem." 
Matthew13:26 Wen di seeds grow kon dey bear fruit, di grass grow too." 
Matthew13:27 “So di savants tell dia oga sey, ‘Nor bi good seed wi plant for yor farm? Na where di grass from kom?’" 
Matthew13:28 “Di oga ansa, ‘Na enemy plant dem.’ “So en savants sey, ‘Yu wont make wi go rut dem komot?’" 
Matthew13:29 “But di oga tell dem, ‘No, if una go rut di grass komot, una fit make mistake rut some for di good seeds too." 
Matthew13:30 Make di good seeds and di grass grow togeda until harvest. Dat time, I go tell di pipol wey dey harvest sey, “Make una first rut all di grass, tie and burn dem, den gada di good seeds put inside my store.” ’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Jesus kon tell dem anoda parabol: “God Kingdom bi like mustard seed wey one man plant for en farm. 
Matthew13:32 Na di seed small pass but wen e grow, na di plant big pass oda plants for di farm and difren-difren birds kon build dia house for en branches.”" 
Matthew13:33 Jesus still tell dem anoda parabol: “God Kingdom bi like yist wey one woman take bake bread. E mix am with plenty flower and di small yist kon make di bread raiz well-well.” 
Matthew13:34 Jesus tok all dis tins for parabol to di pipol. Evritin wey e tell dem, na parabol e use." 
Matthew13:35 E do am so dat wetin di profet tok, go happen: “I go open my mout tok parabol, I go tok evritin wey bi sekret since God kreate dis world.”" 
Matthew13:36 Den Jesus kon leave di pipol enter inside house. En disciples kon tell am, “Tell us wetin di grass parabol for farm mean.”" 
Matthew13:37 Jesus ansa dem, “Pesin wey plant good seed na God Pikin;" 
Matthew13:38 di farm na di world and di good seed na di kingdom pipol. Di grass na devil shidren 
Matthew13:39 and di enemy wey plant dem, na di devil. Di harvest na di last days and di harvest workers, na di angels for heaven." 
Matthew13:40 “Just as dem gada di grass burn dem for fire, na so e go bi for di last day." 
Matthew13:41 God Pikin go send en angels make dem go remove evritin inside en Kingdom wey dey make pipol sin and break God law. 
Matthew13:42 Dem go trow dem inside fire wey nor dey kwensh, where dem go kry and grind dia tit." 
Matthew13:43 Den, God pipol go shine like sun inside dia Papa Kingdom. Anybody wey get ear, make e hear!" 
Matthew13:44 “God Kingdom bi like gold wey dem beri for field. One pesin wey si am, kon hide am. With happiness, e go sell evritin wey e get buy di land." 
Matthew13:45 “Again, God Kingdom bi like trada wey dey look for betta gold to buy." 
Matthew13:46 Wen e si one gold wey dear well-well, e kon go sell evritin wey e get buy am." 
Matthew13:47 Again, God Kingdom bi like net for sea wey katch difren-difren fish." 
Matthew13:48 Wen di net full, dem drag am komot from di wota kon sidan bigin put di good fish inside difren kontaina and trowey all di bad one." 
Matthew13:49 Na so e go bi for di day wen di world go end. Angels go kom separate evil pipol from di good ones 
Matthew13:50 and dem go trow evil pipol inside hell-fire, where dem go kry and grind dia tit.”" 
Matthew13:51 Jesus ask dem, “Una undastand all dis tins?” Dem kon ansa, “Yes.”" 
Matthew13:52 Den Jesus kom tell dem, “Anybody wey dey tisha di law and e bi disciple for God Kingdom, go bi like pesin wey get house kon bring new and old tins kom out from inside di house.”" 
Matthew13:53 Wen Jesus tok di parabol finish, e kon komot for der." 
Matthew13:54 Den e rish en village kon bigin tish di pipol for dia sinagog. Dem sopraiz well-well kon sey, “Where dis man from get dis kind sense and pawa wey e take dey do mirakle sef?”" 
Matthew13:55 “Nor bi di karpenter pikin bi dis? Nor bi Mary bi en mama? James, Josef, Simon and Judas, nor bi dia broda e bi?" 
Matthew13:55 “Nor bi di karpenter pikin bi dis? Nor bi Mary bi en mama? James, Josef, Simon and Judas, nor bi dia broda e bi?"

Matthew13:57 So dem kon dey vex for am. But Jesus tell dem, “Profet dey get respet for evriwhere, escept for en own village and among en family.”" 
Matthew13:58 So Jesus nor do many mirakle for der, bikos dem nor bilive am."

Matthew14:27 But Jesus tell dem, “Make una heart strong! Na mi, make una nor fear.”"

Matthew16:3 and for morning, una go sey, ‘Rain go fall bikos di sky red and dark.’ Una sabi use di sky know how weda go bi, but una nor fit know di signs about di time wey God tok for en word." 
Matthew16:4 Wiked and evil pipol for dis time dey ask for sign, but dem nor go get any one, escept Jonah sign.” Den Jesus kon waka leave dem." 
Matthew16:5 Wen di disciples cross go di oda side, dem forget to take bread follow body." 
Matthew16:6 Jesus kon tell dem, “Make una guide unasef against di Farisee and Sadusi pipol yist.”"

Matthew16:10 Or di seven bread for di 4,000 men and how many basket una gada afta dem don chop finish too?" 
Matthew16:11 Why una nor undastand sey I nor dey tok to una about bread? But na make una for guide unasef against wetin di Farisee and Sadusi pipol dey tish!” 
Matthew16:12 Den di disciples kon know sey nor bi bikos of bread make am dey warn dem, but na bikos of di tins wey di Farisee and Sadusi pipol dey tish."

Matthew16:19 I go give yu heaven key, so dat anytin wey yor prayer tie for eart, dem go tie am for heaven and anytin wey yor prayer luz for dis eart, dem go luz am for heaven.”"

Matthew17:26 Pita ansa, “Na strenjas dey pay tax.” So Jesus kon tell am, “Den dia own kountry pipol dey free," 
Matthew17:27 but make dem nor for kause trobol, make yu go trow hook for river. Di first fish wey yu go katch, wen yu open en mout, yu go si money for inside, den make yu take di money pay di tax for mi and una.”"
