Matthew18:2 Jesus kon koll one pikin stand for dia front," 
Matthew18:3 den e ansa, “I tell una true word, unless una bi like small pikin, una nor go fit enter God Kingdom!" 
Matthew18:4 Anybody wey bring ensef down like dis small pikin, naim big pass for God Kingdom." 
Matthew18:5 “Anybody wey welkom one pikin like dis one for my name, welkom mi." 
Matthew18:6 But if pesin make one of dis small shidren wey bilive mi kommit sin, e betta make dem tie grindin stone for en neck, make e for sink inside river." 
Matthew18:7 “Wahala dey for dis world, bikos of di sin wey pipol dey kommit! Na true sey trobol must kom, but e go bad for di pesin wey go kause di trobol." 
Matthew18:8 If yor hand or leg dey make yu sin, make yu kut am trowey. E betta make yu enter God Kingdom without hand or leg, dan sey God trow yu inside fire wey nor dey kwensh." 
Matthew18:9 If yor eye dey make yu sin, make yu pul am trowey. E betta make yu enter God Kingdom with one eye, down sey God trow yu enter hell-fire with two eyes.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Make sure sey una nor porshu any of dis small shidren komot. I tell una di trut, dia angels dey my Papa front for heaven evritime." 
Matthew18:11 Bikos Man Pikin kon save pipol wey lost. 
Matthew18:12 “Wetin yu tink? If pesin get hundred sheep and one waka lost, e nor go leave di ninty-nine for di bush go find di one wey lost?" 
Matthew18:13 I tell una true word, wen e si am, e go happy for dat one pass di ninty-nine wey nor lost." 
Matthew18:14 Na like dis too yor Papa for heaven nor wont make any of en shidren lost.” 
Matthew18:15 “If yor broda do yu bad, make yu go tell am wetin e do. If e asept wetin yu tell am, yu don win yor broda back bi dat." 
Matthew18:16 But if e nor asept wetin yu tok, take one or two pipol follow body go meet am, bikos matter wey two or three pipol tok put, naim betta pass." 
Matthew18:17 If e nor asept wetin dem tok, make yu tell di church leaders. If e nor gri listin to wetin di church leaders tok, den make una trit am like sina or tax kollector." 
Matthew18:18 “I tell una true word, anytin wey una take prayer tie for eart, God go tie am for heaven and anytin wey una take prayer luz for eart, God go luz am for heaven." 
Matthew18:19 “Again, I tell una true word, if two of una for dis world gri and pray for anytin, my Papa for heaven go do am for una." 
Matthew18:20 Anywhere two or three pipol gada for my name, I go dey der with dem.”" 
Matthew18:21 Den Pita kon ask Jesus, “Oga God, how many times I go forgive my broda wey do mi bad? Na seven times?”" 
Matthew18:22 Jesus ansa am, “Nor bi only seven times I tell yu, but na four hundred and ninty times!”" 
Matthew18:23 “God Kingdom bi like wen one king wey won know how en savants dey manage en business. 
Matthew18:24 As di king dey shek di akkount, dem kon bring one savant wey dey whole 10,000 koins kom." 
Matthew18:25 Bikos e nor fit pay wetin e whole, di king kon orda make dem sell di man, en wife, en shidren and evritin wey e get, take pay di debt." 
Matthew18:26 “So, di savant fall for di king front dey beg, ‘Oga God, make yu dey patient with mi, I go pay yu evritin.’" 
Matthew18:27 Di king sorry for di savant kon release am sey make e nor pay again. 
Matthew18:28 “Afta, di same savant kon si anoda savant wey dey hold am hundred silva koins. E seize am for troat nearly kill-am kon tell am, ‘Make yu pay mi my money.’" 
Matthew18:29 “Di savant wey e seize for troat kon fall for groun dey beg am, ‘Make yu dey patient with mi, I go pay yu yor money.’" 
Matthew18:30 “But e nor gri. Instead e karry am go put for prison, until e go pay wetin e whole." 
Matthew18:31 Wen di oda savants si wetin happen, dem nor happy at-all, so dem kon go tell di king evritin wey happen." 
Matthew18:32 “So di king koll di first savant kon tell am, ‘Yu wiked savant! I forgive yu di big debt wey yu whole mi, bikos yu beg!" 
Matthew18:33 Wetin make yu nor sorry for anoda savant like yu, just as I sorry for yu?’" 
Matthew18:34 With vexnashon, di king kon give di savant to soja make dem sofa am well-well, until e pay evritin wey e dey whole." 
Matthew18:35 “So, na like dis too my Papa for heaven go do una, if una nor forgive una brodas from una heart.”" 
Matthew19:1 Wen Jesus tok finish, e kon komot from Galilee go Judea aria for di oda side for Jordan River." 
Matthew19:1 Wen Jesus tok finish, e kon komot from Galilee go Judea aria for di oda side for Jordan River." 
Matthew19:2 Plenty pipol follow am and e heal all of dem. 
Matthew19:3 Some Farisee pipol kom test and ask am sey, “E dey rite for man to drive en wife at-all?”" 
Matthew19:4 Jesus ansa, “Yu neva read am from di biginnin sey na man and woman God make" 
Matthew19:5 and bikos of dat, ‘Man go leave en papa and mama go join en wife and di two of dem go kon bi one?’" 
Matthew19:6 Dem nor bi two again, but one. So, wetin God don join togeda, make nobody skata am.”" 
Matthew19:7 Di Farisee pipol ask am again, “Wetin make Moses sey make wi drive awa wife?”" 
Matthew19:8 Jesus ansa, “Moses sey make una drive una wife, bikos una heart dey wiked, but nor bi so God plan am from biginnin." 
Matthew19:9 Naw I tell una, anybody wey drive en wife, wey nor bi sey e sleep with anoda man, but kon marry anoda woman, don kommit adultery.”" 
Matthew19:10 Di disciples kon tell Jesus, “If na so husband and wife matter bi, e betta make pesin nor marry at-all?”" 
Matthew19:11 Jesus ansa dem, “Nor bi evribody go fit asept dis word, but na only di pipol wey God give di pawa." 
Matthew19:12 Many men nor fit sleep with woman, bikos na so dem born dem, some na human being do dem like dat, but odas na bikos of God Kingdom. Anybody wey fit asept wetin I tok, make e take am like dat.”" 
Matthew19:13 Some pipol bring shidren kon meet Jesus make e put hand for dia head pray for dem. But di disciples kon bigin kworel with di pipol wey bring di shidren. 
Matthew19:14 But Jesus tell di disciples, “Make una leave di small shidren make dem kom meet mi, nor stop dem, bikos na dem get God Kingdom.”" 
Matthew19:15 So e put en hand for dia head, bless dem, den e waka komot der." 
Matthew19:16 One man kom meet Jesus, ask am, “Tisha, wish good tin I go do make I for fit enter God Kingdom?”" 
Matthew19:17 Jesus ansa am, “Why yu dey ask mi about wetin good? Na only God good. So if yu wont enter heaven, make yu keep God kommandments.”" 
Matthew19:18 Di man kon ask, “Wish one for di kommandment?” Jesus ansa, “Make yu nor kill, nor sleep with pesin wey nor bi yor wife, nor tif, nor tok wetin yor eye nor si," 
Matthew19:19 respet yor papa and mama and make yu love yor neighbour as yu love yorsef.” 
Matthew19:20 Di yong man ansa, “I dey obey all dis law with my heart. Wetin still remain wey I go do?”" 
Matthew19:21 Jesus tell am, “If yu won dey pafet, go sell evritin wey yu get, den give di money to poor pipol and yu go get betta tins for heaven. Wen yu don do wetin I tok, den make yu kom follow mi.”" 
Matthew19:22 Wen di yong man hear wetin Jesus tok, e vex waka komot, bikos e get money well-well." 
Matthew19:23 Den Jesus tell en disciples, “I tell una true word, e go hard for pesin wey get money well-well to enter God Kingdom!" 
Matthew19:24 Again, I dey tok sey, e go eazy for kamel to pass thru nidol whole, dan for pesin wey get money well-well to enter God Kingdom.”" 
Matthew19:25 Di disciples sopraiz wen dem hear dis tins and dem kon ask, “Den who go fit dey save?”" 
Matthew19:26 Jesus look dem kon ansa, “E nor possibol for human being, but evritin dey possibol with God.”" 
Matthew19:27 Den Pita kon tell Jesus, “Look, wi don leave evritin wey wi get kon follow yu! Wetin dey for us naw?”" 
Matthew19:28 Jesus ansa am, “I tell yu true word, for dat time wen evritin go dey new, Man Pikin go sidan for en throne wey get glory and una wey dey follow mi, go sidan for twelf thrones, dey judge di twelf tribes wey dey Israel." 
Matthew19:29 And anybody wey leave en house, brodas, sistas, papa or mama and land bikos of mi, go get am back hundred times and e go get life wey nor dey end." 
Matthew19:30 So many pipol wey bi first naw, go bi last and doz wey bi last, go bi first.”" 
Matthew20:1 “God Kingdom bi like wen pesin komot for early morning go hire pipol wey go work for en farm. 
Matthew20:2 Afta en and di workers don gri how mush dem go get for dia work, e kon send dem go work for en farm." 
Matthew20:3 “Wen nine oklok rish for morning, e kon si pipol wey nor get work stand for market." 
Matthew20:4 E kon tell dem, ‘Make una go work for my farm, I go pay una well.’" 
Matthew20:5 So dem kon go. Wen e go out around twelf and three oklok for aftanoon, e still tell oda pipol make dem go work for di farm." 
Matthew20:6 Wen five oklok for evening don nearly rish, e si some pipol wey nor get work and e ask dem, ‘Why una nor dey work and today don nearly finish?’" 
Matthew20:7 “Dem ansa am, ‘Na bikos nobody hire us.’ “E kon tell dem, ‘Make una enter my farm go work.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Wen evening rish, di pesin wey get di farm kon tell en managa, ‘Koll di workers make yu pay dem, start from di last pipol wey I hire." 
Matthew20:9 “Pipol wey dem hire for five oklok, kollect full day salari." 
Matthew20:10 And wen di pipol wey dem first hire waka kom, dem tink sey di oga go pay dem pass like dat. But dem get di same amount." 
Matthew20:11 Wen di first pipol kollect dia money, dem bigin komplain to di farm owner," 
Matthew20:12 ‘Dis last pipol work for only one hour and wi work for di whole day inside hot sun, but yu pay all of us di same amount.’" 
Matthew20:13 “Di farm owner ansa one of dem, ‘My friend, I nor do yu bad. Nor bi wetin wi gri, dem pay yu?’" 
Matthew20:14 ‘Make yu take yor money dey go. I like give dis last pipol di same amount wey I give yu. 
Matthew20:15 Abi I nor fit use wetin bi my own as I like? Or yu dey jealous bikos I dey do good tin?’ 
Matthew20:16 “So, di pesin wey bi last, go bi first and di first, go bi last.”" 
Matthew20:17 As Jesus dey go Jerusalem, e take en twelf disciples go one korna kon tok to dem." 
Matthew20:18 “Make una look, wi dey go Jerusalem and dem go sell Man Pikin give di priest oga dem and di law tishas. Dem go sey make dem kill-am" 
Matthew20:19 and dem go gi-am to Gentile pipol make dem laf and flog am well-well, den dem go nail am for cross. But for di third day, God go wake am up.”" 
Matthew20:20 Den Zebedee wife with en shidren, James and John kom meet Jesus. Dia mama kon knee down dey beg Jesus." 
Matthew20:20 Den Zebedee wife with en shidren, James and John kom meet Jesus. Dia mama kon knee down dey beg Jesus." 
Matthew20:20 Den Zebedee wife with en shidren, James and John kom meet Jesus. Dia mama kon knee down dey beg Jesus." 
Matthew20:21 Jesus kon ask am, “Wetin yu wont?” Di woman ansa, “Make yu allow dis my two boys sidan for yor kingdom, one for yor rite side and di oda for yor left.”" 
Matthew20:22 Jesus ask dem again, “Una know wetin una dey ask for so? Una go fit drink from di cup wey I won drink from?” Dem ansa, “Yes! Wi go fit.”" 
Matthew20:23 Jesus kon tell dem, “Na true sey una go fit drink from my cup, but e nor dey my hand to choose who go sidan for my rite and left, but na for doz wey my Papa choose.”" 
Matthew20:24 So wen di oda ten disciples hear dis matter, dem kon dey vex with di two brodas." 
Matthew20:25 But Jesus koll and tell dem, “Una know sey Gentile pipol oga and pipol for big pozishon dey kontrol and opress dia pipol." 
Matthew20:26 Make e nor bi like dat among una! Instead, anybody wey won bi oga among una, must serve di rest pipol" 
Matthew20:27 and anybody wey wont bi first among una, must bi savant to di odas," 
Matthew20:28 just as Man Pikin nor kom make pipol serve am, but make e for serve and give en life to save many pipol.”" 
Matthew20:29 As Jesus and en disciples dey komot from Jeriko, many pipol kon dey follow dem." 
Matthew20:30 Two men wey blind sidan for di road korna. Wen dem hear sey Jesus dey pass, dem kon bigin shaut, “David Pikin, make yu sorry for us!”" 
Matthew20:31 Pipol kon dey shaut for dem make dem kwayet. But dem kon dey shaut more-more, “David Pikin, make yu sorry for us.”" 
Matthew20:32 Jesus kon stop, koll and ask dem, “Wetin una wont make I do for una?”" 
Matthew20:33 Dem ansa, “Oga God, make awa eye open again.”" 
Matthew20:34 Jesus sorry for dem, so e tosh dia eye. At wons, dem bigin si and dem kon follow Jesus." 
Matthew21:1 As Jesus and en disciples near Jerusalem, dem kom rish Betpage for Mount Olives, so Jesus send two disciples" 
Matthew21:2 kon tell dem, “Make una go di village wey dey una front. Una go si one donkey and en pikin wey dem tie for der. Make una luz and bring dem kom meet mi." 
Matthew21:3 If anybody ask, ‘Why una dey luz di donkey dem?’ Make una ansa, ‘Di oga nid dem and e go bring dem kom back naw-naw.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Dis tin happen so dat wetin di profet tok, go bi true:" 
Matthew21:5 “Tell Zion pipol, ‘Si! Una king dey kom meet una, e honbol ensef kon sidan on-top donkey.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Di disciples kon go do as Jesus tell dem. 
Matthew21:7 Dem bring di donkey kon put dia klot make Jesus for sidan on-top. 
Matthew21:8 Many pipol spread dia klot for road. Odas kut palm leaf kon spread dem for road too. 
Matthew21:9 Pipol wey dey go for Jesus front and dem wey dey follow am for back kon dey shaut, “Praiz David Pikin! Di pesin wey kom with God name, God go bless am! Make wi praiz God wey dey heaven!”" 
Matthew21:10 As Jesus enter Jerusalem, di town skata and pipol kon dey ask, “Who bi dis?”" 
Matthew21:11 Pipol wey dey follow Jesus kon sey, “Dis na Jesus, di profet from Nazaret wey dey Galilee.”" 
Matthew21:12 Den Jesus enter di temple aria kon drive all di pipol wey dey buy and sell inside di temple, e skata di tabol and chair wey di pipol dey take shange money and sell dove." 
Matthew21:13 Jesus kon tell dem, “God word sey, ‘Dem go koll my house, “Prayer House” ’, but una don turn am to where tif dey hide put!”" 
Matthew21:14 Jesus heal pipol wey blind and doz wey nor fit waka inside di temple yard. 
Matthew21:15 But wen di priest oga dem and di law tishas si di wonderful tins wey Jesus dey do and hear shidren dey shaut, “Praiz, David Pikin” for inside di temple, dem kon dey vex." 
Matthew21:16 So di priest oga dem and di tishas kon ask Jesus, “Yu dey hear wetin dem dey tok?” Jesus ansa dem, “Yes! Una neva read sey, “ ‘Na shidren and small pikin wey dey suck breast go praiz God?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Jesus kon leave dem go Betany kon stay der till day break. 
Matthew21:18 For early morning, as Jesus dey go back to di town, e kon dey hongry." 
Matthew21:19 E si one fig tree for road kon waka go where e dey, but e nor si anytin plok, bikos na only leaf di tree get. So e kon tell di tree, “Yu nor go ever bear fruit again!” At wons, di fig tree kon bigin die." 
Matthew21:20 Wen di disciples si wetin happen, dem sopraiz kon sey, “Wetin make dis fig tree kwik die like dis?”" 
Matthew21:21 Jesus ansa dem, “I tell una true word, if una get faith and una nor dey doubt, una nor go only do wetin happen to dis fig tree, but if una tell dis mountin, ‘Make yu move go inside di sea, e go-go.’" 
Matthew21:22 If una bilive, una go get anytin wey una ask for, wen una pray.”" 
Matthew21:23 Afta Jesus enter di temple, di priest oga dem and di eldas kon ask am wen e dey tish sey, “Na wish pawa yu take dey do all dis tins and who give yu di pawa?”" 
Matthew21:24 Jesus ansa dem, “I won ask una one kweshon. If una ansa mi, den misef go tell una wish pawa I take dey do dis tins." 
Matthew21:25 Where John baptizim from kom? Na from heaven or pipol?” Dem kon dey tok about di matter among demsef sey, “If wi sey, ‘Na from heaven,’ E go sey, ‘Den why una nor bilive am?’" 
Matthew21:25 Where John baptizim from kom? Na from heaven or pipol?” Dem kon dey tok about di matter among demsef sey, “If wi sey, ‘Na from heaven,’ E go sey, ‘Den why una nor bilive am?’" 
Matthew21:26 But if wi sey, ‘Na from pipol,’ wi dey fear di pipol, bikos dem bilive sey na profet John bi.”" 
Matthew21:26 But if wi sey, ‘Na from pipol,’ wi dey fear di pipol, bikos dem bilive sey na profet John bi.”" 
Matthew21:27 So dem ansa Jesus, “Wi nor know.” Jesus kon tell dem, “Misef nor go tell una wish pawa I take dey do all dis tins.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Wetin una tink? One man get two boys. E tell one, ‘My pikin, go work for my farm today.’" 
Matthew21:29 “Di boy ansa, ‘I nor go-go.’ But afta, e shange en mind kon go." 
Matthew21:30 “Di papa kon tell di oda boy di same tin. Dis one kon ansa, ‘I go-go sir,’ but e nor go." 
Matthew21:31 “Wish of di two shidren do wetin dia papa wont?” Dem ansa, “Na di first one.” Jesus kon tell dem, “I tell una true word, tax kollectors and ashawo dem go first una enter God Kingdom!" 
Matthew21:32 John di Baptist kom show una di true road and una nor bilive am. But tax kollectors and ashawo dem bilive am. Even wen una si all dis tins wey I do, una still nor shange una mind kon bilive God.”" 
Matthew21:32 John di Baptist kom show una di true road and una nor bilive am. But tax kollectors and ashawo dem bilive am. Even wen una si all dis tins wey I do, una still nor shange una mind kon bilive God.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Make una hear anoda parabol: One man plant vine for en farm, fence am round, dig pit where dem go for press di fruit wey dem go take make wine and build where sekurity go stay. Den e rent di farm give farmers kon travel go far place." 
Matthew21:34 Wen harvest time rish, e send en savants go meet di farmers make dem gi-am en own share." 
Matthew21:35 “But di farmers seize di savants, beat one, kill one and stone di oda one." 
Matthew21:36 Den di man kon send some oda savants wey plenty pass di first ones go meet di farmers and dem do di same tin to dem. 
Matthew21:37 At last, e send en own pikin go, dey tink sey, ‘May bi dem go respet my pikin.’" 
Matthew21:38 “But wen di farmers si di boy, dem kon tell each oda, ‘Di landlord pikin wey go inherit en papa propaty afta e don die, na-im dey kom so. Make wi kill-am and kollect wetin go bi en own.’" 
Matthew21:39 So dem seize am, trow am komot from di farm kon kill-am." 
Matthew21:40 “Wen di man wey get di farm go kom, ‘Wetin una tink sey e go do doz farmers?’ ”" 
Matthew21:41 Dem ansa Jesus, “E go distroy doz evil pipol! Den e go hire di farm give oda farmers wey go gi-am wetin bi en own, wen harvest time rish.”" 
Matthew21:42 Jesus kon tell dem, “Una neva read God word wey sey: “ ‘Di stone wey di builders rijet don bikom di pila? Dis na God work and e dey wonderful for awa eye.’" 
Matthew21:43 “Na dis make mi tell una sey, ‘Dem go take God Kingdom from una and dem go gi-am to pipol wey go bear di kind fruit wey E wont.’" 
Matthew21:44 Di pesin wey fall for dis stone go skata and di pesin wey dis stone go fall on-top, go grind to powder." 
Matthew21:45 “Wen di priest oga dem and di Farisee pipol hear Jesus parabols, dem kon know sey e dey tok about dem." 
Matthew21:46 So dem kon dey try to arrest Jesus, but dem dey fear, bikos di pipol bilive sey na profet e bi.”" 
Matthew22:1 Jesus kon tok to dem again for parabol sey: 
Matthew22:2 “God Kingdom bi like wen one king do marriage for en son. 
Matthew22:3 E send en savant go koll di pipol wey dem invite kom di party, but dem nor gri kom." 
Matthew22:4 “Den e send oda savants sey, ‘Make una go tell di pipol wey wi invite sey, “Si! Di party go soon start. I don kill big melu and oda animals and evritin don ready, so make una kom for di marriage.” ’" 
Matthew22:5 “But di pipol nor gri listin to wetin di savants tok, instead one go en farm and di oda kon go do en business." 
Matthew22:6 Di oda one seize di savants, beat dem anyhow and kill some." 
Matthew22:7 Di king vex well-well kon send en sojas make dem go kill di pipol wey kill en savants and make dem burn evritin for dia town. 
Matthew22:8 “Den e kon tell en savants. ‘Di marriage don start,’ di pipol wey I invite before, nor bi di pipol wey suppose kom." 
Matthew22:9 So make una go di strits and invite evribody wey una si kom di party. 
Matthew22:10 So di savants go di strits kon gada all di pipol wey dem si, both bad and good, kom di marriage and di hall kon full." 
Matthew22:11 “Wen di king si di pipol wey kom di party, e kon si one man wey nor wear marriage klot." 
Matthew22:12 So di king ask am, ‘My friend, how yu take enter here wen yu nor wear marriage klot?’ But di man nor fit ansa am." 
Matthew22:13 “Den di king tell en savants, ‘Make una tie en hand and leg trow am outside for darkness, where e go kry and grind en tit.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Na only few pipol God choose from di many wey e koll.” 
Matthew22:15 Den di Farisee pipol komot go plan how dem go take katch Jesus with wetin e go tok. 
Matthew22:16 So dem kon send dia disciples, with some pipol wey dey support Herod, go meet Jesus sey, “Tisha, wi know sey yu dey tok trut well-well and yu dey tish wetin God wont. Yu nor dey favor anybody, bikos yu nor dey play wayo." 
Matthew22:17 Wetin yu tink? E good make wi pay tax give Caesar?” 
Matthew22:18 But Jesus know dia wiked plan, so e kon tell dem, “Una wey dey pritend! Why una one set trap for mi?" 
Matthew22:19 Make una show mi di money wey una dey take pay tax.” So dem bring di money kom. 
Matthew22:20 Jesus ask dem, “Wish pesin face and name dem stamp put for di money?”" 
Matthew22:21 Dem ansa, “Na Caesar own.” Jesus kon tell dem, “Den, make una give Caesar wetin bi Caesar own and give God, wetin bi God own.”" 
Matthew22:22 So wen dem hear wetin e tok, dem kon waka leave am." 
Matthew22:23 For di same day, di Sadusi pipol (wey bilive sey resureshon nor dey), kom meet and ask Jesus," 
Matthew22:24 “Tisha, Moses tok sey, ‘If man wey nor get pikin die, en broda must marry en wife, so dat e go fit born pikin for en broda wey don die.’" 
Matthew22:25 Yu si, e get seven brodas wey dey stay here with us. Di first one marry, leta e kon die, since e nor get pikin, en broda kon marry en wife." 
Matthew22:26 Di same tin happen to di sekond broda and di third one, go rish di nomba seven." 
Matthew22:27 At last, di woman kon die too." 
Matthew22:28 Wen pipol wey don die go kom back to life, wish pesin wife di woman go bi out of di seven brodas wey marry am?”" 
Matthew22:29 Jesus ansa dem, “Una dey make mistake, bikos una nor know God word and en pawa." 
Matthew22:30 For resureshon day, pipol nor dey marry or give woman out for marriage, bikos dem go bi like angel for heaven." 
Matthew22:31 Koncerning weda pesin wey don die go kom back to life, una neva read wetin God tell una?" 
Matthew22:32 God sey, ‘I bi Abraham, Isaak and Jakob God. I nor bi God for pipol wey don die, but I bi God for pipol wey dey alive!’ ”" 
Matthew22:33 Wen di pipol hear as Jesus dey tok, dem sopraiz for wetin e dey tish." 
Matthew22:34 Wen di Farisee pipol hear sey Jesus don make di Sadusi pipol kwayet, dem kon gada." 
Matthew22:35 One of dem wey bi law tish kon ask Jesus one kweshon to take try am. 
Matthew22:36 “Tisha, wish kommandment big pass?”" 
Matthew22:37 Jesus ansa, “Make pesin love God with all en heart, with all en soul and with all en mind." 
Matthew22:38 Na dis bi di first kommandment and naim big pass. 
Matthew22:39 Di sekond one bi like di first one: ‘Make pesin love en neighbour as e love ensef.’ 
Matthew22:40 Na dis two kommandments, Moses Law and wetin di profets tish, dey follow.”" 
Matthew22:41 As di Farisee pipol gada, Jesus kon ask dem one kweshon." 
Matthew22:42 “Wetin una tink about Christ, wey bi di Mezaya? Wish pesin pikin e bi?” Dem kon ansa, “Na David Pikin.”" 
Matthew22:43 Jesus ask dem again, “Den, how kom David koll am, ‘Oga God’, thru God Spirit, wen e sey," 
Matthew22:44 “Di OGA tell my Oga God sey, ‘Sidan for my rite hand, until I go put all yor enemies under yor leg.’" 
Matthew22:45 If David koll am, ‘Oga God,’ den, how e kom take bi David pikin?”" 
Matthew22:46 So nobody fit ansa Jesus and from dat day go, nobody try to ask am kweshon again." 
Matthew23:1 Jesus kon tell di pipol and en disciples sey," 
Matthew23:2 “Na di law tishas and Farisee pipol dey tok wetin Moses Law mean. 
Matthew23:3 So make una listin and do wetin dem dey tell una. But nor do wetin dem dey do, bikos dem nor dey do wetin dem dey tish." 
Matthew23:4 Dem dey put heavy load for pipol shoulder and dem nor ready to help dem. 
Matthew23:5 “All wetin dem dey do, na make pipol for si dem. Dem dey tie tins wey dem rite God word put for dia fore head and hand, so dat pipol go si dem." 
Matthew23:6 Dem like betta place for party and betta chair for inside sinagog. 
Matthew23:7 Dem like make pipol dey greet dem with respet for market and make pipol dey koll dem, ‘Tisha.’" 
Matthew23:8 “Nor let anybody koll yu ‘Tisha,’ bikos na only one tisha una get and all of una na brodas." 
Matthew23:9 Make una nor koll anybody for dis world ‘Papa’, bikos na only one real Papa una get and e dey for heaven." 
Matthew23:10 Make yu nor let pipol koll yu ‘Leader’, bikos na only one leader una get and na-im bi Christ." 
Matthew23:11 Di pesin wey big pass among una, go bi una savant." 
Matthew23:12 Anybody wey dey karry body up, God go bring am down and anybody wey nor dey karry body up, God go raiz am up." 
Matthew23:13 “But e go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una klose door make pipol nor for fit enter God Kingdom! Unasef nor won enter and una nor won make odas enter." 
Matthew23:14 E go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una dey use long prayer shit wimen wey dia husband don die, bikos of dis, God go ponish una well-well.”" 
Matthew23:15 “E go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una dey travel go evriwhere just to win one pesin kon meet God and afta una don win am, una go kon make am bad well-well like devil pikin, pass as una bi!" 
Matthew23:16 “E go bad for una, leaders wey blind, una sey, ‘Anybody wey take di temple swear, nor-tin go do am. But if e take di gold for Temple swear, curse go dey for en head.’" 
Matthew23:17 Una bi fool wey blind! Wish one big pass, na di gold or di temple wey make di gold holy?" 
Matthew23:18 Una dey tish sey, ‘Anybody wey take di altar swear, nor-tin go do am, but if pesin take wetin dey for di altar swear, e must do wetin e tok.’" 
Matthew23:19 Una blind o-o! Wish one big pass, na di gift or di altar wey make di gift holy?" 
Matthew23:20 So, anybody wey take di altar swear, na both di altar and evritin wey dey inside, e take swear." 
Matthew23:21 And anybody wey take di temple swear, na both di temple and God wey dey stay inside, e take swear." 
Matthew23:22 Anybody wey take heaven swear, na both God throne and di Pesin wey sidan put, e take swear." 
Matthew23:23 “E go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una dey give one out of evry ten tins wey una get, but una nor dey do di important tin wey di law tok, wey bi to give korrect judgement, to trit pipol well and to do wetin dey good! Una suppose to dey do dis tins join di oda one." 
Matthew23:24 Una wey bi oga wey blind! Una dey remove fly from una drink, but una dey swallow melu!" 
Matthew23:25 “E go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una dey wosh cup and plate body make dem for klean, but bad belle and long-trot full inside una." 
Matthew23:26 Una Farisee pipol wey blind! Make una first wosh inside di cup, den di outside go klean too!" 
Matthew23:27 “E go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una bi like grave wey fine for outside, but di pesin body for inside, don rotin." 
Matthew23:28 Na so e bi with una too, for outside, una bi like good pipol, but for inside, na wayo and sin full una life." 
Matthew23:29 “E go bad for una wey dey tish di law and una Farisee pipol, una wey dey pritend! Una build grave for di profet wey don die kon dekorate koffin for pipol wey fear God." 
Matthew23:30 And una sey, ‘If to sey wi dey alive for awa grand-grand papa time, wi nor for help dem wen dem dey kill di profets.’" 
Matthew23:31 So na una grand-grand papa dem kill di profets. 
Matthew23:32 Make una go finish di work wey una grand-grand papa dem start! 
Matthew23:33 “Una bi snake! Wiked snake shidren! How una go take eskape hell? 
Matthew23:34 I go send profets, wise pipol and law tishas kom meet una and una go kill and nail some for cross, flog some inside una sinagog, den porshu di odas from one town go anoda." 
Matthew23:35 So all God pipol blood wey una kill for dis world, go dey una head. From Abel blood go rish Zekaraya wey bi Barakaya pikin, wey una kill for inside di temple." 
Matthew23:36 I tell una true word, pipol for dis generashon go sofa di ponishment for dis tins wey una do!”" 
Matthew23:37 “O! Jerusalem pipol, O! Jerusalem pipol! Una wey kill di profets and stone di pipol wey God send kom meet una! I don dey try to gada una shidren as fawol dey gada en shidren under am, but una nor let mi do am." 
Matthew23:38 Si, from today go, una go skata and una house go empty." 
Matthew23:39 Make una know sey, una nor go si mi again until una go sey, ‘Make God bless di pesin wey kom with God name!’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 As Jesus dey komot from di temple, en disciples kon show am how di temple building bi." 
Matthew24:2 Jesus kon tell dem, “Una dey si all dis tins? I tell una true word, wen di time rish, one block nor go dey on-top anoda one, bikos di building go skata finish!”" 
Matthew24:3 As Jesus sidan for Mount Olives, en disciples kom meet am for korna ask am, “Make yu tell us wen dis tins go happen? How wi go take know sey di time wen yu go kom, don rish?”" 
Matthew24:4 Jesus ansa dem, “Make una shine una eye, so dat nobody go fit deceive una." 
Matthew24:5 Many pipol go kom with my name dey sey, ‘I bi Christ wey bi di Mezaya’ and dem go deceive many pipol." 
Matthew24:6 Una go dey hear rumor sey war dey happen for difren place. Make una nor fear, bikos e must happen, but di time wey I go kom, neva rish." 
Matthew24:7 One kountry go fight with anoda kountry and one kingdom go fight with anoda kingdom. Honga go dey evriwhere and eartkweke go happen for difren place. 
Matthew24:8 Wen dis tins go dey happen, e go bi like wen belle dey pain woman wey won born.”" 
Matthew24:9 “Dem go karry una wey bi my disciples give pipol wey go sofa and kill una. Bikos of mi, pipol for difren town wey nor know God, go hate una." 
Matthew24:10 Many pipol nor go gri follow mi again and dem go dey lie and hate each oda. 
Matthew24:11 Many wayo profets go kom and dem go deceive many pipol. 
Matthew24:12 Bikos pipol nor go obey God law, di love wey many pipol get for God, nor go strong again." 
Matthew24:13 But God go save di pesin wey go bear go rish end. 
Matthew24:14 Before di world go end, my pipol go prish about God Kingdom go rish evriwhere.”" 
Matthew24:15 “As Profet Daniel tok, ‘Bad tins go happen for di Holy Place, inside di temple’ (Anybody wey hear dis word, make e undastand wetin e mean)." 
Matthew24:16 Pipol for Judea go run go on-top mountin. 
Matthew24:16 Pipol for Judea go run go on-top mountin. 
Matthew24:17 Pesin wey dey on-top roof, make e nor kom down kon take anytin from en house" 
Matthew24:18 and pesin wey dey farm, make e nor go back to en house go take en klot." 
Matthew24:19 For dis time, e go hard well-well for wimen wey get belle and doz wey get small pikin for hand." 
Matthew24:20 Make una pray sey, e nor go bi for Sabat Day or Rainin Sizin naim all dis tins go happen," 
Matthew24:21 bikos for dat time, di sofa wey go dey, go strong pass any sofa wey don happen since wen God kreate di world kom rish naw and dis kind sofa, nor go dey again." 
Matthew24:22 And if God nor reduce di days wen dis tins go happen, evribody go die finish. But bikos of di pipol wey God choose, e go reduce di days." 
Matthew24:23 So if anybody kon tell una sey, ‘Look o-o, Christ dey here or e dey der!’ Make una nor bilive am." 
Matthew24:24 Lie-lie messiahs and profets go kom do big-big mirakles take deceive pipol. If e possibol sef, dem go deceive pipol wey God choose." 
Matthew24:25 Make una remember wetin I dey tell una so, before dem go happen." 
Matthew24:26 “So if anybody tell una sey, ‘Look, Christ dey inside bush,’ make una nor go, or ‘Look, e dey inside house,’ make una nor bilive." 
Matthew24:27 Just as tonda lite dey kom from east go west, na so e go bi wen Man Pikin go kom." 
Matthew24:28 Bikos na where dead body dey, na der vultures dey gada put.”" 
Matthew24:29 “Afta di wahala wey go happen for dat time, “Di sun go kon dark and di moon nor go shine; stars go fall from heaven and heaven go dey shake." 
Matthew24:30 “Den Man Pikin sign go appear for heaven and all di tribes for dis world, go kry. Dem go si God Pikin dey kom from inside di kloud for heaven with pawa and betta glory." 
Matthew24:31 God go send en angels go blow loud trumpet and dem go gada di pipol wey E choose from evriwhere for di world.” 
Matthew24:32 “Make una hear di fig tree parabol: Anytime en branches dey bring leaf kom out, pipol go know sey dry sizin don near." 
Matthew24:33 So wen una si all dis tins dey happen, make una know sey di time don rish and e dey near una door-mot." 
Matthew24:34 I tell una true word, di pipol wey dey di world for dis time, nor go die finish before all dis tins go happen." 
Matthew24:35 Heaven and eart go vanish, but my word go still dey." 
Matthew24:36 “Nobody know dat day or di time, even di angels for heaven nor know am, escept my Papa." 
Matthew24:37 Just like e happen for Noah time, na so Man Pikin go take kom." 
Matthew24:38 For Noah time, before di flood kom, pipol dey chop and drink, dey marry and dey give dia pikin out for marriage, until di day wen Noah enter di ark." 
Matthew24:39 Dem nor know wetin dey happen until wota kom karry dem go. Na like dat e go bi wen Man Pikin go kom. 
Matthew24:40 Dat time, two men go dey for farm; one go vanish leave di oda one." 
Matthew24:41 Two wimen go dey grind korn for engine, one go vanish leave di oda one." 
Matthew24:42 “So, make una shine una eye, bikos una nor know di day wen Christ go kom." 
Matthew24:43 But make una remember sey: If pesin wey get house know di time wen tif go kom for nite, e go ready ensef make di tif nor for enter en house." 
Matthew24:44 So, make una dey ready, bikos Man Pikin go kom for di time wen una nor tink sey e go kom." 
Matthew24:45 “Who bi di savant wey wise and good? Na di pesin wey en oga make leader among di oda savants, so dat e go give dem food for di korrect time." 
Matthew24:46 E go good for dat savant wen en oga go kom back kon si am dey work. 
Matthew24:47 I tell una true word, di oga go sey, ‘Make yu kare for di whole house.’" 
Matthew24:48 But if na wiked savant, e go tell ensef, ‘My oga nor go kwik kom back’," 
Matthew24:49 so e go bigin beat di oda savants and e go dey chop and drink with drunkards. 
Matthew24:50 Wen di oga go kom back for di day wen di savant nor espect and di time wen e nor know," 
Matthew24:51 e go kut di savant to pieces kon trow am put for where pritendas dey, where e go dey kry and grind en tit.”" 
Matthew25:1 “God Kingdom bi like wen ten virgins karry dia lamps go meet man wey won marry wife. 
Matthew25:2 Five get sense and five nor get sense. 
Matthew25:3 Wen di ones wey nor get sense karry dia lamp, dem nor take estra kerosine follow body." 
Matthew25:4 But di ones wey get sense karry estra kerosine. 
Matthew25:5 E kon happen sey di man wey won marry, nor kwik kom, so all di virgins kon sleep." 
Matthew25:6 “For mid-nite, somebody kon shaut, ‘Make una wake-up, di man wey won marry, dey kom o-o! Make una kom meet am.’" 
Matthew25:7 “So all di virgins wake-up, kon inkrease dia lite." 
Matthew25:8 But di ones wey nor get sense kon tell di wise wons sey, ‘Make una give us some kerosine, bikos awa lite won kwensh.’" 
Matthew25:9 “But dem ansa, ‘No! Wetin wi get nor go rish wi share, instead make una go buy for unasef.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Wen dem go buy, di man wey won marry kon kom and di ones wey dey ready kon enter di party with am and dem kon lock di door." 
Matthew25:11 “Afta, di oda virgins kom back dey sey, ‘Oga God, Oga God! Make yu allow us enter.’" 
Matthew25:12 “But e ansa dem, ‘No! I nor know una!’" 
Matthew25:13 “So, make una dey ready, bikos una nor know di day or time wen Christ go kom.”" 
Matthew25:14 “One man wey dey travel kon koll all en savants divide en propaty give dem. 
Matthew25:15 E give one five koins, give anoda one two koins and di last, one koin. E give each savant wetin e go fit use, den e kon travel." 
Matthew25:16 Di savant wey get five koins kwik-kwik go use en money trade kon gain five koins join wetin e get. 
Matthew25:17 Di same way, di savant wey get two koins, gain two estra koins join en own." 
Matthew25:18 But di savant wey get one koin kon go dig hole for outside, hide di money wey en oga gi-am." 
Matthew25:19 “Afta, dia oga kon kom back make e for know how dem use di money wey e give dem." 
Matthew25:20 Di savant wey e give five koins, kon bring anoda five koins join en own, sey, ‘Oga God yu give mi five koins. Si, I don gain five koins join dem.’" 
Matthew25:21 “En oga kon tell am, ‘Yu bi good and wise savant and yu do well! Since yu fit use di small tin wey I give yu, e show sey yu go fit kontrol big-big tins. Make yu kom enjoy with mi!’" 
Matthew25:22 “Di one wey dem give two koins still sey, ‘Oga God yu give mi two koins. Si, I don get two koins join dem.’" 
Matthew25:23 “En oga tell am, ‘Yu bi good and wise savant and yu do well! Since yu fit use di small tin wey I give yu, e show sey yu go fit kontrol big-big tins. Make yu kon enjoy with mi!’" 
Matthew25:24 “Den di savant wey e give one koin kon sey, ‘Oga God, I know sey yu bi wayo man, yu dey harvest wetin yu nor plant and dey pak fruits wey yu nor plok," 
Matthew25:25 so fear katch mi and I kon hide yor money for groun. So oga, make yu take wetin yu give mi.’" 
Matthew25:26 “En oga kon tell am, ‘Yu wiked and lazy savant! Since yu know sey I dey harvest wetin I nor plant and dey pak fruits wey I nor plok," 
Matthew25:27 yu for put my money for bank, so dat wen I kom back, I go kollect my money back with intrest!" 
Matthew25:28 “ ‘Make una take di money from am and gi-am to di savant wey get ten. 
Matthew25:29 Bikos di pesin wey get sometin go get more and wetin e get, go plenty. But di pesin wey nor get, even di small one wey e get, dem go take am from am." 
Matthew25:30 Make una trow dat wiked savant inside darkness for outside, where e go kry and grind en tit.’" 
Matthew25:31 “Wen Man Pikin and en angels go kom with en glory, e go sidan for en king throne." 
Matthew25:32 Evribody for di world go gada for en front and e go separate pipol as shepad dey separate sheep from goat. 
Matthew25:33 E go keep di sheep for en rite hand and di goat for en left. 
Matthew25:34 “Den di king go tell di pipol wey dey en rite hand, ‘Make una kom, una wey my Papa don bless and make una inherit di kingdom wey God prepare for una before di world start." 
Matthew25:35 Wen I dey hongry, una give mi food, wen I dey thirsty, una give mi sometin drink and wen I bi strenja, una let mi enter una house." 
Matthew25:36 I dey naked and una give mi klot wear, wen I nor well, una kare for mi, wen I bin dey prison, una kom visit mi.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Den di raitious pipol go ansa, ‘Oga God, wish time wi si yu hongry and dey thirsty, kon feed and give yu sometin drink?" 
Matthew25:38 Wish time wi si yu as strenja, kon take yu enter awa house, or naked, kon give yu klot wear?" 
Matthew25:39 Wish time wi si yu wen yu nor well or dey for prison kon visit yu?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Den di king go ansa, ‘I tell una true word, just as una do am give di pesin wey small pass among my brodas and sistas, una don do am for mi.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Di king go tell di pipol wey dey en left hand, ‘Make una komot from my side, una wey God don curse! Make una enter hell-fire wey dem prepare for devil and en wiked angels." 
Matthew25:42 Bikos di time wey I dey hongry and thirsty, una nor give mi food and wota drink." 
Matthew25:43 Di time wen I bi strenja, una nor let mi enter una house, wen I dey naked, una nor give mi klot wear, wen I nor well and dey for prison, una nor kom visit mi.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Den, dem go ansa, ‘Oga God, wish time wi si yu dey hongry or won drink and wi nor give yu food or sometin to drink, wish time yu bi strenja or naked or nor well or dey for prison and wi nor give yu wetin yu wont?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Den, di king go ansa dem, ‘I tell una true word, just as una nor do am for di pesin wey small pass among my brodas and sistas, una nor do am for mi.’" 
Matthew25:46 “So wiked pipol go enter ponishment wey nor go end, but raitious pipol go get life wey nor go end too.”" 
Matthew26:1 Wen Jesus tish finish, e kon tell en disciples," 
Matthew26:2 “Make una know sey na two days remain before di Passova go start and dem go give Man Pikin to pipol wey go nail am for cross.” 
Matthew26:3 Di priest oga dem and di eldas kon whole meetin with Kaiafas, di High Priest, for en palis." 
Matthew26:4 Dem kon plan for sekret to arrest Jesus make dem for kill-am. 
Matthew26:5 But dem sey, “Make wi nor do am wen di Feast don start, so dat pipol nor go make trobol.”" 
Matthew26:6 Naw, as Jesus dey Betany for Simon, wey bi leper, house," 
Matthew26:7 one woman bring kontaina wey get oil wey dear well-well kon pour di oil for Jesus head as e sidan for tabol dey chop. 
Matthew26:8 Wen di disciples si wetin happen, dem kon vex well-well, ask di woman, “Why yu dey waste dis oil?" 
Matthew26:9 E for betta sey dem sell am kon give di money to poor pipol!” 
Matthew26:10 Wen Jesus hear wetin dem tok, e kon sey, “Why una dey trobol dis woman? Na betta tin e do for mi o-o!" 
Matthew26:11 Poor pipol dey with una evritime, but mi, I nor go dey with una always!" 
Matthew26:12 Wen di woman pour dis oil for my body, e dey prepare mi for my beri." 
Matthew26:13 I tell una true word, anywhere wey dem go for prish dis gospel, dem go take dis tin wey di woman do so, take remember am for di whole world.”" 
Matthew26:14 Den Judas Iskariot, wey dey among di twelf disciples go meet di priest oga dem," 
Matthew26:15 kon tell dem, “Wetin una go give mi, if I sell Jesus Christ give una?” So dem kon kount thirty silva koins gi-am." 
Matthew26:16 From dat time, Judas kon dey find how e go take sell Jesus Christ." 
Matthew26:17 For di day wen dem start di Feast for di Bread wey nor get yist, di disciples kom meet Jesus Christ tell am, “Tell us where yu for won chop di Passova Food, so dat wi go-go prepare di place.”" 
Matthew26:18 Jesus tell dem, “Make una go inside di town and una go meet one man. Make una tell am, ‘Di tisha sey, “My time don rish. I go chop di Passova Food with my disciples for yor house.” ’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 So di disciples do as Jesus tell dem, den dem kon go prepare di Passova Food." 
Matthew26:20 Wen evening rish, Jesus sidan for di tabol with en twelf disciples." 
Matthew26:21 As dem dey chop, e kon sey, “I tell una true word, one of una go sell mi.”" 
Matthew26:22 Wetin e tok kon worry dem well-well, so dem kon bigin ask am, “Oga God, na mi?”" 
Matthew26:23 Jesus ansa dem, “Di pesin wey go put hand inside plate with mi, na-im go sell mi." 
Matthew26:24 Man Pikin go die as dem rite about am, but curse dey di pesin head wey go sell am! E for betta sey dem nor born di pesin at-all.”" 
Matthew26:25 Den Judas, di pesin wey go sell am, kon sey, “True-true, Oga God, na mi yu dey tok about?” Jesus ansa am, “Yu don tok am.”" 
Matthew26:26 As dem dey chop, Jesus take bread kon tank God, afta e divide am, e give en disciples, kon sey, “Make una chop, dis na my body.”" 
Matthew26:27 Afta, e take di cup kon tank God, den e give dem kon sey, “Make all of una drink from am," 
Matthew26:28 bikos dis na my blood, wey bi di kovenant wey go make God forgive pipol dia sins." 
Matthew26:29 I tell una, from naw go, I nor go drink dis wine until di day wey I go drink di new wine with una for my Papa kingdom.”" 
Matthew26:30 Afta dem sing one hymn, dem komot kon go Mount Olives." 
Matthew26:31 Den Jesus kon tell dem, “Dis nite all of una go run leave mi, bikos God word sey, “ ‘I go kill di shepad and di sheep go skata.’" 
Matthew26:32 But afta God don raiz mi up from deat, I go-go Galilee, go wait for una.”" 
Matthew26:33 Pita kon ansa am, “If odas run leave yu, mi, I nor go ever leave yu!”" 
Matthew26:34 Jesus kon tell am, “I tell yu di trut, for dis nite, before fawol go do ‘Kukuruku’, yu go deny mi three times.”" 
Matthew26:35 Pita still ansa, “Even if I go die, I nor go ever deny yu.” And all di disciples still tok di same tin." 
Matthew26:36 Den Jesus go Getsemani with en disciples kon tell dem, “Make una sidan here bikos I wont cross go di oda side go pray.”" 
Matthew26:37 E take Pita, James and John, wey bi Zebedee two shidren, with am. But bikos of wetin won happen, belle nor sweet am." 
Matthew26:37 E take Pita, James and John, wey bi Zebedee two shidren, with am. But bikos of wetin won happen, belle nor sweet am." 
Matthew26:37 E take Pita, James and John, wey bi Zebedee two shidren, with am. But bikos of wetin won happen, belle nor sweet am." 
Matthew26:38 Den e tell dem, “My heart heavy and e bi like sey I won die. Make una stay here and make una nor sleep.”" 
Matthew26:39 E waka go front small kon liedan face groun, den e kon pray, “My Papa, if yu wont, yu go fit remove dis deat from mi! But nor bi as I wont, na as yu wont am.”" 
Matthew26:40 Wen Jesus kom back, e kon si sey all en disciples dey sleep. Den e ask Pita, “So yu nor fit stay make yu nor sleep for one hour?" 
Matthew26:41 Open yor eye make yu pray, so dat yu nor go fall inside temptashon. Yor spirit won do am, but yor flesh dey weak.”" 
Matthew26:42 Jesus kon go pray for di sekond time, “My Papa, if yu nor won take dis deat komot unless I die, den make wetin yu wont happen.”" 
Matthew26:43 E kom back kon si en disciples dey sleep again; dem nor fit open dia eyes. 
Matthew26:44 So e leave dem, go pray di same way for di third time." 
Matthew26:45 Den e kon meet di disciples ask dem, “Una still dey sleep and rest? Si, di time don dey rish wen dem go sell Man Pikin give sinnas." 
Matthew26:46 Make una stand up, make wi dey go. Si! Di pesin wey won sell mi, don dey kom!”" 
Matthew26:47 As Jesus still dey tok, Judas wey bi one of di disciples, kon kom. Plenty pipol wey di priest oga and eldas send, karry gun and big stik dey follow Judas for back." 
Matthew26:48 (Naw, di pesin wey sell am, don give dem sign sey, “Di pesin wey I go kiss, naim bi di man. Make una arrest am!”)" 
Matthew26:49 At wons, Judas go meet Jesus, greet am kon sey, “Tisha”, den e kiss am." 
Matthew26:50 Jesus tell am, “My friend, do wetin make yu kom.” Den dem whole Jesus kon arrest am." 
Matthew26:51 But one of di disciples wey dey with Jesus draw en swod kom out, kon kut di High Priest slave ear komot." 
Matthew26:52 Den Jesus tell am, “Put yor swod for where e dey before! Bikos anybody wey dey karry swod, na swod go kill-am." 
Matthew26:53 Yu tink sey, I nor fit koll my Papa sey make e send many angels kom help mi naw-naw?" 
Matthew26:54 But if I do am, wetin dem rite for God word about dis matter, nor go happen.”" 
Matthew26:55 By dis time, Jesus tell di pipol wey follow Judas kom sey, “Una karry swod and stik kon arrest mi like sey I bi tif? I dey tish inside di temple evriday, but una nor arrest mi.”" 
Matthew26:56 Dis one happen so dat wetin di profets rite for di book go bi true. Den all di disciples kon run leave am. 
Matthew26:57 Naw di pipol wey arrest Jesus take am go meet Kaiafas di High Priest, wey di law tishas and eldas don gada for en house." 
Matthew26:58 But Pita follow dem go rish di High Priest yard. E kon sidan with di guards to si wetin go happen. 
Matthew26:59 Di priest oga dem and di Sanhedrin kon dey find wetin dem go take whole Jesus, make dem for fit kill-am." 
Matthew26:60 But dem nor si anytin to take hold am, even doh many pipol kom lie against am. At last, two pipol kom out" 
Matthew26:61 kon sey, “Dis man sey, ‘I go fit distroy God Temple and build am again for three days’.”" 
Matthew26:62 So, di High Priest kon stand up ask Jesus, “Yu nor get any ansa? Wetin bi dis wey dem dey tok against yu so?”" 
Matthew26:63 But Jesus kwayet. Den di High Priest kon tell am, “I take God name kommand yu to tell us if yu bi Christ, wey bi God Pikin.”" 
Matthew26:64 Jesus ansa am, “Yu don tok am. But I tell yu, from naw go, yu go si Man Pikin sidan for God rite hand dey kom down for kloud from heaven.”" 
Matthew26:65 Den di High Priest tear en klot kon sey, “E don tok against God! Why wi still nid anoda witness? Una don hear as e tok against God!" 
Matthew26:66 Wetin una tink?” Dem kon ansa, “E do bad and e suppose to die.”" 
Matthew26:67 Dem kon spit for en face, beat am and some slap am," 
Matthew26:68 dey sey, “Make yu tell us wetin go happen, yu wey bi Christ! Na who beat yu?”" 
Matthew26:69 As Pita sidan outside for di yard. One girl wey bi savant kon tell am, “Yorsef bin dey with Jesus Christ wey kom from Galilee.”" 
Matthew26:70 But Pita deny am for evribody front kon sey: “I nor know wetin yu dey tok about!” 
Matthew26:71 Wen e komot go outside, anoda girl wey bi savant si am kon tell di pipol wey dey der, “Dis man sef dey with Jesus wey kom from Nazaret.”" 
Matthew26:72 Pita kon swear deny again, “I nor know di man!”" 
Matthew26:73 Afta sometaim, pipol wey stand for der, kom meet Pita tell am, “Yu really bi one of dem, even di way yu dey tok show sey yu dey with am!”" 
Matthew26:74 As e hear dis one, Pita kon dey swear, “I nor know di man!” Dat same time, fawol kon make, “Kukuruku.”" 
Matthew26:75 Den Pita kon remember wetin Jesus tell am, “Before fawol go make ‘Kukuruku’, yu go deny mi three times.” So Pita go outside bigin kry." 
Matthew27:1 For early morning, di priest oga dem and di eldas kon dey plan as dem go take kill Jesus." 
Matthew27:2 Dem tie am kon take am go meet Pilate, wey bi di govnor." 
Matthew27:3 Wen Judas wey sell Jesus si sey dem kondemn am, en mind kon dey judge am for wetin e do, so e riton di thirty silva koins give di priest oga dem and eldas," 
Matthew27:4 kon sey, “I don sin as I sell dis innocent man make dem kill-am!” But dem sey, “How dat one take koncern us? Na yor business bi dat.”" 
Matthew27:5 So Judas kon trow di silva koins inside di temple, den e komot go hang ensef." 
Matthew27:6 Di priest oga dem take di money kon sey, “Moses Law sey make dem nor put blood money for di temple pus.”" 
Matthew27:7 Afta dem don tok di matter, dem kon take di money buy one land wey di name bi “Potta Field” and na strenjas dem dey beri for der." 
Matthew27:8 Na bikos of dis make dem dey koll di land “Blood Field” kon rish today. 
Matthew27:9 So wetin profet Jeremaya tok kon happen: “Dem take thirty silva koins, di money wey Israel pipol don gri to take sell Jesus," 
Matthew27:10 den dem use di money take buy, ‘Di Potta Field’, just as God tell mi.”" 
Matthew27:11 As Jesus stand for di govnor front, di govnor kon ask am, “Na yu bi di Jew pipol king?” Jesus ansa, “Na as yu tok!”" 
Matthew27:12 Wen di priest oga dem and di eldas dey akuiz Jesus, e nor ansa dem." 
Matthew27:13 Den Pilate tell Jesus, “Yu nor hear all di tins wey dem dey tok sey yu do?”" 
Matthew27:14 But Jesus nor ansa and di govnor kon sopraiz well-well. 
Matthew27:15 For Passova Feast, di govnor dey always release one prisona give di pipol." 
Matthew27:16 Dat time, e get one wiked prisona and en name na (Jesus) Barabas." 
Matthew27:17 So, wen dem don gada, Pilate ask dem, “Who una wont make I release give una? (Jesus) Barabas or Jesus Christ?”" 
Matthew27:18 (Bikos Pilate know sey na jealousy make dem bring Jesus Christ kom meet am.) 
Matthew27:19 As Pilate sidan for di judgement seat, en wife send message go meet am sey, “Nor put hand for dat innocent man matter, bikos last nite, I dream bad dream about am.”" 
Matthew27:20 But di priest oga dem and di eldas sey make di pipol ask for Barabas, so dat dem go fit kill Jesus Christ." 
Matthew27:21 Di govnor kon ask dem again, “Wish one for dis two pipol una wont make I release give una?” Dem ansa, “Barabas!”" 
Matthew27:22 So, Pilate kon still ask dem, “Den wetin I go do with Jesus wey dem dey koll Christ?” All of dem kon ansa, “Nail am for cross!”" 
Matthew27:23 Pilate kon ask, “Why? Wish bad tin e do?” But dem kon dey shaut more-more, “Nail am for cross!”" 
Matthew27:24 Wen Pilate si sey di pipol nor gri and trobol won start, e kon take wota wosh en hand for di pipol front dey sey, “Dis man blood nor dey my head. Make only una go kill-am!”" 
Matthew27:25 Di pipol ansa, “Make en blood dey awa head and awa shidren own!”" 
Matthew27:26 Den Pilate release Barabas give dem. Afta dem flog Jesus Christ, Pilate kon gi-am to dem make dem nail am for cross." 
Matthew27:27 Di sojas take Jesus Christ enter di govnor house and all of dem kon gada am. 
Matthew27:28 Dem remove en klot kon wear am klot wey make am bi like king. 
Matthew27:29 Dem take shuku-shuku make crown wear am for en head, put walkin stik for en hand, den knee down for en front kon dey laf am dey sey: “Make una hail Jew pipol king o-o!”" 
Matthew27:30 Dem spit for en body kon take walkin stik nak en head many times. 
Matthew27:31 Wen dem laf am finish, dem remove di king klot wey dem wear am kon wear am en own klot. Den dem take am go nail for cross." 
Matthew27:32 As dem dey go outside, dem si one man from Sirene wey en name na Simon and dem kon force am make e karry Jesus Christ cross." 
Matthew27:33 Wen dem rish one place wey dem dey koll Golgota (wey mean “Skull Place”)," 
Matthew27:34 dem kon give Jesus Christ betta wine make e drink. But wen e taste am, e nor gri drink am." 
Matthew27:35 Wen dem don nail am for cross, dem kon gambol take divide en klot." 
Matthew27:36 Dem sidan der dey look make anybody nor tosh am. 
Matthew27:37 On-top of en head for di cross, dem rite wetin dem take akuiz am: “Dis na Jesus Christ, Jew pipol king.”" 
Matthew27:38 Dem still nail two tif near Jesus Christ for cross, one for en rite and di oda for en left hand." 
Matthew27:39 So di pipol wey dey pass where Jesus Christ dey kon dey laf am and dey shake dia head 
Matthew27:40 dey sey, “Yu wey sey yu go distroy di temple kon build am back for three days, make yu save yorsef! If yu really bi God Pikin, make yu kom down from di cross!”" 
Matthew27:41 Na like dis too, di priest oga dem, di law tishas and di eldas dey laf am sey," 
Matthew27:42 “E save oda pipol, but e nor fit save ensef! If e kom down naw from di cross, wi go bilive sey, na-im bi Israel King!" 
Matthew27:43 Since e trust God, make God kon save am naw, bikos e sey, ‘I bi God Pikin!’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 Di tifs wey dem nail for cross near Jesus Christ, still dey curse am too." 
Matthew27:45 E kon happen sey, from twelf go rish three oklok for aftanoon, darkness kon kover di whole land." 
Matthew27:46 Wen three oklok won rish, Jesus Christ kon shaut, “Eli, Eli, lema Sabaktani?” wey mean, “My God, My God, wetin make yu abandon mi?”" 
Matthew27:47 Some of di pipol wey hear di word kon sey, “Dis Man dey koll Elijah make e kom help am.”" 
Matthew27:48 At wons, one of dem run go bring sponge kon soak am for wine wey don sawa, put am for stik, den kon give Jesus make e drink." 
Matthew27:49 But di remainin pipol sey, “Leave am! Make wi si weda Elijah go kom save am.”" 
Matthew27:50 So Jesus Christ kry again, den e kon die." 
Matthew27:51 At wons, di temple kotton tear from up go rish bottom. Di groun bigin shake and rocks kon skata for evriwhere." 
Matthew27:52 Graves open and God pipol wey don die kom wake-up. 
Matthew27:53 Afta Jesus raiz from grave, God pipol wey don die follow am raiz, den dem kon enter di holy Town with am and many pipol si dem." 
Matthew27:54 Wen di sojas oga and di pipol wey dey guide Jesus Christ si di eartkweke and wetin happen, dem fear well-well kon sey, “True-true dis man na God Pikin.”" 
Matthew27:55 Many wimen wey follow Jesus Christ from Galilee and wey dey help am, dey der too. Dem dey look wetin dey happen for der." 
Matthew27:56 Mary Magdalin, Mary, wey bi James and Josef mama and Zebedee shidren mama, dey der too." 
Matthew27:56 Mary Magdalin, Mary, wey bi James and Josef mama and Zebedee shidren mama, dey der too." 
Matthew27:57 Wen evening rish, Josef, one rish man from Arimatea, wey bi Jesus Christ disciple" 
Matthew27:58 go meet Pilate kon ask am for Jesus Christ body. So Pilate kon sey make dem gi-am di body. 
Matthew27:59 So Josef karry di body kon wrap am with klean white klot. 
Matthew27:60 E put am inside en own new grave wey e dig inside rock. Den e roll one big stone kover di grave mout. 
Matthew27:61 (Mary Magdalin and di oda Mary sidan for di oda side wey face di grave). 
Matthew27:62 Di next day (wey bi Sabat Day) di priest oga dem and di Farisee pipol kon gada for Pilate front 
Matthew27:63 dey sey, “Oga God, wi remember sey wen dat wayo man still dey for dis world, e tok sey, ‘Afta three days, e go wake-up.’" 
Matthew27:64 So make yu give orda make dem guide di grave until di three days go rish. If not, en disciples go-go tif en body kon tell pipol sey, ‘E don wake-up from deat’ and dis go make di last wayo worse pass di first one.”" 
Matthew27:65 So Pilate tell dem, “Make una take plenty sojas go guide di place as una wont.”" 
Matthew27:66 So dem karry sojas go guide di grave and dem kon block di grave mout, so dat Jesus Christ nor go fit kom out." 
Matthew28:1 Wen day break for Sabat Day, wey bi di first day for di week, Mary Magdalin and di oda Mary kon go look di grave." 
Matthew28:2 At wons, strong eartkweke happen, bikos God angel kom down from heaven, roll di stone komot kon sidan on-top am." 
Matthew28:3 En face bi like tonda lite and en klot white like snow. 
Matthew28:4 Di guards kon dey shake and dem bi like pipol wey won die, bikos fear katch dem well-well." 
Matthew28:5 But di angel tell di wimen, “Make una nor fear, I know sey una dey look for Jesus Christ, wey dem nail for cross." 
Matthew28:6 E nor dey here, bikos God don wake am up, just as God promise. Make una kom si di place where e liedan put before." 
Matthew28:7 Den make una kwik-kwik go tell en disciples sey, ‘God don raiz am from deat and e dey go wait for una for Galilee. Una go si am for der.’ Make una remember sey I tell una so!”" 
Matthew28:8 So dem run komot from di grave with fear and dem kon dey happy as dem dey go tell en disciples. 
Matthew28:9 But Jesus Christ meet dem for road kon tell dem, “I greet una o-o!” Dem dress near am, hold en leg kon woship am." 
Matthew28:10 Den Jesus Christ tell dem, “Make una nor fear, but tell my brodas make dem go Galilee and dem go si mi for der.”" 
Matthew28:11 As dem dey go, some for di guards go inside di town go tell di priest oga dem evritin wey happen." 
Matthew28:12 Afta dem don gada and plan with di eldas, dem kon give di sojas plenty money," 
Matthew28:13 kon tell dem sey, “Make una tok sey, ‘Jesus Christ disciples kom tif en body for nite wen wi dey sleep.’" 
Matthew28:14 If di govnor hear about dis matter, wi know wetin to tell am and una nor go enter trobol.”" 
Matthew28:15 So dem take di money kon do as di eldas tell dem. Pipol still dey tok dis story for evriwhere wey Jew pipol dey, kom rish today." 
Matthew28:16 So di eleven disciples kon go Galilee for di mountin wey Jesus Christ tell dem. 
Matthew28:17 Wen dem si am, dem woship am, but some among dem kon dey doubt." 
Matthew28:18 Den Jesus Christ waka near kon tell dem, “God don give mi all di pawa wey dey heaven and eart." 
Matthew28:19 So make una go make pipol my disciples for di whole world, dey baptize dem with di Papa, di Pikin and di Holy Spirit name," 
Matthew28:20 dey tish dem to do evritin wey I tish una. I go always dey with una until di world go end.” 
Mark1:1 Na so di gospel about Jesus Christ, God Pikin take start." 
Mark1:2 As Profet Isaya tok for di book wey e rite, “I dey send my messenja for front, go prepare di way for yu.”" 
Mark1:3 One pesin dey shaut inside wildaness sey, “Make una prepare Oga God way for am, make una make en road strait.”" 
Mark1:4 For inside wildaness, John di Baptist kon bigin prish sey, make pipol leave di bad tins wey dem dey do, make e for baptize dem, so dat God go forgive dem dia sins." 
Mark1:4 For inside wildaness, John di Baptist kon bigin prish sey, make pipol leave di bad tins wey dem dey do, make e for baptize dem, so dat God go forgive dem dia sins." 
Mark1:5 Pipol for Judea and all di aria wey near am and doz wey dey Jerusalem, dey go meet John and e kon baptize dem for Jordan River afta dem konfess dia sins." 
Mark1:5 Pipol for Judea and all di aria wey near am and doz wey dey Jerusalem, dey go meet John and e kon baptize dem for Jordan River afta dem konfess dia sins." 
Mark1:5 Pipol for Judea and all di aria wey near am and doz wey dey Jerusalem, dey go meet John and e kon baptize dem for Jordan River afta dem konfess dia sins." 
Mark1:6 John wear klot wey dem take kamel hair make, tie leda belt for waist and e dey chop lokust and honey for inside bush." 
Mark1:6 John wear klot wey dem take kamel hair make, tie leda belt for waist and e dey chop lokust and honey for inside bush." 
Mark1:7 E kon sey, “Pesin wey big pass mi dey kom for my back and I nor big rish who go luz di rope wey dey en shoe." 
Mark1:8 I dey use wota baptize una, but e go baptize una with di Holy Spirit.”" 
Mark1:9 Dat time, Jesus kom from Nazaret wey dey for Galilee and John kon baptize am for Jordan River." 
Mark1:9 Dat time, Jesus kom from Nazaret wey dey for Galilee and John kon baptize am for Jordan River." 
Mark1:10 As Jesus dey kom out from di wota, heaven open and God Spirit kom down like dove kon land for en head." 
Mark1:11 Den one vois tok from heaven sey, “Yu bi My Pikin wey I love and yu dey make belle sweet Mi well-well.”" 
Mark1:12 At wons, God Spirit kon take am go inside di wildaness." 
Mark1:13 E stay inside di wildaness where Satan tempt am for forty days. E dey der with wiked animals and God angels kon gi-am evritin wey e wont. 
Mark1:14 Afta dem don put John for prison, Jesus kon enter Galilee dey prish di Good News sey," 
Mark1:14 Afta dem don put John for prison, Jesus kon enter Galilee dey prish di Good News sey," 
Mark1:15 “Di time wey God promise sey en kingdom go kom don rish. So make una leave di sins wey una dey do kon bilive di Good News.” 
Mark1:16 As Jesus dey waka for Galilee wotaside, e kon si Simon and en broda Andru wey dey trow net inside river, (bikos dem bi Fisha men.)" 
Mark1:17 Jesus kon tell dem, “Make una follow mi and I go give una pawa to katch pipol.”" 
Mark1:18 At wons, dem leave dia net kon follow Jesus." 
Mark1:19 As dem waka go front small, dem si James and John, wey bi Zebedee shidren inside boat dey ripair dia net." 
Mark1:19 As dem waka go front small, dem si James and John, wey bi Zebedee shidren inside boat dey ripair dia net." 
Mark1:19 As dem waka go front small, dem si James and John, wey bi Zebedee shidren inside boat dey ripair dia net." 
Mark1:20 At wons, Jesus koll dem, so dem leave dia papa, Zebedee, with di men wey dem hire for inside di boat, kon follow Jesus." 
Mark1:21 Jesus with en disciples kon go Kapanaum. Wen Sabat Day rish, Jesus kon enter di sinagog bigin tish." 
Mark1:22 Di pipol sopraiz, bikos e sabi tish pass di law tishas." 
Mark1:23 For inside di sinagog, one man wey evil spirit dey inside en body kon shaut dey sey," 
Mark1:24 “Make yu leave us o-o, Jesus wey kom from Nazaret! Abi, yu don kom distroy us? I know who yu bi. Yu bi God Pikin wey dey holy.”" 
Mark1:25 But Jesus kommand am, “Shut up and kom out from di man!”" 
Mark1:26 Afta di evil spirit don shake di man well-well, e shaut kon kom out from di man body." 
Mark1:27 Evribody sopraiz dey ask each oda, “Wish one bi dis? Dis new tishing strong o-o! Even wiked spirit dey obey en kommand.”" 
Mark1:28 So, di story about wetin Jesus dey do kon spread kwik-kwik for evriwhere for Galilee." 
Mark1:29 As Jesus, James and John komot from di sinagog, dem kon enter Simon and Andru house." 
Mark1:29 As Jesus, James and John komot from di sinagog, dem kon enter Simon and Andru house." 
Mark1:29 As Jesus, James and John komot from di sinagog, dem kon enter Simon and Andru house." 
Mark1:30 Simon wife mama nor well, so dem kon tell Jesus about am." 
Mark1:31 Jesus go meet am, hold en hand and di woman kon stand up. Den di fever komot from en body and e kon dey serve dem." 
Mark1:32 Wen sun don dey go down for evening, dem kon bring all di pipol wey nor well and wey get demon kom meet Jesus." 
Mark1:33 Di whole town kon gada for di door-mot. 
Mark1:34 So, Jesus heal many pipol wey nor well with difren-difren diziz and e drive many demon komot from pipol body. But e nor let di demons tok, bikos dem know who e bi." 
Mark1:35 For early morning wen evriwhere still dark, Jesus leave di house go one kwayet place go pray." 
Mark1:36 Simon and di pipol wey dey with am kon dey find am. 
Mark1:37 Wen dem si am, dem kon sey, “Evribody dey find yu.”" 
Mark1:38 Jesus tell dem, “Make wi go anoda village, so dat I go prish for der too. Bikos na wetin I kom do, bi dat.”" 
Mark1:39 So e kon go evriwhere for Galilee dey prish for dia sinagog and dey drive demon komot from pipol body. 
Mark1:40 One man wey bi leper kom meet Jesus, knee down for en front dey beg am sey, “If yu wont, yu go fit make mi well.”" 
Mark1:41 Jesus sorry for di man, so e tosh am kon sey, “I wont, so make yu well!”" 
Mark1:42 At wons, di leprosy komot from di man body and e kon dey okay." 
Mark1:43 So Jesus warn di man well-well as e dey go sey," 
Mark1:44 “Make yu nor tell anybody about wetin happen so, but go show yorsef to di priest. And make evribody for know sey yu don klean, make yu take di ofrin wey Moses kommand, follow body.”" 
Mark1:45 But as di man dey go, e kon bigin shaut for evriwhere dey spread di story, sotey Jesus nor fit enter any town again, so e kon dey stay where pipol nor dey. But pipol still dey kom meet am from evriwhere." 
Mark2:1 Afta some days, wen Jesus go back to Kapanaum, news spread sey e dey house." 
Mark2:2 Many pipol kon gada and di house full sotey space nor dey to enter or stand near di door. So Jesus kon bigin prish God word give dem. 
Mark2:3 Some pipol kon karry one man wey paralaiz kom. 
Mark2:4 As dem nor si road pass go meet Jesus, bikos pipol plenty der, dem kon remove di zink on-top di house for where Jesus sidan, den dem kon small-small drop di bed wey di man liedan put till e rish groun." 
Mark2:5 Wen Jesus si as dia faith strong rish, e kon tell di man wey paralaiz, “My pikin, I forgive yu all yor sins.”" 
Mark2:6 So some law tishas wey sidan der kon dey tink wetin Jesus tok for dia mind dey sey," 
Mark2:7 “Why dis man dey tok like dis? E dey shalenge God! Who fit forgive sins escept God?” 
Mark2:8 At wons, Jesus know wetin dem dey tink for dia mind, so e kon ask dem, “Why una dey tink like dis?" 
Mark2:9 Wish one eazy pass to tok? ‘I forgive yu yor sins,’ or ‘Get up, karry yor bed make yu waka?’" 
Mark2:10 But make dem for know sey Man Pikin get pawa for dis world to forgive sins, Jesus kon tell di man wey nor fit waka," 
Mark2:11 ‘I tell yu, get up, karry yor bed, make yu go yor house.’ ”" 
Mark2:12 At wons, di man get up, karry en bed travel for dia front. Dem sopraiz well-well kon dey praiz God dey sey, “Wi neva si dis kind tin before!”" 
Mark2:13 Jesus kon go di wotaside again and pipol kom meet am for der, so e kon start to tish dem." 
Mark2:14 As e dey waka for road, e si Levi, Afius pikin, sidan for where dem dey kollect tax. E tell am, “Make yu follow mi.” So Levi get up kon follow Jesus." 
Mark2:15 As Jesus dey chop for Levi house, many tax kollectors and sinnas dey chop with en and en disciples, bikos di pipol wey follow am, plenty." 
Mark2:16 Wen di law tishas and di Farisee pipol si sey e dey chop with sinnas and tax kollectors, dem kon ask en disciples, “Why una oga dey chop with tax kollectors and sinnas?”" 
Mark2:17 Wen Jesus hear dis, e tell dem, “Pipol wey well nor nid doctor, but na doz wey nor well nid am. Nor bi good pipol I kom koll, but na sinnas I kom for.”" 
Mark2:18 Naw, John di Baptist disciples and di Farisee pipol dey fast. So dem kom meet Jesus sey, “Why John disciples and di Farisee pipol dey fast, but yor disciples nor dey fast?”" 
Mark2:18 Naw, John di Baptist disciples and di Farisee pipol dey fast. So dem kom meet Jesus sey, “Why John disciples and di Farisee pipol dey fast, but yor disciples nor dey fast?”" 
Mark2:19 Jesus ansa dem, “Pipol wey kom marriage nor fit fast wen di man wey dey marry dey with dem, abi dem suppose to? So-far di man wey dey marry dey with dem, dem nor nid to fast." 
Mark2:20 But di time dey kom wen dem go take di man wey dey marry from dem, by dat time, dem go fast." 
Mark2:21 “Nobody dey tear new klot take pash old one. If e do like dat, di pash go tear di klot more and di whole go big pass as e bi before." 
Mark2:22 Nobody dey pour new wine inside wine bag wey don old; if not, di new wine go tear di bag, di wine go trowey and di bag go spoil. Instead, na inside new wine bag dem dey pour new wine put.”" 
Mark2:23 Jesus kon dey waka pass di farm where dem plant korn put for Sabat Day and en disciples kon plok some korn as dem dey pass. 
Mark2:24 So di Farisee pipol tell am, “Si, why yor disciples dey break awa law for Sabat Day?”" 
Mark2:25 Jesus ansa dem, “Una neva read wetin David do wen en and en men nor si food chop?" 
Mark2:26 How en and en men enter God house wen Abiatar bi High Priest kon chop di holy bread wey only priests suppose chop?” 
Mark2:27 Jesus tell dem, “God make Sabat Day to help pipol, but nor bi sey make Sabat Day kontrol pipol life." 
Mark2:28 So, na God Pikin bi Sabat Day Oga God.”" 
Mark3:1 Wen Jesus enter di sinagog again, one man wey en hand die, dey der." 
Mark3:2 Di Farisee pipol kon dey look Jesus with korna eye weda e go heal di man for Sabat Day, so dat dem go si wetin dem go take akuiz am." 
Mark3:3 So Jesus tell di man, “Make yu stand for centre make evribody si yu.”" 
Mark3:4 Jesus kon ask, “E good make wi do good or bad tin for Sabat Day? Make wi save or distroy pesin?” But dem nor ansa." 
Mark3:5 So Jesus vex kon look dem round, bikos dia heart strong well-well, den e tell di man, “Stresh yor hand.” So di man stresh en hand and di hand kon well again." 
Mark3:6 Den di Farisee and Herod pipol kon kwik-kwik go outside go plan how dem go take kill Jesus. 
Mark3:7 Den Jesus komot with en disciples go di wotaside and plenty pipol from Galilee follow am. Pipol from Judea," 
Mark3:7 Den Jesus komot with en disciples go di wotaside and plenty pipol from Galilee follow am. Pipol from Judea," 
Mark3:8 Jerusalem, Idumea, some from across Jordan River and around Tyre and Sidon kom meet am wen dem hear about di tins wey e dey do." 
Mark3:9 Bikos of di pipol, Jesus kon tell en disciples make dem prepare one small boat for am, so dat pipol nor go push am anyhow." 
Mark3:10 Jesus heal many pipol, so all di pipol wey nor well kon dey push each oda, so dat dem go fit tosh am." 
Mark3:11 And anytime evil spirit wey dey inside some pipol body si Jesus, dem go fall for en front dey shaut, “Yu bi God Pikin.”" 
Mark3:12 But Jesus warn dem well-well make dem nor let pipol know who e bi. 
Mark3:13 Jesus klimb go on-top mountin kon koll di pipol wey e wont, make dem kom meet am for der." 
Mark3:14 E choose twelf pipol (wey e koll apostles), so dat dem go dey with am and e go fit send dem go prish." 
Mark3:15 E kon give dem pawa to drive demons komot. 
Mark3:16 Na di twelf wey e choose bi dis: Simon wey e koll Pita," 
Mark3:17 James and en broda John, wey bi Zebedee shidren wey Jesus dey koll “Boanerges (wey mean ‘Tonda shidren’).”"
