John7:52 Dem kon ask am, “Abi na Galilee yu too from kom? If yu look well, yu go si sey know profet go fit kom from Galilee.”" 
John7:53 Afta dis, evribody bigin go en house." 
John8:1 Den Jesus waka enter Mount Olives. 
John8:2 For early morning, e enter di temple. Plenty pipol gada for der and e kon sidan dey tish dem." 
John8:3 Di pipol wey sabi di law and di Farisee pipol kon bring one woman wey dem katch sey e sleep with man wey nor bi en husband. Dem kon make am stand for dia front," 
John8:4 den dem tell Jesus, “Tisha, wi katch dis woman wen e dey sleep with one man wey nor bi en husband." 
John8:5 Moses Law sey, ‘Make dem stone dis kind woman die.’ Wetin yu get to tok for dis matter?”" 
John8:6 (Dem ask am dis kweshon to set trap for am, make dem for fit katch am). But Jesus bend down kon take en finger dey rite sometin for groun." 
John8:7 Wen dem kontinue to dey worry am, e kon get up tell dem, “Any of una wey neva kommit sin before, make e bi di first pesin to stone dis woman.”" 
John8:8 E kon bend down again bigin rite for groun. 
John8:9 Wen dem hear wetin e tok, dem kon dey komot for der one-by-one. Na di old pipol first start to komot, till e remain only Jesus and di woman wey stand for en front." 
John8:10 Den Jesus stand up ask am, “Madam, where di pipol wey bring yu? Nobody remain to kondemn yu?”" 
John8:11 Di woman ansa, “Oga God, nobody remain.” Den Jesus tell am, “Mi too nor go kondemn yu. But from naw go, make yu nor sin again.”" 
John8:12 Den Jesus sey, “Na mi bi di lite wey dey di world, anybody wey follow mi, nor go waka for darkness lie-lie, but e go get di lite wey go gi-am life.”" 
John8:13 Di Farisee pipol kon dey argue with am sey, “Yu dey tok about yorsef and wetin yu tok, nor bi true.”" 
John8:14 Jesus ansa dem, “Even if I dey tok about mysef, wetin I dey tok na true, bikos I know where I from kom and where I dey go. But una nor know where I from kom or where I dey go." 
John8:15 Una dey judge pesin with wetin una si with una eye, but I nor dey judge pipol like dat." 
John8:16 But, if I sey pesin do bad, di tins wey I si and tok about, na true, as e bi sey nor bi only mi dey tok am. Na mi and my Papa wey send mi, dey tok am togeda." 
John8:17 God word sey, ‘Wetin two pipol bear witness about, na true.’" 
John8:18 I dey bear witness about mysef and my Papa wey send mi, dey bear witness about mi too.”" 
John8:19 Dem kon bigin kweshon am, “Who bi yor Papa sef?” Jesus ansa dem, “Una nor know mi or my Papa, if to sey una know mi, una for know my Papa too.”" 
John8:20 Jesus dey tok to dem near di box where dem dey put ofrin money, wey dey inside di temple. Nobody fit katch am, bikos en time neva rish." 
John8:21 Den Jesus kon tell dem again, “I dey go and una go look for mi, but una go die inside una sin. Where I dey go, una nor go fit kom der.”" 
John8:22 So di Jew oga dem kon dey ask, “Abi e won go kill ensef? As e dey tok sey, ‘Where I dey go, una nor go fit kom der?’ ”" 
John8:23 Jesus ansa dem, “Na groun una from kom, but mi, na heaven I from kom. Una kom from dis world, but I nor kom from dis world." 
John8:24 Na dis make mi sey una go die inside una sin. Unless una bilive sey, ‘Na mi bi di pesin wey I tok sey I bi’, una go die inside una sin.”" 
John8:25 Den dem ask am, “Who yu bi sef?” Jesus ansa, “Na wetin I tell una from di biginnin." 
John8:26 I get plenty tins to tok about wetin una dey do, but my Papa wey send mi, nor dey lie and na wetin E tell mi I dey tell pipol wey dey dis world.”" 
John8:27 (But dem nor undastand sey e dey tok about en Papa for heaven). 
John8:28 Den Jesus sey, “Wen una don karry mi put for cross, una go know who I bi. I nor just dey do anytin wey I like, but I dey always do wetin my Papa tell mi." 
John8:29 And di Pesin wey send mi dey with mi. E nor dey leave mi, bikos I always dey do di tins wey E wont.”" 
John8:30 As e dey tok, many pipol kon bilive am." 
John8:31 Jesus kon tell di pipol wey kom from Judea wey bilive am, “If una obey wetin I dey tish una, den una go bi my disciples" 
John8:31 Jesus kon tell di pipol wey kom from Judea wey bilive am, “If una obey wetin I dey tish una, den una go bi my disciples" 
John8:32 and una go know di trut and di trut go free una.” 
John8:33 Dem tell am, “All of us na Abraham pikin, wi neva bi slave to anybody before. Why yu dey sey, wi go dey free?”" 
John8:34 Jesus ansa dem, “Na true word I dey tell una, anybody wey dey kommit sin, na sin bi di masta wey dey rule am." 
John8:35 Pesin wey bi slave nor dey stay for inside dat family forever, but pesin wey bi pikin for di family, naim dey stay forever." 
John8:36 So wen Man Pikin free una, una don dey free bi dat." 
John8:37 I know sey una kom from Abraham family, but una won kill mi bikos una nor won hear wetin I dey tok." 
John8:38 Na wetin I si wen I dey with my Papa, naim I dey tell una, so make una dey do di tins wey una hear from my Papa.”" 
John8:39 Dem tell am, “Na Abraham bi awa papa.” Den Jesus ansa dem, “If una bi Abraham pikin, una for dey do di tins wey Abraham do." 
John8:40 But una won kill mi, bikos I tell una di real trut wey I hear from God. Abraham nor do wetin una dey do so o-o." 
John8:41 Una dey do di tins wey una papa do.” Dem kon tell Jesus, “Awa papa nor born us for outside marriage. Na God ensef bi di papa wey wi get.”" 
John8:42 Den Jesus ansa, “If to sey na God bi una Papa, una for like mi, bikos I kom from God and as I dey so, I nor kom do my own tins, bikos na-im send mi." 
John8:43 Na bikos una nor won asept wetin I dey tish, naim make una nor fit undastand wetin I dey tok." 
John8:44 Na devil bi una papa and na di tin wey una papa wont, naim una dey do. E dey kill pipol from di biginnin and e nor dey support wetin good, as e nor get any good tin inside am. Anytime e dey tok, na di lie wey dey inside am, na-im e dey tok, e bi lie-lie pesin, bikos naim bi lie-lie papa." 
John8:45 Na bikos I dey tell una true word, naim make una nor gri bilive mi." 
John8:46 Who among una go fit show sey I kommit sin? Since I dey tell una true word, why una nor won bilive mi?" 
John8:47 Di pesin wey bi God pikin, dey listin and do wetin dem rite for God word. Una nor dey listin and una nor dey do wetin dem rite for God word, bikos una nor bi God Pikin.”" 
John8:48 So di pipol kon sey, “E bi like sey yu bi Samaria pesin and demon dey inside yu.”" 
John8:49 Jesus kon tell dem, “I nor get demon. I dey respet my Papa, but una nor gri respet mi." 
John8:50 I nor wont make una praiz mi, but na God, di One wey dey heaven, na-im wi suppose praiz and E go judge evribody for di korrect way." 
John8:51 I dey tell una true word, if anybody follow wetin I dey tish, e nor go die again.”" 
John8:52 Den di pipol sey, “Eehen! Wi don know naw sey demon dey inside yu. Abraham and di profets don die, but yu dey tell us sey, ‘Anybody wey follow wetin I dey tish nor go die.’" 
John8:53 Yu big pass awa papa Abraham and all di profets wey don die? Who yu tink sey yu bi sef?” 
John8:54 Jesus ansa, “If I dey praiz mysef, my praiz na yeye one. Di pesin wey dey praiz mi na my Papa, wey una dey sey, ‘Na-im bi awa God.’" 
John8:55 Una nor know am, but I know am and if I sey I nor know am, I dey lie like una. I know am and I dey follow wetin e dey tok." 
John8:56 Una papa Abraham happy well-well wen e hear sey I dey kom. E si am and e happy well-well.” 
John8:57 Den di pipol ask am, “Yu neva old rish fifty years and yu sey yu don si Abraham?”" 
John8:58 Jesus ansa dem, “Na true word I dey tell una so, before dem born Abraham, I don already dey!”" 
John8:59 Den, dem kon pick stone won stone am, but Jesus hide kon komot from di temple aria." 
John9:1 Wen Jesus dey waka pass, e kon si one man wey blind from di time wey en mama born am." 
John9:2 En disciples ask am, “Tisha, na wish pesin sin, wey make dis man blind since di time en mama born am? Na di man or na en papa and mama?”" 
John9:3 Jesus ansa dem, “Nor bi di man or en papa and mama sin, but e blind since dem born am, bikos God won use dis one show en pawa with wetin go happen to am." 
John9:4 I must do di work for di Pesin wey send mi before day go dark, bikos nite dey kom wen nobody go fit work." 
John9:5 As far as I dey inside dis world, na mi bi di lite for di world." 
John9:6 “Afta e tok finish, e spit for groun kon take di san-san wey e spit put take rub di blind man eye." 
John9:7 Den e tell am, Make yu go wosh yor face inside di pond wey dem dey koll Siloam (dis name mean ‘Send’).” So di blind man kon go wosh en face as Jesus tell am. As e dey kom back, e kon bigin si." 
John9:8 Den en neighbours and oda pipol wey dey si am dey beg before, kon ask sey, “Dis nor bi di man wey dey sidan dey beg for money?”" 
John9:9 Some pipol ansa, “Na-im o-o!” Odas tok sey, “Nor bi en, but e look like am.” Di man ensef kon sey, “Na mi bi di pesin.”" 
John9:10 Dem ask am, “Wetin happen wey make yu bigin si?”" 
John9:11 E ansa dem, “Na di man wey dem dey koll Jesus take san-san wey e spit put rub my eye. Den e tell mi sey, ‘Make yu go Siloam go wosh yor face.’ Afta I go wosh my face for di pond, I kon bigin si.”" 
John9:12 Naim dem ask am, “Where di man dey?” E ansa dem, “I nor know o-o.”" 
John9:13 Dem take di man wey blind before go meet di Farisee pipol," 
John9:14 (bikos na for Sabat Day Jesus spit for san-san take rub di blind man eye). 
John9:15 Naim di Farisee pipol ask am again, “How yu take bigin si?” E ansa dem, “E take di san-san wey e spit put rub my eye and afta I don wosh my face, I kon bigin si.”" 
John9:16 Some Farisee pipol kon sey, “Nor bi God send dis man, bikos e nor suppose to do any work for Sabat Day.” But odas sey, “How pesin wey dey kommit sin go fit do dis kind mirakle?” Dis argument kon make di pipol divide." 
John9:17 Dem ask di man wey blind before sey, “Wetin yu tink about di man wey make yu dey si?” Di man ansa, “Na profet e bi.”" 
John9:18 Di Jew oga dem nor gri bilive sey, true-true di man blind before, so dem kon koll en papa and mama." 
John9:19 Dem ask dem, “Na una pikin bi dis? Na true sey e blind wen una born am? How e kon take dey si naw?”" 
John9:20 So en papa and mama ansa, “Wi know sey dis na awa pikin and e blind wen wi born am." 
John9:21 But wi nor know how e take bigin si or even who open en eye. Make una ask am, e don big rish to tok for ensef.”" 
John9:22 (En papa and mama tok like dis, bikos dem dey fear di Jew oga dem wey don tok sey, “Anybody wey tok sey na Jesus bi di Christ, dem go drive am komot from di sinagog.”" 
John9:23 Na dis one make en papa and mama sey, “Make dem ask am, bikos e don big rish to tok for ensef).”" 
John9:24 So dem koll di man again kon tell am, “Make yu promise before God sey yu go tok di trut, bikos wi know sey di man na sina.”" 
John9:25 Man ansa dem, “Weda na sina e bi, I nor know! But wetin I know bi sey, before I blind, but naw, I don dey si.”" 
John9:26 So dem ask am again, “Wetin e do? How e take make yu dey si sef?”" 
John9:27 E kon ansa dem, “I don tell una before, but una nor gri. Why una won hear am again? Abi, una won bi en disciples too?”" 
John9:28 Dem shaut for di man kon sey, “Na yu bi en disciple. Wi bi Moses disciples." 
John9:29 Wi know sey God tok to Moses, but wi nor know where dis man from kom.”" 
John9:30 Di man kon sey, “I sopraiz for una o-o. Una nor know where e from kom, but na-im open my eye!" 
John9:31 Wi know sey God nor dey listin to anybody wey dey sin, but if pesin dey do wetin God tok, God go hear en prayer." 
John9:32 Wi neva hear before sey, anybody don fit make pesin wey blind si." 
John9:33 If God nor send dis man, e nor go fit do dis kind tin.”" 
John9:34 Dem kon tell di man, “Na for inside sins born yu, yu tink sey yu go fit tish us anytin?” So dem drive am komot from di place." 
John9:35 Wen Jesus hear sey dem don drive di man komot, e go look for am kon ask am, “Yu bilive who Man Pikin bi?”" 
John9:36 Di man kon sey, “Oga God, tell mi who e bi, make I for fit bilive am?”" 
John9:37 Jesus ansa am, “Na-im dey here dey tok to yu so.”" 
John9:38 Di man kon sey, “Oga God, I bilive.” Den e knee down kon woship Jesus." 
John9:39 Jesus tell am, “I kon judge pipol for di world, so dat di pipol wey nor dey si, go bigin si and doz wey tink sey dem dey si, dia eye go blind.”" 
John9:40 Wen di Farisee pipol wey dey der hear wetin Jesus tok, dem kon ask am, “Yu tink sey wisef blind?”" 
John9:41 Jesus ansa dem, “If una gri sey una blind, God nor go kondemn una bikos of una sin, but as una tok sey una dey si so, una sin dey for una head.”" 
John10:1 “Na true word I dey tell una, pesin wey nor pass door enter di place where dem dey keep sheep, but klimb pass anoda side enter di place, na big tif." 
John10:2 Di pesin wey pass di door enter, na-im bi di shepad wey dey guide di sheep." 
John10:3 Di gateman go open di door for am and en sheep go hear en vois wen e koll dia name and e go lead dem kom out. 
John10:4 Wen e don bring all en sheep kom out, e go-go dia front and di sheep go follow am, bikos dem know en vois." 
John10:5 Dem nor go gri follow strenja, but dem go run from dem, bikos dem nor know di strenja vois.”" 
John10:6 Jesus tell dem dis parabol, but dem nor undastand wetin e tok." 
John10:7 So Jesus kon tell dem again, “I dey tell una true word. Na mi bi di door wey di sheep go must pass enter." 
John10:8 All di pipol wey kom before mi, na big tif dem bi and di sheep nor go gri listin to dem." 
John10:9 Na mi bi di door, anybody wey enter thru mi, God go save am. E go-go inside and out and e go si betta grass chop." 
John10:10 Di tin wey tif dey do, na to tif, kill and distroy pipol, but mi, I kom so dat pipol go get life, di kind life wey full well-well." 
John10:11 “Na mi bi di good shepad. Di good shepad ready to die for di sheep. 
John10:12 Di pesin wey dem hire nor bi di shepad and bikos nor bi en get di sheep, e go run wen e si lion dey kom, so di lion go skata di sheep, kon kill di ones wey e katch." 
John10:13 Bikos di pesin nor kare for di sheep, go run leave dem." 
John10:14 “Na mi bi di good shepad, I know di sheep wey bi my own and dem know mi too." 
John10:15 Bikos my Papa know mi and I know am, naim make mi ready to die for di sheep." 
John10:16 I get oda sheep wey nor dey here. I must gada dem too and dem go listin to my vois, all of dem go dey togeda and na one shepad go lead dem." 
John10:17 Na dis bi di rizin wey make my Papa like mi, bikos I ready to sakrifice my life, so dat I go fit get di life back again." 
John10:18 Nobody go fit take my life from mi, but na mi go put am down by mysef and I get di pawa to take am back again. Dis na wetin God kommand mi to do.”" 
John10:19 Anoda big kworel kon happen between di Jew pipol bikos of wetin Jesus tok. 
John10:20 Many of dem kon dey sey, “Demon dey inside am and en head nor korrect. Why una dey listin to am sef?”" 
John10:21 Odas kon sey, “Di pesin wey get demon nor go fit tok like dis. No demon fit make blind pesin si.”" 
John10:22 Di time for di Dedikashon Feast for Jerusalem kon rish. 
John10:23 Dat na di time wey rain dey fall (and kold dey strong well-well) and Jesus kon dey waka inside di varanda where Solomon for dey take breeze, wey dey inside di temple yard." 
John10:24 Di Jew oga dem gada round Jesus, kon ask am, “How long yu go make us dey wait? If na yu bi di Christ, make yu tell us.”" 
John10:25 Jesus ansa dem, “I don tell una and una nor bilive. Di tin wey I take my Papa name dey do, dey bear witness for mi." 
John10:26 But una nor bilive mi bikos una nor bi my sheep. 
John10:27 My sheep dey hear my vois and I know dem and dem dey follow mi. 
John10:28 I don give dem life wey nor dey end and dem nor go ever die. Nobody go fit take dem komot from my hand. 
John10:29 My Papa wey give dem to mi big pass evribody and nobody go fit take dem komot from my Papa hand," 
John10:30 bikos mi and my Papa, na one.”" 
John10:31 Di Jew oga dem kon pick stone again, won kon stone am." 
John10:32 So Jesus tell dem, “I don do many good tins wey una si from my Papa, wish one make una won stone mi so?”" 
John10:33 Di Jew oga dem ansa, “Wi nor won stone yu bikos of di good tins, but na bikos yu wey bi ordinary pesin, dey make mout sey, yu bi God.”" 
John10:34 Jesus ask dem, “Una law nor tok sey, I sey, ‘Una bi gods?’" 
John10:35 If dem koll di pipol wey God send en word go meet, sey, ‘Dem bi gods’ and God word nor go ever shange," 
John10:36 Why una dey tell di pesin wey God choose for ensef and wey E send kom dis world sey, Yu dey tok against God, bikos I sey, ‘I bi God Pikin?’" 
John10:37 If I nor do di tins wey my Papa send mi, make una nor bilive mi." 
John10:38 But if I dey do dem, even if una nor bilive mi, make una bilive di tins wey I dey do, so dat una go know and undastand sey, I dey inside my Papa and my Papa dey inside mi too.”" 
John10:39 So dem try again to katch am, but e kon waka leave dem." 
John10:40 Jesus go back kon cross Jordan River, where John for baptize pipol and e kon stay for der." 
John10:41 Many pipol kom meet Jesus for di place. Dem bigin dey sey, “Even doh John nor do any mirakle, but evritin wey e tok about Jesus, na true.”" 
John10:42 And many pipol for di place kon bilive Jesus. 
John11:1 E get one man, en name na Lazarus and e nor well. En with Mary and Marta, en sistas kom from Betany." 
John11:2 Na dis Mary pour perfume for Jesus leg, kon klean dem with en hair." 
John11:3 So di sistas kon send message go meet Jesus sey, Oga God, yor friend wey yu love well-well nor well." 
John11:4 Wen Jesus hear di message, e kon sey, “Dis sickness nor go kill Lazarus. E go make God and en pikin get honor.”" 
John11:5 (E klear sey Jesus love Marta, Mary and Lazarus well-well.)" 
John11:6 Afta e hear sey Lazarus nor well, e stay where e dey for anoda two days." 
John11:7 Den e kon tell en disciples, “Make wi go back to Judea.”" 
John11:7 Den e kon tell en disciples, “Make wi go back to Judea.”" 
John11:8 But en disciples ask am, “Tisha, nor bi di place where di Jew pipol won for kill us yu sey make wi go again so?”" 
John11:9 Jesus ansa, “Evriday get twelf hours wey lite dey take shine, so pipol nor dey fear to waka, bikos dem dey si well-well, as e bi sey lite dey." 
John11:10 But pesin wey waka for nite, go fit fall, bikos e nor get lite to si road.”" 
John11:11 Den Jesus tell dem, “Awa friend Lazarus dey sleep, but I won go wake am up.”" 
John11:12 Di disciples sey, “Oga God, if e just dey sleep, den e go wake-up.”" 
John11:13 (Dem tink sey, wetin Jesus mean bi sey, Lazarus just dey sleep, but wetin e mean bi sey, Lazarus don die.)" 
John11:14 So e tell dem sey, “Lazarus don die." 
John11:15 I happy sey I nor dey der, so dat una go get anoda shance to bilive mi. Make una kom make wi go si am.”" 
John11:16 So Tomas, (wey bi Twins) kon tell di oda disciple, “Make wi follow am go, so dat wi go die with am.”" 
John11:17 Wen Jesus rish Betany, dem kon tell am sey e don rish for days wey dem beri Lazarus." 
John11:18 (Betany na about two mile from Jerusalem," 
John11:19 and from der, many Jew pipol kon salot Mary and Marta, bikos of dia broda wey die.)" 
John11:20 So wen Marta hear sey Jesus dey kom, e kon waka go meet am, but Mary sidan for house." 
John11:21 Marta tell Jesus, “Oga God, if to sey yu dey here, my broda nor for die." 
John11:22 But I know sey, God go give yu anytin wey yu ask am.”" 
John11:23 So Jesus tell am, “Yor broda go wake-up again.”" 
John11:24 Den Marta sey, “I know sey e go wake-up again for di resureshon day.”" 
John11:25 Jesus ansa am, “Na mi bi di resureshon and na mi dey give life. Anybody wey bilive mi go get life even if e don die" 
John11:26 and di pesin wey bilive mi for dis life, nor go ever die. Marta, yu bilive wetin I tok so?”" 
John11:27 Marta kon ansa, “Yes! Oga God, I bilive sey yu bi Christ, God Pikin, wey kom dis world.”" 
John11:28 Den Marta go meet Mary, en sista kon tok for en ear sey, “Di tisha dey here and e won si yu.”" 
John11:29 Wen Mary hear wetin e tok, e kon get up go meet Jesus." 
John11:30 Jesus still dey outside di village wen Marta go meet am. 
John11:31 Wen di pipol wey kom salot Mary si as e waka komot kwik-kwik, dem kon tink sey na Lazarus grave e for dey go kry, so dem follow am." 
John11:32 Wen Mary si Jesus, e fall for en front kon sey, “Oga God, if to sey yu dey here, my broda nor for die.”" 
John11:33 Jesus kon si as Mary and di oda pipol dey kry. So e sorry for dem and di tin pain am well-well. 
John11:34 E kon ask dem, “Where una beri am put?” Den dem tell am, “Oga God, kom make wi show yu.”" 
John11:35 Jesus kon kry. 
John11:36 Di pipol wey kom salot dem kon sey, “Jesus love dis man well-well o-o.”" 
John11:37 But some among dem sey, “Dis man wey make blind man si, e nor fit do make Lazarus nor die?”" 
John11:38 Jesus sorry for dem again, den e waka go di grave. (Dis grave na big whole inside rock wey dem take big stone kover)." 
John11:39 Jesus kon sey, “Make una remove di stone.” Marta wey bi Lazarus sista kon sey, “Oga God, by dis time e go don dey smell, bikos e don rish for days wey dem beri am.”" 
John11:40 Jesus tell am, “I nor tell yu before sey, ‘Yu go si God pawa, if yu bilive mi?’ ”" 
John11:41 So, dem kon roll di stone komot from di grave mout. Den Jesus look heaven kon sey, “Papa, I tank Yu sey Yu dey always hear mi and dey do di tins wey I ask from Yu." 
John11:42 I know sey Yu dey always hear mi, but I dey tok like dis, bikos of di pipol wey stand here naw, so dat dem go bilive sey na Yu send mi.”" 
John11:43 Wen e don tok dis finish, e kon shaut, “Lazarus, kom out!”" 
John11:44 Den Lazarus kom out, but di klot wey dem take beri am still kover en body. So, Jesus tell dem, “Make una luz di klot komot for en body, make e dey go.”" 
John11:45 Den many pipol among di Jew pipol wey follow Mary go di grave bilive Jesus, wen dem si wetin happen." 
John11:46 But some among dem go meet di Farisee pipol kon tell dem wetin Jesus do. 
John11:47 Den di priest oga dem and Farisee pipol kon koll di kansol memba dem togeda, ask dem, “Wetin wi go do, since dis man dey do plenty mirakles?" 
John11:48 If wi let am kontinue like dis, evribody go bilive am and di Roman govnor go kom take di place wey wi dey woship and awa kountry.”" 
John11:49 Den won among dem wey en name bi Kaiafas, wey bi di High Priest dat year kon sey, “Una bi fool wey nor undastand wetin dey happen." 
John11:50 Una nor know sey e betta make one man die for evribody, dan sey make evribody for dis kountry die?”" 
John11:51 (Dis man tok like dis, bikos naim bi di High Priest dat year. E tok true sey, Jesus go die for di whole Jew pipol, but e nor know wetin e tok," 
John11:52 and nor bi for only di Jew pipol, but make all God shidren, wey dey di world for gada togeda.)" 
John11:53 So from dat day, dem kon dey plan to kill Jesus." 
John11:54 Bikos of dis, Jesus nor kon dey waka for Judea as e dey do before, but en and en disciples kon go stay for di town wey dem dey koll Efraim, wey near wildaness." 
John11:54 Bikos of dis, Jesus nor kon dey waka for Judea as e dey do before, but en and en disciples kon go stay for di town wey dem dey koll Efraim, wey near wildaness." 
John11:55 Wen Passova Feast don near, many pipol for di kountry go Jerusalem, kon dey make demsef klean for di feast, as dia tradishon tok." 
John11:56 Dem bigin dey look for Jesus kon dey ask each oda inside di temple yard, “Wetin yu tink, e go kom for di feast?” Abi yu nor tink so?" 
John11:57 (By dis time, di priest oga dem and di Farisee pipol don give orda sey, anybody wey know where Jesus dey, make e kon tok, so dat dem go-go katch am)." 
John12:1 Six days before Passova Feast rish, Jesus go Betany, where Lazarus, di pesin wey e wake-up from deat, dey stay." 
John12:2 So dem kon do party for Jesus dat evening. Marta kon dey serve dem food and Lazarus dey among di pipol wey sidan for tabol with Jesus. 
John12:3 Mary take perfume wey dear well-well, wey plenty rish kwota gallon kon pour am for Jesus two leg. Den e use en hair take klean dem. (Di perfume send kon full evriwhere for inside di house)." 
John12:4 But Judas Iskariot, one among Jesus disciple (di pesin wey go sell am give en enemies) kon sey," 
John12:5 “Why wi nor sell dis perfume for three hundred koins (money wey pass wetin workers go get for one year) kon give di money to poor pipol?” 
John12:6 (Judas tok like dis, nor bi sey e kare for poor pipol, but bikos na tif e bi. As e bi sey naim dey keep di money, e dey tif from am.)" 
John12:7 Den Jesus ansa, “Make yu nor trobol di woman, e do dis tin dey wait di day wen dem go beri mi." 
John12:8 Poor pipol go always dey with una, but I nor go dey with una all di time.”" 
John12:9 For dis time, plenty pipol wey dey Judea hear sey Jesus dey for dia town, so dem kon gada, nor bi bikos of Jesus alone, but dem won si Lazarus too, di pesin wey die before, wey Jesus wake-up." 
John12:9 For dis time, plenty pipol wey dey Judea hear sey Jesus dey for dia town, so dem kon gada, nor bi bikos of Jesus alone, but dem won si Lazarus too, di pesin wey die before, wey Jesus wake-up." 
John12:10 Di priest oga dem kon plan to kill Lazarus too," 
John12:11 bikos naim make plenty Jew pipol for Jerusalem, bilive Jesus." 
John12:12 Wen day break, plenty pipol wey kom di Feast kon hear sey Jesus dey kom Jerusalem." 
John12:13 Di pipol take palm tree leaf go wait am for road. Dem kon bigin shaut, “Hosanna, make God bless di pesin wey E send kom meet us. Make God bless Israel king!”" 
John12:14 Jesus si one small donkey and e kon sidan put, just as God word sey," 
John12:15 “Pipol wey dey Zion, make una nor fear; make una si una king sidan on-top donkey dey kom!”" 
John12:16 (En disciples nor undastand dis tins wey dey happen, until wen Jesus don wake-up from grave, naim dem kon remember wetin God word sey go happen.)" 
John12:17 So di pipol wey dey with am wen e wake Lazarus from grave kon tell odas about am. 
John12:18 And dem gada go meet Jesus, bikos dem hear sey na-im wake Lazarus from grave." 
John12:19 Den di Farisee pipol kon tell each oda, “Una dey si sey wetin wi dey do so nor get head! Si o-o, evribody don bigin follow am.”" 
John12:20 Some Greek pipol go woship God for di feast for Jerusalem. 
John12:21 Dem meet Filip wey kom from Betsaida for Galilee kon tell am, “Oga God, wi go like to si Jesus.”" 
John12:22 Filip tell Andru, den dem kon go tell Jesus." 
John12:23 Jesus tell dem, “Di time don kom wen God go honor en own pikin." 
John12:24 I tell una true word, if one korn seed fall for groun and e nor die, e nor go grow, but if e die, e go grow kon bear plenty seed." 
John12:25 Anybody wey love en life for dis world, go luz am, but di pesin wey nor love en life for dis world, go get life wey nor dey end." 
John12:26 Anybody wey ready to serve mi, go must follow mi and where I dey, na der my savant go dey too. Anybody wey serve mi, my Papa go honor am." 
John12:27 “My heart heavy well-well. Wetin I go tok? ‘Papa, make yu save mi from dis tin wey won happen’? No! Na dis tin make mi kom dis world." 
John12:28 Papa, make yu honor yor name.” Den one vois tok from heaven sey, “I don honor am before and I go honor am again.”" 
John12:29 Wen di pipol wey dey di place hear di vois, some kon sey, “Di vois sound like tonda”, but odas sey, “Na angel dey tok to am.”" 
John12:30 Jesus kon sey, “Dis vois nor tok bikos of mi, but na bikos of una." 
John12:31 Di time to judge di pipol for dis world don rish and God go drive Satan, wey dey kontrol dis world komot." 
John12:32 But as for mi, if una karry mi go up for cross, I go draw evribody kom meet mi.”" 
John12:33 (E tok like dis, make pipol for know di way e go take die)." 
John12:34 Den di pipol ask, “Wi know sey God law sey, ‘Christ go live forever.’ Why yu kon dey tok sey dem go karry Man Pikin put for cross? Na who bi dis Man Pikin sef?”" 
John12:35 Jesus ansa dem, “My lite nor go dey with una tey. Naw wen di lite dey, make una take am waka, so dat darkness nor go kover una. Bikos di pesin wey dey waka for darkness, nor dey si where e dey go." 
John12:36 As una get di lite naw, make una bilive am, so dat una go bi lite shidren.” Wen Jesus don tok dis tin finish, e kon komot der go hide." 
John12:37 Aldo Jesus don do many mirakle for dia front, dem nor still bilive am." 
John12:38 Dis make wetin Profet Isaya tok happen, wen e sey, “Oga God, wish pipol don bilive wetin wi tok and who God don show en pawa?”" 
John12:39 As di pipol nor fit bilive, naim make Profet Isaya tok anoda word sey," 
John12:40 “God don blind dia eye and make dia heart strong like stone, so dat dem nor go si with dia eye and undastand with dia heart, so dem nor go fit kom meet mi, make I for heal dem.”" 
John12:41 Profet Isaya tok dis tins, bikos e si how God honor and tok about Christ." 
John12:42 Many pipol and many Jew oga kon bilive Jesus, but bikos of di Farisee pipol, doz wey bilive nor fit tok for publik about Jesus Christ, so dat dem nor go drive dem komot for di sinagog." 
John12:43 Bikos Jew pipol like make pipol dey praiz dem pass wetin God tink about dem. 
John12:44 Jesus kon shaut sey, “Di pesin wey bilive mi, nor bi mi e bilive, but na my Papa wey send mi." 
John12:45 And di pesin wey si mi, don si God wey send mi." 
John12:46 I kom as lite for dis world, so dat anybody wey go bilive mi nor go waka inside darkness." 
John12:47 “Anybody wey hear wetin I tok and nor obey am, nor bi mi go judge am, bikos I nor kom judge di world, but I kom save pipol for di world." 
John12:48 Anybody wey rijet mi and nor do wetin I tok, God go use dis my word judge am for di last day." 
John12:49 Bikos nor bi my pawa I take dey tok, but na my Papa wey send mi dey tell mi wetin I dey tok." 
John12:50 I know sey anytin wey God kommand, dey give life wey nor dey end, so I dey tok wetin E send mi.”" 
John13:1 Before dem do di Passova Feast, Jesus know sey en time don rish wen e go komot for dis world go meet en Papa. Bikos e love di pipol wey dey di world, e kon show dem how en love for dem strong rish." 
John13:2 Before dem start to chop evening food, devil don already enter Judas Iskariot mind, wey bi Simon pikin sey, make e sell Jesus give en enemy." 
John13:3 Bikos Jesus know sey en Papa don gi-am pawa to kontrol evritin and as e bi sey e kom from God and e dey go back go meet am," 
John13:4 e kon stand up for where dem dey chop, remove en big koat kon tie towel for en waist." 
John13:5 E pour wota for basin, bigin dey wosh en disciples leg and dey dry dem with di towel wey dey en waist." 
John13:6 Wen e rish Simon Pita turn, Pita kon tell am, “Oga God, yu won wosh my leg?”" 
John13:7 Jesus ansa, “Yu nor go fit undastand wetin I dey do naw, but yu go undastand am leta.”" 
John13:8 Pita tell am, “I nor go gri make yu wosh my leg!” Den Jesus ansa, “If I nor wosh yor leg, mi and yu nor go get anytin togeda again.”" 
John13:9 So Simon Pita tell am, “Oga God, make yu nor wosh only my leg, but make yu wosh my hand and head too!”" 
John13:10 Jesus ansa, “Di pesin wey don baf, only nid to wosh en leg, bikos e don dey klean. Una dey klean, but nor bi all of una.”" 
John13:11 (Bikos Jesus know di pesin wey go sell am, naim make am sey, “Nor bi all of una dey klean.”)" 
John13:12 So wen Jesus don wosh dia leg finish, e kon wear en big koat back. Den e go sidan for di tabol kon ask dem, “Una undastand wetin I do for una so?" 
John13:13 Una dey koll mi ‘Tisha’ and ‘Oga God’, una korrect, bikos na so I bi." 
John13:14 So, if mi wey bi una oga and tisha, wosh una leg, e good make una wosh each oda leg too." 
John13:15 I don give una ezample wey una go follow. So make una do for each oda as I don do for una. 
John13:16 Make I tell una true word, savant nor dey big pass en oga, just as di pesin wey bi messenja nor dey big pass di oga wey send am." 
John13:17 Since una know wetin I dey tok, God go bless una, if una do dem." 
John13:18 “Wetin I dey tok so nor koncern all of una, bikos I know di pipol wey I choose. Dis show sey God word na true sey, ‘Di pesin wey follow mi chop don turn to my enemy.’" 
John13:19 “I don tell una before e go happen, so dat wen e happen, una go bilive sey na mi bi Christ." 
John13:20 I dey tell una true word, anybody wey receive di pesin wey I send, don receive mi and anybody wey receive mi, don receive God wey send mi kom.”" 
John13:21 Wen e don tok dis tin finish, en heart kon heavy well-well, den e sey, “I dey tell una true word, one of una go sell mi give my enemy.”" 
John13:22 Di disciples look each oda kon dey worry and tink for dia mind sey, “Wish pesin e dey tok about?”" 
John13:23 John, di disciple wey Jesus love well-well, sidan for en rite hand wen dem dey chop." 
John13:24 So, Simon Pita kon use eye tell am sey make e ask Jesus wish pesin e dey tok about." 
John13:25 Den John bend en head near Jesus chest kon ask am, “Oga God, who yu dey tok about?”" 
John13:26 Jesus ansa, “Na di pesin wey I go give dis bread afta I don shuk am inside di pot.” Den e shuk di bread inside di pot kon gi-am to Judas Iskariot, wey bi Simon pikin." 
John13:27 Afta Judas take di bread, devil enter en mind. Jesus kon tell am, “Di tin wey yu won do, make yu go do am kwik-kwik.”" 
John13:28 (No one among dem wey sidan for di tabol undastand why Jesus tok to Judas like dat. 
John13:29 Some of dem tink sey, since na Judas dey keep di money, Jesus tell am sey make e go buy wetin dem go use for di feast or make e give poor pipol money)." 
John13:30 Wen Judas don take di bread, e hurry komot for di place. (By dis time, day don dark.)" 
John13:31 Wen e don komot, Jesus kon sey, “Naw, di time don rish wen God go honor en pikin and en pikin go honor am too." 
John13:32 Wen di pikin don honor God, God go honor am too." 
John13:33 “My shidren, na small time remain wey I go dey with una. Leta, una go dey find mi and as I tell di Jew oga dem before sey, ‘Where I dey go una nor go fit kom der’, na di same word I dey tell una naw." 
John13:34 “I dey give una new kommand: Una must love each oda, as I love una," 
John13:35 so dat evribody go know sey, una bi my disciples if una love each oda.”" 
John13:36 Simon Pita kon tell am, “Oga God, where yu dey go?” Jesus ansa, “Una nor go fit follow mi go di place wey I dey go naw, but una go kom meet mi for der leta.”" 
John13:37 Pita ask am, “Oga God, why wi nor go fit follow yu naw? I ready to die bikos of yu!”" 
John13:38 Jesus ansa am, “Yu really ready to die for mi? Make I tell yu true word, before fawol go do ‘Kukuruku’ dis nite, yu go tok three times sey, yu nor know mi.”" 
John14:1 “Make una nor let anytin worry una mind. Since una bilive God, make una still bilive mi." 
John14:2 Many rooms dey for my Papa house and I dey go prepare place for una to stay, if nor bi so, I for tell una." 
John14:3 Wen I don finish, I go kom take una, so dat una go stay with mi for where I dey." 
John14:4 And una go know di place wey I dey go and how una go take rish der.” 
John14:5 Tomas ask am, “Oga God, wi nor know where yu dey go, how wi go take know road?”" 
John14:6 Jesus ansa am, “Na mi bi di road, di trut and life. Nobody go fit go meet my Papa, unless e pass thru mi." 
John14:7 But since una don know mi, una go know my Papa too. Naw wey una don know am, una don si am.”" 
John14:8 Filip kon sey, “Oga God, show us yor Papa and wi go dey okay.”" 
John14:9 Jesus ansa am, “So Filip, I don dey with una all dis time and yu still nor know mi? Di pesin wey don si mi, don si my Papa! Why yu kon dey sey, ‘Show us yor Papa?’" 
John14:10 Yu nor bilive sey mi and my Papa na di same? As E dey inside mi, na so I dey inside am. Di word wey I dey tell una so, I nor dey tok am with my own pawa, but na my Papa wey dey inside mi, dey do all dis mirakle thru mi." 
John14:11 Make una bilive sey I dey inside my Papa and my Papa dey inside mi, but if una nor fit bilive mi, make una bilive bikos of di mirakles wey I dey do." 
John14:12 I tell una true word, di pesin wey bilive mi, go do di kind mirakle wey I dey do and e go even do di ones wey big pass dem, bikos I dey go meet my Papa." 
John14:13 And anytin wey una use my name ask, I go do am, so dat pipol go honor di Papa bikos of en pikin." 
John14:14 If una ask anytin with my name, I go do am for una." 
John14:15 “If una love mi, una go do wetin I tok." 
John14:16 Den I go ask my Papa and E go send una anoda Pesin wey go help and stay with una forever. 
John14:17 Naim bi di Spirit wey dey tok trut, wey pipol for dis world nor go fit receive, bikos dem nor fit si am or know am, but una know am, bikos e dey stay inside una." 
John14:18 I nor go leave una like pikin wey nor get papa and mama, bikos I go kom meet una again." 
John14:19 Afta sometaim, di pipol for dis world nor go si mi, but una go si mi and bikos I dey alive, una go dey alive too." 
John14:20 Dat time, una go know sey I dey inside my Papa and una dey inside mi, as I dey inside una." 
John14:21 Anybody wey hear and do wetin I tok, love mi. Di pesin wey love mi, mi and my Papa go love am too and I go show am who I bi.”" 
John14:22 Judas (dis nor bi Judas Iskariot) kon sey, “Oga God, why yu won show yorsef give us and yu nor won show oda pipol for di world?”" 
John14:23 Jesus ansa am, “Anybody wey love mi, go do wetin I tok and my Papa go love am, den wi go kon meet and stay with am." 
John14:24 Di pesin wey nor love mi, nor go do wetin I tok. Wetin una dey hear so nor bi my word, but na my Papa own." 
John14:25 “I don dey tell una all dis tins since I dey with una. 
John14:26 But di pesin wey go help una na di Holy Spirit, wey my Papa go send kom for my name. E go tish una evritin and e go help una remember evritin wey I don tell una." 
John14:27 Make una mind rest, bikos na my peace I give una. My peace difren from di one wey di world dey give. Make una nor fear or allow anytin worry una mind." 
John14:28 “Una remember wen I tell una sey, ‘I dey komot and I go kom back kon meet una?’ If una love mi, una go happy wen I tok sey, ‘I dey go meet my Papa’, bikos my Papa big pass mi." 
John14:29 I don tell una naw before e happen, so dat wen e happen, una go bilive mi." 
John14:30 I nor go tok too mush naw, bikos di devil wey dey rule dis world, dey kom and e nor get pawa for my body." 
John14:31 Since I dey do wetin my Papa tell mi, di world go know sey I love my Papa. “So make una get up make wi dey go." 
John15:1 “Na mi bi di korrect vine and na my Papa bi di gardina. 
John15:2 E dey kut evry branches wey nor dey bear fruit for my body komot and e dey ripair evry branch for my body wey dey bear fruit, so dat e go bear more fruit." 
John15:3 Una dey klean already, bikos of di word wey I tell una." 
John15:4 Make una dey inside mi, so dat I go dey inside una too. As di branches nor fit bear fruit with en own pawa unless e dey inside di vine, na so una nor go fit bear fruit, unless una dey inside mi." 
John15:5 “Na mi bi di vine and na una bi di branches dem. Di pesin wey stay inside mi and I stay inside am, go bear plenty fruit, bikos without mi, una nor go fit do anytin." 
John15:6 Anybody wey nor stay inside mi, go dry and pipol go gada en branches dem, trow and burn dem inside fire." 
John15:7 If una stay inside mi and my word dey inside una, anytin wey una ask, I go do am for una." 
John15:8 My Papa go get big honor if una bear plenty fruit, wey go show sey una bi my disciples." 
John15:9 “As my Papa love mi, na so I love una too, so make una live di kind life wey go let mi fit love una more-more." 
John15:10 If una do wetin I tok, I go love una, just as I dey obey wetin my Papa tok and E love mi." 
John15:11 I don tell una all dis tins, so dat my joy go dey inside una and una joy go full well-well." 
John15:12 Dis na di kommand wey I give una sey, ‘Make una love each oda di way I love una.’" 
John15:13 E nor get love wey big rish di one wey make pesin die for en friend. 
John15:14 Una go bi my friend if una do wetin I tok. 
John15:15 I nor go koll una savant again, bikos savant nor dey undastand wetin en oga dey do, but I dey koll una my friend, bikos I don show una evritin wey I hear from my Papa." 
John15:16 Nor bi una choose mi, but na mi choose una. Bikos of dat, I don give una pawa to bear fruit wey go last, so dat my papa go give una anytin wey una ask am for my name." 
John15:17 Wetin I dey tell una bi sey, ‘Make una love each oda.’ ”" 
John15:18 “If pipol for dis world hate una, make una remember sey na mi dem first hate." 
John15:19 If una bi friend with di pipol for dis world, dem go love una as dia own pipol. But una nor bi dia friend, bikos I don choose una from di world, naim make dem nor like una." 
John15:20 Make una remember wetin I tell una, ‘Savant nor dey big pass en oga.’ If dem sofa mi, den dem go sofa una too. If to sey dem obey my word, dem go obey una own too." 
John15:21 Since dem nor know di Pesin wey send mi kom, dem go do all dis tins to una bikos of my name." 
John15:22 If to sey I nor kom tok to dem, dem for nor dey guilty for dia sin. But naw, dem nor get any eskuse for dia sin." 
John15:23 Di pesin wey hate mi, hate my Papa too." 
John15:24 If to sey dem nor si di mirakle wey I do, wey nobody don do before, dem for nor dey guilty for dia sin. But afta dem don si di mirakles, dem still hate mi and my Papa." 
John15:25 All dis tins happen, so dat wetin God law tok, go bi true sey, ‘Dem nor get rizin to take hate mi.’" 
John15:26 “But wen di true Spirit wey I go send from my Papa to help una don kom, e go tok about mi." 
John15:27 And unasef go tok about mi, bikos una dey with mi from di biginnin.”" 
John16:1 “I dey tell una all dis tins, so dat nobody go fit deceive una." 
John16:2 Dem go drive una komot for di sinagog and di time dey kom wen di pesin wey go kill una, go tink sey e dey do God work." 
John16:3 Dem go do all dis tins, bikos dem nor know mi and my Papa." 
John16:4 But I tell una all dis tins, so dat wen di time rish, una go remember sey I tell una about dem before. I just dey tell una all dis tins, bikos I dey with una since." 
John16:5 “Naw, I dey go meet di Pesin wey send mi kom, but una dey ask mi, ‘Where yu dey go?’" 
John16:6 But una nor happy as I dey tell una all dis tins. 
John16:7 I tell una true word, na for una own good naim make mi won go, bikos if I nor go, di Pesin wey go help una nor go kom, but if I go, I go send am kom meet una." 
John16:8 Wen e kom, e go show pipol for dis world wetin sin, God raitiousness and God judgement, bi." 
John16:9 Di Spirit go show dem sey dem dey wrong about sin, bikos dem nor bilive mi." 
John16:10 Dem dey wrong about God raitiousness, bikos I dey go meet my Papa and dem nor go si mi again." 
John16:11 And dem dey wrong about judgement, bikos God don kondemn di pesin wey dey rule dis world." 
John16:12 “I get plenty tins wey I won tell una, but una nor go fit bear dem naw." 
John16:13 But wen God Spirit kom, e go show una di trut. E nor go tok wetin dey en mind, but e go tok wetin e hear from God and wetin go happen afta I don go." 
John16:14 E go dey give mi glory wen e dey tell una di tins wey e dey hear from mi. 
John16:15 Evritin wey my Papa get, na my own, naim make mi tok sey di Spirit go tell una wetin e dey hear from mi." 
John16:16 “Time go soon kom wen una nor go si mi, but afta sometaim, una go si mi.”" 
John16:17 Den some among di disciple kon dey ask each oda, “Wetin e mean wen e sey, ‘Time go soon kom wen una nor go si mi, but afta sometaim, una go si mi bikos I dey go meet my Papa?’ ”" 
John16:18 Some still sey, “Wetin e get for mind wen e sey, ‘Time go soon kom?’ Wi nor undastand wetin e dey tok.”" 
John16:19 Jesus si sey dem won ask am about wetin e tell dem, naim e ask dem, “Una dey ask each oda wetin I mean wen I sey, ‘Time go soon kom wen una nor go si mi, but afta sometaim, una go si mi?’" 
John16:20 I tell una true word, una go kry and mourn, but di world go dey happy; una go dey sad well-well, but una sadnes go turn to happiness." 
John16:21 Wen woman won born pikin, e dey sofa strong pain, bikos en time to born don rish, but wen e don born, e go happy and e nor go remember di pain again, bikos e go si sey e don born pikin." 
John16:22 Na so e bi for una naw, bikos una heart dey heavy, but I go si una again and for dat time, una go dey happy and nobody go fit take di happiness from una." 
John16:23 By dat time, una nor go ask mi anytin again. I tell una true word sey, anytin wey una ask my Papa with my name, E go give una." 
John16:24 Before naw, una neva take my name ask for anytin. Naw make una use my name ask for anytin wey una wont and una go get am, so dat una joy go full well-well." 
John16:25 “Since I dey use parabol tok to una; but di time dey kom wen I nor go use parabol again, but I go tell una about my Papa for di way wey una go undastand." 
John16:26 By dat time, una go fit ask anytin with my name and God go do am for una." 
John16:27 My Papa love una, bikos una love mi and bilive sey na-im send mi." 
John16:28 Na my Papa send mi kom dis world, but naw, I dey go back go meet am.”" 
John16:29 En disciples kon sey, “Yu si, na naw yu dey tok for di way wey wi undastand and nor bi with parabol." 
John16:30 Naw wi know sey yu know evritin and yu nor nid anybody to ask yu any kweshon. Bikos of dis, wi bilive sey na God send yu kom.”" 
John16:31 Jesus kon tell dem, “So una don bilive naw?" 
John16:32 Look, di time dey kom and e don even rish, wen una go skata and evribody go-go en own way and I go stay alone. But I nor dey alone, bikos my Papa dey with mi." 
John16:33 “I don tell una all dis tins, so dat my peace go stay with una. Wahala full inside di world and sofa dey too, but make una heart dey strong, bikos I don already win di world.”" 
John17:1 Wen Jesus don tok all dis tins finish, e look heaven kon sey, “My Papa, di time don kom wen yu go give glory to yor pikin, so dat yor pikin go give yu glory too." 
John17:2 Just as yu don give mi pawa ova all di pipol for di world, na so too I go give life wey nor dey end to evribody wey yu give mi." 
John17:3 Life wey nor dey end, dis na wetin e mean, ‘Na make pipol know yu wey bi di only true God and Jesus Christ, wey yu send.’" 
John17:4 I don give yu glory for dis world and I don finish di work wey yu send mi. 
John17:5 And naw, Papa honor mi, make yu draw mi near yu, just as wi dey before di world start." 
John17:6 I don make di pipol wey yu give mi for dis world know yor name. Na yor own dem bi before yu give dem to mi and dem don obey yor word. 
John17:7 Naw, dem don know sey evritin wey yu give mi kom from yu," 
John17:8 bikos I don tell dem di message wey yu give mi. Dem don asept wetin I tell dem and dem know and bilive sey na yu send mi. 
John17:9 I dey pray for di pipol wey yu give mi, bikos dem bi yor own, but I nor dey pray for di oda pipol wey dey inside di world." 
John17:10 Evritin wey I get, na yor own and evritin wey yu get, na my own and dem don honor mi." 
John17:11 I nor go dey di world again, but dem go still dey inside di world, since I won kom meet yu. Holy Papa, make yor name protet di pipol wey yu give mi, so dat dem go bi one, just as mi and yu na one." 
John17:12 Wen I dey with dem, I keep dem with yor name. No one lost, escept di one wey yor word sey e go perish." 
John17:13 Since I dey kom meet yu, I dey tok all dis tins for di world, so dat dia joy go full well-well." 
John17:14 I don give dem yor word and bikos of dat, di pipol for world hate dem, since dem nor bilong to di world, as misef nor bilong to di world." 
John17:15 I nor sey make yu remove dem from di world, but make yu protet dem from di devil." 
John17:16 Dem nor bilong to di world, just as misef nor bilong to di world." 
John17:17 Make yu protet dem with di trut, bikos na yor word bi di trut." 
John17:18 Just as yu send mi kom inside dis world, na so too I send dem go inside di world." 
John17:19 I don separate mysef from di world for dia sake, so dat dem go fit separate diasef from di world too." 
John17:20 I nor dey pray for dem alone, but I also dey pray for oda pipol wey go bilive mi thru di word wey dem go tok about mi." 
John17:21 Papa, I dey pray, so dat all of dem go get one mind, just as mi and yu bi one. I still dey pray make dem dey with us, so dat di world go bilive sey na yu send mi." 
John17:22 I don give dem di honor wey yu give mi, so dat dem go bi one just as wi bi one:" 
John17:23 I dey with dem and yu dey with mi, so dat dem go really bi one, just as wi bi one and di world go know sey na yu send mi and yu love dem, as yu love mi." 
John17:24 Papa, I wont make di pipol wey yu give mi stay with mi for where I dey, so dat dem go si di glory wey yu give mi, bikos yu love mi before yu kreate di world." 
John17:25 Holy Papa, even if di pipol for di world nor know yu, I know yu and dis ones know sey na yu send mi." 
John17:26 I don help dem know yor name and I go dey try to make oda pipol know am too, so dat di love wey yu get for mi, go dey with dem, as I dey with dem.”" 
John18:1 Afta e don tok finish, Jesus and en disciples komot cross go Kidron Valley kon enter one big farm." 
John18:2 (Judas, wey sell Jesus, know di place, bikos Jesus don go der with en disciples many times)." 
John18:3 So Judas kon escort many soja, some Temple polise and Farisee pipol enter di farm. Dem whole lamp, tosh and some whole swod and stik for hand." 
John18:4 Bikos Jesus know evritin wey go happen to am, e kon ask dem, “Who una dey find?”" 
John18:5 Dem ansa am, “Na Jesus wey kom from Nazaret.” E kon tell dem, “Na mi bi di pesin.” (Judas wey sell am, stand der with dem)." 
John18:6 So wen Jesus don tell dem sey, “Na mi bi di pesin”, dem dress go back kon fall for groun." 
John18:7 Den Jesus ask dem again, “Who una sey una dey find?” Dem ansa, “Na Jesus wey kom from Nazaret.”" 
John18:8 Jesus kon sey, “I don tell una sey na mi bi di pesin. Since na mi una dey find, make una allow dis men go.”" 
John18:9 (E tok dis word make e bi sey wetin dem rite for God word na true, “I nor lost anybody among di sheep wey yu give mi.”)" 
John18:10 Den Simon Pita bring en swod out kon kut di High Priest savant rite ear komot. (Di savant name na Malkus). 
John18:11 Jesus kon tell Pita, “Make yu put yor swod back for where e dey before! Yu nor know sey I go drink from di sofa cup wey my Papa give mi?”" 
John18:12 Den di sojas with dia oga and di Jew oga dem take Jesus kon tie am with rope. 
John18:13 Dem take am go meet Annas, Kaiafas fada-in-law, wey bi di High Priest for dat year." 
John18:14 (Dis na di Kaiafas wey advise di Jew oga dem sey, “E good make one man die for evribody”)." 
John18:15 Simon Pita with anoda disciple kon follow dem as dem dey take Jesus go meet Annas. (Di oda disciples know di High Priest well-well, so e follow Jesus enter inside di High Priest kompond)." 
John18:16 But Simon Pita stand outside di kompond near di door. Den di oda disciple wey know di High Priest kom out kon tok to di savant girl wey dey guide di gate and e kon allow Pita enter inside. 
John18:17 Di girl wey dey di gate kon ask Pita, “Yu nor bi one of dis man disciple?” At wons, Pita ansa, “I nor bi one of dem.”" 
John18:18 For dis time, all di savant and guards gada round shako fire wey dem make to warm demsef, bikos kold strong well-well. Pita follow dem stand der dey warm ensef too." 
John18:19 As dem dey der, di High Priest bigin dey ask Jesus kweshon about en disciples and wetin e tish." 
John18:20 Jesus kon ansa am, “Na for publik I tok wetin I tish. Na inside sinagog and Temple where all di Jew pipol dey gada, na der I for dey tish. I nor tok anytin for sekret." 
John18:21 Why yu dey ask mi? Make yu ask di pipol wey hear mi. Dem know wetin I tok.” 
John18:22 Afta Jesus don tok finish, one of di High Priest savant, wey stand near am slap am for face kon ask am, “Na di High Priest yu dey tok to like dis?”" 
John18:23 Den Jesus sey, “If wetin I tok nor korrect, make yu tell mi, but if e korrect, why yu slap mi?”" 
John18:24 Den Annas kon send am as dem still tie am with rope, go meet Kaiafas, wey bi di High Priest." 
John18:25 As Simon Pita stand for inside di kompond dey warm ensef, dem kon ask am, “Yu too nor bi one of en disciple?” Pita deny sey, “I nor dey among dem.”" 
John18:26 One High Priest savant, wey bi di same family with di man wey Pita take swod kut en ear kon sey, “I nor si yu with am for inside di farm?”" 
John18:27 Pita deny again for dia front and fawol kon do “Kukuruku.” 
John18:28 Den, dem take Jesus komot from Kaiafas place go di Roman Govnor palis. (By dis time, morning don rish). Dem nor gri enter inside di govnor house, make dem nor for dirty as dia tradishon tok, so dat dem go fit chop di Passova food." 
John18:29 So Pilate kom meet dem for outside kon ask dem, “Wetin una sey dis man do?”" 
John18:30 Dem ansa, “If to sey dis man nor bi criminal, wi nor for bring am kom meet yu.”" 
John18:31 Den Pilate tell dem, “Make una go judge am as una law tok.” Di Jew oga dem kon sey, “Awa law nor give us pawa to kill anybody.”" 
John18:32 (Dis tin happen to show sey wetin Jesus tok about how e go die, na true)." 
John18:33 So Pilate go inside en house for di palis, kon koll Jesus ask am, “Na yu bi di Jew pipol king?”" 
John18:34 Jesus ansa am, “Na from yor mind yu ask dis kweshon, abi pipol don tell yu about mi?”" 
John18:35 Pilate kon sey, “Yu know sey I nor bi Jew, abi? Na yor pipol and priest oga dem bring yu kom meet mi. Wetin yu do sef?”" 
John18:36 Jesus ansa, “My kingdom nor dey dis world. If to sey my kingdom dey dis world, my savants for fight make I nor kom meet di Jew oga dem. But as e bi so, my kingdom nor dey here.”" 
John18:37 Den Pilate ask am, “So yu bi king?” Jesus ansa, “Na yu tok so and yu dey korrect sey, I bi king. Na dis make dem born mi and naim make mi kom dis world kon tok di trut. Anybody wey wont hear di trut, go listin to wetin I dey tok.”" 
John18:38 Pilate still ask am, “Wetin bi di trut?” Den e go outside again go meet di Jew oga dem kon tell dem, “I nor si any bad tin wey dis man do o-o." 
John18:39 But as una custom sey make I free one prisona for una for Passova, una wont make I free Jesus, wey bi di Jew king?”" 
John18:40 Den, dem kon dey shaut, “Wi nor wont dat man, na Barabas wi wont and na criminal dis Barabas bi.”" 
John19:1 Den Pilate kon sey make dem flog Jesus with koboko. 
John19:2 Den di sojas go kut tree branches wey get shuku-shuku make crown put for en head and dem kon wear am klot wey dear well-well. 
John19:3 Dem kon dey laf am, dey take am make yeye, dey sey, “Make una kon si di Jew pipol king.” Dem slap am for face many times." 
John19:4 Pilate kom out again kon tell di Jew oga dem sey, “I won bring am kom out for una, to let una know sey I nor si anytin bad wey e do.”" 
John19:5 So Jesus kom outside, with di shuku-shuku crown for en head and di fine klot wey dem gi-am wear. Den Pilate kon sey, “Na di man bi dis!”" 
John19:6 Wen di priest oga dem and di temple polish dem si am, dem kon dey shaut, “Nail am for cross! Nail am for cross!” Den Pilate sey, “Make only una go nail am. But as for mi, I nor si any bad tin wey e do.”" 
John19:7 Di Jew oga dem ansa, “Wi get law and di law sey, e suppose to die, bikos e sey en na God Pikin.”" 
John19:8 Wen Pilate hear wetin dem tok, fear kon katch am well-well." 
John19:9 So e enter di house back kon ask Jesus, “Na where yu from kom sef?” But Jesus nor ansa am." 
John19:10 So Pilate kon sey, “Yu nor won tok to mi? Yu nor know sey I get pawa to free or kill yu?”" 
John19:11 Jesus ansa, “Yu nor get pawa at-all for my life, escept God gi-am to yu. So, na di pipol wey bring mi kom meet yu, na dia sin big pass yor own.”" 
John19:12 From dat time, Pilate kon bigin find way to free Jesus, but di Jew oga dem kon dey shaut, “If yu free dis man, yu nor bi Caesar friend. Anybody wey sey en bi king, na Caesar enemy e bi.”" 
John19:13 Wen Pilate hear wetin dem tok, e bring Jesus kom out kon sidan for di chair for where e dey judge kase, (dem dey koll di chair, “Di Stone Pavement”, but na Gabbata dem dey koll am for Aramaik language.)" 
John19:14 (Dat time na aftanoon for di day wen dem dey prepare for Passova Feast). So, Pilate kon tell di Jew oga dem, “Make una look, na una king bi dis!”" 
John19:15 Den, dem kon bigin dey shaut, “Kill-am trowey! Kill-am trowey! Make yu kill-am!” Pilate kon ask dem, “Una wont make I nail una king for cross?” Di High Priest dem kon sey, “Di only king wey wi get na Caesar.”" 
John19:16 So Pilate kon gi-am to dem make dem go kill-am. Den dem kon take Jesus komot for der. 
John19:17 As Jesus karry en cross dey go, e kon rish di place wey dem dey koll “Di Skull” (na Golgota dem dey koll di place for Aramaik language.)" 
John19:18 For der, dem kon nail Jesus for cross. Dem still nail two oda pipol for cross, one for en rite and di oda for en left." 
John19:19 Pilate kon rite for sign-board wey dem nail on-top Jesus cross, wey sey, “dis na Jesus wey kom from Nazaret, wey bi di Jew pipol king.”" 
John19:20 Since di place where dem kill Jesus near town, many of di Jew pipol wey dey for Jerusalem kom read di sign-board, bikos dem rite am for three language wey bi Aramaik, Latin and Greek." 
John19:21 Den di shief priests kon tell Pilate, “Make yu nor rite sey, dis na Jew pipol king, but rite sey, dis man sey, ‘I bi Jew pipol king.’ ”" 
John19:22 But Pilate ansa dem, “Wetin I don rite finish, na so e go bi.”" 
John19:23 Wen di sojas don nail Jesus for cross, dem tear en klot and dem for kon divide am. But dem leave di fine koat (bikos e nor get where dem join am, since dem weave-am from top go rish bottom)." 
John19:24 So di sojas tell each oda sey, “Make wi nor tear am, but make wi gambol to si who go take am.” Dis tin happen to show sey, wetin dem rite for God word na true sey, “Dem go divide my klot, afta dem don gambol for am.” Dis na wetin di sojas kon do." 
John19:25 By dis time, di only pipol wey stand near di cross where dem nail Jesus, na-im mama; en aunty, Mary wey bi Klopas wife and Mary Magdalin." 
John19:26 So wen Jesus si en mama and John, di disciple wey e love well-well stand for der, e kon tell en mama, “Mama, look, dis na yor pikin.”" 
John19:27 Den e tell di disciple, “Make yu look, dis na yor mama.” From dat time, di disciple kon take Jesus mama go en own house." 
John19:28 Wen Jesus si sey evritin don finish, e kon sey, “Wota dey hongry mi”, (dis show sey wetin God tok, really happen)." 
John19:29 Di sojas soak sponge inside wine wey betta, wey dey one kontaina for der kon put am for di branches of one plant wey dem dey koll hyssop kon stresh am put for Jesus mout." 
John19:30 Wen e don taste di wine, Jesus kon sey, “Evritin don finish.” Den e bend en head down, kon die." 
John19:31 Dis tin happen for di day wen dem dey prepare for di Passova Feast and bikos dem nor wont make di dead body dem stay for cross for Sabat Day, (bikos dat Sabat Day na special one for dem), di Jew oga dem kon tell Pilate make dem break dia leg, to make sure sey dem don die, so dat dem go fit bring dia dead body kom down." 
John19:32 So di sojas break di oda two pipol leg wey dem kill with Jesus. 
John19:33 But wen dem rish di cross wey Jesus dey and si sey e don die, dem nor kon break en leg." 
John19:34 But one soja kon take spear shuk di korna of en belle, den blood and wota kon dey rush kom out." 
John19:35 All dis story na true, (bikos na di pesin wey si dem happen, naim tok about dem and wetin e tok na true), so dat una go fit bilive." 
John19:36 All dis tin happen to show sey, wetin dem rite for God word na true sey, “Dem nor go break one singol bone for en body.”" 
John19:37 And God word still sey, “Dem go stand dey sopraiz as dem dey look di pesin wey dem shuk en body.”" 
John19:38 Afta dis time, Josef wey kom from Arimatea, wey bi Jesus sekret disciple, (bikos e dey fear di oda Jew oga dem), kon ask Pilate make e allow am karry Jesus dead body komot for der. Pilate gri for am and e go karry Jesus body komot." 
John19:39 Nikodimos, di man wey hide go si Jesus for nite, kon follow Josef. E karry perfume wey heavy rish seventy-five pounds, wey dem take myrrh and aloe spice make." 
John19:40 Den dem pour di perfume for Jesus body kon wrap am with linen klot akordin to di way Jew pipol dey prepare dead body for beri. 
John19:41 One gardin dey near di place where dem kill Jesus and one new grave wey dem neva beri anybody put before, dey inside di gardin." 
John19:42 Since dat day na di day wey Jew pipol dey prepare for di Passova Feast and bikos di new grave dey near der, dem kon beri Jesus inside di grave." 
John20:1 For di first day for di week, wen day neva break well, Mary Magdalin kon go where di grave dey. E si sey dem don remove di stone wey dem take kover di grave mout." 
John20:2 Den e run go meet Simon Pita and John kon tell dem, “Somebody don karry Jesus body komot from di grave and wi nor know where dem put am.”" 
John20:3 So Pita and John kon go where di grave dey. 
John20:4 Di two of dem kon dey run togeda, but John run pass Pita kon first am rish di grave." 
John20:5 E nor enter inside di grave, but e bend down kon si di linen klot wey dem take wrap Jesus body for groun inside di grave." 
John20:6 Wen Simon Pita rish der, e enter inside di grave kon si di linen klot for groun too." 
John20:7 But di small klot wey dey for Jesus head nor dey for di same place where di oda klot dey, e dey on en own for one korna." 
John20:8 Den John kon enter inside and wetin e si kon make am bilive. 
John20:9 (Bikos dem undastand God word wey sey, Jesus go wake-up afta e die)." 
John20:10 So di two disciple kon go back to dia house. 
John20:11 But Mary stand for outside di grave dey kry. As e still dey kry, e kon bend down look inside di grave." 
John20:12 Den e si two angel wey wear white klot sidan for where dem put Jesus body. One dey for where di head dey and di oda dey for where di leg dey. 
John20:13 Dem kon ask am, “Woman, why yu dey kry?” Mary ansa, “Dem don karry my oga komot and I nor know where dem karry am go.”" 
John20:14 Afta e tok finish, e turn round kon si Jesus stand for der, but e nor know sey na Jesus bi dat." 
John20:15 Jesus tell am, “Woman, why yu dey kry? Na who yu dey find?” Bikos Mary tink sey naim bi di gardina, e kon sey, “Oga God, if na yu karry am komot, make yu tell mi where yu karry am go, so dat I go-go karry am.”" 
John20:16 Den Jesus koll am, “Mary.” So, Mary turn round face am kon koll am for Hibru language, “Raboni!” (wey mean Tisha)." 
John20:17 Jesus ansa am, “Make yu neva tosh mi, bikos I neva go meet my Papa for heaven. Go meet my brodas, tell dem sey, ‘I dey go heaven go meet my Papa, wey bi yor Papa too; my God, wey bi yor God too.’ ”" 
John20:18 Den Mary Magdalin go meet di disciples for where dem dey kon tell dem, “I don si di Oga God!” Den e tell dem wetin Jesus tell am." 
John20:19 Dat evening, for di first day for di week, en disciples kon gada togeda. Dem lock di door for di house wey dem dey, bikos dem dey fear di Jew oga dem. Jesus stand among dem kon sey, “Make peace dey with una.”" 
John20:20 Wen e don tok finish, e show dem en hand and di korna for en belle wey dem shuk with spear. Den di disciples kon happy well-well, wen dem si Jesus." 
John20:21 Den Jesus tell dem again, “Make peace dey with una. As my Papa send mi, na so I send una too.”" 
John20:22 Wen e tok finish, e breath for dia body kon sey, “Make una receive di Holy Spirit." 
John20:23 If una forgive anybody en sin, God go forgi-am, but if una nor forgive anybody en sin, God nor go forgi-am.”" 
John20:24 For dis time, Tomas (wey bi twins), one among di twelf disciples, nor dey der wen Jesus show ensef to dem." 
John20:25 Di oda disciples kon tell am, “Wi don si Jesus.” But e ansa dem, “Unless I si en two hand wey dem nail kon put my finger inside di whole wey di nail make and shuk my hand inside di whole wey dey en belle, I nor go ever bilive una.”" 
John20:26 Afta eight days, wen all di disciples gada again inside di house and Tomas dey der with dem dis time, even doh sey dem lock all di doors, Jesus show ensef kon stand among dem sey, “Make peace dey with una.”" 
John20:27 Den e tell Tomas, “Put yor finger for my hand, make yu tosh am. Stresh yor hand put inside di korna for my belle. Make yu nor dey doubt again, but make yu bilive.”" 
John20:28 Tomas ansa am, “O! My Oga God and my God.”" 
John20:29 Den Jesus tell am, “So yu bilive naw, bikos yu don si mi? God go bless pipol wey neva take eye si mi, but dem bilive mi.”" 
John20:30 Jesus do many mirakles wen e dey with en disciples wey dem nor rite for dis book. 
John20:31 But dis tins wey dem rite so, na make una for bilive sey na Jesus bi di Christ and naim bi Man Pikin and if una bilive am, una go get life thru en name." 
John21:1 Afta dis, Jesus show ensef again to en disciples near Tiberias Sea. Dis na how e do am." 
John21:2 Simon Pita and Tomas (wey bi twins), with Netanel (wey en town bi Kana for Galilee), with Zebedee pikin and two oda Jesus disciples, kon gada togeda." 
John21:3 Simon Pita kon tell dem, “I dey go katch fish.” Dem sey, “Wi too go follow yu go.” Den dem komot go enter one kenu. But dat nite dem nor katch any fish." 
John21:4 Wen day break, Jesus stand for di wotaside, but di disciples nor know sey naim dey der." 
John21:5 Jesus kon ask dem, “My shidren, una katch any fish?” Dem ansa, “No o-o.”" 
John21:6 E kon tell dem, “Make una trow una net go di rite side for di kenu and una go katch some fish.” Wen dem don trow dia net inside di river, dem nor fit draw am komot from di wota, bikos di fish wey dem katch, plenty well-well." 
John21:7 Den, John, di disciple wey Jesus love kon tell Pita, “Dis man na Jesus o-o.” Wen Simon Pita hear sey di man na Jesus, e kon kwik-kwik tie en klot well (bikos e nor wear anytin under), den e jump inside di river." 
John21:8 By dis time, di oda disciples dey inside di kenu dey pul di net with di plenty fish go rish groun for di wotaside (bikos where dem dey, na about one hundred yard from di wotaside)." 
John21:9 Wen dem don kom down from di kenu, dem kon si shako fire with fish and some bread on-top am." 
John21:10 Jesus tell dem, “Make una bring some for di fish wey una katch kom.”" 
John21:11 Den Simon Pita enter di kenu kon pul di net kom groun. Di net katch plenty big-big fish wey rish one hundred and fifty-three and di net nor tear. 
John21:12 Jesus tell dem, “Make una kom chop.” But dem nor fit ask am, “Who yu bi”, bikos dem bilive sey na Jesus e bi." 
John21:13 Den Jesus kon give dem bread and fish. 
John21:14 Dis make am di third time wen Jesus show ensef to en disciples, afta e don raiz-up from grave." 
John21:15 Wen dem don chop finish, Jesus ask Simon Pita, “Simon, John pikin, yu love mi pass all dis tins?” E ansa, “Yes, Oga God! Yu know sey I love yu.” Jesus kon tell am, “Make yu feed my sheep.”" 
John21:16 Jesus ask am again, “Simon, John pikin, yu really tink sey yu love mi?” Pita ansa, “Yes, oga! Yu know sey I love yu.” Jesus kon tell am, “Make yu kare for my sheep.”" 
John21:17 Jesus ask am di third time, “Simon, John pikin, yu sure sey yu love mi so?” Pita kon dey vex, bikos e pain am well-well, as Jesus ask am di same kweshon three times, “Yu sure sey yu love mi so?” Den Pita sey, “Oga God, yu know evritin, yu know sey I really love yu.” So, Jesus tell am, “Make yu feed my sheep." 
John21:18 I tell yu true word, wen yu dey small, yu dey do as yu like, dey dress as yu like and dey go anywhere wey yu wont, but wen yu go old, yu go spread yor hand and oda pipol go help yu tie yor klot and karry yu go where yu nor won go.”" 
John21:19 (Jesus tok dis to show how Pita go die, so dat God go get honor). Afta Jesus tok finish, e kon tell Pita, “Make yu follow mi.”" 
John21:20 Wen Pita turn round, e kon si John, (di disciple wey Jesus love well-well), dey follow dem. (Dis na di disciple wey bend en head near Jesus chest wen dem dey chop kon ask am, “Oga God, who bi di pesin wey go sell yu give yor enemy?”)" 
John21:21 Wen Pita si am, e kon ask Jesus, “Oga God, wot about dis man?”" 
John21:22 Jesus ansa am, “Make yu mind yor own business. If I wont sey make e stay until I kom back, wish one koncern yu inside? Make yu yorsef follow mi.”" 
John21:23 Den di rumor kon dey spread among di brodas and sistas sey, di disciple nor go die. But Jesus nor really tell Pita sey di oda disciple nor go die, but e sey, “If I won sey make e stay until I kom back, wish one koncern yu inside?”" 
John21:24 Na dis bi di disciple wey bear witness about all dis tins and wey rite dem and wi know sey wetin e rite, na true." 
John21:25 Jesus do many oda tins wey dem nor rite down. If to sey dem rite all of dem, di world nor go get space wey go kontain all di book, where dem rite dem put." 
Acts1:1 My friend Teofilus, for di book wey I first rite give yu, I tok about all di tins wey Jesus Christ start to dey do and tish," 
Acts1:2 until di day wen God kon karry am go heaven, afta e give orda to di apostles, wey e choose with di Holy Spirit." 
Acts1:3 Na di same apostles e show ensef many time sey, e still dey alive afta di sofa wey e sofa. Dem si am for forty days and e tell dem about God kingdom." 
Acts1:4 Den wen e follow dem sidan dey tok, e kon kommand dem sey, “Make una nor leave Jerusalem, but make una wait for di tin wey my Papa promise wey I don tell una before." 
Acts1:5 John dey baptize with wota, but e nor go tey wen God go baptize una with en Holy Spirit (wey go kontrol una life forever).”" 
Acts1:5 John dey baptize with wota, but e nor go tey wen God go baptize una with en Holy Spirit (wey go kontrol una life forever).”" 
Acts1:6 So wen dem gada, dem kon start to ask Jesus Christ, “Oga God! Na naw yu go start to rule Israel?”" 
Acts1:7 Jesus ansa dem, “Di time wey God plan nor koncern una," 
Acts1:8 but una go get pawa wen di Holy Spirit don enter una life and una go tell pipol about mi for Jerusalem, for evriwhere for Judea and Samaria go rish all di far place wey dey dis world.”" 
Acts1:8 but una go get pawa wen di Holy Spirit don enter una life and una go tell pipol about mi for Jerusalem, for evriwhere for Judea and Samaria go rish all di far place wey dey dis world.”" 
Acts1:9 So afta e don tok with dem, God kon karry am up until kloud kover am and dem nor fit si am again." 
Acts1:10 As dem still dey look up as e dey go, two men wey wear white klot stand near dem" 
Acts1:11 kon sey, “Galilee pipol, na wetin make una stand der dey look heaven like dat? Dis Jesus Christ wey God don karry go heaven today, go still kom back di same way wey una si am dey go heaven.”" 
Acts1:12 So dem go back to Jerusalem from Mount Olives (wey dey near Jerusalem and di place wey dem waka so, far pass how di law dey allow pipol waka for Sabat Day)." 
Acts1:13 Wen dem enter Jerusalem, dem kon go di room for upstair where dem dey stay. Pita and John; James and Andru; Filip and Tomas; Bartolomew and Matiu; James wey bi Afaeus pikin, Simon wey dem dey koll Zealot and Judas wey bi James pikin, na all of dem gada for der." 
Acts1:13 Wen dem enter Jerusalem, dem kon go di room for upstair where dem dey stay. Pita and John; James and Andru; Filip and Tomas; Bartolomew and Matiu; James wey bi Afaeus pikin, Simon wey dem dey koll Zealot and Judas wey bi James pikin, na all of dem gada for der." 
Acts1:13 Wen dem enter Jerusalem, dem kon go di room for upstair where dem dey stay. Pita and John; James and Andru; Filip and Tomas; Bartolomew and Matiu; James wey bi Afaeus pikin, Simon wey dem dey koll Zealot and Judas wey bi James pikin, na all of dem gada for der." 
Acts1:14 Dem kon dey pray togeda evriday with one mind, with all di wimen, plus Mary, Jesus Christ mama and en brodas." 
Acts1:15 Di pipol wey dey pray, plenty rish one hundred and twenty. So Pita stand up for di pipol front kon sey," 
Acts1:16 “My brodas, di word wey di Holy Spirit use David tok about Judas, wey show road to di pipol wey arrest Jesus Christ, must happen," 
Acts1:17 bikos e dey awa group before and e dey follow us do di work.” 
Acts1:18 (Dis Judas buy one land with di money wey e kollect for di wiked tin wey e do and na der e hang ensef till en belle burst and all en intestine kon skata kom out," 
Acts1:19 sotey all di pipol for Jerusalem hear di story and naim make dem dey koll di place for dia language, “Akeldama”, wey mean, “Blood Land”)." 
Acts1:20 “For Psalms book, God word sey, ‘Make en house empty, make nobody stay der again and make anoda pesin take en place.’" 
Acts1:21 So, make one pesin from di men wey dey follow us since di time wey Oga God Jesus Christ dey with us," 
Acts1:22 from wen dem baptize am, until e go up leave us; make e kon join us tell pipol di trut sey, Jesus Christ don raiz-up from grave.”" 
Acts1:23 So dem choose two men, one na Josef wey dem dey koll Barsabas (but some pipol dey koll am Justus) and di oda one, na Matias." 
Acts1:24 Den dem kon pray, “Oga God Jesus Christ, na yu know wetin dey inside evribody mind. Make yu show us di pesin wey yu wont among dis two pipol," 
Acts1:25 so dat e go take Apostle Judas, wey kill ensef, place.”" 
Acts1:26 Naim dem kon vote to choose between di two men and di pesin wey dem choose, na Matias." 
Acts2:1 Wen Pentekost Day rish, di disciples kon gada for one place." 
Acts2:2 At wons, one kind nois wey bi like heavy breeze kom from heaven kon full di whole house where dem sidan." 
Acts2:3 Dem kon si small-small fire wey bi like kandol lite dey fall kom from heaven on-top dia head, one-by-one." 
Acts2:4 Den di Holy Spirit enter dia body and as di Spirit give dem pawa, dem kon start to tok for difren language." 
Acts2:5 Dat time, Jew and oda pipol dey stay for Jerusalem." 
Acts2:6 Wen pipol hear di nois, dem sopraiz kon gada, bikos evribody dey hear di disciples dey tok with difren language, wey demsef dey tok for dia kountry." 
Acts2:7 As di pipol dey sopraiz, dem kon dey ask each oda, “All dis pipol wey dey tok so, nor bi Galilee dem from kom?" 
Acts2:8 How e bi sey dem dey speak awa difren language? 
Acts2:9 Wi wey kom from Partia, Medes, Elam, Mesopotamia, Judea, Kappadocia for Pontus and all di aria wey dey for Asia," 
Acts2:9 Wi wey kom from Partia, Medes, Elam, Mesopotamia, Judea, Kappadocia for Pontus and all di aria wey dey for Asia," 
Acts2:10 Frigia and Pamfilia, even di pipol from Egypt and di aria for Libya near Sirene, plus all di strenjas wey kom from Rome," 
Acts2:11 weda dem bi Jew or Gentile, wey dey serve God with dem, like pipol from Krete and Arabia, all of us dey hear, as dem dey use awa language praiz God!”" 
Acts2:12 All of dem sopraiz and di tin konfuse dem well-well. So dem kon dey ask each oda wetin dis kind tin mean. 
Acts2:13 But some among dem dey laf di pipol wey dey speak di difren language kon dey sey, “Dis pipol don drink well-well!”" 
Acts2:14 But Pita stand up with di eleven apostles kon shaut: “Judea pipol and una wey dey Jerusalem, make una put ear down for wetin I won tell una so. Make una know sey" 
Acts2:14 But Pita stand up with di eleven apostles kon shaut: “Judea pipol and una wey dey Jerusalem, make una put ear down for wetin I won tell una so. Make una know sey" 
Acts2:15 dis men neva drink anytin as una tink, bikos na just nine oklok for morning and e too early to drink." 
Acts2:16 But Profet Joel sey: 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Wen di last day don rish, God sey, “I go pour my Spirit inside evribody and all una shidren, both boys and girls go dey profesai, una yong men go dey si vishon and una old men go dey dream plenty dreams." 
Acts2:18 For dat time, I go give my Spirit to all di pipol wey dey serve mi and dem go dey profesai." 
Acts2:19 I go show plenty wonders for heaven and many mirakles for dis world, blood and fire go appear for inside di sky like smoke." 
Acts2:20 Di sun go black and di moon go red like blood, before di big day wen God tok about, go rish." 
Acts2:21 For dat time, evribody wey koll God name, God go save am.” ’" 
Acts2:22 “Israel pipol, make una hear wetin I dey tok, Jesus Christ wey kom from Nazaret, di man wey God choose and wey e send to una, wey God use do many mirakles and oda wonderful signs for una front, as all of una know," 
Acts2:23 na Judas sell dis man give Jew pipol, bikos na so God plan am from biginnin. Una know sey una kill-am, wen una gi-am to di sojas make dem nail am for cross." 
Acts2:24 But God kon raiz am up afta E don gi-am pawa to win deat, bikos deat nor get pawa to hold am." 
Acts2:25 Dis na wetin David tok about sey, “ ‘God always dey near mi and bikos e dey for my rite hand, I nor go fear anytin." 
Acts2:26 Bikos of dis, belle sweet mi and my mout kon dey tok betta-betta tins and I kon get hope sey tins go really good for mi," 
Acts2:27 bikos I know sey God nor go allow mi stay for grave or make my body rotin for groun. 
Acts2:28 “True-true, yu don show mi di way wey dey give life and yu go make mi happy well-well wen I dey for where yu dey.” ’" 
Acts2:29 “My pipol, Nor bi true sey awa grand-grand papa, David don die since, dem beri am and en grave dey awa land till today?" 
Acts2:30 Wi know sey en na profet, bikos God don promise am sey, naim pikin dem go always bi king for Israel." 
Acts2:31 Bikos of dis vishon wey David si, e kon sey, ‘Di Mezaya go get up from grave, bikos God nor go leave am der make en body rotin for groun.’ As all of us know," 
Acts2:32 God don raiz dis Jesus Christ up and evribody si am. 
Acts2:33 Bikos God don promote am make e dey en rite hand and e don receive di Holy Spirit wey en Papa promise and naw, e don pour di Holy Spirit for awa body, as una si am dey happen so." 
Acts2:34 Wi know sey David neva go heaven, but only en tok with en mout sey, “ ‘God tell my oga sey, “Sidan for my rite hand," 
Acts2:35 until I go make all yor enemies serve yu.” ’ 
Acts2:36 So Israel pipol, make una know sey, God don turn dis Jesus Christ wey una kill, to bi Oga God and Mezaya.”" 
Acts2:37 Wen di pipol hear dis prishin, e trobol dem for mind well-well and dem kon ask Pita and di rest apostles, “Awa brodas, wetin wi go do naw?”" 
Acts2:38 Pita ansa dem, “Make una turn from sin kom meet God one-by-one and make dem baptize una with Jesus Christ name, so dat God go forgive una, den una go fit receive di Holy Spirit." 
Acts2:39 Bikos dis promise na for una, all una pikin, pipol wey dey far place and all di pipol wey God go draw near ensef.”" 
Acts2:40 As Pita dey tok to di pipol, e kon warn dem, “Make una save una head from di ponishment wey dey kom meet wiked pipol.”" 
Acts2:41 So, dem baptize all of dem wey bilive wetin e prish and dem rish 3,000 pipol wey join dem dat day." 
Acts2:42 Dem kon dey use all dia time dey learn wetin di apostles dey tish. Dem dey waka, help, chop and pray togeda." 
Acts2:43 Di apostles do many wonders and mirakles and bikos of dis, pipol kon dey respet and fear God." 
Acts2:44 All di pipol wey bilive, dey share dia propaty with one anoda and stay togeda." 
Acts2:45 Dem dey sell wetin dem get kon use di money dey help each oda. 
Acts2:46 Dem dey stay togeda evriday like one big family. Dem dey gada go di temple togeda and dem dey go from house to house, dey chop togeda with happiness." 
Acts2:47 Dem kon dey praiz God and dey fellowship with one anoda. So God kon dey add more pipol join dem evriday. 
Acts3:1 One day, Pita and John dey go di temple go pray for three oklok for aftanoon." 
Acts3:1 One day, Pita and John dey go di temple go pray for three oklok for aftanoon." 
Acts3:2 Some pipol dey always karry one man, wey nor fit waka since en mama born am, kom di temple door-mot wey dem dey koll, “Beautiful Gate”, so dat e go dey beg for money from pipol, wey dey enter inside di temple." 
Acts3:3 As di man si Pita and John wen dem won enter di temple, e kon dey beg dem for money," 
Acts3:3 As di man si Pita and John wen dem won enter di temple, e kon dey beg dem for money," 
Acts3:4 but dem look am strait for eye kon sey, “Make yu look us!”" 
Acts3:5 So di man wey nor fit waka kon look dem well-well, bikos e tink sey dem won gi-am money." 
Acts3:6 Pita kon tell am, “I nor get silva or gold to give yu: but na wetin I get, I go give yu. With Jesus Christ name wey kom from Nazaret, stand up make yu bigin waka!”" 
Acts3:7 Pita hold di man for en rite hand kon drag am up and at wons, di man legs kon strong." 
Acts3:8 Di man jump up bigin waka, e follow dem enter di temple dey waka, dey jump up-and-down, dey praiz God." 
Acts3:9 Pipol si am dey waka dey praiz God
