Acts3:10 and dem remember en face kon sey, dis na di man wey dey sidan for di temple door-mot dey beg money, before. Di pipol sopraiz well-well, bikos of wetin happen." 
Acts3:11 Di man still dey jump follow Pita and John with happiness and di pipol still dey sopraiz. Den di pipol run go meet Pita and John for di place wey dem dey koll “Solomon Varanda.” 
Acts3:11 Di man still dey jump follow Pita and John with happiness and di pipol still dey sopraiz. Den di pipol run go meet Pita and John for di place wey dem dey koll “Solomon Varanda.” 
Acts3:12 Wen Pita si sey all di pipol gada, e kon start to dey prish, “Israel pipol, wetin make dis mirakle dey sopraiz una like dis? Why una dey look us like sey na with awa own pawa or holiness wi take make dis man waka?" 
Acts3:13 Na Abraham, Isaak, Jakob and awa grand-grand papa God, naim karry en savant Jesus Christ go up, di one wey una rijet kon gi-am to Pilate make e judge am, even wen e won free am." 
Acts3:14 Una sey una nor wont Jesus Christ, di holy and Raitious Pesin, instead una sey make dem release anoda pesin wey dey kill pipol give una." 
Acts3:15 Una kill di pesin wey dey give pipol life, but God raiz am from deat and wi bear witness sey dis na true." 
Acts3:16 Dat Jesus Christ name wey wi bilive, naim make dis man wey una dey si and know well-well, strong. Yes! Naim name don heal dis man as una dey si so." 
Acts3:17 So my brodas, I know sey una and una oga dem nor know wetin una do." 
Acts3:18 God don tok before-before thru all en profet sey, di Mezaya go sofa and E don make am happen, thru wetin una do." 
Acts3:19 So make una turn from sin kom meet God, make E for forgive una," 
Acts3:20 so dat una go fit get freedom wey God dey give and E go send Jesus Christ, di Mezaya wey E don prepare down, kom meet una." 
Acts3:21 Dis Jesus Christ go stay for heaven till di time wey God go make evritin betta again as E don tok thru en holy profets. 
Acts3:22 Even Moses sef tok before sey, Jehovah wey bi una God go send one profet to una, just as E send mi and e go bi una family memba. Una must obey evritin wey e sey make una do." 
Acts3:23 Anybody wey nor obey dat profet, dem go distroy am and dem go remove am from God family." 
Acts3:24 God don tok about all dis tins wey dey happen so, from Profet Samuel time go rish di profets wey kom afta am." 
Acts3:25 All of una get share for inside di promise wey God make with una grand-grand papa dem thru di profets. Na so E tell Abraham sey, ‘Na thru di pikin wey yu go born, naim I go take bless all di family wey dey di world.’" 
Acts3:26 So God don raiz en savant and E don send am give una, make e for bless and help una turn from sin kom meet am.”"

Acts5:1 One man wey dem dey koll Ananias with en wife Saffira kon sell dia land. 
Acts5:2 Dem kon gri sey dem go keep some for di money for demsef. So Ananias take di remainin money go give di apostles. 
Acts5:3 But Pita tell am, “Ananias, why yu allow Satan enter yor heart and yu kon dey lie give di Holy Spirit? Why yu keep some for di money wey una sell di land, for unasef?" 
Acts5:4 Before una sell di land, nor bi una own propaty? Naw wen una sell am finish, di money nor still bi una own to spend as una like? Wetin make una get dis kind mind? Dis lie wey yu tok so, nor bi pesin yu do am to, but na God!”" 
Acts5:5 Wen Ananias hear di word wey Pita tok, e fall for groun at wons kon die. Dis tin make fear katch evribody wey hear wetin happen." 
Acts5:6 So di yong men wey dey der, take wrapa kover en body kon karry am go beri." 
Acts5:7 Wen three hours don pass, en wife, Saffira waka kom, but e nor know wetin don happen to en husband." 
Acts5:8 Den Pita ask am, “Madam, tell mi di trut. Na dis bi di prize wey una sell di land? Saffira ansa, ‘Yes, na-im.’ ”" 
Acts5:9 So Pita tell am, “Wetin make yu and yor husband decide to try God Spirit like dis? Look! Na di pipol wey go beri yor husband dey kom so and dem go karry yu go beri too!”" 
Acts5:10 At wons, di woman fall for groun kon die for Pita front. So wen di yong men enter inside di house kon si sey di woman don die, dem karry am go beri near where dem beri en husband put." 
Acts5:11 Fear katch di pipol for di church and odas wey hear wetin happen. 
Acts5:12 Na dis kind mirakle and wonder God do thru di apostles for di pipol front and dem kon dey meet for Solomon Varanda. 
Acts5:13 Fear nor let anybody wey nor dey among dem go join dem anyhow and e kon make all di pipol dey respet dem well-well. 
Acts5:14 But plenty men and wimen wey bilive Jesus Christ kon join dem," 
Acts5:15 sotey dem even dey karry pipol wey nor well put for bed and mat for road, so dat as Pita dey pass, en shadow go heal dem." 
Acts5:16 Dem bring pipol well nor well and doz wey get evil spirit from all di town and village wey near Jerusalem and God heal all of dem. 
Acts5:17 But jealousy kon full di High Priest and di Sadusi pipol mind," 
Acts5:18 so dem kon arrest di apostles put for prison. 
Acts5:19 But for dat nite, God angel open di prison door kon bring dem kom out and tell dem," 
Acts5:20 “Make una go stand for di temple varanda bigin prish God word wey dey give pipol life.” 
Acts5:21 Afta dem hear dis, dem enter di temple varanda for morning kon start to dey tish di pipol. Den di priest oga dem and di pipol wey dey follow am kon koll di Sanhedrin, wey bi di big kansol for Israel pipol. Dem send pipol go di prison make dem go bring di apostles kom, bikos dem won judge dia kase." 
Acts5:22 But di savant wey dem send go, nor si dem for di prison, so dem go back go ripot sey," 
Acts5:23 “Wi si sey dem lock di prison well and all di sojas stand for di front, but wen wi open di gate, wi look inside, but wi nor si anybody.”" 
Acts5:24 So wen di soja oga wey dey di temple and di priest oga dem hear dis tin, dem sopraiz well-well kon dey wonder wetin happen to di apostles." 
Acts5:25 Na dat time one pesin kon tell dem sey, “Si o-o, di men wey una put for prison dey for di temple varanda dey tish pipol!”" 
Acts5:26 So di soja oga wey dey di temple kon escort di savant go bring di apostles, but dem nor use force, bikos dem dey fear sey di pipol wey gada der, fit stone dem." 
Acts5:27 Wen dem don bring dem inside, dem kon sey make dem stand for di kansol front and di priest oga dem kon dey kweshon dem." 
Acts5:28 E ask dem, “Wi kommand una sey make una nor tish pipol about dis name, but si naw, di whole Jerusalem don full with di tins wey una dey tish. Una won put dis man blood for awa head?”" 
Acts5:29 But Pita and di apostles ansa, “Wi go must obey God instead of human being." 
Acts5:30 Na di God wey awa grand-grand papa dem serve raiz-up Jesus Christ wey una hang for tree. 
Acts5:31 But God don promote am sey make e sidan for en rite hand kon gi-am big pozishon as Oga God and di Pesin wey go save di world, so dat Israel shidren go turn from dia sin kom meet God make e forgive dem." 
Acts5:32 All of us know sey dis tin na true and di Holy Spirit wey God don give to pipol wey dey obey am, dey still bear witness sey, dis tin na true.”" 
Acts5:33 Wen di priest oga dem hear dis tin, dem kon vex well-well and won kill di apostles." 
Acts5:34 Den one Farisee wey dem dey koll, Gamaliel, wey dey tish di law and wey di pipol dey respet well-well kon stand up tok, “Make una send dis men go outside first.”" 
Acts5:35 Den e kon tok to di kansol, “Una Israel oga, make una tink well before una do anytin to dis men." 
Acts5:36 Bikos na so Teudas still kom up before, dey tok sey en na pesin wey dey important and na about four hundred pipol follow am. Wen dem kill-am, all di pipol wey dey follow am skata and evritin kon end." 
Acts5:37 Afta am, Judas wey kom from Galilee kom out wen dem dey do census. E push pipol to join am oppoz wetin dem dey do. Dem still kill-am and all di pipol wey dey follow am skata too." 
Acts5:38 Naim make I sey for dis matter so, make una remove una hand and leave all dis men, bikos if all di tins wey dem dey plan and do, na from dia mind, dem nor go susid," 
Acts5:39 but if na from God, una nor go fit stop dem, escept una won fight God.”"

Acts5:41 So di apostles komot from der dey happy well-well sey God don give dem di shance to sofa, bikos of Jesus Christ." 
Acts5:42 So evriday for di temple kompond and from house to house, dem kontinue to dey tish and prish di Good News sey, “Na Jesus Christ bi di Mezaya.”" 
Acts6:1 As time dey go, wen di disciples don plenty, di Jew pipol wey dey tok with Greek language kon dey kworel with di oda kountry-men wey dey tok Hibru. Dem kon dey komplain sey, “Wen dem dey share food, di Hibru men dey sofa wimen wey dia husband don die.”" 
Acts6:2 So di twelf apostles gada evribody kon sey, “E nor good make wi leave God word wey wi dey prish kon put hand for food matter." 
Acts6:3 So make una look round kon choose among una, seven men wey una know sey dey bihave well; di Holy Spirit dey use well-well and wey get sense, so dat dem go do dis work for us." 
Acts6:4 So dat wi go fit put awa mind for prayer, as wi dey prish God word.”" 
Acts6:5 Evribody like wetin di apostles tok, so dem kon choose one man wey en name na Stefen, bikos di Holy Spirit dey use am well-well. Di odas wey dem choose, na Filip, Prokorus, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas and Nikolas wey kom from Antiok and e dey serve God like Jew pipol." 
Acts6:6 Dem show dem to di apostles. Di apostles put hand for dia head kon pray for dem. 
Acts6:7 Na so God word start to spread and di disciples wey dey Jerusalem kon plenty well-well. And many priests kon bilive Jesus Christ. 
Acts6:8 God bless Stefen well-well kon gi-am pawa to take do many wonders and mirakles among di pipol. 
Acts6:9 But some men kon dey argue with am. Dis men dey woship God for one place wey dem dey koll “Di Freedmen Sinagog.” Some among dem kom from Alexandria, Sirene, Silisia and Asia." 
Acts6:10 But dis pipol nor fit stand di wisdom and pawa wey Stefen take dey tok. 
Acts6:11 So, dem kon bribe some men make dem lie sey, “Wi hear wen dis man tok tins wey dey against Moses and God law.”" 
Acts6:12 Dem lie for Stefen head, so di pipol, di eldas and di oga dem for di law kon hate am. So dem arrest Stefen kon karry am go di kansol." 
Acts6:13 Dem bring pipol kon lie sey, “E don tey wey dis man dey tok bad-bad tins about Moses Law and dis Temple." 
Acts6:14 Wi hear wen e dey tok sey Jesus Christ wey kom from Nazaret go skata dis place and e go shange all di tradishon wey Moses give us.” 
Acts6:15 Evribody wey dey di kansol dey look Stefen kon si sey en face dey shine like angel own.

Acts7:5 Dat time, God neva gi-am any part for di land and e neva born any pikin, but God promise am sey E go gi-am di land and en and en shidren go stay der forever."

Acts8:21 Yu nor get share for inside dis tin wey God dey give, bikos God don si sey na bad tin yu won take am do." 
Acts8:22 So make yu turn from sin kom meet God and from di bad tins wey dey yor mind and pray make God forgive yu.

Acts8:28 and e dey go house back. E sidan for en horse dey read di book wey Profet Isaya rite. 
Acts8:29 Naim di Holy Spirit tell Filip, “Make yu waka go meet di man.”" 
Acts8:30 So Filip run go meet am kon hear am dey read wetin Profet Isaya rite. So e ask di man, “Yu undastand wetin yu dey read so.”" 
Acts8:31 Di man ansa, “How I won take undastand, unless pesin tish mi!” E kon tell Filip sey make e kom sidan with am." 
Acts8:32 Na di place wey e dey read for God word bi dis, “Dem lead am like sheep go kill and as sheep pikin dey kwayet wen dem dey shave am, na so too e nor open en mout." 
Acts8:33 Dem disgrace am kon take pawa from en hand. Nobody go fit tok about en shidren or en grand-shidren, bikos dem kill-am wen e still dey yong.”" 
Acts8:34 So di man ask Filip, “Abeg tell mi, na who dis profet dey tok about? Na ensef, abi na anoda pesin?”" 
Acts8:35 Filip kon start to prish di Good News about Jesus Christ give di man from di place wey e dey read. 
Acts8:36 As dem dey go, dem kon rish where wota dey, naim di man sey, “Si, wota dey here! Wetin go make mi nor baptize naw?”" 
Acts8:37 Filip ansa, “If yu bilive, I go baptize yu.” Di man kon sey, “I bilive sey Jesus Christ na God Pikin.”" 
Acts8:38 So e tell di driver make e stop, Filip with am waka go where di wota dey and e kon baptize am." 
Acts8:39 Wen dem kom out from di wota, God Spirit karry Filip komot from der and di man nor si am again, but e kon dey happy as e dey go." 
Acts8:40 Filip si ensef for Azotus and as e dey waka pass for di aria, e kon dey prish di Good News for all di towns till e rish Caesaria." 
Acts9:1 As all dis tins dey happen, Saul still dey tell di disciples sey e go kill dem. E go meet di High Priest" 
Acts9:2 kon take pamishon to go Damaskus, so dat if e si anybody wey dey follow Jesus Christ wey bi di Way, weda na man or woman, e go arrest dem kom Jerusalem." 
Acts9:3 As e dey go, one lite from heaven kon shine round where e dey." 
Acts9:4 E fall for groun kon hear one vois wey koll en name, “Saul, Saul, wetin make yu dey ponish mi?”" 
Acts9:5 So e ansa, “Oga God, na who dey tok so?” Di vois ansa am, “I bi Jesus Christ wey yu dey ponish!" 
Acts9:6 Naw, make yu get up go inside di town and dem go tell yu wetin yu go do.”" 
Acts9:7 Di men wey dey follow am travel, sopraiz dey look, bikos dem hear vois dey tok, but dem nor si anybody." 
Acts9:8 So Saul get up from groun, en eye open, but e nor dey si. En friends hold en hand kon escort am enter Damaskus." 
Acts9:9 E nor si at-all for three days and for dat time, e nor chop or drink anytin." 
Acts9:10 Dat time, e get one disciple for Damaskus and en name na Ananias. God koll am for inside vishon, “Ananias”, e kon ansa, “Na mi bi dis, Oga God.”" 
Acts9:11 God tell am, “Get up make yu go di street wey dem dey koll ‘Strait’ and wen yu rish Judas house wey dey der, make yu look for one man, en name na Saul and e kom from Tarsus. Yu go meet am dey pray for der." 
Acts9:12 I don show am for vishon sey one man wey dem dey koll Ananias go kom meet am and e go put hand for en head, pray for am, make e for fit si again.”" 
Acts9:13 But Ananias ansa, “Oga God, many pipol don tell mi about dis man and all di wiked tins wey e don do to yor pipol for Jerusalem." 
Acts9:14 E even kollect leta from di priest oga dem, wey e go take katch and trow pipol wey bilive yu, for prison.”" 
Acts9:15 But God tell Ananias, “Make yu go meet am, bikos I don choose am make e karry my name to Gentile pipol, kings and all Israel pipol." 
Acts9:16 True-true I go show am how e go sofa, bikos of my name.”" 
Acts9:17 So Ananias go di house and wen e enter, e put en hand for Saul head kon sey, “Broda Saul, di Oga God wey show ensef to yu for road wen yu dey kom here, na en send mi kom meet yu, so dat yu go fit si again kon receive di Holy Spirit.”" 
Acts9:18 At wons, sometin wey bi like fish skale fall komot from Saul eye and e kon dey si. E get up and dem baptize am." 
Acts9:19 Afta e chop finish, en body kon strong again and Saul kon stay Damaskus for some days with di disciple." 
Acts9:20 At wons, e kon start to dey prish for di sinagog sey Jesus Christ na God Pikin." 
Acts9:21 Evribody wey hear am kon dey sopraiz dey ask demsef sey, “Dis nor bi di man wey dey kill pipol wey bilive Jesus Christ? Wi tink sey e kom here kon arrest pipol karry go give di priest oga dem.”" 
Acts9:22 But Saul still dey prish with pawa. E dey show sey na Jesus Christ bi di Mezaya and di Jew pipol wey dey for Damaskus, nor fit ansa am." 
Acts9:23 Afta some days, di Jew pipol kon dey plan to kill-am," 
Acts9:24 but Saul hear wetin dem dey plan. Some pipol dey wosh for di town gate day and nite make dem for fit kill-am wen dem si am. 
Acts9:25 But one nite, di pipol wey dey follow Saul kon put am for basket, trow am down small-small from one small window wey dey near di town fence." 
Acts9:26 Wen e rish Jerusalem, e kon try to join di disciples, but dem dey fear am, bikos dem nor bilive sey e don bi Jesus Christ disciple." 
Acts9:27 So Banabas take Saul go meet di apostles, den e tell dem how Saul take si Jesus Christ for vishon wen e dey go Damaskus and how e bigin prish with boldness about Jesus Christ." 
Acts9:28 Saul stay and waka with dem for Jerusalem and e dey tok with boldness about Jesus Christ. 
Acts9:29 E bigin dey tok and argue with di Jew pipol wey dey speak Greek, but some pipol kon dey try to kill-am." 
Acts9:30 Wen di brodas know about wetin dem dey plan, dem kon take am go Caesaria and from der, dem send am go Tarsus." 
Acts9:31 Dat time, di church wey dey Judea, Galilee and Samaria get rest and dis kon make dem strong as dem dey stay togeda, dey woship God with all dia heart and as di Holy Spirit dey tok to dem. So pipol wey dey di church kon dey plenty more-more." 
Acts9:31 Dat time, di church wey dey Judea, Galilee and Samaria get rest and dis kon make dem strong as dem dey stay togeda, dey woship God with all dia heart and as di Holy Spirit dey tok to dem. So pipol wey dey di church kon dey plenty more-more." 
Acts9:32 Pita dey travel from one place go anoda and e still go where di bilivers dey for Lydda. 
Acts9:33 E kon meet one man for der, en name na Aeneas wey nor fit waka since wen e bi eight years." 
Acts9:34 Pita kon tell am, “Aeneas, Jesus Christ, wey bi di Mezaya, won heal yu naw. So make yu stand up, karry yor bed!” At wons, e get up kon karry en bed." 
Acts9:35 All di pipol wey dey Lydda and Sharon si wetin happen and dem kon bigin follow Jesus Christ. 
Acts9:36 One woman dey for Joppa wey bi Jesus Christ disciple and en name na Tabita (wey mean Dorkas for Greek language). E dey do good tins and dey help poor pipol. 
Acts9:37 E sick and e kon die. Wen di pipol don wosh en dead body, dem kon karry am put for one room for upstair." 
Acts9:38 Bikos Lydda dey near Joppa, so wen di disciples hear sey Pita dey der, dem kon send two men go koll am sey, “Make yu kom meet us at wons.”" 
Acts9:39 So Pita get up follow dem and wen e rish der, dem kon take am go di room for up. All di wimen wey dia husband don die stand near Pita dey kry and dey show am all di dress wey Dorkas make for dem, wen e dey with dem." 
Acts9:40 But Pita drive all of dem go outside, den e knee down kon pray. E turn face di dead body kon sey, “Tabita, get up!” Naim di woman open en eye and wen e si Pita, e kon sidan." 
Acts9:41 Pita kon hold en hand stand up. E koll di bilivers and all di wimen wey dia husband don die, kon give di woman to dem." 
Acts9:42 Wen evribody for Joppa hear dis tin wey happen, many of dem kon bilive Jesus Christ." 
Acts9:43 Pita kon stay for Joppa for many days with one man wey dem dey koll Simon, wey dey do leda work." 
Acts10:1 One man wey en name bi Kornelius dey stay for Caesaria and e bi offisa for Italy soja. 
Acts10:2 E dey holy and en and en family dey woship God. E dey help di pipol well-well and dey pray to God evritime. 
Acts10:3 One day, around three oklok for aftanoon, e si vishon where God angel for koll am, “Kornelius.”" 
Acts10:4 Fear katch am as e dey look di angel, so e ansa, “Oga God, Wetin yu wont?” Di angel tell am, “God don hear yor prayer and si all di good tins wey yu dey do for poor pipol." 
Acts10:5 So, send some men go Joppa make dem go koll one man wey en name bi Simon Pita." 
Acts10:6 Di man dey stay with Simon wey dey do leda work and di house dey near di sea.” 
Acts10:7 Wen di angel don go, Kornelius kon koll two of en house boys with one soja wey dey serve am" 
Acts10:8 and wen e don tell dem evritin wey happen, e kon send dem go Joppa." 
Acts10:9 For aftanoon for di next day, as di men dey near di town, Pita kon go di housetop go pray," 
Acts10:10 afta sometaim, e kon dey hongry, but di food neva ready. As e dey wait, e kon si vishon." 
Acts10:11 For di vishon, e si sey heaven open and sometin wey bi like tray, wey dem whole for en for korna kon dey kom down small-small." 
Acts10:12 Difren-difren animals wey get four legs and di ones wey dey creep for groun and difren birds dey inside di tray. 
Acts10:13 Den one vois tell am, “Pita, get up, kill make yu chop.”" 
Acts10:14 But Pita ansa, “Oga God, I nor go fit, bikos yu know sey since dem born mi, I neva chop anytin wey get blood or wey nor klean.”" 
Acts10:15 But di vois tell am, “Wetin God don make klean, make yu nor forbid am.”" 
Acts10:16 Dis tin happen three times and di tray kon go back to heaven. 
Acts10:17 As Pita still dey wonder wetin di vishon mean, di men wey Kornelius send kon rish Simon house." 
Acts10:18 Dem ask if anybody wey bi Simon Pita dey di house. 
Acts10:19 As Pita still dey tink about di vishon, di Holy Spirit kon tell am, “Look! Three men dey find yu." 
Acts10:20 Make yu get up go meet dem and make yu follow dem, bikos na Mi send dem kom.”" 
Acts10:21 So Pita go down go meet di men kon sey, “Na mi bi di pesin wey una dey look for. Wetin bring una kom?”" 
Acts10:22 Dem ansa, “Kornelius, di soja offisa, wey dey do good tins and dey woship God well-well, wey all Jew pipol dey respet, na-im send us kom. One angel kommand am sey make e invite yu kom prish gi-am.”" 
Acts10:23 So Pita sey make dem enter house and e welkom dem well-well. Di next day, e kon follow dem go and some brodas for Joppa, follow am go too." 
Acts10:24 Afta dem don travel for one full day, dem kon rish Caesaria. Kornelius don gada all en family and friends dey wait for dem." 
Acts10:25 So as Pita enter di kompond, Kornelius knee down for en front kon dey woship am." 
Acts10:26 But Pita hold am kon sey, “Stand up, bikos I bi ordinary human being like yu.”" 
Acts10:27 As Pita still dey follow am dey tok wen e enter di house, e kon si sey many pipol gada dey wait am." 
Acts10:28 E tell dem, “Una know sey di law nor allow us, wey bi Jew pipol, to visit Gentile pipol or follow dem do anytin, but God don show mi sey make I nor sey anybody nor dey klean." 
Acts10:29 Na dis make wen una send pipol kom koll mi, I nor sey ‘No’. So make una tell mi, ‘Why una koll mi?’ ”" 
Acts10:30 Kornelius ansa, “For days ago, for dis kind time for aftanoon, as I dey pray for my house, one man wey en dress dey shine kon stand for my front." 
Acts10:31 E kon sey, ‘Kornelius, God don hear yor prayer and E don remember all di good tins wey yu dey do." 
Acts10:32 So make yu send pipol go Joppa go koll Simon, wey dem dey koll Pita. E dey stay as strenja with Simon wey dey do leda work, wey e house dey near di sea.’" 
Acts10:33 So, I kon send pipol go koll yu and yu do well as yu kom. Na wi bi dis for God present, wi ready to hear wetin E sey make yu tell us.”" 
Acts10:34 Den Pita tell dem, “Naw, I don undastand sey God nor dey opress anybody,"

Acts10:39 All of us si di tins wey e do for Judea and Jerusalem, but dem hang am for three kon kill-am."

Acts10:42 E kon kommand us make wi prish and warn pipol sey, na en ensef bi di Pesin wey God choose make e judge pipol wey dey alive and di ones wey don die." 
Acts10:43 All di profets tok about am sey, ‘Evribody wey bilive am, thru en name, God go forgive dem.’ ”"

Acts11:1 Di apostles and di brodas wey dey Judea kon hear sey Gentile pipol too don receive God word.

Acts11:3 “Yu go chop with pipol wey dem nor sekonsaiz.” 
Acts11:4 But Pita tell dem evritin wey happen. E kon sey," 
Acts11:5 “As I dey pray for Joppa I kon si vishon. For inside di vishon, I si sometin wey bi like tray dey kom down small-small from heaven, dem hold am for four korna and e kon stop for my front." 
Acts11:6 As I look inside, I kon si animals wey get four legs, bush meat, di ones wey dey creep and difren-difren birds." 
Acts11:7 I still hear one vois wey tell mi sey, ‘Get up Pita, kill some, make yu chop.’" 
Acts11:8 But I ansa, ‘Oga God, I nor fit, bikos since dem born mi, I neva chop anytin wey nor dey klean.’" 
Acts11:9 But di vois from heaven kon tell mi again, ‘Wetin God don make klean, make yu nor forbid am!’" 
Acts11:10 Dis tin happen three times, den di tray kon go heaven back." 
Acts11:11 Na dat same time three men wey dem send kom meet mi from Caesaria kon rish di house where wi dey stay. 
Acts11:12 Di Holy Spirit kon tell mi sey make I follow dem go. Six brodas for Joppa follow mi go too and wi kon enter di man house. 
Acts11:13 Di man tell us how e si angel wey stand for en house kon tell am, ‘Send pipol go Joppa go koll Simon wey dem dey koll Pita." 
Acts11:14 Wen e kom, e go give yu di message wey God go use take save yu and yor family.’" 
Acts11:15 And wen I start to tok, di Holy Spirit kon enter dem, just as e enter us for di first time."

Acts11:19 All di pipol wey skata komot from Jerusalem for di time wey dem kill Stefen kon travel go far place like Foenicia, Cyprus and Antiok, dey prish give only Jew pipol." 
Acts11:20 But some among dem wey kom from Cyprus and Sirene kon go Antiok dey tok to di Greek pipol about di Good News wey koncern Jesus Christ. 
Acts11:21 God pawa dey with dem and many pipol wey bilive kon bigin dey follow Jesus Christ. 
Acts11:22 Wen di pipol for di church wey dey Jerusalem hear di news, dem kon send Banabas go Antiok." 
Acts11:23 Wen e rish der kon si how God don bless di pipol, e happy well-well kon enkourage dem sey make dem kontinue to woship God with all dia heart." 
Acts11:24 Banabas na betta pesin, di Holy Spirit dey inside am and e get faith well-well, so many pipol kon bigin follow Jesus Christ."

Acts11:28 One among dem wey en name bi Agabus, get up and di Holy Spirit kon put word for en mout sey, “Heavy honga go happen for di whole world.” Dis tin happen di time wen Klaudius dey rule."

Acts12:4 Wen e don katch Pita put for prison, e put four gangs, wey get four four soldiers each, make dem guide am. Herod plan na to bring Pita out make e judge am for di whole town front wen Passova don finish." 
Acts12:5 So as Pita dey prison, di pipol wey dey di church dey pray to God for am, day and nite." 
Acts12:6 But for di nite before dem go judge am, dem tie Pita with two shains and e sleep for two sojas centre. Oda sojas still dey di prison front, dey guide am." 
Acts12:7 God angel appear and lite kon shine for di prison. Di angel wake Pita kon tell am, “Get up kwik-kwik!” At wons, di shains fall komot from Pita hand." 
Acts12:8 Di angel sey, “Wear yor klot and yor sandal.” So Pita do wetin di angel tell am. Den di angel sey, “Wear yor koat make yu follow mi.”" 
Acts12:9 Pita follow am go outside. Even doh e bilive sey wetin dey happen so na true, e tink sey na dream e dey dream."

Acts12:11 Wen Pita si sey all dis tins wey dey happen nor bi dream, e kon sey, “Naw I know sey, True-true, God send en angel kon save mi from Herod hand and from all di tins wey di Jew pipol tink sey go happen.”"

Acts13:1 Dis na di profets and tishas wey dey di church for Antiok: Banabas, Simeon wey dem dey koll Naija, Lucius wey kom from Sirene, Manaen (wey bi Herod di Tetrak friend from small pikin) and Saul." 
Acts13:2 As dem dey fast and woship God, di Holy Spirit kon tell dem, “Make una separate Banabas and Saul for di work wey I wont make dem do.”" 
Acts13:3 Afta dem don fast and pray finish, dem pray for Banabas and Saul kon send dem go." 
Acts13:4 So Banabas and Saul wey di Holy Spirit send kon go Seleucia and from der, dem enter ship go Cyprus." 
Acts13:5 Wen dem rish Salamis, dem kon dey prish God word for di Jew sinagog, (John dey der dey help dem.)" 
Acts13:5 Wen dem rish Salamis, dem kon dey prish God word for di Jew sinagog, (John dey der dey help dem.)" 
Acts13:6 Wen dem don cross di whole Island go rish Pafos, dem kon si one magician wey bi Jew and na wayo profet. En name na Bar-Jesus," 
Acts13:7 e dey with Sergius Paulus, one Roman offisa wey know book well-well. Di offisa invite Banabas and Saul kom en house, bikos e won hear God word." 
Acts13:8 But “Elymas” wey bi magician, (bikos na wetin en name mean bi dat) kon dey oppoz dem, so dat di Roman offisa nor go bilive wetin dem dey prish." 
Acts13:9 But Saul (wey dem dey koll Paul) wey get di Holy Spirit, look Elymas for face" 
Acts13:10 kon tell am, “Yu devil pikin wey nor like good tin, na so-so wayo and bad tins yu sabi do, yu nor go stop to dey oppoz God?" 
Acts13:11 Naw, God don raiz en hand against yu. Yor eye go blind and yu nor go fit si for sometaim!” At wons, e eye just blind and darkness kover en face and e kon dey take hand find pipol make dem show am road." 
Acts13:12 So wen di Roman offisa si wetin happen, e kon bilive, bikos e sopraiz well-well for wetin dem tish about Jesus Christ." 
Acts13:13 Paul and di pipol wey follow am kon travel from Pafos go rish Perga wey dey for Pamfilia, but John Mark leave dem kon go back to Jerusalem." 
Acts13:13 Paul and di pipol wey follow am kon travel from Pafos go rish Perga wey dey for Pamfilia, but John Mark leave dem kon go back to Jerusalem." 
Acts13:13 Paul and di pipol wey follow am kon travel from Pafos go rish Perga wey dey for Pamfilia, but John Mark leave dem kon go back to Jerusalem." 
Acts13:14 Wen dem komot for Perga, dem rish Antiok for Pisidia for Sabat Day kon enter di sinagog go sidan." 
Acts13:15 Afta dem don read from di law and di profets book, di oga for di sinagog kon send message go meet dem sey, “Awa brodas, if una get any message to take enkourage di pipol, make una kon tok naw.”" 
Acts13:16 So, Paul stand up raiz en hand kon sey: “Israel and Gentile pipol wey dey fear God, make una hear wetin I won tok:" 
Acts13:17 Na from Israel pipol God choose awa grand-grand papa dem and E kon make dem great for di time wey dem dey Egypt as strenja and E karry dem komot from Egypt with en own hand. 
Acts13:18 For forty years, E stay with dem for inside wildaness." 
Acts13:19 Afta E don distroy seven tribes for Kanaan, E kon dash en pipol di land." 
Acts13:20 All dis tins happen for four hundred and fifty years. Afta dis, E kon give dem profet wey go judge dem, until Profet Samuel time rish." 
Acts13:21 Di pipol kon ask for king and God give dem Saul, wey bi Kish pikin, wey kom from Benjamin tribe and e rule dem for forty years." 
Acts13:22 Afta God remove am, E kon make David dia king. Na dis man God tok about sey, ‘I don si David, Jesse pikin, di man wey I like well-well and e go do evritin wey I wont.’" 
Acts13:23 Na from dis man family God give Israel, Jesus Christ, di Savior wey E promise dem before." 
Acts13:24 Before Jesus kom, John di Baptist don prish to all Israel pipol sey make dem turn from sin kom meet God and make e baptize dem." 
Acts13:24 Before Jesus kom, John di Baptist don prish to all Israel pipol sey make dem turn from sin kom meet God and make e baptize dem." 
Acts13:25 But as John dey finish en work, e kon tok many times sey, ‘Wetin una tink sey I bi? Nor bi mi bi di Mezaya. Make una si, somebody dey kom afta mi. I nor rish to remove shoe from en leg!’" 
Acts13:25 But as John dey finish en work, e kon tok many times sey, ‘Wetin una tink sey I bi? Nor bi mi bi di Mezaya. Make una si, somebody dey kom afta mi. I nor rish to remove shoe from en leg!’" 
Acts13:26 So my brodas, wey bi Abraham shidren and una wey bi Gentile pipol wey dey fear God, na di message about how God go take save pipol, naim wi kom tell una so." 
Acts13:27 Bikos di pipol wey dey stay for Jerusalem and all di rulers nor know am, so dem kon use wetin dem dey read for Sabat Day, wey di profets tok, take kill-am." 
Acts13:28 Even doh dem nor si anytin wey go make dem kondemn am, dem still tell Pilate make e kill-am." 
Acts13:29 Wen dem don do evritin wey Bible tok about am, dem bring am down from di cross kon put am for grave." 
Acts13:30 But God raiz am from deat 
Acts13:31 and for many days, e appear to di pipol wey dey follow am from Galilee go rish Jerusalem. Na dis pipol kon dey bear witness sey, dis tins na true." 
Acts13:32 And wi dey tell una di Good News about dis tins wey God promise awa grand-grand papa dem. 
Acts13:33 E don do wetin E promise us and dia shidren, wen E raiz Jesus Christ, as dem rite am for Psalms sey, ‘Yu bi my Pikin and today, I don bi yor Papa.’" 
Acts13:34 But bikos E don raiz Jesus Christ from deat make e nor for rotin, God kon sey: ‘I go give yu di holy promise wey una fit trust, wey I promise David.’" 
Acts13:35 E still tok for anoda Psalms sey, ‘Yu nor go allow yor Pikin wey dey holy, make e rotin.’" 
Acts13:36 Bikos David, afta e don do wetin God send am kon do among en pipol, e kon die and dem beri am with en grand-grand papa dem and e rotin," 
Acts13:37 but di pesin wey God raiz-up, nor rotin." 
Acts13:38 So my pipol, make una know sey, na thru dis Pesin wi dey prish sey, ‘God go forgive una.’" 
Acts13:39 True am, evribody wey bilive, go dey free from evritin wey Moses Law nor fit free dem from." 
Acts13:40 So make una make sure sey wetin di profets tok for groun, nor happen to una:" 
Acts13:41 “ ‘Una wey dey laf; make una hear, una go sopraiz till una die! Bikos I go do sometin for una time, sometin wey una nor go bilive even if dem tell una.’ ”" 
Acts13:42 As Paul and Banabas dey komot, di pipol kon dey beg dem make dem still kon tok about all dis tins for di next Sabat Day." 
Acts13:43 Wen di meetin for di sinagog don finish, many Jew and Gentile pipol wey dey fear God kon follow Paul and Banabas, dey enkourage dem sey, make dem kontinue for di grace wey God give dem." 
Acts13:44 Di next Sabat Day, nearly evribody for di town gada make dem for hear God word." 
Acts13:45 But wen di Jew pipol si as di pipol plenty rish, jealousy kon full dia mind, so dem start to oppoz wetin Paul dey tok kon dey curse am." 
Acts13:46 Paul and Banabas kon use boldness take ansa dem, “E good sey na una wi first prish God word give. But since una rijet am and una nor ready to get life wey nor dey end, wi go-go prish give Gentile pipol." 
Acts13:47 Bikos dis na wetin God don already kommand us sey: ‘I don choose una to bi lite for Gentile pipol, make una bring salvashon kom dis world.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Wen di Gentile pipol hear wetin e tok, dem start to happy kon dey tank God for en word and evribody wey God don choose to get life wey nor dey end, kon bilive." 
Acts13:49 So God word kon dey spread round di whole kountry. 
Acts13:50 But di Jew pipol tok bad tins about Paul and Banabas give all di big wimen wey dey fear God and di big-big men for di town, so dem sofa dem and drive dem komot from di aria." 
Acts13:51 So wen dem don shake di land san-san wey dey dia leg komot, dem kon go Ikonium." 
Acts13:52 So di disciples kon dey happy and di Holy Spirit full dia life. 
Acts14:1 For Ikonium, Paul and Banabas go inside di Jew sinagog and dem prish sotey many Jew and Greek pipol kon bilive God word." 
Acts14:2 But di Jew pipol wey nor gri bilive, gada di Gentile pipol kon spoil dia mind against Paul and Banabas." 
Acts14:3 Di apostles stay der tey well-well and dem tok with boldness about God, wey show sey dia message about en goodness na true, bikos E kon give dem pawa to do many mirakles and wonders." 
Acts14:4 But di pipol wey dey di town kon divide; some dey di Jew side and some dey di apostle side. 
Acts14:5 Di Gentile and di Jew pipol (with di oga dem wey dey rule dem) kon dey try to sofa and stone di disciples," 
Acts14:6 but wen Paul and Banabas know about am, dem kon run go Lystra and Derbe wey dey for Lykaonia and all di aria wey dey near der" 
Acts14:7 and dem kon kontinue to dey prish for der. 
Acts14:8 For Lystra, dem meet one man wey nor fit waka since wen dem born am." 
Acts14:9 Di man dey listin to Paul as e dey tok. Wen Paul look am for eye kon si sey e get faith wey go fit heal am," 
Acts14:10 e tell am, “Stand up.” Di man kon jump up and e bigin waka." 
Acts14:11 Wen di pipol si wetin Paul do, dem kon shaut for Lykaonia language sey, “Awa gods don turn to human being kom meet us.”" 
Acts14:12 Dem start to koll Banabas, “Zeus” and Paul, “Hermes”, bikos na Paul dey lead dem." 
Acts14:13 Di priest wey dey woship di god wey dem dey koll Zeus wey en shrine dey outside di town kon bring melu and flowers kom di town gate; so dat en and all di pipol go sakrifice give di apostles. 
Acts14:14 Wen Banabas and Paul hear about di tin wey di pipol won do, dem shaut, tear dia klot kon run go meet di pipol sey," 
Acts14:15 “Why una won do dis kind tin? Wi too na human being like una! Wi kon tell una di Good News, wey go make una turn from sin kom meet God, wey make heaven, eart, sea and all di tins wey dey inside dem." 
Acts14:16 Before-before, E let difren tribes dey do as dem like," 
Acts14:17 but E nor stop to do good for una, E dey give una rain from heaven and food from groun, so dat una go chop and belle go sweet una.”" 
Acts14:18 But as Paul and Banabas tok rish, dem nor fit stop di pipol make dem nor do di sakrifice." 
Acts14:19 But afta some Jew pipol wey kom from Antiok and Ikonium don win di pipol mind, dem kon stone Paul, drag am komot from di town, bikos dem tink sey e don die." 
Acts14:20 And as di disciples gada round am, e get up kon waka go back to di town. Di next day, en and Banabas kon komot go Derbe." 
Acts14:21 Afta dem don prish God word for dat town and many pipol don turn from sin kom meet God, dem kon go back to Lystra, Ikonium and Antiok." 
Acts14:22 Dem enkourage di disciples sey make dem get heart and make dem kontinue to dey bilive sey, “Wi go must sofa well-well for pipol hand, before wi go fit enter God Kingdom.”" 
Acts14:23 Wen dem don choose eldas wey go lead di bilivers for di difren-difren church, dem kon pray and fast sey, make God protet dem." 
Acts14:24 Dem kon leave Pisidia go Pamfilia 
Acts14:25 and wen dem don prish for Perga, dem kon go Atalaya." 
Acts14:26 From der, dem enter ship go Antiok, where dem for first pray for dem, for di work wey dem just finish naw." 
Acts14:27 Wen dem rish Antiok, dem gada di pipol kon tell dem all di tins wey God use dem do and how E open road for Gentile pipol to bilive." 
Acts14:28 So dem stay der for sometaim with di bilivers. 
Acts15:1 Some men kom from Judea kon dey tish di brodas sey, “Unless dem sekonsaiz una di way Moses tok for di law, una nor go fit get salvashon.”" 
Acts15:1 Some men kom from Judea kon dey tish di brodas sey, “Unless dem sekonsaiz una di way Moses tok for di law, una nor go fit get salvashon.”" 
Acts15:2 Wen Paul and Banabas don argue with di pipol well-well, di church pipol kon send Paul and Banabas with some oda pipol go Jerusalem go meet di apostles and di eldas, so dat dem go ask dem about di matter." 
Acts15:3 So di church send dem go and as dem dey go, dem pass Foenicia and Samaria kon tell pipol wey dem meet for der how Gentile pipol take turn from dia sin kom meet God and di story make all di brodas wey hear am, happy well-well." 
Acts15:4 Wen dem rish Jerusalem, di whole church with di apostles and di eldas kon welkom dem, den dem tell dem evritin wey God don use dem do." 
Acts15:5 But some Farisee wey don bilive Christ stand up kon sey, “E good make wi tell Gentile pipol make dem sekonsaiz and do evritin wey Moses Law tok.”" 
Acts15:6 Di apostles and di eldas kon whole meetin to tok about di matter. 
Acts15:7 Afta dem don argue well-well about di matter, Pita kon stand up sey, “My brodas, una know sey before-before, na mi God choose make e go prish give Gentile pipol make dem hear and bilive en word." 
Acts15:8 And God, wey know wetin dey inside pipol mind, don show ensef to dem wen E give dem di Holy Spirit, just as E give us" 
Acts15:9 and E nor do wayo between wi and dem bikos, E make dia heart klean by faith." 
Acts15:10 So why una won kon try God? Load wey wi and awa grand-grand papa dem nor fit karry, why una dey put am for dis disciples head?" 
Acts15:11 Wi bilive sey God save us thru grace wey kom from Jesus Christ, just as E do for dis Gentile pipol too.”" 
Acts15:12 Evribody wey dey for der kon kwayet dey hear wetin Banabas and Paul dey tok and dem tell dem about di mirakles and wonders wey God use dem do among Gentile pipol. 
Acts15:13 Afta dem don tok finish, James ansa, “Awa brodas, make una hear wetin I won tok." 
Acts15:13 Afta dem don tok finish, James ansa, “Awa brodas, make una hear wetin I won tok." 
Acts15:14 Pita don tell us how God first choose some pipol from Gentile wey go dey tok about am. 
Acts15:15 Dis tins gri with wetin di profets tok before sey: 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Afta all dis tins, I go kom back and I go build David house wey don fall; I go build am with all di san wey skata for groun and e go strong again," 
Acts15:17 so evribody go kom meet God, plus Gentile pipol wey I don koll to bi my pipol.’ God wey make all dis tins, na so E tok" 
Acts15:18 and E know sey na so e go bi. 
Acts15:19 “So, I go sey make wi nor make tins hard for Gentile pipol wey just start to serve God," 
Acts15:20 but instead, make wi rite leta go give dem sey, make dem nor chop food wey dem sakrifice give juju and make dem nor sleep with who dem nor marry, animal wey dem kill and di blood nor tosh groun, make dem nor chop or drink en blood." 
Acts15:21 Bikos na since awa grand-grand papa dem time dem don dey prish Moses Law for di sinagog for evry Sabat Day.” 
Acts15:22 So di apostles, eldas and di whole church kon gri sey dem go send some men follow Paul and Banabas go Antiok. Den choose Judas, wey dem dey koll Barsabas and Silas and dem bi leaders among di brodas." 
Acts15:23 Na wetin dem rite for di leta, bi dis, “From di apostles and eldas wey bi una brodas, to all di brodas and sistas wey bi Gentile wey dey Antiok, Siria and Silisia. Wi greet una o-o!" 
Acts15:24 Wi hear sey some pipol kom meet una sey dem kom from us, even doh wi nor send dem. Dem dey konfuse and tell una wetin go disturb una mind." 
Acts15:25 So all of us kon gri sey make wi choose pipol wey go follow Banabas and Paul, wey bi awa friend, kom meet una." 
Acts15:26 Dis men dey risk dia life, bikos of awa Oga God Jesus Christ name." 
Acts15:27 So wi send Judas and Silas wey go tell una all dis tins by demsef. 
Acts15:28 Bikos wi and di Holy Spirit nor won put heavy load for una head, so na dis small advise wi dey give una:" 
Acts15:29 ‘Wi advise sey make una forbid meat and blood wey dem don sakrifice give juju and any animal wey una kill wey en blood nor tosh groun. And make una nor sleep with who una nor marry.’ If una forbid all dis tins, una go do well!”" 
Acts15:30 So wen dem don send dem go, dem kon go Antiok and afta dem gada evribody, dem kon give dem di leta." 
Acts15:31 Bikos of wetin dem rite put for di leta, all di pipol happy wen dem read am out." 
Acts15:32 But Judas and Silas, wey bi profet, enkourage di pipol and wetin dem tok kon make di pipol heart strong." 
Acts15:33 Afta dem don stay der tey small, di brodas kon send dem back with peace to di pipol wey send dem kom." 
Acts15:34 But Silas sey e go still stay der for sometaim. 
Acts15:35 Paul, Banabas and odas kon still stay for Antiok dey tish and prish God word." 
Acts15:36 Afta some days, Paul kon tell Banabas, “Make wi go back go visit di brodas for all di town wey wi for prish God word, so dat wi go know how dem dey.”" 
Acts15:37 Banabas won kon karry John Mark follow body," 
Acts15:37 Banabas won kon karry John Mark follow body," 
Acts15:37 Banabas won kon karry John Mark follow body," 
Acts15:38 but Paul sey make dem nor karry am, bikos na so e take leave dem for Pamfilia before and e nor follow dem do di work." 
Acts15:39 Dis matter kon kause sirious kworel, sotey dem kon separate. Banabas take Mark follow body and dem kon enter ship go Cyprus," 
Acts15:39 Dis matter kon kause sirious kworel, sotey dem kon separate. Banabas take Mark follow body and dem kon enter ship go Cyprus," 
Acts15:40 but Paul choose Silas and dem go meet di brodas and sistas kon pray make God bless dem. 
Acts15:41 Paul pass thru Siria and Silisia dey enkourage di pipol wey dey di church dem for der. 
Acts16:1 Paul kon still go Derbe and Lystra. One disciple wey dem dey koll Timoti dey der. En mama na Jew wey bilive Christ, but en papa, na Greek." 
Acts16:2 Di brodas wey dey Lystra and Ikonium dey tok good about am. 
Acts16:3 Paul wont make Timoti follow am, so e sekonsaiz am, bikos di Jew pipol wey dey for di aria, know sey en papa na Greek." 
Acts16:4 As dem dey go from town to town, dem kon dey pass di message wey di apostles and eldas for Jerusalem send to all di Gentile pipol wey bilive Christ sey, make dem obey." 
Acts16:5 So di pipol for di church dey strong more-more for faith and dem kon dey plenty evriday. 
Acts16:6 Dem pass thru Frigia and Galatian aria, bikos di Holy Spirit warn dem sey make dem nor prish di message for Asia." 
Acts16:7 Wen dem rish Mysia, dem kon try to enter inside Bitynia, but Jesus Christ Spirit nor allow dem enter," 
Acts16:8 naim dem pass thru Mysia kon face Troas. 
Acts16:9 Paul si dis vishon for nite: One man wey kom from Masidonia stand dey beg am sey, “Make yu kom help us for Masidonia!”" 
Acts16:10 Wen Paul si dis vishon finish, wi kon try to go Masidonia. Wi kon bilive sey God don koll us make wi go prish di Good News to di pipol wey dey der." 
Acts16:11 Wi travel for wota from Troas and awa ship kon from der go Samotrace and di next day, wi go Neapolis" 
Acts16:12 and from der, to Filippi wey bi nomba one town for Masidonia, wey Rome dey rule. Wi stay for dis town for some days." 
Acts16:13 Wen Sabat Day rish, wi komot from di town go di wotaside, where wi tink sey wi go si where dem for dey pray, naim wi sidan kon start to dey tok to di wimen wey gada for der." 
Acts16:14 E get one woman wey dey listin to us, en name na Lydia and e kom from Tiatira. E dey fear God well-well and dey sell purpol klot. God open en heart to bilive evritin wey Paul tok." 
Acts16:15 Afta en and en family don baptize, e kon beg us sey, “If una don asept mi as pesin wey bilive Christ, make una kon stay for my house.” So e beg us until wi gri." 
Acts16:16 One day, as wi dey go di place where dem for dey pray, one slave girl wey get spirit wey dey make am si vishon, kon si us. Di girl oga dey use am make plenty money, anytime e tell pipol wetin go happen." 
Acts16:17 Di girl kon dey follow mi and Paul for back dey shaut sey, “Dis pipol na God savants o-o, dem dey prish to una about how una go take save.”" 
Acts16:18 E kontinue to dey shaut like dis for many days. So di tin vex Paul well-well, naim e turn face di girl kon tell di spirit, “I kommand yu with Jesus Christ name, komot for dis girl body!” At wons, di spirit komot from di girl body." 
Acts16:19 But wen di pipol wey get di girl si sey wetin dem take dey make money don go, dem seize Paul and Silas kon drag dem go meet di town oga dem for di market centre." 
Acts16:20 Den dem drag dem go meet di judge dem kon sey, “All dis men dey kause wahala for dis town. Dem bi Jew" 
Acts16:21 and dem dey tish law wey nor bi awa own, since wi bi Rome pipol.”" 
Acts16:22 All di pipol wey gada for der kon join put mout against dem and di judge dem kon give orda sey, make dem remove Paul and Silas klot komot for dia body and flog dem with heavy stik." 
Acts16:23 Afta dem don flog dem well-well, dem put dem for prison kon tell di warda make e guide dem well-well." 
Acts16:24 Bikos of dis strong orda, di warda put dem for inside-inside di prison kon hook dia leg with big-big shains." 
Acts16:25 Wen mid-nite rish, Paul and Silas kon dey pray and sing song give God and all di pipol wey dey di prison dey listin to dem." 
Acts16:26 At wons, di groun start to shake, sotey all di wall and pilas wey dey di prison kon dey shake too. Na wons di door open and di shains wey dem take hook di pipol wey dey di prison, kon luz." 
Acts16:27 Wen di warda wake-up kon si sey all di doors for di prison open, e bring en swod kom out, won kon kill ensef, bikos e tink sey all di prisonas don run." 
Acts16:28 But Paul shaut, “Make yu nor kill yorsef, all of us still dey for here!”" 
Acts16:29 Naim di warda sey make dem bring lite and e rush enter inside di prison kon fall for Paul and Silas front dey shake. 
Acts16:30 E bring dem kom outside kon ask, “My oga dem, wetin I go do to dey save?”" 
Acts16:31 Dem ansa am, “Bilive Jesus Christ and yu go save, both yu and all yor family.”" 
Acts16:32 Den, dem prish God word give en and all di pipol wey dey en house." 
Acts16:33 Dat nite, di warda kon wosh all dia sore; den en and en family kon baptize." 
Acts16:34 Di warda bring dem enter en house kon put food for tabol make dem chop. E happy well-well sey en and en family don bilive God. 
Acts16:35 Wen day break, di judge dem kon send sojas sey, “Make una go release doz men.”" 
Acts16:36 Di warda tell Paul, “Di judge dem don give orda sey make wi free una. So make una kon dey go.”" 
Acts16:37 But Paul tell di sojas, “Dem sey make dem beat us for publik even wen dem neva judge awa kase, even doh sey wi bi Rome pipol, dem still trow us for prison. Naw, dem won free us from back make pipol nor for know? Wi nor gri! Make dem kom here by demsef kon release us!”" 
Acts16:38 Di sojas kon ripot wetin Paul tok give di judge dem. Fear katch dem wen dem hear sey Paul and Silas na Rome pipol," 
Acts16:39 so dem kon beg dem sey make dem nor vex. Afta dem bring dem kom out, dem kon beg dem well-well sey make dem leave di town." 
Acts16:40 Wen dem don komot for prison, dem enter Lydia house and wen dem si di brodas, dem enkourage dem before dem leave di town." 
Acts17:1 Afta dem pass Amfipolis and Apollonia, dem kon rish Tesalonika where one Jew sinagog dey." 
Acts17:2 Paul go meet di Jew pipol for di sinagog as e dey do before and for three Sabat Day, e kon dey tish dem God word," 
Acts17:3 dey show dem how God word sey Christ must sofa and e go raiz from grave. E tell dem, “Dis Jesus wey I dey tell una about so, naim bi di Christ.”" 
Acts17:4 Some among dem wey bilive kon join Paul and Silas and many Greek pipol wey dey fear God and some big-big wimen, join dem too." 
Acts17:5 But di Jew pipol dey jealous, so dem kon gada aria boys wey dey waka about for market, take form gang to skata di town. Dem attack Jason house, bikos dem tink sey Paul and Silas dey der, so dat dem go bring dem out kon take dem go di town hall." 
Acts17:6 Wen dem nor si dem, dem kon drag Jason and some for en brodas go meet di town oga, dey shaut, “All dis pipol wey don start wahala for di world, don rish here too" 
Acts17:7 and Jason put dem for en house like visitor! Dem dey do wetin dey against Caesar law, dey tok sey anoda king dey wey en name bi Jesus Christ!”" 
Acts17:8 Dem kause konfushon among di pipol wey gada and di town oga dem wey hear all dis tins. 
Acts17:9 Afta di oga dem don kollect money from Jason and di brodas, dem kon allow dem go." 
Acts17:10 At wons, di brodas send Paul and Silas go Berea for nite. Wen dem don rish der, dem kon go di Jew sinagog." 
Acts17:11 Dis Jew pipol get betta mind pass di ones wey dey for Tesalonika, bikos dem open mind take bilive di message and dem dey read God word evriday to shek weda all di tins wey dem hear, na true." 
Acts17:12 Na so many of dem take bilive, even with some big-big men and wimen wey bi Greek." 
Acts17:13 But wen di Jew pipol wey dey for Tesalonika hear sey Paul don rish Berea dey prish God word, dem kon go der go kause wahala and spoil di pipol mind." 
Acts17:14 Naim di brodas send Paul go di wotaside, but Silas and Timoti still stay for Berea." 
Acts17:15 Di pipol wey follow Paul, escort am go rish Atens and afta, e orda dem sey make Silas and Timoti kom meet am kwik-kwik for der, so dem kon go back." 
Acts17:16 As Paul dey Atens dey wait for dem, e kon dey vex for en spirit, bikos e si sey na so-so juju full di town." 
Acts17:17 So e tok to di Jew and Gentile pipol wey dey fear God wey dey inside di sinagog and e still tok to evribody wey dey di market. 
Acts17:18 So some wise men wey dey learn Epikurean and Stoik kon dey tok with am and some sey, “Wetin dis mumu and toku-toku tink sey e know wey e won tell us?” Some still sey, “E bi like sey e dey prish about some gods from anoda tribe.” (Dem tok so, bikos e dey prish di Good News about Jesus Christ and en resureshon.)" 
Acts17:19 So dem take Paul go Areopagus kon tell am, “Wi beg, make yu tell us about dis new tin wey yu dey tish so?" 
Acts17:20 Bikos di tins wey yu dey tok, wi neva hear am before and wi like to know wetin dem mean.”" 
Acts17:21 (Atens pipol and odas wey dey der, nor get any oda work pass make dem sidan dey tok story about any new tin wey dey happen.)" 
Acts17:22 So Paul stand for Areopagus front kon sey, “My pipol wey dey for Atens, I si sey una like God matter well-well." 
Acts17:23 Bikos as I waka round dey look all di tins wey una dey woship, I even si one shrine wey dem rite put sey: ‘To di god wey pipol nor know.’ So wetin una dey woship wey una nor know, naim I kon tell una about today." 
Acts17:24 God wey make di world and evritin wey dey inside, wey bi di Oga God for heaven and eart, nor dey stay inside house wey human being build" 
Acts17:25 and E nor wont make human being gi-am sometin like sey E nid anytin, bikos naim dey give life and air wey wi dey breath." 
Acts17:26 Na thru one man E make all di tribes wey dey di world and E tok di time and place where dem go find God rish," 
Acts17:27 so dat as dem dey look for God, dem go si am, even doh E nor dey far from all of us." 
Acts17:28 Bikos na inside am wi dey live, waka, get life and some of una wey dey rite poem tok sey, ‘Wisef na God pikin.’" 
Acts17:29 So, as e bi sey wi bi God pikin, make wi nor tink sey God bi like image wey human being use gold, silva or stone take make." 
Acts17:30 God don forgive us for di time wen wi nor know wetin wi dey do, but naw, E dey kommand pipol for evriwhere sey make dem turn from sin kom meet am," 
Acts17:31 bikos E don choose one day wey E go take judge di world with raitiousness thru di man wey E choose and show evribody wen E raiz am from deat.” 
Acts17:32 Wen di pipol hear sey pipol go raiz from deat, some kon dey laf, but odas sey, “Yu go tell us dis matter again.”" 
Acts17:33 So Paul kon komot from Areopagus. 
Acts17:34 But some pipol wey bilive Christ kon join am. Inside dis pipol wey bilive so, na Dionysius wey bi memba for Areopagus and one woman wey dem dey koll Damaris, with oda pipol wey join dem." 
Acts18:1 Afta dis tins, Paul komot from Atens go Korint." 
Acts18:2 For der, e kon si one Jew wey dem dey koll Akwila, wey kom from Pontus and e just kom back from Italy with en wife Priscilla, bikos Klaudius orda sey make all Jew pipol komot from Rome. Paul go meet dem" 
Acts18:3 and bikos dem dey do di same work, e kon stay with dem dey follow dem work (na tent dem dey make sell)." 
Acts18:4 E dey tok to both Jew and Greek pipol for di sinagog evry Sabat Day, so dat dem go bilive." 
Acts18:5 Wen Silas and Timoti kom from Masidonia, Paul kon use all en mind dey prish di word, dey tok to Jew pipol sey, na Jesus bi di Christ." 
Acts18:6 Wen dem oppoz and curse am, e shake en dress kon sey, “Make una blood dey una head, bikos I nor do any bad tin and from today go, I go-go prish for Gentile pipol!”" 
Acts18:7 Den Paul komot for di sinagog go Titus Justus house; di man na Gentile wey dey woship God and en house dey near di sinagog. 
Acts18:7 Den Paul komot for di sinagog go Titus Justus house; di man na Gentile wey dey woship God and en house dey near di sinagog. 
Acts18:8 Krispus, di oga for di sinagog and en family, plus many Korint pipol wey hear about Jesus Christ, bilive and dem kon baptize dem." 
Acts18:9 Jesus kon tell Paul for vishon for nite, “Make yu nor kwayet bikos of fear, but make yu open yor mout dey tok," 
Acts18:10 I dey for yor side and nobody go fit do yu anytin, bikos I get plenty pipol for dis town.”" 
Acts18:11 So Paul stay der for one year and six monts dey tish di pipol God word. 
Acts18:12 Wen Gallio dey rule for Akaia, Jew pipol join togeda attack Paul kon karry am go di judgement seat." 
Acts18:13 Dem sey, “Dis man dey bribe pipol to woship God and dat tin dey against awa law!”" 
Acts18:14 But just as Paul won start to tok, Gallio kon tell di Jew pipol sey, “If na bikos of one offence or sirious wayo, I for listin to una komplain," 
Acts18:15 but since na matter about word, name and una own law, make una go setol am by unasef. I nor go judge all doz kind tins!”" 
Acts18:16 So e drive dem komot from di judgement seat. 
Acts18:17 Dem kon seize Sostenes, wey bi oga for di sinagog kon start to beat am for di judgement seat front. But Gallio do like sey all dis tins nor koncern am." 
Acts18:18 Afta Paul don stay many days for Korint, e kon tell all di brodas bye-bye, den e enter ship go Siria, but Priscilla and Akwila follow am go. For Cenchrea, e kon kut en hair bikos e make vow." 
Acts18:19 Wen dem rish Efesus, Paul leave Priscilla and Akwila for der, but en ensef enter di sinagog go follow di Jew pipol tok." 
Acts18:20 Wen dem sey make e stay with dem small, e nor gri," 
Acts18:21 but e tell dem bye-bye kon sey, “If God wont, I go kom again kon si una.” Den e enter ship from Efesus" 
Acts18:22 and wen e rish, Caesaria pass go Jerusalem go salot di pipol for di church wey dey der, before e go Antiok." 
Acts18:23 Afta e don stay small for der, Paul komot kon travel pass all di aria wey dey Galatian and Frigia, dey enkourage all di disciples." 
Acts18:24 E get one Jew man, en name na Apollos and e from Alexandria go Efesus. Apollos sabi tok and e know di Bible well-well." 
Acts18:25 Dem don tish am about Jesus and na with high spirit e take dey tok and tish about Jesus Christ, but na only John baptizim e know rish." 
Acts18:25 Dem don tish am about Jesus and na with high spirit e take dey tok and tish about Jesus Christ, but na only John baptizim e know rish." 
Acts18:26 E kon dey tok with boldness for di sinagog, but wen Priscilla and Akwila hear am dey tok, dem koll am go korna kon esplain God word gi-am well-well." 
Acts18:27 Wen Apollos one cross go Akaia, di brodas enkourage am kon gi-am leta make e give di disciples, so dat dem go welkom am. Wen e rish der, e kon join dey help di bilivers," 
Acts18:28 bikos e nor gri with wetin di Jew pipol dey tok for publik and e show dem from di Bible sey na Jesus Christ, bi di Mezaya." 
Acts19:1 For di same time wen Apollos dey Korint, Paul travel pass inside town until e rish Efesus. For der, e meet some disciples" 
Acts19:2 kon ask dem, “Una don receive di Holy Spirit, since una don bilive Christ?” Dem ansa, “No! Wi neva even hear sey Holy Spirit dey.”" 
Acts19:3 Paul ask dem, “Na how dem kon take baptize una?” Dem ansa, “Na John baptizim.”" 
Acts19:3 Paul ask dem, “Na how dem kon take baptize una?” Dem ansa, “Na John baptizim.”" 
Acts19:4 Paul kon tell dem, “John baptize pipol wey turn from sin kom meet God with wota kon tell dem make dem bilive di pesin wey go kom afta am and na dat pesin, bi Jesus Christ.”" 
Acts19:4 Paul kon tell dem, “John baptize pipol wey turn from sin kom meet God with wota kon tell dem make dem bilive di pesin wey go kom afta am and na dat pesin, bi Jesus Christ.”" 
Acts19:5 Wen dem hear wetin Paul tok, dem kon baptize dem with Jesus Christ name" 
Acts19:6 and as Paul put hand for dia head, di Holy Spirit enter dem and dem kon start to speak difren language, dey profesai." 
Acts19:7 (Na twelf disciples Paul follow tok.) 
Acts19:8 So Paul enter di sinagog kon dey tok with boldness for three monts. E dey show di pipol how dem go take bilive God Kingdom. 
Acts19:9 But wen some sturbon pipol nor gri bilive, dem kon dey spoil Jesus Christ name for all di pipol front, so Paul with en disciples kon leave dem. Paul dey take en disciples follow body evriday, go tish for Tirannus Hall." 
Acts19:10 Dis tin kontinue for two years until evribody wey dey stay for Asia aria, weda na Jew or Greek, hear God word." 
Acts19:11 Dat time, God use Paul dey do many wonderful mirakles," 
Acts19:12 even handkachief and klot wey dem take tosh Paul body, dey heal sick pipol and drive evil spirit from pipol body, wen dem use am tosh dem." 
Acts19:13 But some Jew wey dey waka about kon try to koll Jesus Christ name for pipol wey evil spirit dey disturb dey sey, “I kommand yu with Jesus Christ name wey Paul dey prish.”" 
Acts19:14 (So, Skeva wey bi Jew priest, get seven sons wey dey do dis kind tin.)" 
Acts19:15 But di evil spirit ansa dem, “Yes! I know who Jesus Christ bi, I still know Paul too, but who una bi?”" 
Acts19:16 Naim di man wey di evil spirit dey inside en body kon jump for dia body beat dem well-well, until dem start to beg. E beat dem till dem run komot from di house with nakednes and all dia body full with sore." 
Acts19:17 Wen evribody wey dey stay Efesus, both Jew and Greek, hear di story, fear katch dem and Jesus Christ name kon dey reign." 
Acts19:18 Pipol wey nor bilive, kom out kon dey konfess all di bad tins wey dem dey do." 
Acts19:19 Some wey dey do majik, bring all dia book kon burn dem to ashes for evribody front. Wen dem add di prize for all di book, e rish 50,000 silva koins." 
Acts19:20 So God word kon dey grow more-more and dem kon dey win many souls. 
Acts19:21 Afta all dis tins happen, Paul kon sey e go-go Jerusalem thru Masidonia and Akaia. E plan sey, “Afta I don rish der, I go still go Rome.”" 
Acts19:22 So, afta e send two men wey dey help am, Timoti and Erastus go Masidonia, e kon still stay Asia small." 
Acts19:23 Dat time sirious wahala happen bikos of “Christ Way” wey dem dey prish. 
Acts19:24 E get one man, en name na Demetrius and e dey mold silva image. Na dis man mold Artemis shrine and dey help pipol wey dey mold, make plenty money." 
Acts19:25 Di man kon gada all di pipol wey dey mold, with oda men wey dey do dat kind work, den e tell dem, “My pipol, una know sey na dis business wi take dey chop." 
Acts19:26 And una don si and hear sey dis Paul don take many pipol komot from awa hand. Nor bi only for dis Efesus, but for di whole Asia, bikos e dey tell dem sey di gods wey dem mold, nor bi god at-all." 
Acts19:27 So, if wi nor do sometin, awa business go spoil and nor bi only dat one, but pipol nor go respet di temple wey awa juju, Artemis, dey stay again and dis woman wey di whole Asia dey woship, nor go get pawa again.”" 
Acts19:28 Wen di pipol hear dis tins, dem vex well-well kon start to shaut, “Artemis wey dey Efesus, na yu bi awa god!”" 
Acts19:29 Di whole town kon dey shake with nois and all di pipol rush go di stadium dey drag Gaius and Aristakus and di Masidonia pipol wey dey escort Paul. 
Acts19:30 But wen Paul one enter di stadium, di disciples nor allow am." 
Acts19:31 Even some for di oga dem wey bi en friend, send message go meet am sey, make e nor enter di stadium." 
Acts19:32 Na so all di pipol dey shaut anyhow and konfushon kon full evriwhere, many pipol wey gada dey shaut, nor even know why dem gada." 
Acts19:33 Some pipol sey na about Alexanda, bikos di Jew pipol don push am go front. Alexanda wave en hand kon sey, make dem kwayet, make e for fit tok to defend di Jew pipol." 
Acts19:34 But wen dem si sey na Jew e bi, dem kon start to shaut again, “Artemis wey dey Efesus, na yu bi awa god!” Dem shaut like dis rish two hours." 
Acts19:35 “Afta di town sekretary don make di pipol kwayet, e kon sey, My pipol wey dey Efesus, wish pesin dey among una wey nor know sey na Artemis bi Efesus god wey fall from heaven?" 
Acts19:36 So bikos nobody fit argue dis matter, make una kwayet and make una nor do anytin wey nor get head." 
Acts19:37 Una don bring dis men kom here, nor bi bikos dem spoil di temple or curse awa goddes." 
Acts19:38 If Demetrius and di pipol wey dey with am get any komplain against anybody, kourt dey and judge dem dey der too. So make dem take dia kase go der." 
Acts19:39 But if una wont anytin wey pass dis one, na kourt dem go for setol am." 
Acts19:40 Bikos dem fit take all of us go kourt today sey wi dey rayot, bikos wi nor get any rizin for dis konfushon wey dey happen so.”" 
Acts19:41 Afta e tok finish, e kon sey make evribody go dia house." 
Acts20:1 Afta di wahala for Efesus, Paul send for di disciples and afta e enkourage dem, e tell dem bye-bye kon komot der go Masidonia." 
Acts20:2 Afta e waka round di aria, e enkourage di bilivers wey dey der kon go Greece." 
Acts20:3 E stay for der for three monts. Bikos Jew pipol don plan to wait make dem katch am, as e won enter ship go Siria, e kon go back thru Masidonia." 
Acts20:4 Pipol wey follow Paul go, na Sopata, wey bi Pyrrhus pikin wey kom from Berea; Aristakus and Sekundus wey kom from Tesalonika; Gaius from Derbe; Timoti with Tikikus and Trofimus wey kom from Asia." 
Acts20:5 All dis pipol don go for front go wait us for Troas. 
Acts20:6 Wi enter ship from Filippi afta di Passova Feast and afta five days, wi meet dem for Troas kon stay der for seven days." 
Acts20:7 For di first day for di week, wen wi whole meetin to break bread togeda, Paul start to tok with di pipol and bikos e won go di next day, e kon prish till mid-nite." 
Acts20:8 (For di room for upstair where wi for dey meet, lamp many for der)," 
Acts20:9 one boy wey dem dey koll Eutikus, sidan for di window kon dey sleep as Paul dey prish. Di sleep karry am go, so e fall from di three story and wen dem rush go karry am, dem si sey e don die." 
Acts20:10 But Paul go down, liedan on-top di boy kon put en hand round am sey, “Make una nor worry, bikos e still dey alive!”" 
Acts20:11 Den Paul go upstair and afta e don break bread with dem, e follow dem tok till day break. Den e kon komot from der." 
Acts20:12 Dem take di boy go house kon dey happy sey e dey alive. 
Acts20:13 Wi waka go where di ship dey kon go Asoss, so dat wi go karry Paul for der, bikos e plan sey e go pass land go der." 
Acts20:14 Wen e meet us for Asoss, wi karry am for di sheep kon go Mitilene." 
Acts20:15 From der, wi move and di next day, wi kon rish Miletus." 
Acts20:16 Paul don sey e go travel pass Efesus make e for nor spend time for Asia, bikos e dey hurry make e for kwik rish Jerusalem for Pentekost Day." 
Acts20:17 From Miletus, e send messenja go Efesus sey make di eldas wey dey di church kon meet am der." 
Acts20:18 Wen dem kom, e tell dem, “All of una know how I dey live my life since di time wey I dey with una and from di first day wey I enter Asia;" 
Acts20:19 how I nor dey karry body up as I dey serve Jesus with pain and wahala wey I dey face, bikos of di wiked plan wey Jew pipol get for mi." 
Acts20:20 Una know sey I nor stop to dey tell una anytin wey go help una and I tish una for publik and for una house. 
Acts20:21 I dey prish give Jew and Greek pipol sey make dem turn from sin kom meet and serve God and put dia faith for awa Oga God Jesus Christ. 
Acts20:22 Naw, di Spirit dey lead mi go Jerusalem, even doh I nor know wetin go happen to mi for der," 
Acts20:23 escept sey di Holy Spirit dey warn mi sey, from town to town, na prison and sofa dey wait for mi." 
Acts20:24 But I nor kount my life to mean anytin, so dat I go fit finish my work and di ministry wey I receive from Jesus Christ, wey bi to prish about di Good News wey go make pipol undastand God grace." 
Acts20:25 “Naw, I know sey non of una wey I prish God kingdom give, go si mi again." 
Acts20:26 So, I won tell una naw sey, nobody blood dey for my head." 
Acts20:27 Bikos I nor hide anytin from una, as I dey tell una about God plan." 
Acts20:28 Make una take kare of unasef and all di pipol wey di Holy Spirit don put under una, bikos na una bi di leaders for God church wey E buy with en only pikin blood." 
Acts20:29 I know sey afta I don go, wiked pipol with bad mind go kom join una and dis pipol nor go sorry for di ship." 
Acts20:30 Even among una, some men go stand dey tish lie-lie tins kon draw pipol follow body." 
Acts20:31 So make una shine una eye and remember sey, for day and nite for three years, I nor stop to dey kry, as I dey warn una." 
Acts20:32 Naw, I leave una for God hand, so make en word wey get grace, keep una. Dis word wey get grace fit make una grow and get share with all God pipol." 
Acts20:33 Since una know mi, I nor put eye for anybody gold, silva or koat." 
Acts20:34 Una know sey na dis my hand I take dey work and get evritin wey I wont and even dey help pipol wey dey with mi. 
Acts20:35 Like dis, I don show una sey wi must help pipol wey dey weak and una remember wetin Jesus Christ tok, wen e sey, ‘E betta make pesin dey give pipol tins, dan make e dey kollect from dem.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Wen e tok all dis tins finish, e knee down with all of dem kon pray." 
Acts20:37 All of dem start to kry, as dem draw Paul near body kon dey kiss am." 
Acts20:38 Wetin Paul tok, make dem weak, bikos e sey, “Una nor go si mi again.” So dem follow am go rish where di ship dey." 
Acts21:1 Afta wi don leave dem, wi enter ship kon travel go Kos. Di next day, wi go Rhodes and from der, wi kon go Patara." 
Acts21:2 Wi si one ship dey cross go Foenicia, so wi kon enter am." 
Acts21:3 Afta wi rish Cyprus, wi kon leave der travel go Siria, kom stop for Tyre, bikos di ship won put load down." 
Acts21:4 Wi kon go find di disciples wey dey for di town, wen wi si dem, wi stay with dem for seven days. Dem kon tell Paul many times sey make e nor go Jerusalem." 
Acts21:5 Wen wi don stay der for sometaim, wi kon travel komot der. All of dem with dia wife and pikin escort us go outside di town. Wi knee down pray for di wotaside" 
Acts21:6 kon tell dem bye-bye and as wi enter ship, dem kon go back to dia house." 
Acts21:7 Wi kontinue awa journey from Tyre go rish Ptolemais and wen wi don greet di brodas, wi stay with dem for one day." 
Acts21:8 Di next day, wi leave der kon go Caesaria. For der, wi enter Filip house. Dis Filip na evangelist and e dey among di seven deakons wey dem choose for Jerusalem, den wi kon stay der with am." 
Acts21:9 (E get for dotas wey neva marry, wey dey profesai.)" 
Acts21:10 As wi stay der for some days, one profet wey en name na Agabus kom from Judea." 
Acts21:10 As wi stay der for some days, one profet wey en name na Agabus kom from Judea." 
Acts21:11 E waka kon meet us, take Paul belt tie en hand and leg kon sey, “Di Holy Spirit sey, ‘Na so di Jew pipol wey dey Jerusalem go tie di man wey get dis belt kon karry am give Gentile pipol.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Wen wi hear wetin e tok, wi and di pipol wey dey der kon beg Paul sey make e nor go Jerusalem." 
Acts21:13 But Paul ansa, “Wetin una dey do so, una dey kry dey won break my heart? I ready, nor bi only make dem tie mi, but to die for Jerusalem, bikos of Jesus Christ name.”" 
Acts21:14 Bikos wi nor fit stop am again, wi kon keep kwayet and only en kon sey, “Wetin God wont make e happen, go happen.”" 
Acts21:15 Afta dat day, wi prepare kon go Jerusalem." 
Acts21:16 Some disciples from Caesaria follow us go, dem kon take us go Mnason house for Cyprus. Dis Mnason dey among di first disciples and wi stay der with am." 
Acts21:17 Wen wi rish Jerusalem, di brodas welkom us with happiness." 
Acts21:18 Di next day, Paul kon follow us go si James and all di eldas wey dey der." 
Acts21:18 Di next day, Paul kon follow us go si James and all di eldas wey dey der." 
Acts21:19 Wen Paul don greet dem, e kon start to tok di story about wetin God don do for Gentile pipol thru en ministry." 
Acts21:20 Wen dem hear wetin e tok, dem kon dey praiz God. Den, dem tell am, “Yu si, awa broda, many Jew don bilive and dem still dey obey di law!" 
Acts21:21 Dem hear sey yu dey tish Jew pipol wey dey stay with Gentile pipol, sey make dem trowey Moses Law; make dem nor sekonsaiz dia shidren again and make dem nor follow awa laws again." 
Acts21:22 So, wetin wi go do? Bikos dem go really hear sey yu don kom." 
Acts21:23 So make yu do wetin wi won tell yu: For men dey with us here wey make vow; 
Acts21:24 take dem follow body make una go do wetin Moses Law tok and make yu pay all di money wey dem spend take shave dia head. Den, evribody go know sey all di story wey dem hear about yu, nor bi true and dem go si sey yu yorsef dey obey di law." 
Acts21:25 But for Gentile pipol wey don bilive, wi don rite leta go give dem sey, make dem forbid meat wey dem sakrifice give juju; animal wey dem kill and e blood nor tosh groun and make dem nor sleep with who dem nor marry.”" 
Acts21:26 Di next day, Paul take di men and afta e don join dem do wetin Moses Law tok, e go di temple kon sey, dem don obey di law and dem ready to offa di sakrifice." 
Acts21:27 Wen di seven days don dey finish, di Jew pipol wey kom from Asia kon si am for di temple, naim dem start wahala and pipol kon gada. Dem seize Paul" 
Acts21:28 dey shaut sey, “Israel pipol, make una kom o-o! Dis na di man wey dey tish pipol for evriwhere, about tins wey dey against awa pipol, awa law and against dis Temple. Even sef e don take Greek pipol enter inside di temple kon make dis Holy Place dirty.”" 
Acts21:29 (Bikos dem si Trofimus wey kom from Efesus for di town with am before, so dem kon tink sey, Paul don karry am enter di temple.)" 
Acts21:30 Di whole town start to shake and all di pipol kon gada. Dem seize Paul, drag am komot from di temple kon klose di door." 
Acts21:31 As dem dey try to kill-am, news kon rish di kommanding offisa for di Roman soja wey dey guide di town sey, di whole Jerusalem don skata." 
Acts21:32 At wons, e karry plenty sojas and ofisas kon run go where di pipol gada. Wen dem si di kommanding offisa and di sojas, dem kon stop to beat Paul." 
Acts21:33 Den di kommanding offisa arrest am kon give orda sey make dem tie am with two shain. E ask am who e bi and wetin e do. 
Acts21:34 Some pipol among di crowd kon dey tok difren-difren tins and wen di kommanding offisa nor fit know wetin kause di wahala, e kon give orda sey, make dem karry Paul go barrak." 
Acts21:35 Wen e rish di step for di temple, di sojas kon karry Paul, bikos of di crowd wey won kill-am." 
Acts21:36 So dem follow di sojas for back kon dey shaut, “Kill-am!”" 
Acts21:37 As dem won karry Paul enter di barrak, e kon ask di kommanding offisa, “I go fit tok to yu first?” Di offisa ansa, “So yu dey hear Greek language?" 
Acts21:38 So nor bi yu bi dat Egypt man wey start wahala kon karry 4,000 men wey dem dey koll ‘Asassins’ go inside wildaness?”" 
Acts21:39 Paul ansa, “I bi Jew wey kom from Tarsus wey dey Silisia. I bi citizin for dis town and dem know mi well-well. Abeg allow mi follow di pipol tok.”" 
Acts21:40 Wen di kommanding offisa allow am, Paul kon stand for di step, wave en hand sey make dem kwayet. Wen evriwhere don kwayet, e kon use Aramaik language follow dem tok." 
Acts22:1 “My brodas and fada, make una hear mi as I dey defend mysef.”" 
Acts22:2 (Wen dem hear sey e dey tok to dem with Aramaik language, dem kon kwayet well-well.) Den Paul sey," 
Acts22:3 “I bi Jew wey dem born for Tarsus wey dey Silisia, but na for dis town I for grow, I go skool and learn awa grand-grand papa dem law well-well under Gamaliel and I get mind to serve God well-well, just as una bi today." 
Acts22:4 I sofa Christians and I dey kill pipol wey dey serve God, dey tie pipol trow for prison, weda dem bi man or woman" 
Acts22:5 and even di High Priest and di kansol eldas know about mi. From dem, I kollect leta go give dia brodas wey dey for Damaskus, so dat I go arrest pipol wey bilive Christ kon bring dem kom Jerusalem put for prison." 
Acts22:6 As I dey go, near Damaskus, around aftanoon, one kind lite from heaven kon shine round mi." 
Acts22:7 Den I fall for groun kon hear one vois wey sey, ‘Saul, Saul, why yu dey ponish mi?’" 
Acts22:8 I ansa, ‘Who yu bi Oga God?’ E kon sey, ‘I bi Jesus Christ wey kom from Nazaret, wey yu dey ponish.’" 
Acts22:9 Di pipol wey follow mi si di lite, but dem nor undastand di vois wey dey tok to mi." 
Acts22:10 So I ask am, ‘Oga God! Wetin yu wont make I do?’ God ansa, ‘Get up make yu go Damaskus; for der, dem go tell yu evritin wey God don choose sey yu go do.’" 
Acts22:11 Bikos of how di lite shine for my eye, I nor fit si again, so di pipol wey dey follow mi kon whole my hand go Damaskus." 
Acts22:12 One man wey dem dey koll Ananias, wey dey holy and dey serve God akordin to di law and di Jew pipol wey dey stay der, dey tok good about am." 
Acts22:13 Na di man kom meet and stand near mi sey, ‘Broda Saul, make yu bigin si again!’ So for dat same time, I look up kon si am." 
Acts22:14 Den e sey, ‘God wey awa grand-grand papa dem serve don already choose yu to do wetin e wont, so dat yu go take yor eye si di Raitious Pesin. So make yu hear and listin to am," 
Acts22:15 bikos yu go bi witness to all di pipol, about wetin yu don si and hear." 
Acts22:16 Naw, wetin yu dey wait for? Get up, make dem baptize yu, so dat God go forgive yu yor sin, as yu koll en name.’" 
Acts22:17 Wen I go Jerusalem back and dey pray for di temple, I kon si vishon" 
Acts22:18 and Jesus Christ sey, ‘Make yu komot for Jerusalem kwik-kwik, bikos dem nor go asept wetin yu dey tok about mi.’" 
Acts22:19 I ansa, ‘Oga God, dem diasef know sey I dey beat and trow pipol wey bilive yu put for prison." 
Acts22:20 And wen dem kill yor savant Stefen, I stand der support dem kon keep dia koat for dem.’" 
Acts22:21 But di Oga God sey, ‘Go, bikos I go send yu go far-far go meet Gentile pipol.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 As e tok finish, pipol wey gada dey listin to am kon dey shaut, “Karry dis man komot! Make dem nor allow am live!”" 
Acts22:23 As dem dey shaut dey vex pul shirt and trowey san-san," 
Acts22:24 di kommanding offisa kon give orda sey make dem take Paul go inside barrak. E sey make dem flog and ask Paul kweshon, so dat dem go fit know why di pipol dey shaut for Paul head like dat." 
Acts22:25 Wen dem don put am for groun make dem start to flog am, Paul kon ask di soja wey stand near am, “E dey rite make una flog pesin wey bi Roman citizin, wen dem neva judge en kase?”" 
Acts22:26 Wen di soja hear dis, e go tell di kommanding offisa, “Wetin yu won do so? Dis man kom from Rome o-o.”" 
Acts22:27 So di kommanding offisa ask Paul, “Tell mi, yu bi Roman citizin?” Paul ansa, “Yes.”" 
Acts22:28 Di kommanding offisa kon sey, “Na big money I spend to bi Roman citizin.” Paul ansa, “But dem born mi for Rome.”" 
Acts22:29 Den doz men wey bi won ask am kweshon kon komot and fear katch di kommanding offisa wen e know sey Paul, wey dem tie, na Roman citizin." 
Acts22:30 Di next day, bikos di kommanding offisa won know di rizin wey make di Jew pipol dey akuiz Paul, e release am kon orda di priest oga dem and di whole kansol make dem gada. So e bring Paul kon stand for dia front." 
Acts23:1 Paul look di kansol pipol kon tell dem, “My brodas, I dey live my life with klean mind for God eye kon rish today.”" 
Acts23:2 Bikos of wetin e tok, Ananias wey bi di High Priest kon orda di pipol wey stand near Paul sey make dem slap am for mout." 
Acts23:3 So Paul tell am, “God go slap yu too, yu wey dey pritend! Yu sidan dey judge mi with di law, yu nor dey disobey di law wen yu sey make dem slap mi?”" 
Acts23:4 Di pipol wey stand near am kon sey, “Yu dey curse God High Priest?”" 
Acts23:5 Paul ansa, “I nor know before sey naim bi di High Priest, bikos God word sey, ‘Make yu nor tok bad about di pesin wey dey rule yor pipol.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Den wen Paul know sey some pipol wey dey der na Sadusi and odas na Farisees, e kon shaut make di whole kansol hear, “My brodas, I bi Farisee, na Farisee pesin born mi. Dem dey judge mi today, bikos I put hope sey pipol wey don die go wake again!”" 
Acts23:7 Wen e tok dis tin, kworel kon start between di Farisee and di Sadusi pipol and di kansol kon divide." 
Acts23:8 (Bikos Sadusi pipol bilive sey pipol wey don die, nor go wake again and dem nor bilive sey anytin like angel or spirit dey sef, but Farisee pipol bilive all dis tins.)" 
Acts23:9 So kworel kon start between dem and some oga for di law matter wey bi Farisee pipol kon stand up dey oppoz di Sadusi pipol sey, “Wi nor si any bad tin wey dis man do. Una know weda na spirit or angel tok to am?”" 
Acts23:10 Wen di argument kon too mush and di kommanding offisa dey fear sey dem go tear Paul to pieces, e kon orda en sojas make dem enter di meetin and karry Paul komot for der by force." 
Acts23:11 For nite for di next day, Jesus kon stand near Paul tell am for vishon, “Make yu nor fear, bikos as yu don testify about mi for Jerusalem, na so yu go still do for Rome.”" 
Acts23:12 Wen morning rish, some Jew pipol kon gada dey make bad plan and dem swear sey dem nor go chop or drink anytin until dem kill Paul." 
Acts23:13 Di pipol wey make dis bad plan pass forty. 
Acts23:14 Dem go meet di priest oga dem and di eldas tell dem sey, “Wi don swear sey wi nor go chop anytin until wi kill Paul."
