2Corinthians8:22 So wi dey send awa broda follow dem; awa broda wey wi don test plenty times kon si sey e get di mind to help and e ready to help naw, bikos e trust una well-well." 
2Corinthians8:23 But for Titus, en na my patina and e dey follow mi work to help una. As for di oda brodas wey dey follow am, na all di church sey make dem kom meet una, so dat dem go tell una about di glory wey dey inside Christ." 
2Corinthians8:23 But for Titus, en na my patina and e dey follow mi work to help una. As for di oda brodas wey dey follow am, na all di church sey make dem kom meet una, so dat dem go tell una about di glory wey dey inside Christ." 
2Corinthians8:24 So make una show dem sey, una love dem, so dat all di pipol for di church go know sey, di way wey wi dey boast about una, na true." 
2Corinthians9:1 I nor nid to rite to una about how to help God pipol wey dey Jerusalem," 
2Corinthians9:2 bikos I know sey una one help dem. I always dey boast give Masidonia pipol sey, una wey dey Akaia, dey always won help and una don ready to give money since last year. And di way wey una dey won help, don make some for dem won help too." 
2Corinthians9:3 But I dey send dis brodas kom meet una to make sure sey una dey ready; as I don tell dem before sey, una don already kollect money. So make una nor let shame katch mi, as I dey boast about una." 
2Corinthians9:4 But if anybody for Masidonia follow mi kom meet una, den e si sey una neva ready to give, shame go katch us, (I nor go tok too mush) bikos wi trust una." 
2Corinthians9:5 Naim make mi beg dis brodas make dem go for my front before di time go rish and make dem help una arrange di money wey una promise, so dat una go do am with una mind and nobody go force una." 
2Corinthians9:6 Na wetin I dey tok bi dis; Pesin wey plant small, go harvest small, but di pesin wey plant plenty, go harvest plenty." 
2Corinthians9:7 Make each of una give as e plan for en mind; nor bi with regret or like sey dem force am, bikos God love pesin wey dey give with happiness." 
2Corinthians9:8 God go provide evritin wey una nid. Den, una go always get evritin wey una nid and di one wey una go fit give odas." 
2Corinthians9:9 Just as dem rite for God word, “E don skata for evriwhere, e don give to poor pipol and en raitiousness, go dey forever.”" 
2Corinthians9:10 Bikos na God dey give seed to farmer and provide bread wey pipol go chop. Like dis too, E go provide and di tins wey una nid, go plenty well-well and dem go last forever." 
2Corinthians9:11 E go make una get enough money for evritin, so dat evritime, una go fit dey give well-well and di pipol wey una give money, go always dey tank God." 
2Corinthians9:12 Bikos dis work wey una dey do so, nor just dey help only God pipol, but e dey always make pipol, tank God." 
2Corinthians9:13 Bikos of una work, pipol go praiz God, bikos una dey obey Christ word wey una bilive and una dey share evritin wey una get with good mind." 
2Corinthians9:14 So, bikos of God big grace wey E give una, pipol dey pray for una with strong love." 
2Corinthians9:15 Na dis make us dey tank God for dis gift wey pesin mout nor fit tok. 
2Corinthians10:1 Naw, mi Paul (I kwayet wen I dey with una, but my mout dey sharp naw wen I don leave una). Christ wey nor dey karry body up, wey dey gentol," 
2Corinthians10:2 I take am beg una, so dat wen I kom, I nor go nid to tok with vexnashon about pipol wey si us like yeye pipol (bikos I dey fear sey na so e go bi)." 
2Corinthians10:3 Bikos even doh wi dey for dis world, wi nor dey fight as pipol wont am." 
2Corinthians10:4 Di tins wey wi take dey fight, nor bi dis world own, but na God make am strong, so dat wi go fit skata all di strong place where wiked pipol dey. Wi dey skata trobol;" 
2Corinthians10:5 pipol wey dey karry body up; doz wey nor wont make odas know God and as wi dey do like dis, pipol dey obey Christ." 
2Corinthians10:6 And wen una don show sey una dey fear God, wi go always dey ready to ponish doz wey dey disobey God." 
2Corinthians10:7 Na only tins wey eye fit si, naim una know. If anybody dey sure sey e bilong to Christ, make e tink about am again: If e bilong to Christ, den wi na Christ own too." 
2Corinthians10:8 Bikos if I boast small about di authority wey Jesus give us make wi take build, instead of to distroy una, I nor go shame to do am." 
2Corinthians10:9 I nor wont make una dey fear, bikos of wetin I rite," 
2Corinthians10:10 bikos some pipol dey sey, “En letas dey heavy and get pawa well-well, but if yu si am for groun, e nor get pawa and e nor even fit tok well.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Make doz pipol know sey, “Wetin wi tok for leta wen wi nor dey with una, wi dey do am wen wi dey with una.”" 
2Corinthians10:12 Wi nor go kompare awasef with doz wey sey dem good well-well or kon put awasef for di same group. But wen dem dey measure and kompare demsef with demsef, e dey show sey dem nor get sense." 
2Corinthians10:13 But wi nor go boast pass as wi suppose boast; wi go boast akordin to di work wey God give us and una dey inside dat work too. 
2Corinthians10:14 Wi nor dey do awa work pass as wi suppose do am wen wi dey with una, bikos na wi bi first to bring Christ message kom meet una." 
2Corinthians10:15 Wi nor dey boast anyhow about di work wey oda pipol do, but wi dey hope sey as una faith dey grow well-well, awa work among una go big, just as God share am give us," 
2Corinthians10:16 so dat wi go fit prish di gospel for oda kountries wey far pass una own. So make wi nor boast about di work wey odas do for oda aria. 
2Corinthians10:17 But pesin wey won boast, make e boast about di work wey Jesus do." 
2Corinthians10:18 Bikos nor bi who praiz ensef dey rite, but na di pesin wey God like to praiz." 
2Corinthians11:1 For wetin I won tok naw, make una bear with mi like sey I nor get sense!" 
2Corinthians11:2 I dey jealous for una with God jealousy, bikos I promise sey na one man una go marry. Like woman wey nor no man, na so I won give una to Christ." 
2Corinthians11:3 But I dey fear sey, just as di snake deceive Eve with en wayo, una mind fit spoil komot for di true and di way wey una dey follow Christ." 
2Corinthians11:4 So, if anybody kon prish anoda Christ wey wi nor prish for una and una receive anoda spirit wey una nor receive before, or anoda gospel wey una neva hear before, dat mean sey, una don asept dem well." 
2Corinthians11:5 I nor tink sey doz “supper apostle” betta pass mi. 
2Corinthians11:6 But even doh I nor know how to tok, I know book. True-true, wi don let una know dis tins wey happen." 
2Corinthians11:7 As I honbol mysef dey do di work, na sin I kommit? I dey do am, so dat una go fit grow up and wen I prish give una, I nor kollect money." 
2Corinthians11:8 I shit di oda church dem, bikos I dey kollect money from dem, so dat I go dey work with una for free!" 
2Corinthians11:9 Wen I nid anytin for di time wen I dey with una, I nor put my load for anybody head, bikos awa brodas wey Masidonia dey give mi evritin wey I nid. I nor allow mysef to bi problem for anybody and I nor go ever do am." 
2Corinthians11:10 True-true, as Christ trut dey inside mi, nobody go fit stop mi for di way I dey boast for Akaia." 
2Corinthians11:11 Why? Na bikos I nor love una? No! God know sey I love una! 
2Corinthians11:12 And I go kontinue to do wetin I dey do, so dat doz apostles nor go get rizin to boast sey, dem dey do di same work with us." 
2Corinthians11:13 Bikos dem bi fake apostles; pipol wey dey lie and pritend like sey dem bi Jesus Christ apostles. 
2Corinthians11:14 E nor sopraiz us, bikos even Satan dey pritend sey en na angel wey get lite." 
2Corinthians11:15 So e nor sopraiz us sey, en savants dey pritend too like sey dem bi savant wey dey do wetin good for God eye. For di end, dem go gain wetin fit di tins wey dem dey do." 
2Corinthians11:16 I dey tell una again, make anybody nor tink sey I bi fool. But if una tink so, den make una asept mi as fool, so dat misef go boast small." 
2Corinthians11:17 Wetin I dey boast about so, nor bi as Christ wont make I boast, instead, I dey tok like fool." 
2Corinthians11:18 Since some pipol dey boast like dis world pipol, make mi mysef still boast." 
2Corinthians11:19 Una sey una get sense well-well, yet una dey use happiness asept wetin fool dey tok." 
2Corinthians11:20 Una like make pesin turn una to slave; use and shit una; take evritin wey una get, den beat and slap una anyhow." 
2Corinthians11:21 (Na shame for mi, but I must tell una sey awa heart nor strong rish to do una doz kind tins!) But anytin wey anybody fit boast about (I dey tok like fool naw o-o), misef fit boast about dat tin too." 
2Corinthians11:22 Na Hibru pipol dem bi? Misef na Hibru pesin too. Dem bi Israel pipol? Mi na Israel pesin too. Na Abraham bi dia grand-grand papa? Na dat same Abraham bi my grand-grand papa too. 
2Corinthians11:23 Na Christ savants bi? (I don dey tok like sey I dey kraze again!) Misef na Christ savant wey betta pass dem! I don work hard pass dem, I don dey prison plenty times pass dem, dem don beat mi well-well pass dem, I don nearly die plenty times." 
2Corinthians11:24 Na five times Jew pipol don flog mi thirty-nine times. 
2Corinthians11:25 Rome pipol don beat mi three times. Dem stone mi wons until I nearly die. Sheep wey I dey inside, don spoil for wota three times. I don float wons for wota from morning go rish di next day." 
2Corinthians11:26 I don travel many times wey I enter trobol for wota; for tif hand, even for my kountry pipol and Gentile pipol hand; both for inside town; for wildaness and from pipol wey dey pritend sey dem bi awa brodas." 
2Corinthians11:27 I don do hard work; nor sleep for many nites; food and wota go dey hongry mi; many times, I nor get food to chop. I don dey for kold and I nor get klot to kover body." 
2Corinthians11:28 Apart from dis tins, my mind dey heavy mi evriday as I dey tink of how I go take help all di pipol wey dey God church." 
2Corinthians11:29 If pesin dey weak, misef dey weak too. If dem deceive pesin enter sin, e dey pain mi well-well." 
2Corinthians11:30 If I go must boast, den I go boast about di tins wey show sey I dey weak." 
2Corinthians11:31 God wey bi awa Oga God Jesus Christ Papa, wey dem go praiz forever, know sey nor bi lie I dey tok." 
2Corinthians11:32 For Damaskus, King Aretas sey make di govnor put sojas for di town gate, so dat dem go arrest mi." 
2Corinthians11:33 But awa pipol for der kon put mi for basket wey dem tie rope put kon drop mi small-small from di window and na so I take eskape from di man hand. 
2Corinthians12:1 E good to dey boast, even doh gain nor dey inside. I go still dey tok about di vishon and revelashon wey Jesus Christ show mi." 
2Corinthians12:2 Fourteen years ago, I know one man wey bi Christ savant. Weda na for vishon or Fisical, I nor know, but God know. God karry am go di heaven wey high pass." 
2Corinthians12:3 And I know dis man (but na only God know weda e dey for en body or for spirit). 
2Corinthians12:4 God karry am go paradise and e hear tins wey dey too holy to tok; tins wey God nor give human being pawa to tok. 
2Corinthians12:5 Na dat pesin make mi dey boast and I nor go boast about mysef, escept di tins wey show sey, I nor dey strong." 
2Corinthians12:6 Even if I won boast, I nor go bi fool, bikos na trut I go still tok, but I nor do am make anybody for tink sey na mi know pass, bikos e si and hear mi dey tok" 
2Corinthians12:7 about di betta tins wey I si for vishon. Make I for nor dey karry body up, God put sometin inside mi, wey bi Satan messenja, so dat e go dey trobol mi." 
2Corinthians12:8 Na three times I ask Christ sey, make e take dis tin komot from my body." 
2Corinthians12:9 But e tell mi, “Di grace wey I give yu strong rish, bikos my pawa dey show wen yu dey weak.” So, I go boast well-well about how I nor dey strong, so dat Christ pawa go dey show for my body." 
2Corinthians12:10 I dey happy as I dey weak with all di curse, trobols, ponishment and wahala wey I dey sofa bikos of Christ, bikos anytime wey I dey weak, na dat time, I dey-dey strong." 
2Corinthians12:11 I don turn to fool! Na una force mi, bikos una suppose to praiz mi. Even if I nor bi anytin, e nor get anytin wey doz una “supper apostles” take betta pass mi." 
2Corinthians12:12 True-true for una present, wi do mirakles and wonders to show sey wi bi apostles too." 
2Corinthians12:13 Bikos di way wey dem trit us worse pass di oda church, escept sey I nor dey put my load for una head. Make una forgive mi for dis tins wey I do!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Si, for di third time, I don ready to kom visit una and I nor go put my load for una head, bikos na una I wont and nor bi wetin una get. Nor bi pikin suppose pay for dia papa and mama food, but na papa and mama, dey pay for dia pikin food." 
2Corinthians12:15 I go dey happy to spend all my money and even my life, as long as una soul go dey save. Una love for mi dey small, bikos my love for una plenty?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Even if e bi like dat, I nor put my load for una head. But dem sey, bikos I bi wayo pesin, I dey deceive una!" 
2Corinthians12:17 I nor play anybody wayo thru di pesin wen I send kom meet una, abi I dey lie?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Abeg Titus make e visit una and I send dat broda make e follow am kom. Dem play una wayo? Nor bi di same mind wi awasef take follow una? Abi nor bi di same way wi dey bihave? 
2Corinthians12:18 Abeg Titus make e visit una and I send dat broda make e follow am kom. Dem play una wayo? Nor bi di same mind wi awasef take follow una? Abi nor bi di same way wi dey bihave? 
2Corinthians12:19 May bi una dey tink sey wi dey tok dis tins to defend awasef. No! Wi dey tok to una like dis as Christ savant and na God bi awa witness. Evritin wey wi dey do, na to make una strong." 
2Corinthians12:20 Bikos I dey fear sey wen I kom, I nor go like wetin I go si and una nor go like as I go tok. I dey fear sey una go dey kworel, dey jealous each oda; dey vex; dey tink of only unasef; dey tok bad about each oda; dey do aproko; dey karry body up and dey bihave anyhow." 
2Corinthians12:21 I dey fear sey wen I kom again, God go disgrace mi for una front. And I go kry, bikos many of una still dey sin. Una neva turn from sin kom meet God; una neva turn komot from di ashawo and yeye life wey una dey live." 
2Corinthians13:1 Na di third time wey I dey kom visit una bi dis. If dem sey pesin do bad, two or three pipol must sey, na true, before pipol go bilive am." 
2Corinthians13:2 Wen I dey with una for my sekond visit, I tell una wey dey sin before about dis tins. Even doh I nor dey with una naw, I dey tok am again sey, if I kom again, I nor go sorry for anybody, but I go ponish am," 
2Corinthians13:3 bikos una sey make I show sey Christ dey tok thru mi. Christ nor dey weak to una, bikos e show en pawa among una." 
2Corinthians13:4 True-true, bikos e nor show en pawa, na dat make dem fit nail am for cross, but e dey alive naw, bikos of God pawa. Aldo wi dey weak with am, but wi go dey alive togeda with am, bikos of God pawa wey wi get." 
2Corinthians13:5 Make una test unasef to know weda una still dey inside di faith; e good make una shek unasef well-well! Una nor know sey Christ dey inside una? May bi una don fail di test! 
2Corinthians13:6 I hope sey una go know sey wi neva fail di test! 
2Corinthians13:7 Wi dey pray to God make una nor do anytin bad; wi nor dey do am to show sey wi pass di test, but make una for do wetin good, even if e bi like sey wi fail di test." 
2Corinthians13:8 Wi nor go fit do anytin against di trut, but na di trut go make us do evritin." 
2Corinthians13:9 Belle dey sweet us wen ever wi dey weak and una dey strong. And na wetin wi dey pray for bi dis, “Una go get evritin wey una suppose get.”" 
2Corinthians13:10 Na dis make mi dey rite all dis tins since I nor dey with una, so dat wen I kom, I nor go vex for una bikos of di authority wey I get and God give mi dis authority to build; nor bi to distroy." 
2Corinthians13:11 Finally my brodas and sistas, make una use happiness dey do tins as dem suppose bi. Make una take heart, dey greet each oda and live togeda for peace and di God wey get love and peace, go dey with una." 
2Corinthians13:12 Make una greet each oda for Christian way. 
2Corinthians13:13 All God pipol for here dey greet una. 
2Corinthians13:14 Make di grace wey awa Oga God Jesus Christ give us and di love wey God get for us, plus di Holy Spirit fellowship, dey with una." 
Galatians1:1 Na mi Paul, rite dis leta, (nor bi human being make mi apostle, but na Jesus Christ and God awa Papa wey raiz am from deat)." 
Galatians1:2 Mi and di brodas wey dey here, dey greet una wey dey Galatia." 
Galatians1:3 Make God awa Papa and Oga God Jesus Christ grace and peace, dey with una." 
Galatians1:4 Na Jesus die for awa sins, bikos na so God awa Papa wont am." 
Galatians1:5 Make all glory bi en own forever and ever! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 I sopraiz sey una kwik turn back from di Pesin wey koll una with en grace kon bigin follow oda tishing. 
Galatians1:7 Nor bi sey anoda gospel really dey, but some pipol dey disturb una, bikos dem won shange wetin wi prish about Christ." 
Galatians1:8 But if wi (or angels wey kom from heaven) tish una difren tins from di one wey wi prish give una before, make God distroy us with fire!" 
Galatians1:9 As I tok before, I dey repeat am again, if anybody dey tish difren tins from di ones wey wi prish give una before, make God trow dat pesin for hell!" 
Galatians1:10 Una tink sey, I dey try to do tins make pipol for like mi? Abi I dey do wetin God wont? Or I dey try to make belle sweet pipol? If I dey try to make belle sweet pipol, den I nor bi Christ savant again!" 
Galatians1:11 My brodas and sistas, I wont make una know sey di gospel wey I dey prish, nor bi human being give mi." 
Galatians1:12 Bikos I nor get or learn am from anybody, but I get am thru di revelashon wey Christ give mi." 
Galatians1:13 Una don hear about di kind life wey I dey live before as Jew pesin; how I trobol di church kon dey try to distroy am. 
Galatians1:14 I grow among Jew pipol kon know di relijon pass many of my mates for my kountry and I know my grand-grand papa dem tradishons. 
Galatians1:15 But God koll mi with en grace kon separate mi even before dem born mi. 
Galatians1:16 E show mi en pikin, so dat I go fit prish about am give Gentile pipol. I nor go meet anybody make e advise mi" 
Galatians1:17 and I nor go Jerusalem go meet pipol wey bi apostle before mi, but I komot der go Arabia, den I kon go back to Damaskus." 
Galatians1:18 Afta three years, I go visit Pita for Jerusalem, so dat e go tell mi wetin I go do and I stay with am for fifteen days." 
Galatians1:19 But I nor go si any oda apostle apart from James, wey bi Jesus Christ broda." 
Galatians1:19 But I nor go si any oda apostle apart from James, wey bi Jesus Christ broda." 
Galatians1:20 God dey si wetin I dey rite, bikos evritin wey I dey rite to una so, na true!" 
Galatians1:21 Afta dis, I kon go Siria and Silisia aria." 
Galatians1:22 But di pipol for di church wey dey Judea, nor know mi." 
Galatians1:22 But di pipol for di church wey dey Judea, nor know mi." 
Galatians1:23 Dem only dey hear sey, “Di pesin wey dey trobol us before, don dey prish di message wey e bin dey try to distroy.”" 
Galatians1:24 So dem kon dey praiz God bikos of mi. 
Galatians2:1 Afta fourteen years, I kon go back to Jerusalem with Banabas and Titus." 
Galatians2:1 Afta fourteen years, I kon go back to Jerusalem with Banabas and Titus." 
Galatians2:2 I go der bikos of di revelashon wey I receive, den I tell dem about wetin I dey prish give Gentile pipol. But I tok with di oga dem, so dat dem go dey sure sey, I dey prish Christ message." 
Galatians2:3 Titus dey with mi; even doh en na Greek pesin, dem nor sey e must sekonsaiz." 
Galatians2:3 Titus dey with mi; even doh en na Greek pesin, dem nor sey e must sekonsaiz." 
Galatians2:4 Dem diskuss dis matter, bikos of di fake brodas with dia wayo wey dem take dey spy di freedom wey Christ give us, so dat dem go fit make us dia slave." 
Galatians2:5 But wi nor give dem shance, so dat di trut wey dey di gospel, go last for una." 
Galatians2:6 But doz wey tink sey dem bi oga, (wetin dem bi, nor mean anytin to mi; bikos God nor dey support bad tin); dem wey bi leaders for di church nor add anytin to my message." 
Galatians2:7 But dem kon si sey na God sey make I prish en word to pipol wey dem nor sekonsaiz, just as E sey make Pita prish to doz wey dem sekonsaiz," 
Galatians2:8 (Bikos na thru God pawa Pita take prish to Jew pipol and na di same pawa I take dey prish give Gentile pipol too)," 
Galatians2:9 so wen James, Pita and John wey bi leaders for di church, si sey God give mi grace, dem kon dey support mi and Banabas sey, “Make wi dey prish give Gentile pipol and doz wey dem sekonsaiz.”" 
Galatians2:9 so wen James, Pita and John wey bi leaders for di church, si sey God give mi grace, dem kon dey support mi and Banabas sey, “Make wi dey prish give Gentile pipol and doz wey dem sekonsaiz.”" 
Galatians2:9 so wen James, Pita and John wey bi leaders for di church, si sey God give mi grace, dem kon dey support mi and Banabas sey, “Make wi dey prish give Gentile pipol and doz wey dem sekonsaiz.”" 
Galatians2:10 But dem sey make wi always remember poor pipol and na wetin dey my mind to do, bi dat." 
Galatians2:11 But wen Pita kom Antiok, I kon shalenge am, bikos wetin e do, nor good." 
Galatians2:12 Pita dey chop with Gentile pipol until some pipol wey James send, kom rish der. As Pita si dem, e kon stop to chop with Gentile pipol, bikos e dey fear di pipol wey kom, since dem bilive sey evribody must sekonsaiz." 
Galatians2:12 Pita dey chop with Gentile pipol until some pipol wey James send, kom rish der. As Pita si dem, e kon stop to chop with Gentile pipol, bikos e dey fear di pipol wey kom, since dem bilive sey evribody must sekonsaiz." 
Galatians2:13 Oda Jew pipol kon dey pritend like Pita, sotey Banabas join dem too." 
Galatians2:14 But wen I si sey dem nor dey do wetin dem rite for God word, I kon tell Pita for dia front, “If yu wey bi Jew, dey do like Gentile pipol, how yu wont take make Gentile pipol live like Jew pipol?”" 
Galatians2:15 Wi bi Jew pipol bikos of how dem born us and wi nor bi Gentile pipol wey bi sinnas. 
Galatians2:16 Wi know sey nobody dey free from God judgement, bikos na so di law tok and pipol go only dey free, if dem get faith for Christ. Since wi don bilive Christ, wi suppose to dey do good thru di faith wey wi get for Christ and nor bi to dey do wetin di law tok and wi nor go dey free from judgement, wen wi do only wetin di law tok." 
Galatians2:17 Make wi dey kommit sin as wi dey try to do good, bikos wi get faith for Christ? If na so, dat mean sey Christ don dey support sin!" 
Galatians2:18 Naw, if I dey ripair di law wey I don first skata, dat mean sey I dey break God law." 
Galatians2:19 As for di law, I don die to am, so dat I go fit dey alive with God." 
Galatians2:20 I don die with Christ for cross, so nor bi mi dey live again, but na Christ dey live inside mi. Di life wey I dey live naw, na bikos of di good tins wey God pikin do inside mi, bikos e love and die for mi." 
Galatians2:21 I nor go trowey God grace; bikos if na wetin di law tok go make pesin good, den Christ die for nor-tin!" 
Galatians3:1 Galatia pipol, una nor get sense at-all! Who turn una to fool naw? Bikos na for una front wi for show sey Jesus Christ die for cross!" 
Galatians3:2 Na di tin wey I won know from una, bi dis: Una receive di Spirit, bikos una dey do wetin di law tok or na bikos una bilive wetin wi prish give una?" 
Galatians3:3 Na so una mumu rish? True-true, una start with di Holy Spirit, but naw, una won finish di work with human being pawa." 
Galatians3:4 Una sofa dis many tins for nor-tin? True-true, una really sofa for nor-tin." 
Galatians3:5 Wetin make God give una di Spirit to do mirakle? Na bikos una do wetin di law tok or bikos una bilive wetin una hear? 
Galatians3:6 Just as Abraham bilive God and God koll am raitious man," 
Galatians3:7 na so too, doz wey bilive, go bi Abraham shidren." 
Galatians3:8 Dem rite for God word before sey, “E go asept Gentile pipol, wen dem get faith” and na dis make am tell Abraham before di time rish sey, “E go bless evribody, bikos of am.”" 
Galatians3:9 So pipol wey bilive, God go bless dem togeda with Abraham, bikos dem bilive." 
Galatians3:10 Pipol wey dey under di law and dem nor dey do evritin wey di law tok, dey under curse, bikos dem rite am sey, “E nor go betta for anybody wey nor dey do evritin wey dey di law.”" 
Galatians3:11 Dis one show sey, nobody dey good for God eye, bikos e dey obey di law. So anybody wey dey raitious, must live by faith." 
Galatians3:12 Di law nor dey bring faith, but di pesin wey dey do wetin di law tok, go live by wetin e dey do." 
Galatians3:13 Christ don save us from di curse wey di law bring, bikos e die for cross for us (just as dem rite am, “Anybody wey dem hang for tree, curse dey en head”)," 
Galatians3:14 so thru Christ, Abraham blessings go kom meet Gentile pipol and wi go receive di Spirit wey God promise us, thru faith." 
Galatians3:15 My brodas and sistas, make I use wetin dey happen evriday for life take make ezample for una: Wen pipol don make agriment, nobody go fit trow di agriment for korna or add anytin join am." 
Galatians3:16 Wi know sey God make dis promise with Abraham and en pikin. God word nor sey, “to di shidren”, but e sey, “and to yor pikin,” and e mean only one and dat one, na Christ." 
Galatians3:17 Na wetin I dey tok bi dis: Di law wey kom afta four hundred and thirty years, nor get pawa to break di agriment and promise wey God and Abraham don make before." 
Galatians3:18 Bikos if promise dey kom thru di law, den e nor bi promise again. But wi know sey, na thru promise, God take bless Abraham." 
Galatians3:19 Na awa sin make law dey and na so e go bi, until di pikin wey God promise, go kom and na thru angels, God take give us di law thru en profet." 
Galatians3:20 Wi know sey pesin wey bi middo-man dey stand between two pipol, but na only one God dey." 
Galatians3:21 So di law dey against God promise? No! Bikos if di law dey give pesin life, den raitiousness go must kom thru di law." 
Galatians3:22 But God word kondemn evritin and evribody under sin, so dat wi; di pipol wey bilive, go get God promise thru Jesus Christ." 
Galatians3:23 Before faith kom, wi dey under di law, bikos di law whole us like prisonas." 
Galatians3:24 So na di law bi awa tisha before Christ kom, so dat wi go fit tok sey wi dey raitious thru faith." 
Galatians3:25 But since faith don kom, wi nor dey under any tisha again." 
Galatians3:26 Bikos thru Jesus Christ, all of us don bikom God shidren by faith." 
Galatians3:27 Una wey dem don baptize inside Christ, don wear Christ for body like klot." 
Galatians3:28 E nor matter weda una bi Jew or Greek pipol, savant or free pesin, man or woman, bikos all of una dey inside one body for Christ." 
Galatians3:29 And if e bi sey una bilong to Christ, den una bi Abraham shidren and pipol wey go inherit wetin God promise." 
Galatians4:1 Wetin I mean bi sey, di pesin wey inherit en papa propaty and e still bi small pikin, e nor dey difren from savant, even doh na en get evritin." 
Galatians4:2 But e go dey under who dey guide am, until di time wey en papa tok, go rish." 
Galatians4:3 Na so e bi with us wen wi small; wi dey under di pawa wey dey kontrol dis world," 
Galatians4:4 but wen di rite time rish, God kon send en pikin wey woman born under di law," 
Galatians4:5 make e save pipol wey dey under di law, so dat God go make us en own shidren kon give us awa own propaty." 
Galatians4:6 Since wi bi God shidren, E put en Holy Spirit inside us and naim make us dey fit koll am, “Abba! Fada!”" 
Galatians4:7 So, una nor bi slave again, but una don bi God pikin and since una bi God shidren, una go get God propaty too." 
Galatians4:8 Before-before, wen una nor know God, una dey do bad-bad tins." 
Galatians4:9 But naw wey una don know am (or abi make I sey God don know una), why una still dey follow all dis weak and yeye pawas? Una won bi dia slave again?" 
Galatians4:10 Dat time, una follow dia tradishon." 
Galatians4:11 I dey fear sey make di work wey I do among una, nor waste." 
Galatians4:12 My brodas and sistas, Abeg, make una bi like mi, as I don bi like una, bikos una nor do mi any bad tin!" 
Galatians4:13 But wen I first prish di gospel give una, una know sey I nor well," 
Galatians4:14 even doh my sickness na problem to una, una nor laf or drive mi. Instead, una welkom mi like God angel; like sey na mi bi Jesus Christ!" 
Galatians4:15 Naw, na wetin don happen to una happiness? I know sey, if to sey e dey possibol, una for pul una eye give mi!" 
Galatians4:16 So, I don bikom una enemy, bikos I dey tell una di trut?" 
Galatians4:17 Di pipol wey won deceive una dey trit una well, but dem nor dey do am with betta mind; bikos dem wont make una leave mi kon follow dem." 
Galatians4:18 But e good make una dey trit odas well, so-far una dey do am with betta mind and nor bi only wen I dey with una." 
Galatians4:19 My shidren! Just like woman wey won born, I dey feel pain for una, until Christ pawa go dey inside una life!" 
Galatians4:20 How I wish sey I dey with una naw, so dat I go know how to trit una, bikos I dey worry about una well-well." 
Galatians4:21 Make una tell mi, wish of una won dey under di law? Una nor know wetin di law tok?" 
Galatians4:22 Dem rite am sey, Abraham get two boys, one wey di savant woman born and di oda pikin, na di really wife born am." 
Galatians4:23 Di one wey savant born, na ordinary pikin e bi, but na thru God promise di really wife take born." 
Galatians4:24 Betta sense dey for dis story, bikos dis two wimen bi like two kovenant. One na from Mount Sinai wey bi like di shidren wey Hagar, di slave woman, born." 
Galatians4:25 Hagar bi like Mount Sinai for Arabia kountry and na di same with Jerusalem wey dey naw, bikos e dey inside der as slave with en pikin." 
Galatians4:26 But di Jerusalem wey kom from heaven, dey free and na-im bi awa mama." 
Galatians4:27 Bikos dem rite am sey: “Woman! Yu wey neva born, make yu shaut dey happy, bikos yu neva labor like woman wey won born. Di woman wey neva born, get plenty shidren pass di woman wey get husband.”" 
Galatians4:28 But my brodas and sistas, una bi shidren wey get promise, just as Isaak bi." 
Galatians4:29 For dat time, di one wey dem born for normal way, trobol di one wey dem born with di Spirit and na so e bi with una naw." 
Galatians4:30 But wetin dem rite for God word? “Make yu drive di savant woman and en pikin komot, bikos di savant pikin nor go share with di pikin wey di really wife born.”" 
Galatians4:31 So my brodas and sistas, wi nor bi savant shidren. Na di really woman shidren, wi bi." 
Galatians5:1 Make una nor dey karry load for head like slave again, but make una stand strong for groun, bikos Christ don make us free." 
Galatians5:2 Una dey hear so! Mi wey bi Paul dey tell una sey, if dem sekonsaiz una, den Christ nor mean anytin to una again." 
Galatians5:3 And I dey warn evribody; anybody wey gri make dem sekonsaiz am, must obey evry oda tin wey di law tok." 
Galatians5:4 Pipol wey wont make pipol know sey dem dey good, bikos dem dey keep di law, dem don already fall komot from God grace." 
Galatians5:5 Bikos na thru faith for God Spirit, naim wi hope sey, God go make us dey good for en eye." 
Galatians5:6 For Christ, e nor matter weda dem sekonsaiz pesin or not; di only tin wey matter, na faith wey dey work thru love." 
Galatians5:7 Before, una dey do well; but naw, who sey make una nor obey di trut?" 
Galatians5:8 Nor bi God wey koll una sey make una dey do like dis! 
Galatians5:9 Na small yist dey make bread raiz! 
Galatians5:10 I get mind sey, God nor go let una listin to anoda pesin. But di pesin wey dey konfuse una, go face judgement, no matter who e bi." 
Galatians5:11 Naw, my brodas and sistas, if I still dey prish about how dem go take sekonsaiz una, why pipol dey trobol mi? If na so, my tishing about Christ cross nor suppose kause any trobol." 
Galatians5:12 I wish sey doz wey dey disturb una go-go sekonsaiz demsef! 
Galatians5:13 My brodas and sistas, God don koll una make una dey free; but make una nor use di freedom wey God give una anyhow, instead make una love each oda." 
Galatians5:14 Bikos if dem add di whole law togeda, dem go kon bi one kommandment wey sey, “Make yu love yor neighbour as yu love yorsef.”" 
Galatians5:15 But if una kontinue to kworel among unasef; una go fit wound or kill each oda by mistake. 
Galatians5:16 I tell una, make una let di Spirit direct una life and una nor go do wetin di flesh wont." 
Galatians5:17 Bikos di tins wey di body like, difren from wetin di Spirit like and wetin di Spirit wont, nor dey gri with wetin di flesh wont." 
Galatians5:18 But if una allow di Spirit kontrol una, den una nor dey under di law again." 
Galatians5:19 Na di tins wey di flesh dey do bi dis: To sleep with pesin wey yu nor marry; to get bad mind; to opress pipol; 
Galatians5:20 to dey serve juju; dey do majik; kworel-kworel life; fighty-fighty; jealousy; anyhow vexnashon; long-trot; tins wey dey skata pipol; 
Galatians5:21 bad belle; killi-killi; to dey drink anyhow and dey do oda tins like all dis ones. I dey warn una naw as I don warn una before sey, pipol wey dey do dis kind tins, nor go enter God kingdom!" 
Galatians5:22 But di fruit wey di Holy Spirit dey bear inside us; na love, joy, peace, patient, kindness, goodness, faithfulnes," 
Galatians5:23 gentolness and to kontrol awasef. Di law nor dey against all dis tins. 
Galatians5:24 Pipol wey dey inside Christ don kill dia flesh with all di bad tins wey di flesh dey like to do. 
Galatians5:25 If di Holy Spirit dey inside us, den make wi dey live awa life as di Holy Spirit wont." 
Galatians5:26 Make wi nor dey karry body up and dey do wetin go vex pipol or dey jealous one anoda. 
Galatians6:1 My brodas and sistas, if una si pesin dey sin, make una wey dey spiritual, koll am back. But make una wosh unasef, so dat una nor go fall inside temptashon too." 
Galatians6:2 Make una help karry each oda load and if una do like dis, una dey obey Christ." 
Galatians6:3 Bikos if anybody tink sey, en too big wen e nor bi anytin, e dey deceive ensef." 
Galatians6:4 Instead of una to dey kompare unasef with anoda pesin, make una shek unasef, den una go fit tok about unasef." 
Galatians6:5 Bikos each pesin go karry en own load by ensef. 
Galatians6:6 Di pesin wey dem dey tish God word, must share di good tins wey e get with di pesin wey dey tish am." 
Galatians6:7 Make una nor let anybody deceive una. Nobody go fit deceive God. Anytin wey pesin plant, naim e go reap," 
Galatians6:8 bikos di pesin wey dey live akordin to en flesh, go reap bad tins, but di pesin wey dey live akordin to God Spirit, go reap life wey nor dey end." 
Galatians6:9 So make to do good, nor taya us, bikos wen time rish, wi go gain am." 
Galatians6:10 So anytime wey wi get shance, make wi dey do good, especially to pipol wey bi God shidren." 
Galatians6:11 Make una si as di word wey I take my hand rite give una, big rish!" 
Galatians6:12 Pipol wey won show sey dem good, dey try to force una to sekonsaiz. Dem dey do so, so dat dem nor go sofa, bikos of Christ cross." 
Galatians6:13 Pipol wey sekonsaiz nor dey obey di law, but dem wont make una sekonsaiz, so dat dem go fit use una take boast." 
Galatians6:14 I nor go boast about anytin escept for di sofa wey awa Oga God Jesus Christ sofa and bikos of dat sofa, di world nor mean anytin to mi and I don die to di world too." 
Galatians6:15 Weda pesin sekonsaiz or not, e nor mean anytin, di only tin wey matter bi sey, una don turn to new pesin." 
Galatians6:16 Una wey dey obey dis rule wey I dey give so, make peace and mesi dey with una and all God pipol." 
Galatians6:17 From naw go, make nobody worry mi, bikos I get Jesus Christ mark for my body." 
Galatians6:18 My brodas and sistas, make awa Oga God Jesus Christ grace dey with una spirit. Amen!" 
Ephesians1:1 Dis leta na from Paul, wey bi Jesus Christ apostle, bikos na so God wont am. I dey rite to God pipol wey dey for Efesus, di ones wey dey follow Jesus Christ with faith." 
Ephesians1:2 Make di grace and peace wey dey kom from God awa papa and from awa Oga God Jesus Christ, dey with una." 
Ephesians1:3 I bless God wey bi awa Oga God Jesus Christ Papa; wey don bless us with difren spiritual blessing from heaven, bikos of Christ." 
Ephesians1:4 Before God kreate di world, E choose us thru Christ bikos E love us, so dat for en front, wi nor go get any fault and wi go dey holy." 
Ephesians1:5 Before, God don already decide thru Jesus Christ sey, wi go bi en shidren, bikos na so E wont am." 
Ephesians1:6 So, make all praiz and glory bi en own, bikos of en free grace wey E give us, thru en pikin wey E love well-well." 
Ephesians1:7 Na thru Christ blood wi take get salvashon and na dis blood make God dey forgive us awa sins, bikos en grace big well-well." 
Ephesians1:8 Di grace wey E give us, get plenty wisdom, sense and undastandin." 
Ephesians1:9 E do like dis wen E show us di sekret plan wey E get and di good mind wey E show evribody, thru Christ." 
Ephesians1:10 God go komplete en plan wen di time don rish, den E go gada evritin wey dey heaven and eart togeda under Christ, wey bi di head." 
Ephesians1:11 All tins dey happen as God wont am and thru Christ, E choose us to bi en own pipol, bikos na so E plan am from di time wen E kreate di world," 
Ephesians1:12 so dat wi wey first bilive Christ, go dey gi-am praiz and glory." 
Ephesians1:13 Since una don hear di trut kon bilive Christ, God don give una di Holy Spirit as special mark to show sey naim get una." 
Ephesians1:14 God deposit dis Holy Spirit for di tins wey wi go inherit, until di time wen E go save en pipol, so dat all praiz and glory go bi en own." 
Ephesians1:15 So, since I hear about una faith for Christ and how una love all God pipol," 
Ephesians1:16 I nor dey stop to tank God for una, wen ever I dey pray." 
Ephesians1:17 I pray make God, awa Oga God Jesus Christ Papa wey get glory, give una spiritual wisdom and revelashon, wey go make una know am well-well." 
Ephesians1:18 Una eye don open to undastand di grace wey God koll una kom enter and una don si how di blessing wey E promise en pipol, plenty rish." 
Ephesians1:19 Una don si how en pawa big rish, bikos una bilive am. Dis na di pawa wey dey do big-big tins for us." 
Ephesians1:20 E show dis pawa thru Christ, wen E raiz am from deat, kon make am sidan for en rite hand for heaven;" 
Ephesians1:21 di place wey far well-well, wey high pass where wiked pipol dey rule; wey strong pass evry pawa wey dey dis world; big pass evry name wey dey for dis world and di ones wey dey kom." 
Ephesians1:22 God put evritin under Christ leg kon make am head for di church and Oga God for evritin. 
Ephesians1:23 Na di church bi Christ body and naim dey make evritin for evriwhere full and komplete. 
Ephesians2:1 Before-before, na sturbones and sin dey kontrol una life," 
Ephesians2:2 bikos una dey do wetin di world wont. Una dey obey wiked pawas wey dey rule di air and kontrol sturbon shidren. 
Ephesians2:3 All of us dey live dis kind life before. Wi dey do difren tins wey awa body and mind wont. Dat time, wi bi shidren wey God won ponish like oda sinnas." 
Ephesians2:4 Bikos God love us well-well, E don show us plenty mesi" 
Ephesians2:5 (aldo sin dey kontrol awa life before), E kon give us life thru Christ, den E save us with en grace!" 
Ephesians2:6 E raiz us up with Christ kon make us sidan with am for heaven. 
Ephesians2:7 E do dis, to show evribody for di world wey dey kom sey, en grace wey dey show us kindness thru Jesus Christ, big well-well." 
Ephesians2:8 God save una with en grace, bikos una get faith (as una don bilive Christ), nor bi with una own pawa, but na God give una." 
Ephesians2:9 E nor save una bikos of di work wey una do, so make nobody dey boast." 
Ephesians2:10 God kreate us thru Jesus Christ as di good work wey E don prepare down before, so dat wi go dey do as E plan." 
Ephesians2:11 Make una remember sey before-before una bi Gentile pipol wey dey do wetin di flesh wont and Jew pipol dey koll una, “pipol wey dem neva sekonsaiz” like di way dem dey sekonsaiz human being." 
Ephesians2:12 Dat time, una dey without di Mezaya and una nor get share for Israel blessings and since una nor get hope and una dey without God for dis world, una kon bi strenja to God kovenant wey E promise Israel pipol." 
Ephesians2:13 But thru Jesus Christ blood, una wey bin dey far, God don draw una near ensef," 
Ephesians2:14 bikos na Christ bi awa peace. Na Christ make Jew and Gentile pipol bi one. E don break di wall wey divide and separate dem as enemies. 
Ephesians2:15 E don kansol Jew pipol law with all en kommand and rules, so dat e go fit make Jew and Gentile pipol to bi one with am and like dis, peace go dey among dem." 
Ephesians2:16 E use di sofa wey e sofa for cross take end dia kworel kon make dem one body as dem dey serve God. 
Ephesians2:17 And e prish peace to una wey dey far and near," 
Ephesians2:18 so dat thru am, all of us with one Spirit, go fit rish where awa Papa dey for heaven." 
Ephesians2:19 So, una nor go bi strenja and pipol wey nor get share for Israel blessings again, but una go bi God shidren with all di pipol wey dey en house." 
Ephesians2:20 Dis na bikos, God don build una on-top di apostles and profets foundashon and na Jesus Christ bi di nomba one stone wey God take lay di foundashon." 
Ephesians2:21 Na for inside Christ di whole building for join togeda kon grow as one holy Temple for God and 
Ephesians2:22 thru am, God don build una togeda as where E go dey stay thru di Spirit." 
Ephesians3:1 Bikos of dis, mi Paul wey bi prisona for Christ, bikos of una wey bi Gentile pipol, dey pray give God." 
Ephesians3:2 True-true, una don hear sey na God give mi dis work thru en grace and na for una own good." 
Ephesians3:3 God open my eye to undastand en sekret, as I rite to una before," 
Ephesians3:4 so dat wen una read am, una go fit undastand di sekret wey God show mi." 
Ephesians3:5 Di pipol wey dey before nor know dis sekret as God don show en holy apostles and profets wey dey naw, thru di Holy Spirit." 
Ephesians3:6 So, bikos of di gospel, Gentile pipol don follow Jew pipol get share for God blessing. Dem don bi membas for Christ body and dem get share for God promise." 
Ephesians3:7 I bi dis gospel savant, bikos of God grace wey E give mi thru di work wey en pawa dey do." 
Ephesians3:8 Na mi small pass for all God pipol, but God don give mi grace to prish di Good News give Gentile pipol and dis grace wey Christ give mi, nor dey finish." 
Ephesians3:9 Di grace na to make evribody undastand God sekret plan. Na God kreate evritin and E hide di plan since e kreate di world. 
Ephesians3:10 E make dem undastand, so dat thru di church, all di rulers and pawas wey dey heaven go kon know God komplete wisdom, wey dey show ensef for difren ways." 
Ephesians3:11 Dis happen akordin to en plan wey go stand forever and E make am happen thru awa Oga God Jesus Christ 
Ephesians3:12 and na bikos Christ dey faithful, naim make us get di heart to fit rish where God dey." 
Ephesians3:13 Na dis make mi tell una sey, make una nor fear bikos of di tins wey I dey sofa, bikos na for una own good." 
Ephesians3:14 Bikos of dis, I dey knee down for awa Papa front," 
Ephesians3:15 where all di family for heaven and eart from get dia names. 
Ephesians3:16 I dey pray sey as en glory big rish, E go make una strong well-well with pawa thru en Spirit wey bi di really pesin inside una." 
Ephesians3:17 So dat Christ go dey inside una heart thru faith and wen una don strong well-well inside God love," 
Ephesians3:18 una go fit join all God pipol undastand how God love wide, long, high and deep rish." 
Ephesians3:19 Den una go really know di love wey Christ get, wey big pass evritin wey una go fit undastand and evritin inside God, go full una life." 
Ephesians3:20 So, make all di glory bi God own; di Pesin wey dey do pass di tins wey wi go fit ask or tink, thru en pawa wey dey work inside us." 
Ephesians3:21 Make all glory for Christ church bi en own from one generashon go rish anoda. Amen! 
Ephesians4:1 Mi wey bi prisona, bikos I dey serve di Oga God; I dey beg una make una dey live una life as God wont." 
Ephesians4:2 Make una dey get pity for one anoda with kwayetnes, gentolness and patient, bikos of di love wey una get." 
Ephesians4:3 Make una dey do evritin wey una fit do to keep di unity wey di Spirit dey give, as una dey live togeda for peace." 
Ephesians4:4 Na one body and Spirit dey, bikos just as all of una get one hope from God wen E koll una," 
Ephesians4:5 na so too una get one Oga God, one faith, one baptizim," 
Ephesians4:6 one God and Papa wey dey above evribody; dey use evribody and dey inside evribody. 
Ephesians4:7 But God don give grace to all of us akordin to how Christ gift plenty rish. 
Ephesians4:8 Na dis make dem sey, “Wen e raiz-up go heaven, E karry many prisonas wey E free follow body and E give plenty gift to pipol.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Na wetin dis word, “E raiz-up,” mean? E mean sey Christ first die and dem beri am for di eart." 
Ephesians4:10 En wey dem beri, naim still bi di pesin wey raiz-up pass di heavens, so dat e go komplete evritin." 
Ephesians4:11 Na Christ make some among us bi apostles, profets, evangelist, pastors and tishas." 
Ephesians4:12 Christ do like dis to prepare us for di ministry work, wey go make God church grow," 
Ephesians4:13 so dat wi go bi one for di tins wey wi bilive and wey go make us really know God Pikin. Den, wi go dey tink like Christ." 
Ephesians4:14 So make wi nor bi like shidren wey breeze dey karry up-and-down; shidren wey dey follow yeye tins wey human being dey tish and na dis tins dem dey take deceive pipol. 
Ephesians4:15 But, as wi dey do wetin dey good and korrect with love, wi go dey grow for evry side kon meet Christ wey bi di head." 
Ephesians4:16 Na from Christ di whole body dey grow well and join togeda thru di pawa wey dey support am. As each part dey do en work, na so di body go dey grow inside God love." 
Ephesians4:17 So, I dey use Christ pawa take tell una dis tins sey, make una nor live una life like Gentile pipol wey dey tink only bad and tins wey nor get sense." 
Ephesians4:18 Dia mind dey for darkness and dem nor get part for di life wey God dey give, bikos dem sturbon and nor fit undastand." 
Ephesians4:19 Dem dey do wayo, dey give dia body to yeye tins; tins wey nor dey pure and dey wiked." 
Ephesians4:20 But wi nor tish una like dat about Christ. 
Ephesians4:21 If na thru, den una don hear and learn di trut about am, just as di trut dey inside Christ." 
Ephesians4:22 Koncerning di kind life wey una dey live before, wi sey make una trowey dat bad spirit wey dey make una do bad-bad tins" 
Ephesians4:23 and make una dey tink betta tins for una mind. 
Ephesians4:24 Den, true raitiousness and holiness wey di trut dey bring, make una wear di new man wey God don kreate like ensef." 
Ephesians4:25 Since una don stop to lie, make una start to tok trut give una neighbour, bikos all of us na membas for Christ body." 
Ephesians4:26 If una dey vex, make una nor sin and make day nor dark still meet una dey vex." 
Ephesians4:27 Make una nor give di devil any shance. 
Ephesians4:28 Pesin wey dey tif, make e nor tif again. Instead, make e work hard and do good with en own hand, so dat e go fit give pipol wey nor get." 
Ephesians4:29 Make una nor allow any bad word kom out from una mout, but make una word dey give poor pipol hope, so dat e go bless pipol wey hear am." 
Ephesians4:30 Make una nor do wetin go make di Holy Spirit vex. Bikos na di Holy Spirit bi di mark wey God put for una body, so dat for judgement day, E go know doz wey E go save." 
Ephesians4:31 Una must stop to get bad belle; to dey vex; kworel and to dey tok bad-bad word. 
Ephesians4:32 Make una dey good to one anoda; dey sorry for pipol and dey forgive each oda, just as God forgive una thru Christ." 
Ephesians5:1 So, make una dey bihave like shidren wey God love well-well." 
Ephesians5:2 Make wi love one anoda, just as Christ love and sakrifice ensef as ofrin wey get betta smell to God, bikos of us." 
Ephesians5:3 To dey sleep with pesin wey yu nor marry; dey do tins wey nor dey pure and get long-trot, make una nor allow dis tins dey among una, bikos dem nor good for God pipol." 
Ephesians5:4 Make una nor allow yeye and foolish word kom out from una mout. And make una nor dey tok anyhow or use bad word, bikos all dis tins nor good. Instead, make una dey tank God with una mout." 
Ephesians5:5 One tin wey una must know bi sey, pesin wey dey sleep with who e nor marry; wey nor dey pure or wey get long-trot and dey serve juju, nor go enter Christ and God kingdom." 
Ephesians5:6 Make una nor let anybody deceive una with yeye word, na dis tins make God dey vex for doz wey nor dey obey am." 
Ephesians5:7 So make una nor join dem. 
Ephesians5:8 Before-before, una dey for darkness, but naw, una bi lite wey dey shine inside Christ. So make una dey do tins like shidren wey get lite," 
Ephesians5:9 bikos di fruit wey lite get, dey bring goodness, raitiousness and trut." 
Ephesians5:10 So, make una always dey do tins wey go make God happy." 
Ephesians5:11 Make una nor put hand for bad tins, instead, make una dey espose dem." 
Ephesians5:12 Shame nor go let wiked pipol tok about wetin dem dey do for sekret. 
Ephesians5:13 But evribody go si evritin wey kom out for lite. 
Ephesians5:14 Bikos na lite dey make evritin shine kom out and na dis make dem rite sey: “Wake-up; yu wey dey sleep! Make yu raiz from grave and Christ go shine for yor life!” 
Ephesians5:15 Make una dey kareful as una dey live una life. Make una nor bi like pipol wey nor get sense. 
Ephesians5:16 Make una use evry shance wey una get well, bikos dis time wey wi dey so, dey evil and wiked." 
Ephesians5:17 Bikos of dis, make una get sense to undastand wetin awa Oga God word tok and mean." 
Ephesians5:18 Make una nor dey drink strong drink, bikos e go distroy una. But make una allow God Spirit fill una mind." 
Ephesians5:19 Make una dey tok to unasef with psalms, hymns and spiritual songs. For inside una heart, make una dey praiz God with hymns and psalms." 
Ephesians5:20 With awa Oga God Jesus Christ name, make una dey tank God awa papa for each oda." 
Ephesians5:21 Bikos of di respet wey una get for Christ, make una dey respet one anoda." 
Ephesians5:22 Una wey bi wife, make una dey respet una husband, just as una dey respet Christ," 
Ephesians5:23 bikos na di husband bi di wife head, just as Christ bi head for di church and naim en save di body." 
Ephesians5:24 As di church dey submit to Christ, na so too, wife suppose submit to dia husband for evritin." 
Ephesians5:25 Husband, make una love una wife, just as Christ love di church kon sakrifice en life for am," 
Ephesians5:26 so dat e go fit make am klean, thru baptizim and God word." 
Ephesians5:27 E do like dis, so dat di church go bi like wife wey fine well-well, wey nor get any stain, dey do anyhow or get any oda tin wey fit spoil am." 
Ephesians5:28 Na so too, husbands suppose love dia wife like dia own body. Man wey love en wife, love ensef." 
Ephesians5:29 Nobody don ever hate e own body, but e dey feed and kare for am, just as Christ dey kare for di church," 
Ephesians5:30 bikos wi bi part for en body. 
Ephesians5:31 Na bikos of dis, man go live en papa and mama go join en wife and di two of dem, go bi one flesh." 
Ephesians5:32 Dis sekret wey I dey tell una so big well-well, but na di tin wey dey between Christ and di church, I dey tok about." 
Ephesians5:33 So, each man suppose love en own wife, just as e love ensef and evry wife suppose respet en husband." 
Ephesians6:1 Shidren, as una know God, make una dey hear una papa and mama word, bikos na wetin una suppose do bi dat." 
Ephesians6:2 Make una respet una papa and mama, bikos na dis bi di first kommandment from God wey get promise." 
Ephesians6:3 So dat e go betta for una and una go get long life. 
Ephesians6:4 Una wey bi papa, make una nor make una shidren vex, but make una raiz dem to follow Christ tishing." 
Ephesians6:5 Una wey bi savant, make una dey obey una masta with fear, respet and with klean mind like sey, na Christ una dey obey." 
Ephesians6:6 Make una nor bi like pipol wey dey do dia work wen dem si sey, pesin dey look dem; bikos dem dey fine good face. Instead, as una bi Christ savant, make una dey do wetin God like from una heart." 
Ephesians6:7 Make una dey do una work with betta mind like sey, na Christ una dey do am for and nor bi human being," 
Ephesians6:8 bikos una know sey, each pesin; weda e bi slave or e dey free, if e do wetin dey good, Christ go reward am." 
Ephesians6:9 And una wey bi masta, make una dey trit una savant well. Make una nor make dem fear, bikos both yu and dem get di same masta for heaven and E nor dey favor pesin anyhow." 
Ephesians6:10 Finally, make una dey strong with Christ mighty pawa." 
Ephesians6:11 Make una wear komplete soja uniform wey God dey give, so dat una go fit stand fight di wayo wey devil dey use." 
Ephesians6:12 Bikos, wi nor dey fight against human being, but na against di wiked rulers wey dey for dis world, against evil spirits and pawas wey dey di heavens." 
Ephesians6:13 Na dis make mi sey, make una wear komplete soja uniform wey God dey give, so dat una go fit stand for groun wen trobol and wahala go kom and wen una don win, una go still stand well." 
Ephesians6:14 So, make una stand well-well kon tie trut like belt round una waist, den wear bullet proof koat as raitiousness for una body." 
Ephesians6:15 Make una wear shoe for leg wey go show sey, una dey ready to prish di Good News wey dey give pipol peace" 
Ephesians6:16 and with all dis, make una karry faith wey go help una kwensh all di wiked arrows wey Satan dey trow." 
Ephesians6:17 Make una wear salvashon like priest kap for head kon whole di Spirit swod wey bi God word. 
Ephesians6:18 With difren prayers, make una dey ask God to help una. Make una always dey pray with di Spirit and dey shine una eyes well-well. Make una nor give up, but make una kontinue to pray for all God pipol." 
Ephesians6:19 Make una pray for mi too sey, make God give mi betta word anytime wen I open my mout to tok and make I fit esplain di sekret wey dey di gospel." 
Ephesians6:20 I bi God messenja, even doh I dey for prison naw. But make una pray sey, I go dey tok with boldness as I suppose to tok." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikikus wey bi my special broda and faithful savant for God work, go tell una evritin, so dat una go know wetin dey happen to mi for here." 
Ephesians6:22 Na bikos of dis I send am kom meet una, make una for know how tins dey with us for here and make e for fit enkourage una heart." 
Ephesians6:23 I pray sey make God, awa Papa and Oga God Jesus Christ give all my fellow Christian brodas and sistas peace, love and faith." 
Ephesians6:24 Make God grace dey with evribody wey love awa Oga God Jesus Christ with di love wey nor dey die. 
Philippians1:1 Dis leta na from Paul and Timoti, wey bi Jesus Christ savant. To all God pipol for Filippi, with dia bishops and leaders." 
Philippians1:2 Make God awa papa and Oga God Jesus Christ give una grace and peace. 
Philippians1:3 I dey tank my God evritime I remember una. 
Philippians1:4 Evritime wen I dey pray for una, I dey do am with happiness," 
Philippians1:5 bikos of how una dey help mi prish di gospel from di first day wey una hear am kon rish today. 
Philippians1:6 I dey sure sey, di Pesin wey start dis good work for una life, go make am pafet until di day wen Christ go kom." 
Philippians1:7 So e dey good for mi to dey tink about una like dis, bikos una dey my heart. Una don follow mi share from God favor, even wen I dey prison and wen I dey prish di trut about di gospel." 
Philippians1:8 God know sey, bikos of Christ love wey dey my heart, I dey miss una well-well." 
Philippians1:9 I pray make una love dey strong more-more for God tins wey una learn and make E help una undastand," 
Philippians1:10 so dat una go fit choose wetin betta pass and as una dey do so, una go dey ready for di day wen Christ go kom." 
Philippians1:11 Make di work wey Christ do for us and how to please God, full una mind. Den all di glory and praiz go bi God own." 
Philippians1:12 My brodas and sistas, I wont make una know sey my sofa na to make di gospel stand." 
Philippians1:13 Di sojas wey dey guide di prison and all di oda pipol don know sey, na bikos of Christ, I dey prison" 
Philippians1:14 and bikos of di prison wey dem put mi so, almost all di brodas and sistas faith for Christ, don strong well-well. And naw, dem don dey prish God word without fear." 
Philippians1:15 True-true, na jealousy and kworel make some dey prish about Christ, but odas dey do am with betta mind." 
Philippians1:16 I know sey dis ones na love make dem dey do am, bikos dem know sey I dey here to defend wetin dem dey prish." 
Philippians1:17 Doz oda ones wey dey prish about Christ dey do so, bikos dem dey tink about diasef and wetin dem go gain. Dem nor dey do tins with klean mind and dem tink sey dem fit kause more trobol for mi, bikos I dey prison." 
Philippians1:18 But dat one nor matter to mi. So, weda dem dey pritend or do am with klean mind, di message about Christ dey kontinue and na dat one dey make mi happy. I go always dey happy," 
Philippians1:19 bikos I know sey na una prayer and di help wey Christ Spirit dey give, dey save mi." 
Philippians1:20 Di hope wey I get bi sey, shame nor go ever fit katch mi; my heart go strong well-well and as I dey do naw, na so I go always dey do. Evritin for my body go praiz Christ, weda I dey alive or I don die." 
Philippians1:21 Bikos to mi, to dey dis life, na to live for Christ and to die inside Christ, na dat one betta pass." 
Philippians1:22 If I kontinue to dey live inside dis body, e mean sey I go do betta work, but I nor know wish one I go like pass." 
Philippians1:23 Naw, I know wish one I go choose, bikos I won go dey with Christ and na dat one betta pass." 
Philippians1:24 But e go good for una as I still dey for dis body. 
Philippians1:25 I dey sure of dis tins: I know sey I nor go die naw, so dat I go kontinue with una and as una dey inside di faith, una life go dey betta more-more." 
Philippians1:26 So wen I kom meet una again as una dey serve Christ, una go get more rizin to dey happy bikos of mi." 
Philippians1:27 Make una life dey show sey una bilive Christ message, so dat weda I kom si una or not, I go dey hear sey una dey strong with one spirit, one mind and dey fight togeda make di gospel for stand." 
Philippians1:28 Make una nor fear una enemies, bikos dem go soon skata and dat na sign to show sey God go save una." 
Philippians1:29 God don give una dis sign, nor bi only make una for bilive Christ, but make una for still sofa for am," 
Philippians1:30 bikos una dey face di same sofa wey una si mi dey face. And I wont make una know sey, even naw, I still dey sofa di same tin." 
Philippians2:1 Gain dey to serve Christ? Konfort dey for en love? Fellowship dey between pipol and God Spirit? Una heart good rish to show pipol mesi? 
Philippians2:2 Den, make una let my joy dey komplete, as una dey gri with each oda and dey love and work togeda with one mind." 
Philippians2:3 Make una nor dey karry body up, but make una trit each oda like unasef. Instead, una dey do wetin una like, bikos of di tins wey una go gain, so dat una go fit boast." 
Philippians2:4 Make una nor dey tink about unasef alone and wetin una wont, but make una dey tink about wetin good for odas too." 
Philippians2:5 Make una get di same mind wey Christ get: 
Philippians2:6 wey bi sey, even doh en with God na di same, e nor boast about am." 
Philippians2:7 But e leave evritin wey e get for heaven kon bi like savant. So e kom dis world as human being. 
Philippians2:8 E put en body down kon obey God, until Jew pipol kill and nail am for cross!" 
Philippians2:9 Bikos of dis, God raiz am up kon gi-am di name wey big pass evry oda name," 
Philippians2:10 so dat wen dem koll Jesus name, evribody and evritin must knee down, weda dem dey heaven, eart or for under di eart" 
Philippians2:11 and evry tongue go konfess sey, “Na Jesus Christ bi di Oga God.” Den all di glory go bi God own." 
Philippians2:12 So, my friends wey I love; pipol wey dey always obey mi, (nor bi only wen I dey with una, but una dey obey well-well, even wen I nor dey with una). Make una kontinue to do God work with all una heart, so dat una salvashon go full well-well," 
Philippians2:13 bikos na God dey work inside una and una go fit do good tins kon get di pawa wey go make una happy. 
Philippians2:14 Make una nor use vexnashon take work for God," 
Philippians2:15 so dat una nor go get any blame and una go dey klean. God Pikin nor get fault; even doh una dey live for di world wey bad pipol dey, una go dey shine like stars," 
Philippians2:16 bikos una get God message wey dey give life. So, di day wen Christ go kom, I go get rizin to boast sey I nor run dis race or work for nor-tin." 
Philippians2:17 But even if dem take mi offa sakrifice for una, I go dey happy," 
Philippians2:18 so make una kom follow mi rijoice. 
Philippians2:19 As Jesus Christ wont am, I go send Timoti kom meet una, so dat my heart go strong small, with di news wey I go hear about una." 
Philippians2:20 Among all di pipol for here, na only Timoti get di kind mind wey I get for una and naim dey make mi tink of una and how una dey manage." 
Philippians2:21 Di odas dey busy with dia own matter, but nor bi matter wey koncern Christ." 
Philippians2:22 Una know how mi and Timoti bi, sey as pikin dey work with en papa, na so e dey follow mi work, so dat di gospel go stand." 
Philippians2:23 I go soon send am kom meet una, so dat una go know how my kondishon bi." 
Philippians2:24 Aldo I bilive Christ sey, e nor go tey, before mi mysef go kom visit una." 
Philippians2:25 But before dat time, I don tink am sey, e good make I send Epafroditus kom meet una. En na my broda, ko-worker and soja. Na una messenja e bi and e dey help mi anytime wey I nid anytin." 
Philippians2:26 True-true, e miss all of una well-well and en mind dey worry am, bikos una hear sey e nor well." 
Philippians2:27 E sick well-well sotey e nearly die. But God get mesi for am; nor bi only for am, but for mi too, so dat I nor go kry join di one wey I dey so." 
Philippians2:28 Na dis make mi won really send am kom meet una, so dat wen una si am, belle go sweet una again and I nor go dey worry about una." 
Philippians2:29 So make una welkom and respet am as una broda for Christ with happiness," 
Philippians2:30 bikos e nearly die bikos of Christ. E put en life for danger, so dat e go fit help mi do wetin una for do, since una nor dey here." 
Philippians3:1 Finally, my brodas and sistas, make una happy bikos una get Christ. I dey rite di same tin give una again, bikos e go help una." 
Philippians3:2 Make una shine una eye, bikos of doz wey dey bihave like dogs and wiked pipol wey dey ponish dia body!" 
Philippians3:3 Na wi bi di really sekonsishon; di pipol wey dey woship God thru en Spirit; pipol wey dey happy inside Christ and wi nor dey put awa hope for wetin pipol dey do. 
Philippians3:4 Aldo my own rizin important too. If anybody tink sey e get betta rizin to put hope for wetin human being dey do, mi Paul, get pass dem." 
Philippians3:5 Dem sekonsaiz mi eight days afta dem born mi. I kom from Israel, Benjamin tribe and I bi Hibru man. I bin dey live akordin to di law, bikos I bi Farisee." 
Philippians3:6 Bikos I really won do God work, I kon dey kause sirious wahala for di pipol wey dey di church. I do evritin just as di law sey make wi do, so dat wi go dey good for God eye. So, I nor get any fault." 
Philippians3:7 But all dis tins wey I si as gain, I kon kount dem to bi nor-tin bikos of Christ." 
Philippians3:8 Nor bi only doz ones, but naw, I dey look evritin as nor-tin, wen I kompare am with Christ, my Oga God wey I know and I trowey evritin, bikos of am. True-true, I dey look all doz tins as yeye, so dat I go fit gain Christ," 
Philippians3:9 kon bi one with am. My raitiousness nor kom from di law, but I dey raitious thru my faith for Christ. Bikos na thru faith God take make us dey raitious with am." 
Philippians3:10 Wetin I wont na to know am and di pawa wey wake Christ from deat; to sofa wetin e sofa; to bi as e bi wen e die," 
Philippians3:11 so dat mi too go still wake-up from deat, as e wake." 
Philippians3:12 Nor bi sey I don get evritin wey I wont or God don make mi pafet, but I dey try make I get di prize wey dey kom from God kon hold am as Jesus Christ whole mi." 
Philippians3:13 My brodas and sistas, I nor look mysef like sey I don get evritin wey I wont. Bikos I dey tink of only one tin wey bi: To forget di tins wey don pass kon dey porshu di ones wey dey front" 
Philippians3:14 and as I put my mind for dis tins, I dey try to get di prize wey bi life for heaven; prize wey make God koll us thru en pikin, Jesus Christ." 
Philippians3:15 So wi wey don mature for Christ, make wi get dis kind mind. But if una dey tink difren tins, I bilive sey God go show una di trut." 
Philippians3:16 So, make wi kontinue to follow di rules wey wi dey follow." 
Philippians3:17 My brodas and sistas, make una dey live like mi and dey learn from odas wey dey follow us as ezample." 
Philippians3:18 Bikos I don tell una before and I dey tok am again with tears for my eye sey, di way many pipol dey bihave, dey show sey dem bi enemies to Christ cross." 
Philippians3:19 Dem go end for hell; na dia belle bi di god wey dem dey serve. Tins wey suppose make dem shame, naim dey make dem happy and na only tins for dis world dem dey tink about." 
Philippians3:20 But wi bilong to heaven and wi dey wait awa Savior wey kom from der, wey bi Oga God Jesus Christ." 
Philippians3:21 E go use en pawa wey make am Oga God for evritin, take shange dis awa ordinary body and awa body go kon bi like en own wey get glory." 
Philippians4:1 My brodas, sistas and friends wey I love, I dey hongry to si una, bikos una dey make mi proud. My friends wey I love, make una stand well inside Christ!" 
Philippians4:2 I dey beg Euodia and Sintike make dem gri togeda inside Christ. 
Philippians4:3 Yes, my good friends, I still dey tell una, make una help dem. Dem try as dem dey prish di gospel with mi, both Klement and my oda ko-workers, wey dia name dey inside Christ Life Book." 
Philippians4:4 Make una always dey happy inside Christ. I dey tok again sey, make una dey happy!" 
Philippians4:5 Make evribody know sey una nor like wahala, bikos Jesus go soon kom." 
Philippians4:6 Make una nor let anytin worry una for mind. Instead, for evry kondishon wey una dey face, make una ask God thru prayer for evritin wey una nid and make una always dey tank am, as una dey pray." 
Philippians4:7 Den God peace wey pass wetin human being fit undastand, go guide una heart and mind, inside Christ." 
Philippians4:8 Finally, my brodas and sistas, tins wey bi true; wey get respet; wey fine; wey pipol dey tok good about; wey good well-well; wey rish to praiz, na dis kind tins una suppose to dey tink about." 
Philippians4:9 So anytin wey una learn, hear and si mi dey do, make una dey do dem too. And di God wey dey give us peace, go dey with una." 
Philippians4:10 I dey happy well-well inside Christ, bikos una don finally show sey, una dey tink about how I dey manage. (I know sey una get mi for mind before, but una nor get shance to do anytin for mi)." 
Philippians4:11 I nor dey tok dis one bikos I nid anytin, but na bikos I don learn to dey okay for any kondishon wey I si mysef." 
Philippians4:12 E get sometaim wey I nor get and sometaim, I dey get plenty. But for evry kondishon, I don learn how to dey okay, weda my belle full or I dey hongry; weda I get plenty or I nor get anytin at-all." 
Philippians4:13 I fit do evritin thru Christ wey dey give mi pawa. 
Philippians4:14 But una try well-well as una help mi wen I dey trobol. 
Philippians4:15 Filippi pipol, una know sey, wen I komot from Masidonia, for di time wen I just start to prish di gospel, na una bi di only church wey help mi and na only una dey follow mi share for my happiness and sofa." 
Philippians4:16 Bikos even for Tesalonika, una still send tins kom give mi." 
Philippians4:17 I nor dey tok dis bikos I wont gift, but make una for gain from dis work wey una dey do." 
Philippians4:18 Naw, I get evritin wey I nid, bikos Epafroditus don give mi di tins wey una send. And na dis bi di ofrins wey dey make belle sweet God." 
Philippians4:19 My God go give una evritin wey una nid, bikos of en glory and propaty wey dey inside Jesus Christ." 
Philippians4:20 Make evribody give glory to God awa Papa, forever and ever. Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Make una greet God pipol wey dey for Christ. 
Philippians4:22 God pipol wey dey here dey greet una too, especially doz ones wey kom from Caesar house." 
Philippians4:23 Make awa Oga God Jesus Christ grace dey with una spirit. 
Colossians1:1 Dis leta na from mi Paul, Jesus Christ apostle and Timoti my broda, bikos na so God wont am." 
Colossians1:2 To all God pipol for Kolosse, wey bi awa brodas and sistas for Christ. Make God awa Papa give una grace and peace." 
Colossians1:3 Wi dey always tank God wey bi Jesus Christ Papa, anytime wen wi dey pray for una," 
Colossians1:4 since wi hear about how una bilive Christ and di love wey una get for God pipol. 
Colossians1:5 Wen una first hear about di Good News wey bring trut, una kon get love and faith for wetin God prepare for una for heaven and na dis gospel" 
Colossians1:6 kom meet una. Dis gospel dey bear fruit for di whole world and since di day wey una hear am, una don undastand as God grace big rish and e don dey bear fruit and grow among una." 
Colossians1:7 Awa broda Epafras, wey dey work for Christ with all en mind, even doh wi nor dey der, na-im tish una di gospel" 
Colossians1:8 and e kon tell us about di love wey di Spirit give una. 
Colossians1:9 Bikos of dis, wi too, since wi hear about una, wi neva stop to dey pray for una. Wi dey tell God make E show una wetin E wont, so dat una go dey wise and undastand God Spirit," 
Colossians1:10 den una life go betta just as Christ wont. For all di good tins wey una dey do, make una dey bear fruit and learn to know God more-more." 
Colossians1:11 Wi still dey pray sey una go dey strong with God pawa wey get glory. Una go show sey una dey patient and get strong mind for God work with happiness. 
Colossians1:12 Make una dey tank God, bikos E don make una share from wetin en pipol get for en kingdom wey dey give lite." 
Colossians1:13 E save us from darkness pawa and put us for di kingdom wey E give di pikin wey E love. 
Colossians1:14 Dis na di pikin wey pay for us, so dat wi go dey free and God go forgive us awa sins." 
Colossians1:15 God wey wi nor dey si, na Jesus bi en image and for evritin wey E kreate, na Jesus bi di first." 
Colossians1:16 Bikos God kreate evritin for heaven and eart thru en pikin; both Fisical and spiritual tins; weda dem get pawa or dey rule for difren-difren place; God kreate dem thru am and E kreate dem for am. 
Colossians1:17 Christ dey before evritin and bikos e dey, evritin still dey where dem dey." 
Colossians1:18 Na-im bi head for di body wey bi di church and from di biginnin, na-im bi di first-born wey raiz-up from grave, so dat e go bi nomba one for evritin." 
Colossians1:19 God dey happy sey evritin wey dey inside am, dey inside en pikin too" 
Colossians1:20 and thru Christ blood wey e pour out for us for di cross, God go draw evritin back to ensef afta E don make peace with tins for heaven and eart." 
Colossians1:21 Before-before, bikos of di wiked tins wey una dey do and tink, una dey far from God and una bi en enemy." 
Colossians1:22 But naw, with en pikin blood, E don draw una klose kom en present, so dat E go make una en friends wey nor get stain or fault and wey dey holy." 
Colossians1:23 If true-true una get faith and una leg strong for groun, den una go get hope kon whole di gospel wey una hear. Dem don prish dis gospel give evribody for di world and mi Paul don bi di gospel savant." 
Colossians1:24 I dey happy for di sofa wey I dey sofa for una and for di church wey bi Christ body, so I dey take my body komplete wetin remain for Christ sofa." 
Colossians1:25 I bi savant for di church, bikos of di work wey God sey make I do for una and I dey do am to komplete God work." 
Colossians1:26 So di sekret wey E hide from awa grand-grand papa dem and evribody wey dey di world before, E don open am make en pipol si." 
Colossians1:27 God wont make dem know di rishis wey dey en glory; wey di sekret get for evribody and na-im bi Christ wey dey inside una. So una get hope sey una go share for God glory. 
Colossians1:28 As wi dey tell evribody wetin dem go do, wi dey prish Christ and tish with wisdom, so dat wen wi go show una to Christ, una go don dey pafet." 
Colossians1:29 So na dis tins I dey struggol and work for akordin to en pawa wey dey work inside mi. 
Colossians2:1 Pipol for Laodicea and doz wey neva si mi face-to-face, I wont make una know how I dey work for una rish." 
Colossians2:2 Wetin I wont bi sey, wen una don really undastand God sekret wey dey inside Jesus Christ, make una heart dey strong with love, so dat una go get evritin wey una wont." 
Colossians2:3 Bikos all di wisdom and knowledge wey God get, E hide dem inside Christ." 
Colossians2:4 I dey tok all dis tins, so dat nobody go dey deceive una with argument." 
Colossians2:5 And even if I nor dey der with una, my spirit dey der and I dey happy sey una mind nor dey shange and una faith for Christ, still strong well-well." 
Colossians2:6 So, just as una asept Jesus Christ as una Oga God, make una kontinue to live una life inside am." 
Colossians2:7 Make una dey strong for groun and dey grow inside Christ, so dat una faith go strong as wi dey tish una and una go dey tank God well-well." 
Colossians2:8 Make una take kare and nor let anybody fool una with wayo tok about human being wisdom and spiritual pawas wey dey rule di world, but make una dey do as Christ wont." 
Colossians2:9 Bikos na Christ dey show us evritin about God. 
Colossians2:10 And una dey komplete inside am; bikos na-im bi di head for all di pawas wey dey for heaven and eart. 
Colossians2:11 Dem sekonsaiz una inside am. Dis nor bi human being sekonsishon, but na di spirit own wey Christ dey do." 
Colossians2:12 Bikos wen dem baptize una, dem beri una with am and una follow am raiz-up thru di faith wey God pawa dey give and na dis God raiz am up." 
Colossians2:13 Even doh una bin don die inside una sin bikos dem nor sekonsaiz una body, God kon make una dey alive with am, bikos E don forgive una sins." 
Colossians2:14 E don distroy doz bad-bad tins wey una dey do and wetin dem rite about awa debt wey fit kill us, God remove am kon nail dem for di cross." 
Colossians2:15 God disgrace wiked and evil rulers for publik, wen E win dem for di cross." 
Colossians2:16 So make una nor let anybody take food, drink, party, new moon or Sabat Day matter, take judge una." 
Colossians2:17 Bikos all dis tins na shadow for di tins wey go kom, but di really tin, na Christ!" 
Colossians2:18 Make una nor let doz wey dey pritend and woship angels judge una. Dat kind pesin dey tok anyhow about vishon wey e sey e si, but na yeye tins and sin full en mind." 
Colossians2:19 Dat pesin nor dey with Christ wey bi di head. Bikos na Christ join di whole body togeda, as dem dey grow inside God." 
Colossians2:20 Since una don die with Christ and e don free una from wiked pipol, den why una still dey bihave as pipol wey nor know God?" 
Colossians2:21 Wen dem sey, make pipol nor whole, chop or tosh some tins, e nor mean anytin." 
Colossians2:22 All dis tins dey yuzles as pipol dey use dem, bikos na human being make all dis rules." 
Colossians2:23 E bi like sey dis tins get wisdom, bikos pipol dey woship angels; dey pritend sey dem good and dey sofa dia body, but dis wisdom nor get value, bikos e nor fit stop pesin make e nor do di yeye tins wey dey en mind." 
Colossians3:1 So, if God raiz una with Christ, den make una put mind for tins wey dey heaven; di place where Christ for sidan for God rite side." 
Colossians3:2 Make una dey tink about tins for heaven, nor bi tins for dis eart," 
Colossians3:3 bikos una don die and una life dey save with Christ for inside God. 
Colossians3:4 Wen Christ (wey bi una life) go kom, una go follow am kom with glory." 
Colossians3:5 So make una kill evry bad karata wey dis world dey bring: Like to dey sleep with pesin wey una nor marry; dey bihave anyhow; follow dis world tins; dey do bad tins; long-trot and to serve juju. 
Colossians3:6 Na dis tins dey make God vex for doz wey nor dey obey am. 
Colossians3:7 Na so una dey live una life before wen una bi sinnas," 
Colossians3:8 but naw, to dey vex anyhow; to get bad mind for pesin; to take mout spoil pesin and to dey curse pipol, make una remove dem from una life." 
Colossians3:9 Since una don kill una old sef and di tins wey una dey do before, make una nor dey lie give each oda." 
Colossians3:10 Make una wear di new pesin, so dat una go dey new as una dey learn to know and bi like di Pesin wey kreate una." 
Colossians3:11 For heaven, e nor get anytin like Greek or Jew pesin; pesin wey dem sekonsaiz or not; bush pesin; pipol wey dey chop human being; slave or free pesin, but na Christ bi all and e dey inside all of us." 
Colossians3:12 So, as pipol wey God don choose, wey holy and wey E love well-well, make una kwik dey sorry for pipol; dey gentol; nor dey karry body up and wear patient like klot for body." 
Colossians3:13 Make una dey bear with each oda; dey forgive each oda; even doh una get wahala with anybody. Just as Christ don forgive una, make una forgive odas too." 
Colossians3:14 With all dis good tins, make una love one anoda, bikos na love bi di best tin wey fit whole una togeda." 
Colossians3:15 Make Christ peace dey rule una heart (bikos na thru dis peace, Christ take koll una as one body) and make una dey tank God." 
Colossians3:16 Make Christ word stay inside una and make una dey tish each oda with wisdom wey go make una heart strong. Make una dey sing psalms, hymns and spiritual song and dey do all dis tins to really tank God from una heart." 
Colossians3:17 For anytin wey una dey do, weda una dey tok or do oda tins, make una do am with awa Oga God Jesus Christ name and tank God thru am." 
Colossians3:18 Una wey bi wife, make una dey do wetin una husband wont, as Christ pipol suppose do." 
Colossians3:19 Una wey bi husband, make una love una wife and nor dey wiked to dem." 
Colossians3:20 Una wey bi pikin, make una dey obey una papa and mama for evritin, (dey do evritin wey una papa and mama tok), bikos na wetin Christ like bi dat." 
Colossians3:21 Una wey bi papa, make una nor do wetin go make una shidren vex, so dat life nor go taya dem." 
Colossians3:22 Una wey bi savants, make una obey una mastas (dey do wetin dem tok) for evritin and nor bi only wen dem dey look una. Make una nor dey do like pipol wey wont make dem praiz dem, but make una dey obey with betta mind, bikos una dey fear God." 
Colossians3:23 Anytin wey una dey do, make una do am with all una body, like sey una dey do am for Christ and nor bi for pipol," 
Colossians3:24 bikos una know sey na Christ una really dey serve and una know sey E go reward una. 
Colossians3:25 Pesin wey do bad, God go pay am back for wetin e do, bikos God dey judge evribody akordin to wetin dem do, since E nor dey support anybody anyhow." 
Colossians4:1 Una wey bi masta, make una trit una savants well and nor shit dem, bikos una know sey, unasef get masta for heaven." 
Colossians4:2 Make una dey sirious for una prayer. Make una dey shine una eye as una dey tank God wen una dey pray.
