Colossians4:3 Like dis too, make una dey pray for us, so dat God go give us betta shance to tok about Christ sekret, wey make mi dey prison." 
Colossians4:4 Make una pray make I tok well, so dat pipol go undastand mi." 
Colossians4:5 Make una dey wise as una dey tok with pipol wey nor dey follow Christ. Make una use evry shance wey una get well. 
Colossians4:6 Make all of una word dey good and sweet like wetin dem put sugar, so dat una go know how to ansa evribody." 
Colossians4:7 Tikikus, my broda wey I love and awa Oga God savant; wey dey work well-well like mi, go tell una evritin wey dey happen to mi." 
Colossians4:8 Na bikos of dis I send am kom meet una, so dat una go know how tins bi for us and make e for give una heart." 
Colossians4:9 Onesimus, di broda wey dey with us, wey wi love well-well, wey bi one of una, I dey send am follow Tikikus. Dem go tell una evritin wey dey happen for here." 
Colossians4:10 Aristakus, wey follow mi dey prison dey greet una and Mark wey bi Banabas kousin (wey wi bin tell una sey, if e kom meet una, make una welkom am) dey greet una too." 
Colossians4:10 Aristakus, wey follow mi dey prison dey greet una and Mark wey bi Banabas kousin (wey wi bin tell una sey, if e kom meet una, make una welkom am) dey greet una too." 
Colossians4:11 Jesus wey dem still dey koll Justus, dey greet una. Jew pipol wey bi Christian and dey follow mi do God work, na only dem dey help mi." 
Colossians4:12 Epafras, wey bi one among una and Christ savant, dey greet una. E dey pray well-well for una, so dat una leg go strong for groun and una go grow as una dey learn di tins wey God wont." 
Colossians4:13 Bikos I bi witness sey, e don work well-well for una and doz wey dey Laodicea and Hierapolis." 
Colossians4:14 Awa friend Demas and Luke, wey wi love well-well, wey bi doctor, dey greet una too." 
Colossians4:14 Awa friend Demas and Luke, wey wi love well-well, wey bi doctor, dey greet una too." 
Colossians4:15 Make una tell di brodas and sistas wey dey Laodicea, with Nimfa and di pipol wey dey gada for en house sey, I greet dem." 
Colossians4:16 And afta una don read dis leta, make una let di pipol for di church wey dey Laodicea, read am too. Den make una still read di leta wey I rite give dem." 
Colossians4:17 Make una tell Arkippus sey, make e finish di work wey Christ gi-am." 
Colossians4:18 Mi Paul, dey rite dis greetin with my own hand. Make una remember di shains wey dem take tie mi and make God grace dey with una." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Na Paul, Silas and Timoti rite dis leta go give God and Jesus Christ pipol wey dey di church for Tesalonika. Make God grace and peace dey with una." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Wen ever wi dey pray, wi dey always tank God for all of una." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Wi remember di work wey una don do thru faith and as una dey bear bikos of di hope wey una get about awa Oga God Jesus Christ. 
1Thessalonians1:4 Awa brodas and sistas wey God love, wi know sey God don choose una as en own." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Nor bi only thru ordinary word wi take prish di gospel give una, but na with di Holy Spirit pawa and wi show sey, evritin wey e tok, na true. Una know how wi dey live and help una." 
1Thessalonians1:6 So, una kon bigin do as wi and Christ dey do; even doh una sofa well-well, una receive di message with joy wey di Holy Spirit dey give." 
1Thessalonians1:7 So una bi ezample to all di pipol wey bilive Jesus for both Masidonia and Akaia. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Bikos nor bi only sey di message about Christ don rish evriwhere for Masidonia and Akaia, but dem don hear di news about una faith for evriwhere. So wi nor even nid to tok about una again." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Pipol dey tok about how una welkom us and leave di juju wey una dey serve before kon follow di true God wey get life. 
1Thessalonians1:10 And una dey wait en pikin wey dey kom from heaven. Dis na en pikin, Jesus wey E wake from deat and na-im go save us from God vexnashon wey dey kom." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Awa brodas and sistas, una know sey awa visit nor dey yuzles." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Before wi kom meet una for Tesalonika, dem sofa and trit us anyhow for Filippi and many pipol nor wont make wi tok, but awa God give us pawa to prish en Good News." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Bikos wetin wi dey prish nor bi with mistake, dirty mind or wayo," 
1Thessalonians2:4 but na God choose us to prish di gospel and na so wi dey prish am. Wi nor dey do am make pipol for praiz us, but make God wey dey si awa heart, praiz us by ensef." 
1Thessalonians2:5 As una know, wi nor ever try to win una with sweet words. And God na awa witness sey wi nor dey pritend to bi una friends bikos of una money." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Wi nor ever sey make pipol praiz us; weda na una or odas. 
1Thessalonians2:7 Wen wi dey with una, wi dey gentol like as mama dey kare for en pikin, even doh wi for fit kollect money from una since wi bi Christ apostles." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Bikos wi love una, wi dey happy as wi dey share God word and awa own life with una." 
1Thessalonians2:9 But awa brodas and sistas, wi hope sey una remember as wi dey work for both day and nite, so dat as wi dey prish di gospel, wi nor go bi problem to una." 
1Thessalonians2:10 As wi dey live with una wey bilive Christ, una and God na awa witness sey, wi dey holy and dey do good tins for God eye without fault." 
1Thessalonians2:11 As unasef know, wi dey trit una as papa dey trit en shidren." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Wi dey advise, beg and tok to una sey, una must live una life as God wont, bikos na-im koll una enter en own kingdom and glory." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Wi still dey tank God evritime, bikos wen una asept God message wey una hear from us, una nor asept am like sey na human being message, but una asept am as God message and true-true na God message e bi and God dey work inside una wey don bilive." 
1Thessalonians2:14 My brodas and sistas, na di same tin happen to God church for Judea and una wey bilive Christ for der don still sofa pain from una kountry-men wey bi Jew pipol." 
1Thessalonians2:14 My brodas and sistas, na di same tin happen to God church for Judea and una wey bilive Christ for der don still sofa pain from una kountry-men wey bi Jew pipol." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Di same Jew pipol wey dey ponish us, na dem still kill awa Oga God Jesus Christ and di profets. Dem dey wiked to evribody and nor dey do wetin God wont." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Dem even try to stop us, so dat wi nor go prish di message wey go give salvashon to Gentile pipol. As dem dey do so, dia sins dey plenty more-more. But naw, God vexnashon with ponishment dey kom meet dem." 
1Thessalonians2:17 My brodas and sistas, afta wi leave una (even doh wi still dey tink about una), wi kon dey try to make sure sey wi si una again bikos of di love wey wi get for una." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Wi bin won kom si una (mi wey bi Paul don try to kom many times), but Satan spoil awa plan." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Nor bi una bi awa hope, joy and crown wey wi go take boast give Jesus wen E kom? Yes! Na una!" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Bikos na una bi awa joy and glory! 
1Thessalonians3:1 Wen wi nor fit bear-am again, wi kon sey wi go stay for Atens by awasef." 
1Thessalonians3:2 So wi kon send Timoti, awa broda wey dey follow us do God work sey, make e kom enkourage una koncerning una faith," 
1Thessalonians3:3 so dat nobody among una go dey fear, bikos of all dis sofa. Unasef know sey all wetin dey happen, na as God plan am." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Wen wi dey with una, wi dey tell una before di time rish sey, wi go sofa well-well and e don dey happen as una dey si am." 
1Thessalonians3:5 So wen I nor fit bear again, I send pesin make e help mi shek how una faith bi, bikos I dey fear sey devil wey dey tempt pipol, don tempt una and all di work wey wi do among una, don dey yuzles." 
1Thessalonians3:6 But naw, Timoti don kom meet us afta e si una and e tell us di Good News about di faith and love wey una get. E still tell us sey, una dey always remember and dey hongry to si us, just as wi dey hongry to si una." 
1Thessalonians3:7 So, awa brodas and sistas, for all awa trobol and sofa, awa heart dey strong about una, bikos of una faith." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Naw, wi dey alive again, bikos una stand well for Christ" 
1Thessalonians3:9 and wi dey tank God for una. Wi dey tank am for di joy wey wi get for en present bikos of una. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Wi dey pray with all awa mind for day and nite sey, make God let us si una again kon let una know evritin wey una suppose know about una faith." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Make God awa papa and Oga God Jesus prepare road for us, so dat wi go si una again." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Make Christ make una love for each oda and for evribody, grow more-more and big, just as awa love for una bi," 
1Thessalonians3:13 so dat una heart go dey strong for holiness. And for di time wey Christ go kom with en pipol, una go dey without fault for God present." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Finally, my brodas and sistas, wi dey ask and beg una bikos of Christ sey, as una don hear from us about how una suppose live as God wont (as una dey do naw), make una kontinue to dey live like dat." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Una know di kommand wey wi give una thru Christ. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Na wetin God wont bi dis: Make una dey holy; komot hand for bad tins; nor sleep with who nor bi yor wife or husband. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Una wey bi man, make una dey live with una wife for holiness and with respet," 
1Thessalonians4:5 nor bi to dey follow who yu nor marry, just as Gentile pipol wey nor know God dey do." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Make nobody shit en Christian broda or make am vex, bikos na God go fight for di pesin wey yu shit and wi don tell una before and wi still dey warn una sey, God go really ponish pipol wey dey do like dat." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Bikos God nor koll us to live yeye life, but na to live holy life." 
1Thessalonians4:8 So, anybody wey rijet wetin wi tok; nor bi human being authority e rijet, but na God wey give una en Holy Spirit." 
1Thessalonians4:9 No nid to rite give una about love for una fellow Christians, bikos God ensef don tish una about how una suppose love each oda." 
1Thessalonians4:10 And una really dey show love to di Christian brodas and sistas for Masidonia. My brodas and sistas, wi dey beg una sey, make una kontinue to dey do like dat." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Make una dey do well, so dat una go live kwayet life; dey mind una own business and dey work with una hand as wi kommand una before." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Like dis, doz sinnas go dey respet una and una go get evritin wey una nid." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Awa brodas and sistas, wi wont make una know di trut about doz pipol wey don die, so dat una nor go dey sad like pipol wey nor get hope." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Since wi bilive sey Jesus die and e wake-up; na so too wi bilive sey, doz wey bi Christian before dem die, God go raiz dem up." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Bikos wetin wi dey tish una naw, na wetin Christ tish sey: Wi wey dey alive wen Jesus go kom, nor go follow am go kon leave doz wey don die bikos, all of us go-go with am." 
1Thessalonians4:16 God big angel go shaut dey kommand as Christ dey kom down from heaven; di angel vois go dey loud with God trumpet and doz wey bi Christian before dem die, go first go up." 
1Thessalonians4:17 God go karry wi wey remain for dis world go meet dem for sky, den all of us go-go meet Christ for heaven." 
1Thessalonians4:18 So make una dey enkourage each oda with all dis word. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Brodas and sistas, koncerning di time and sizin wen dis tins go happen, wi nor nid to rite anytin give una." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Bikos una really know sey, di day wen Christ go kom, e go bi like wen tif dey kom for nite." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Wen pipol dey sey, “Evritin dey okay and peaceful,” na dat time wahala wey go skata evriwhere go kom and e go bi like di pain wey woman dey face wen e won born and nobody go eskape from am." 
1Thessalonians5:4 But una wey bi awa brodas and sistas, make una komot from darkness, so dat, dat day nor go kom meet una as tif dey kom wen nobody dey espect," 
1Thessalonians5:5 bikos all of una na lite shidren. Wi nor bi nite or darkness shidren," 
1Thessalonians5:6 so make wi nor dey sleep as odas dey do, but make wi shine awa eye well-well." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Na for nite pipol dey sleep and dey drink anyhow. 
1Thessalonians5:8 But since wi bilong to lite, make wi dey kwayet, use faith and love take protet awa chest, den wear di hope wey wi get like priest kap for head." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Bikos God nor choose us to sofa en vexnashon, but to get salvashon thru awa Oga God Jesus Christ" 
1Thessalonians5:10 wey die for us, so dat weda wi dey alive or wi don die wen e kom, wi go stay togeda with am for heaven." 
1Thessalonians5:11 So make una dey enkourage and help each oda, just as una dey do naw." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Naw wi dey beg una, awa brodas and sistas, make una dey respet doz wey dey work, guide and tell una wetin to do about dis matter wey koncern Christ." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Bikos of di work wey dem dey do, make una love and respet dem well-well." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Wi dey beg una, awa brodas and sistas, make una tell pipol wey dey bihave anyhow sey, wetin dem dey do nor good, den make una help doz wey dey weak, but make una dey patient with evribody." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Make una dey sure sey nobody pay bad for bad, but for evritime, make una always dey do good for each oda and for evribody." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Make una dey happy evritime. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Make una dey pray evritime. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Make una dey tank God for evritin, bikos na so God wont sey make una wey dey inside Christ dey do." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Make una nor drive God Spirit komot for una life. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Make una nor take God word wey pesin tok as yeye tin. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Make una test evritin kon dey do wetin good. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Make una nor put hand for wiked and evil tins. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Make God wey dey give peace, help una to dey holy go rish di end, so dat for di day wen Christ go kom, una spirit, soul and mind go dey without fault." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Di Pesin wey koll una to do en work dey faithful. 
1Thessalonians5:25 My brodas and sistas, make una pray for us." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Make una greet all di brodas and sistas as God wont am. 
1Thessalonians5:27 I kommand una with Jesus name sey, make una read dis leta give all di brodas and sistas wey bilive." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Make awa Oga God Jesus Christ grace dey with una. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Na Paul, Silas and Timoti rite dis leta go give God and Jesus Christ pipol wey dey di church for Tesalonika." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Make grace and peace wey God awa papa and Oga God Jesus Christ dey give, dey with una." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Wi get betta rizin to dey tank God evritime for una, bikos una faith dey grow more-more and di love wey una get for each oda, dey grow too." 
2Thessalonians1:4 So, bikos of una faith and how una dey bear wahala and sofa, wi dey use una boast to all di pipol for God church." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Dis na sign sey God dey give korrect judgement. E wont make una dey good to inherit en kingdom and na bikos of dis kingdom, una dey sofa so." 
2Thessalonians1:6 E good as God dey ponish di pipol wey dey trobol una. 
2Thessalonians1:7 And una wey dey sofa so, God go give wi and una rest wen Christ go kom from heaven with en mighty angels." 
2Thessalonians1:8 Den Christ go use fire wey nor dey kwensh take ponish doz wey nor know God and wey nor dey obey wetin wi dey prish about am. 
2Thessalonians1:9 God go distroy dem and dia ponishment nor go ever end. Wen Christ go kom receive glory from di pipol wey e choose," 
2Thessalonians1:10 e go drive sinnas komot from en present, en pawa and en glory. Dat day, evribody wey bilive, go praiz am and true-true, una bilive evritin wey wi tell una." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Na dis make us dey always pray for una sey, as God koll una, E go make una dey good and evry good tin wey una wont, go happen to una thru en pawa, so dat una work wey una dey do with faith, go komplete." 
2Thessalonians1:12 So, bikos of una, pipol go dey praiz awa Oga God Jesus Christ and akordin to awa God and Oga God Jesus Christ grace, unasef go dey receive en blessing." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Naw my brodas and sistas, for di time wen Jesus go kom and wen God go gada us go meet am, wi won tell una sey," 
2Thessalonians2:2 make fear nor dey una mind or spirit; even doh wi tell or rite give una sey Christ go soon kom. 
2Thessalonians2:3 Make nobody deceive una. Bikos dat day nor go kom until trobol go first kom and true-true, di pesin wey God go distroy, go kom out." 
2Thessalonians2:4 E go oppoz and karry ensef pass God and oda tins wey pipol dey woship. E go even sidan for God Temple dey tok sey e bi God. 
2Thessalonians2:5 Una remember sey wen I dey with una before, I tell una all dis tins." 
2Thessalonians2:6 And una know wetin dey stop am, bikos e go only kom out wen en time don rish." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Dis wikedness don already dey work for sekret and dem go dey sekret until di pesin, wey bi di Holy Spirit wey dey whole dem, go komot for road." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Den evribody go know who dis wiked man bi and God go distroy am with breeze from Christ mout kon beri am with di glory wey dey kom. 
2Thessalonians2:9 Di wiked man go kom with Satan pawa and e go do difren mirakles and wonders. 
2Thessalonians2:10 E go use wayo deceive doz wey go perish, bikos dem nor won love and respet di trut wey for save dem." 
2Thessalonians2:11 So God go make dem deceive dis pipol well-well and dem go bilive dia lie-lie. 
2Thessalonians2:12 Den God go distroy dem, bikos dem enjoy sin instead of di trut." 
2Thessalonians2:13 But my brodas and sistas wey God love, wi dey always tank God for una evritime, bikos God don choose una from di biginnin sey, E go save una with di Holy Spirit pawa wey go make una dey holy, since una get faith and trut." 
2Thessalonians2:14 E koll una enter en salvashon thru awa message, so dat una go fit get share for Christ glory." 
2Thessalonians2:15 So, my brodas and sistas, make una stand well for groun kon whole wetin wi tish una tait; weda na thru di words wey wi tok or letas wey wi rite." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Naw I dey pray sey, God wey love and give us betta konfort thru en grace and hope," 
2Thessalonians2:17 go enkourage and give una pawa for all di good work wey una dey do or di words wey una dey tok. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Finally, my brodas and sistas, make una pray for us, so dat Christ message go kontinue to spread kon get glory just as e really get among una." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Make God diliver us from wiked and evil pipol, bikos nor bi evribody get faith." 
2Thessalonians3:3 But Christ dey keep en promise and E go make una strong. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Wi get mind sey Christ go help una and una go do all di tins wey wi tell una. 
2Thessalonians3:5 I pray make God guide una heart to undastand en love more-more, so dat una go get Christ patient." 
2Thessalonians3:6 My brodas and sistas, wi dey kommand una with awa Oga God Jesus Christ name sey, make una nor follow bilivers wey dey do anyhow and nor dey do as wi tell dem." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Una know sey una suppose to dey imitate us, bikos wi nor bihave anyhow wen wi dey with una." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Wi nor chop anybody food wey wi nor pay for. Instead, wi dey struggol and work hard for day and nite, so dat wi nor go bi wahala to una." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Nor bi sey wi nor get rite to ask una, but wi won use awasef as ezample for una," 
2Thessalonians3:10 bikos even wen wi dey with una, wi tell una sey, “Pesin wey nor ready to work, make e nor chop.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Wi hear sey some pipol among una dey leave anyhow and dem nor dey mind dia business, instead dem dey put eye for anoda pesin tin." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Wi dey kommand and enkourage dis kind pipol with awa Oga God Jesus Christ name sey, make dem do dia work well, so dat dem go fit feed demsef." 
2Thessalonians3:13 My brodas and sistas, make e nor taya una to do good." 
2Thessalonians3:14 But if anybody nor obey awa message thru dis leta, make una look dat kind pesin well-well and make nobody follow am waka or do anytin togeda, so dat shame go katch am." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Make una nor si am as enemy, but make una korrect am as una broda." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Naw, make Christ wey dey give peace, give una en peace evritime and make di peace dey with una always." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Na mi Paul dey rite and greet una with my own hand, just as I dey do for evry leta wey I don send kom meet una." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Make awa Oga God Jesus Christ grace dey with all of una. 
1Timothy1:1 Paul wey bi Jesus Christ apostle thru God awa Savior kommand, na-im rite dis leta and na Jesus Christ bi di hope wey wi get:" 
1Timothy1:2 To Timoti, my own pikin for di faith. Make favor, mesi and peace wey dey kom from God awa papa and Jesus Christ awa Oga God, dey with yu." 
1Timothy1:3 As I tell yu wen I dey go Masidonia, make yu korrect doz pipol for Efesus wey nor dey tish di trut" 
1Timothy1:4 but dey waste oda pipol time with di words wey dem dey tok. Dis kind tin dey make pipol live yeye life, instead of to dey hear God word wey dey make pesin faith strong." 
1Timothy1:5 But di rizin why I dey give dis kommand, na bikos I love dem from my heart with betta mind and faith." 
1Timothy1:6 Some disobey dis kommand kon dey tok tins wey nor dey good. 
1Timothy1:7 Dem won tish pipol di law, but dem nor undastand wetin dem dey tok, even doh dem dey tok with strong heart." 
1Timothy1:8 But wi know sey di law dey good wen pipol dey obey am. 
1Timothy1:9 God nor give di law, bikos of good pipol, but na for pipol wey dey disobey and do anyhow. Dis kind pipol dey like to sin and dem nor dey fear God. Dem nor dey holy or get respet for anytin and dem fit kill dia papa, mama or anybody." 
1Timothy1:10 Di law na for pipol wey dey sleep with who dem nor marry; man wey dey sleep with man; woman wey dey sleep with woman; pesin wey dey sell pipol as slave; lie-lie pipol; doz wey dey promise and dem nor fit do am or anybody wey nor dey obey di rite tishings 
1Timothy1:11 wey dey dis betta gospel, wey awa Oga God sey make I dey prish." 
1Timothy1:12 I tank Christ awa Oga God, wey give mi pawa to do en work. Even doh I dey tok bad about am and dey opress en pipol before," 
1Timothy1:13 e si mi as good pesin kon choose mi to serve am. But God sorry for mi, bikos den I nor know wetin I dey do and I nor bilive en gospel." 
1Timothy1:14 But God grace big well-well with faith and love wey dey for Jesus Christ. 
1Timothy1:15 Dis na true word and e good for evribody to asept and bilive am sey: “Jesus Christ kom dis world kon save sinnas” and na mi worse pass. 
1Timothy1:16 But God sorry for mi, so dat Christ go use mi as betta ezample to show sey, e dey patient with even di pesin wey sin pass. Den odas go know sey, demsef go fit bilive am kon get life wey nor dey end." 
1Timothy1:17 Make all di honor and glory bi God own forever and ever! Na-im bi di King wey nor dey die, di One wey nobody dey si and na only en bi God. Amen!" 
1Timothy1:18 Timoti my pikin, na as dem tok for di words wey dem profesai about yu before, na-im make mi give yu dis kommand. So make dis words make yu strong as yu dey fight for Christ." 
1Timothy1:19 Whole yor faith for Christ well and make yor mind dey klear. Bikos some pipol nor dey use good mind and bikos of dat, dia faith don skata." 
1Timothy1:20 Hymenaeus and Alexanda na ezample of doz kind pipol. I don give dem to Satan, so dat dem go stop to dey tok anyhow about God." 
1Timothy2:1 First of all, I tell una make una dey pray, ask and tank God for evribody." 
1Timothy2:2 Make una pray for kings and doz wey dey rule, so dat wi go fit live for peace, get betta karata and good life with fear for God." 
1Timothy2:3 Dis kind tin good and na wetin God awa Savior dey like," 
1Timothy2:4 bikos E wont make evribody dey save and undastand di trut. 
1Timothy2:5 Bikos na only one God dey and na Jesus Christ wey kom as human being, bi di pesin wey dey bring God and human being togeda." 
1Timothy2:6 E die so dat evribody go dey free. Na dis message God go give di world, wen di time don rish." 
1Timothy2:7 Na dis tins make God choose mi as prisha, apostle and tisha to Gentile pipol, so dat I go prish faith and wetin bi trut (na true word I dey tell una so, I nor dey lie)." 
1Timothy2:8 So, I wont make evribody dey pray for evriwhere, dey raiz dia holy hand without vexnashon or kworel." 
1Timothy2:9 I wont make wimen dey dress well with sef kontrol. Nor make yeye hair style; nor wear too mush gold or stones and klot wey dear well-well. 
1Timothy2:10 Instead, make dem get good karata as wimen wey dey fear God, suppose bi." 
1Timothy2:11 Make wimen dey kwayet and listin well as dem dey learn. 
1Timothy2:12 I nor allow woman tish or give dem authority ova men. Make dem kwayet dey listin," 
1Timothy2:13 bikos na Adam God first kreate, nor bi Eve." 
1Timothy2:14 And nor bi Adam, Satan deceive. Satan deceive di woman and na so sin take kom dis world." 
1Timothy2:15 But God go save di woman wen e won born, so-far e kontinue to get faith, love, holiness and dey kontrol ensef." 
1Timothy3:1 Dis na true word: If any man like to bi leader, na betta work e wont." 
1Timothy3:2 Leader for church must bi pesin wey nor get fault; wey get only one wife; fit kontrol ensef; get sense and respet; dey welkom pipol and e bi good tisha. 
1Timothy3:3 Make e nor bi drunkard or pesin wey like to fight; but e must dey gentol. Make e nor bi pesin wey like to kworel or love money. 
1Timothy3:4 E must bi pesin wey dey manage en own house well and dey make en shidren obey and respet am. 
1Timothy3:5 If pesin nor fit manage en own house, na how e go take manage God church?" 
1Timothy3:6 Who won bi leader must bi pesin wey get strong faith, bikos if e nor strong for faith, e go start to karry body up, den Satan go ponish am." 
1Timothy3:7 Pipol wey nor dey di church must dey tok good about di pesin wey bi leader, so dat dem nor go disgrace and make am fall enter devil trap." 
1Timothy3:8 Like dis too, deakons must bi pipol wey get good karata; nor bi pipol wey dey play wayo; dey drink anyhow or love money." 
1Timothy3:9 Dem must bi pipol wey get mind and dey prish di trut about di faith wey God don show us. 
1Timothy3:10 Before dem go choose deakons, make dem test dem well-well. If dem pass di test, den dem fit serve as deakons." 
1Timothy3:11 Like dis too, dia wifes must get good karata, nor bi wifes wey dey lie or gossip, but dem must fit dey kontrol diasef and dey honest for evritin." 
1Timothy3:12 Deakons must dey faithful to en wife and must fit kontrol en shidren and evritin for en house. 
1Timothy3:13 Doz wey don serve well as deakons, pipol go respet dem well-well and di faith wey dem get for Christ, go dey strong." 
1Timothy3:14 I dey rite all dis kommand to una naw, even doh I dey hope to kom si una soon," 
1Timothy3:15 so dat if I nor kwik kom, una go know how pipol suppose bihave for God church, wey bi di true pila and foundashon." 
1Timothy3:16 Wi know sey God ways dey great well-well: Christ kom as human being; di Spirit show sey e dey free; angels si am wen e kom prish among Gentile pipol; pipol bilive am for di world and God karry am go heaven with glory. 
1Timothy4:1 Di Spirit tok sey for di last days, some pipol go leave di faith kon dey bilive lie-lie spirits and follow wetin demons dey tish." 
1Timothy4:2 Dis pipol dey lie and na wayo dem sabi do and dia mind don skata. 
1Timothy4:3 Dem dey tish sey, e nor good to marry or chop some kind food. But na God kreate dis food and E sey pipol wey bilive di trut fit chop am afta dem don tank am." 
1Timothy4:4 Bikos evritin wey God kreate, dey good and wi nor suppose rijet any food, so-far wi don tank God for am," 
1Timothy4:5 bikos God word and prayer don make am klean. 
1Timothy4:6 If yu give all dis kommand to di brodas and sistas, yu go bi good savant for Christ, bikos yu don feed yorsef with God word, wey bi di spiritual food and naim bi di good tishing wey yu dey follow." 
1Timothy4:7 But make una rijet lie-lie and yeye story. Instead make una dey train unasef with betta words from God. 
1Timothy4:8 Fisical trainin dey good, but na to know God good pass, bikos yu go get reward for dis life and di one wey dey kom." 
1Timothy4:9 Dis na true word and e good make evribody asept am with betta mind. 
1Timothy4:10 Na dis make wi dey work hard and dey struggol, bikos awa hope dey with God wey dey alive and E dey save evribody, especially doz wey bilive am." 
1Timothy4:11 Make yu tish di pipol dis tins and make sure sey, dem do dem." 
1Timothy4:12 Nor let anybody opress yu bikos of yor age; but make yu show ezample to doz wey bilive thru yor word, karata, love, faith and as yu pure rish." 
1Timothy4:13 Until I kom back, make yu dey read God Word for church, dey enkourage di bilivers and tish dem." 
1Timothy4:14 Nor stop to dey use di spiritual gift wey yu get; bikos yu get am thru profesy, wen eldas put hand for yor head dey pray." 
1Timothy4:15 Make yu dey learn dis tins; dey do am with all yor mind, so dat pipol go si as yu dey progress." 
1Timothy4:16 Make yu wosh as yu dey live yor life and di tins wey yu dey tish. Get patient, bikos if yu dey do like dis, yu go save yorsef and doz wey dey listin to yu." 
1Timothy5:1 Make yu nor tok anyhow to pesin wey old pass yu, but dey tok to am with respet like sey yu dey tok to yor papa. Tok to yong men as yu go take tok to yor broda." 
1Timothy5:2 Make yu trit wimen wey old pass yu like sey dem bi yor mama and wimen wey yu senior, make yu trit dem with good mind like sey dem bi yor sistas." 
1Timothy5:3 Respet and kare for wimen wey dia husband don die. 
1Timothy5:4 But if di woman get shidren or grand-shidren, di first tin wey dem go do for dia family, na to show sey dem dey fear God, as dem dey kare for dia papa and mama. Dis na wetin dey make belle sweet God." 
1Timothy5:5 Naw, woman wey en husband don die and e really dey alone for dis world, dey trust God. E dey pray for nite and day sey make God help am." 
1Timothy5:6 But if e just dey enjoy ensef anyhow for dis world, dat mean sey en spirit don die, even doh e still dey alive." 
1Timothy5:7 Make yu always dey give dis kommand so dat dem nor go get fault. 
1Timothy5:8 But if anybody nor fit kare for en pipol, especially en family membas, e don deny di faith bi dat and e worse pass sina." 
1Timothy5:9 Woman wey don pass sixty years and e dey faithful to en husband bi for di man die, make una put am join doz wey di church dey help." 
1Timothy5:10 Evribody go know am for di good work wey e dey do sey: e don train shidren; dey welkom strenjas; dey serve God pipol; dey help doz wey nor get and e dey do difren good work. 
1Timothy5:11 But yong woman wey en husband just die, make una nor put am join doz wey di church dey help, bikos wen dem dey hongry to marry again, dem go fit leave Christ kon bigin sin." 
1Timothy5:12 So God go judge dem, bikos dem don break dia promise." 
1Timothy5:13 For di same time, dem go dey lazy, dey waka from house to house, dey do aproko and tok anyhow." 
1Timothy5:14 So I wont make di yong wimen marry; born shidren; dey guide dia house, so dat enemies nor go get shance to akuiz dem." 
1Timothy5:15 Bikos some pipol don already dey follow Satan. 
1Timothy5:16 If anybody wey bilive get rilashons wey en husband don die, make e help dem. Make e nor worry di church about dem, so dat dem go fit help di oda wimen wey dia husband don die." 
1Timothy5:17 Doz wey dey lead well, make dem pay dem well, especially doz wey dey work and tish well-well, so dat di gospel go stand." 
1Timothy5:18 Bikos God word sey, “Animal wey dey harvest korn, make una nor tie en mout.” Anybody wey dey work, suppose get en pay." 
1Timothy5:19 Make yu nor asept any words wey dem tok against any leader, unless two or three pipol bear witness sey na true." 
1Timothy5:20 Doz wey dey sin, make yu korrect dem for evribody front, so dat e go bi warnin to odas." 
1Timothy5:21 For God, Jesus Christ and di angels wey dey with us, I dey enkourage yu make yu obey all di kommand without wayo." 
1Timothy5:22 Make yu nor hurry to make pesin leader and nor rush put hand for en head, so dat yu nor go karry anoda pesin sin for yor head. Make yu keep yorsef pure." 
1Timothy5:23 Nor dey drink only wota, but make yu still drink small wine bikos of yor belle wey dey make yu sick anyhow." 
1Timothy5:24 Remember sey some pipol dey sin make evribody si am and dis dey judge dem. But e get some wey yu nor go know dia sins naw, but leta, e go kom out for publik." 
1Timothy5:25 Like dis too, pipol dey si di good work wey odas dey do and one day, di good work wey dem do for sekret, go kom out for publik." 
1Timothy6:1 Una wey bi savants, make una dey respet una masta, so dat nobody go tok bad about God and wetin wi dey tish." 
1Timothy6:2 Make una nor disobey una masta, bikos dem bi bilivers. But make una serve and love dem well, bikos di mastas wey una dey serve, na Christian dem bi. Timoti, make yu tish dis tins and dey enkourage evribody to obey am." 
1Timothy6:3 If anybody dey tish wetin nor korrect and nor gri with awa Oga God Jesus Christ tishing and as God wont make wi dey live awa life," 
1Timothy6:4 dat pesin dey proud and na only to dey argue and kworel, e know. Dis kind tin nor good, bikos jealousy; kworel; lie-lie; to dey suspet odas anyhow" 
1Timothy6:5 and wahala, naim e dey kause. Dia mind don spoil and dem nor know di trut again, bikos dem tink sey dem fit use God work take make money." 
1Timothy6:6 To live as God wont and dey happy with wetin E give yu, dey bring betta reward." 
1Timothy6:7 Bikos wi nor bring anytin kom dis world and true-true, wi nor go take one singol tin komot from dis world afta wi don die." 
1Timothy6:8 But if wi get food to chop and klot to wear, make dem rish us." 
1Timothy6:9 Pipol wey won get money by force, dey fall enter temptashon and dem dey get troat for yeye tins wey go distroy and put dem for wahala." 
1Timothy6:10 Pesin wey love money, go get wahala, wiked and evil tins. Bikos some pipol one get money by force, dem don fall komot from di faith kon wound demsef anyhow." 
1Timothy6:11 But yu wey dey serve God, make yu nor put hand for all dat kind tin. Instead, make yu dey struggol to do wetin dey rite and good; dey keep yor promise; dey love; get patient and dey gentol." 
1Timothy6:12 Make yu fight di fight wey dey make faith strong and whole di life wey nor dey end, wey go make pipol praiz God, bikos na dis make am koll yu." 
1Timothy6:13 Before God wey dey give life to all tins and Jesus Christ wey tok well for Pontius Pilate front, I dey tell yu from my heart sey," 
1Timothy6:14 make yu obey dia kommand without fault or blame, until awa Oga God Jesus Christ go kom." 
1Timothy6:15 Bikos wen di time don rish, Christ go kom from heaven with God mighty pawa: Na God bi di King for all kings and Oga God of all oga." 
1Timothy6:16 Dis God nor fit die and E dey stay for lite wey nobody fit waka near. Lite wey human being neva fit si. Make all honor and pawa bi en own forever and ever. Amen! 
1Timothy6:17 Make yu give dis kommand to rish pipol. Tell dem sey, make dem nor dey karry body up kon dey trust dia money wey nor get value and make dem dey trust God wey dey give us evritin wey wi nid to take enjoy dis life." 
1Timothy6:18 Tell dem sey, make dem use dia money take do good. Make dem dey do plenty good works kon dey give doz wey nor get and make dem always dey ready to share with odas." 
1Timothy6:19 If dem dey do like dis, dem go dey use dia money and propaty take lay good foundashon for dia future, so dat dem go get life wey nor dey end." 
1Timothy6:20 Timoti, make yu guide wetin God give yu well-well. Nor put yor mout for yeye tins or matter wey pipol wey nor know God dey tok and do, bikos dem dey oppoz yu with wetin dem feel sey dem know." 
1Timothy6:21 Some pipol don fall komot from di faith, bikos dem dey listin to pipol wey dey do doz bad tins. Make God grace dey with all of una." 
2Timothy1:1 Na Paul, Jesus Christ apostle rite dis leta, bikos na so God wont am, so dat I go prish about di life wey God promise us thru Christ." 
2Timothy1:2 To Timoti, my pikin wey I love. Make grace, mesi and peace dey with yu from God awa Papa and awa Oga God Jesus Christ." 
2Timothy1:3 Anytime I remember yu for my prayer, weda na for nite or day time, I dey always tank God wey I dey serve with betta mind, just as my grand-grand papa dem serve am." 
2Timothy1:4 Wen I remember as yu take kry, e dey hongry mi to kom si yu, so dat joy go full my mind." 
2Timothy1:5 I always dey remember di faith wey yu first get from yor grand-mama, Lois and from yor mama, Eunice. I dey sure sey e dey inside yu." 
2Timothy1:6 Na dis make mi dey remind yu sey, make yu dey use God gift wey yu get well and yu receive dis gift afta I lay hand for yor head." 
2Timothy1:7 Bikos God nor give us di spirit wey go make us fear, but di spirit wey E give us, get pawa, love and sef kontrol." 
2Timothy1:8 So make yu dey proud to tok about Christ or about mi wey dey prison bikos of am and make yu use di pawa wey God give yu, take follow mi sofa for dis gospel." 
2Timothy1:9 Bikos God save and koll us to live holy life. E do like dis, nor bi sey wi deserve am bikos of wetin wi do, but na so E plan am even before di world start, so dat wey go know en grace thru Jesus Christ." 
2Timothy1:10 But naw, E don bring all dis plan out wen awa Oga God Jesus Christ kom dis world. E distroy deat pawa kon bring life wey nor dey end thru di gospel." 
2Timothy1:11 Na dis gospel make God choose mi as prisha, apostle and tisha." 
2Timothy1:12 And naim make mi dey sofa wetin I dey sofa so. But I nor dey shame, bikos I know di Pesin wey I dey serve and I dey sure sey, E go guide di tin wey I gi-am whole, until di day wey Christ go kom." 
2Timothy1:13 Make yu kontinue with di word wey I tell yu kon dey do am with di faith and love wey dey inside Christ. 
2Timothy1:14 Make yu guide di good tins wey God give yu thru di Holy Spirit wey dey inside us. 
2Timothy1:15 Yu know sey evribody for Asia, Figelus and Hermogenes aria, don run leave mi." 
2Timothy1:16 Make God show en mesi to Onesiforus family, bikos e dey always make mi happy and e nor dey shame sey I dey prison." 
2Timothy1:17 Wen e kom Rome, e find mi for evriwhere until e si mi." 
2Timothy1:18 For di day wen Christ go kom, make e show am en mesi! And yu know how e help mi wen I dey Efesus." 
2Timothy2:1 So yu, my pikin, make yu dey strong for di grace wey Christ dey give." 
2Timothy2:2 Di tins wey yu hear mi tok for pipol present, make yu tish oda pipol wey yu trust sey dem dey ready to tish odas." 
2Timothy2:3 Make yu dey ready to sofa as mi and odas dey sofa, so dat yu go bi good soja for Christ." 
2Timothy2:4 Nor-tin koncern sojas with tins wey ordinary pipol dey do; if not, e nor go do wetin en oga wont." 
2Timothy2:5 Bikos anybody wey dey run race, nor go fit win unless e follow di rule wey dey di game." 
2Timothy2:6 Farmer wey work well-well, naim suppose get di first share for di harvest." 
2Timothy2:7 Make yu tink about wetin I dey tok so and Christ go help yu to undastand evritin. 
2Timothy2:8 Remember Jesus Christ wey kom from David family; di pesin wey God raiz from deat; bikos na so e bi for di message wey I dey prish 
2Timothy2:9 and na dis Good News make mi dey sofa, sotey dem kon put mi for prison like tif; but dem nor fit put God word for prison!" 
2Timothy2:10 So I dey ready to bear di sofa, as long as e go save doz wey God don choose inside Christ with glory wey go dey forever and ever." 
2Timothy2:11 Dis word na true: If wi die with am, wi go live with am too." 
2Timothy2:12 If wi bear with am, den wi go reign with am too and if wi sey wi nor know am, en too go sey, e nor know us." 
2Timothy2:13 Weda wi get faith for am or not, Christ go still bi who e bi and e nor go shange." 
2Timothy2:14 Make yu remind evribody about dis tins, den make yu kommand dem for God present sey, make dem nor dey argue about words, bikos doz kind tins nor dey good and e fit konfuse doz wey dey listin." 
2Timothy2:15 Make yu do evritin wey yu fit do, so dat God go si yu as betta pesin. Dey do yor work well as pesin wey nor dey shame, but dey ready to esplain God word wey bi trut." 
2Timothy2:16 Make yu nor put mout for yeye tok, bikos pipol wey dey do doz tins, dey far from God." 
2Timothy2:17 Dia word dey spread like diziz and na dis tin happen to Hymenaeus and Filetus. 
2Timothy2:18 Dem leave di trut kon dey sey resureshon don happen already and like dis, dem don make some pipol fall from di faith." 
2Timothy2:19 But God strong foundashon still stand and dem rite put sey, “God know en pipol and evribody wey bi Christ own, must stop to do evil.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Wen yu go rish man house, nor bi only gold and silva tins dey der, but tins wey dem use wood and klay take make still dey der too and some dey make di house fine and odas nor good at-all." 
2Timothy2:21 So if yu keep yorsef without fault, yu go bi betta pesin wey Christ fit use as e dey do en good work." 
2Timothy2:22 Make yu run from doz tins wey dey hongry yong pipol to do, so dat yu go please God forever. Den yu go fit love and stay for peace with odas wey dey serve God with klean heart." 
2Timothy2:23 I dey tell yu again sey, make yu nor put mout for yeye word, bikos yu know sey dis kind tin dey kause kworel." 
2Timothy2:24 Pesin wey bi Christ savant nor dey kworel, instead e must dey good with evribody; must sabi tish well-well and get patient with sturbon pipol." 
2Timothy2:25 E must dey gentol as e dey korrect pipol wey dey oppoz en prishin and God fit let dis pipol turn from sin kom meet am, so dat dem go know di trut." 
2Timothy2:26 Den dia sense go korrect and dem nor go fall enter devil trap again. Bikos devil don katch dem put inside en trap before, so dem dey do anytin wey e wont." 
2Timothy3:1 Make yu undastand sey, for di last days before dis world go end, tins go hard well-well." 
2Timothy3:2 Pipol go dey tink of diasef alone; dey like money; dey boast; dey karry body up; dey tok bad about God; dey disobey dia papa and mama and dem nor dey tank even pipol wey do good for dem. 
2Timothy3:3 Dem nor get love or forgivenes; dem go dey gossip odas and nor fit kontrol diasef. Dem go dey wiked and hate wetin good. 
2Timothy3:4 Dem go betray dia friends; dey do tins before dem tink; dey feel sey dem dey important and dem go love enjoyment pass God. 
2Timothy3:5 If yu look dem well-well, dem bi like God pipol, but dem don rijet God pawa. So make yu run from dis kind pipol." 
2Timothy3:6 Bikos na dis pipol dey hide enter pipol house kon sleep with wimen wey nor get sense; wey dey sin well-well and wetin dey sweet dis wimen to do, na-im dey kontrol dem." 
2Timothy3:7 Doz kind wimen dey try to learn, but dem nor dey fit know di trut." 
2Timothy3:8 Just as Jannes and Jambres oppoz Moses; na so too, dis pipol wey dia mind block and nor get faith, dey oppoz di trut." 
2Timothy3:9 But dem nor go do am tey, bikos evribody go si how dem foolish rish, just as e happen to Jannes and Jambres." 
2Timothy3:10 But yu don know my tishings; di way I dey live my life and why I dey do wetin I dey do: my faith; patient; love and as I dey bear. 
2Timothy3:11 Yu know di wahala and sofa wey happen to mi for Antiok, Ikonium and for Lystra. I bear all dis wahala and Christ save mi from dem." 
2Timothy3:12 True-true, anybody wey won live di kind life wey God wont inside Christ, make e know sey e must sofa." 
2Timothy3:13 But wiked and evil pipol nor go prosper. Dem go deceive odas and dem go deceive diasef too. 
2Timothy3:14 But make yu kontinue to do wetin yu learn. Yu know sey dis tins na true and yu trust doz wey tish yu. 
2Timothy3:15 Dem don tish yu God word since yu bi small pikin and yu don get salvashon to receive di wisdom wey dey kom thru Christ, wey yu trust." 
2Timothy3:16 Evry word wey dey Bible, kom from God and dem dey good to tish us di trut and to know di tins wey dey wrong for awa life. God word dey korrect us wen wi dey wrong and e dey tish us to do good tins," 
2Timothy3:17 so dat as wi dey do God work, wi go fit do am well and wi go get evritin wey wi nid to take do good tins." 
2Timothy4:1 I dey tell yu wetin to do for God and Jesus Christ present. Wen Christ go appear to make en kingdom stand, e go judge pipol wey dey alive and doz wey don die." 
2Timothy4:2 Make yu dey prish God word and dey ready, weda di time dey okay or not. Make yu use patient take korrect and enkourage yor pipol with betta tishing." 
2Timothy4:3 Bikos time dey kom wen pipol nor go won hear good and betta tishing again. Instead, dem go dey follow wetin dey hongry dem to do kon dey find tisha wey go tish dem wetin dem won hear." 
2Timothy4:4 Dem go rijet di trut and love lie-lie story. 
2Timothy4:5 But make yu kontrol yorsef for evritin. Nor fear to sofa for Christ. Dey do God work and dey tell odas about di Good News. 
2Timothy4:6 For mi, I don already use my life as ofrin for God work, bikos di time wey I go die, don near." 
2Timothy4:7 I don fight di good fight for di faith wey I get; I don run di race finish; I don do wetin I promise sey I go do. 
2Timothy4:8 Naw, di prize for raitiousness dey wait mi and na God wey dey judge rite go give mi dis prize for di day wen Christ go kom. Di prize nor bi for mi alone, but na for evribody wey dey wait for Christ to kom back." 
2Timothy4:9 Make yu try yor best to kom si mi soon. 
2Timothy4:10 Bikos Demas love dis world tins, e kon run leave mi go Tesalonika. Crescens don go Galatia and Titus go Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:10 Bikos Demas love dis world tins, e kon run leave mi go Tesalonika. Crescens don go Galatia and Titus go Dalmatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Na only Luke dey with mi. Make yu karry Mark follow body wen yu dey kom, bikos e go fit help mi for di ministry work." 
2Timothy4:11 Na only Luke dey with mi. Make yu karry Mark follow body wen yu dey kom, bikos e go fit help mi for di ministry work." 
2Timothy4:11 Na only Luke dey with mi. Make yu karry Mark follow body wen yu dey kom, bikos e go fit help mi for di ministry work." 
2Timothy4:12 I send Tikikus go Efesus. 
2Timothy4:13 Wen yu dey kom, bring di klot wey I leave with Karpus for Troas. Make yu bring my book, especially my papers." 
2Timothy4:14 Alexanda wey dey do iron work, wiked mi well-well, but Christ go judge am for wetin e do." 
2Timothy4:15 Make yu dey kareful with am, bikos e fight against evritin wey wi tok." 
2Timothy4:16 Di first time wen dem karry mi go kourt, evribody abandon mi and all of dem run leave mi. Make God nor judge dem bikos of wetin dem do!" 
2Timothy4:17 But God dey for my side and E give mi pawa, so dat thru mi, Gentile pipol go hear di Good News and Christ don save mi from lion mout!" 
2Timothy4:18 And Christ go still save mi from evry evil plan until e take mi enter en kingdom. Make glory bi en own forever and ever. Amen! 
2Timothy4:19 Make yu help mi greet Priscilla, Akwila and Onesiforus family." 
2Timothy4:20 Erastus dey for Korint and bikos Trofimus nor well, I kon leave am for Miletus." 
2Timothy4:21 Make yu try kom before kold sizin go rish. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Klaudia and all di brodas and sistas dey greet yu." 
2Timothy4:22 Make Christ dey with yor spirit. Make God grace and favor dey with yu. 
Titus1:1 Na Paul, wey bi Jesus Christ apostle and God savant rite dis leta to help pipol wey God don choose, so dat dia faith go strong kon know di trut wey go help dem live di kind life wey God wont." 
Titus1:2 Di trut dey give dem di mind sey dem get life wey nor dey end and na God wey nor fit lie promise dem dis life even before E kreate di world. 
Titus1:3 As di time don rish, E don give us en message thru di word wey wi dey prish give evribody and na God awa Savior give mi pawa to do dis work." 
Titus1:4 I dey rite to Titus, my own pikin for faith. Make grace and peace wey dey kom from God awa Papa and from awa Savior Jesus Christ, dey with yu." 
Titus1:5 Titus! Na dis message make mi leave yu for Krete, so dat yu go kontinue awa work for der and pick new leaders for each town, just as I kommand yu." 
Titus1:6 Anybody wey won bi elder must dey good. E must get only one wife and en shidren must bi bilivers; dey gentol and dey respet demsef. 
Titus1:7 Make pesin wey bi leader nor get fault, bikos na God work e dey do. Make e nor dey karry body up; dey kwik vex or drink anyhow; dey like to beat pipol or love money." 
Titus1:8 Instead make e dey welkom strenjas for en house; love wetin dey good and e must get sense; make e nor dey put hand for bad tin; e must dey holy and fit kontrol ensef. 
Titus1:9 E must bilive di message about God wey e dey tish, so dat e go fit tell pipol di trut and korrect doz wey dey oppoz am." 
Titus1:10 Many pipol nor won do wetin God tok, instead, dem dey tok anyhow, dey deceive pipol and follow Jew pipol law wey sey, evribody must sekonsaiz." 
Titus1:11 So wi must stop dem, bikos dem dey tish pipol tins wey go make pipol komot from di trut and dem dey do like dis, bikos of di money wey dem go get." 
Titus1:12 Even one among dia own profets sey, “Krete pipol dey always tok lie, dem bi wiked animals and lazy pipol wey get long-trot.”" 
Titus1:13 Wetin di profet tok, na true. So bikos of dis, make yu stop dem, so dat di bilivers go strong for faith." 
Titus1:14 Make dem stop to listin to Jew pipol lie-lie story and nor dey bihave like doz wey nor bilive. 
Titus1:15 Evritin dey pure to doz wey dia heart dey pure. But nor-tin dey pure to doz wey bad tins full dia mind. 
Titus1:16 Dis kind pipol dey sey dem know God, but di way wey dem dey live dia life, show sey dem nor know am, bikos dem get bad mind, dey disobey God and dem nor ever dey like betta tin." 
Titus2:1 But for yu Titus, yu must tish pipol how to bihave well." 
Titus2:2 Make yu tish old men sey, make dem nor dey bihave anyhow, so dat pipol go respet dem and make dem dey kontrol demsef; get faith; dey show love and dey patient." 
Titus2:3 Make yu tish old wimen sey, make dem live life wey go make God happy. Make dem nor tok bad about pipol; nor dey drink anyhow, instead make dem tish oda wimen wetin dey good." 
Titus2:4 So, make di old wimen train and tish di yong ones how dem go take love dia husband and shidren;" 
Titus2:5 to dey kontrol diasef; get pure mind; dey do dia house work well; dey kare for pipol; dey do as dia husband wont, so dat pipol nor go tok anyhow about God word wey wi dey prish so." 
Titus2:6 Make yu tish yong men to dey live dia life with betta sense 
Titus2:7 and make yu yorsef bi good ezample to dem. Make evritin wey yu dey do, show sey wetin yu dey tish, na trut." 
Titus2:8 Make yu prish di trut, so dat pipol nor go get rizin to tok against yu. Den doz wey dey oppoz yu, go shame and dem nor go get word to tok about us." 
Titus2:9 Una wey bi savant, make una dey do evritin wey una oga wont and wen una oga tok to una, make una nor dey ansa am anyhow." 
Titus2:10 Make una nor dey tif, instead make una dey show sey una get faith, so dat evritin wey una dey do, go bring praiz to God awa Savior." 
Titus2:11 Bikos God grace wey bring salvashon, don kom out make evribody si am." 
Titus2:12 Di grace dey tish us sey, make wi nor live like pipol wey nor know God or dey bihave anyhow. So make wi dey kontrol awasef; dey do good and follow God for dis time wey wi dey so," 
Titus2:13 bikos wi dey wait for di day wen God sey Christ, wey bi awa God Almighty and Savior, go kom." 
Titus2:14 E die for us, so dat e go free and klean us from wikedness kon turn us to en own pipol wey like to do good tins." 
Titus2:15 Make yu tish dem dis tins and korrect dem with boldness. So, make yu nor let anybody trit yu like small pikin." 
Titus3:1 Make yu remind di bilivers sey, make dem respet doz wey dey rule dem. Dem must obey and dey ready to do good." 
Titus3:2 Make dem nor ever tok bad about anybody, instead make dem dey live for peace, dey gentol and dey bihave well to evribody." 
Titus3:3 Before naw, wi dey bihave like fool; wi nor dey obey; wi dey deceive pipol; wi bi savant to tins wey dey sweet us; wi dey do bad tins and dey jealous odas; pipol hate us and wi hate dem too." 
Titus3:4 But wen God awa Savior show us di kindness and love wey E get for us," 
Titus3:5 E kon save us. Nor bi bikos wi do good, but na bikos of en mesi. E forgive awa sins and E make us new shidren kon give us new life thru di Holy Spirit." 
Titus3:6 God give us dis Spirit for free thru Jesus Christ wey bi awa Savior. 
Titus3:7 Since Christ grace don make us klean for God eye, wi don bi pipol wey dey wait for di life wey nor go end and wi dey sure sey, wi go get am." 
Titus3:8 Dis word wey I dey tok so na trut and I wont make yu make sure sey evribody wey trust God dey do good. Dis tishing dey good and e go help evribody. 
Titus3:9 Nor put mout for word wey nor dey good: like matter wey koncern who born who and kworel or fight about Jew pipol law. All dis tin dey yuzles and dem nor mean anytin. 
Titus3:10 If anybody dey won kause kworel for di church and yu don warn am rish two times and e nor gri shange, den make yu drive am." 
Titus3:11 Bikos dat kind pesin don turn from di trut and en own sin go kondemn am. 
Titus3:12 If I send Artemas or Tikikus kom meet yu, make yu try kom meet mi for Nikopolis, bikos I don decide sey, na der I go stay until kold sizin go end." 
Titus3:13 Make yu do evritin wey yu fit do to help Zenas, wey bi lawyer and Apollos for dia journey and make sure sey dem get evritin wey dem nid." 
Titus3:14 Like dis too, awa pipol go learn how to do good and help pipol wey really nid help. And as dem dey do like dis, dem nor go live yuzles life." 
Titus3:15 Evribody wey dey with mi dey greet yu! Make yu greet all di pipol wey love us. Make God grace dey with all of una. 
Philemon1:1 Na Paul wey bi prisona bikos of Jesus Christ and awa broda Timoti rite dis leta to Filemon, awa dear broda and ko-worker." 
Philemon1:2 And to Afia awa sista, Arkippus awa fellow soja and di church pipol wey dey meet for en house." 
Philemon1:3 Make God and awa Oga God Jesus Christ give una grace and peace. 
Philemon1:4 Evritime wey I remember yu for my prayers, I dey tank my God," 
Philemon1:5 bikos I don hear about di faith and love wey yu get for awa Oga God Jesus Christ and all God pipol," 
Philemon1:6 so I dey pray sey di faith wey yu get go make yu undastand all di blessings wey bi yor own inside Christ. 
Philemon1:7 I get joy and my heart dey strong bikos of yor love and thru yu, all God pipol heart don strong too." 
Philemon1:8 Since I get strong bilive for Christ sey, I fit tell yu make yu do wetin dey rite," 
Philemon1:9 mi Paul, wey bi old man and prisona bikos of Christ, won advise yu with love." 
Philemon1:10 Abeg, make yu dey kind to Onesimus, wey bi my pikin for God work and e dey prison with mi." 
Philemon1:11 Before, e nor dey yuzful to yu, but naw, e dey yuzful to mi and yu." 
Philemon1:12 I dey send am kom back kom meet yu (even doh I love am well-well). 
Philemon1:13 If to sey yu dey here, I for wont make e help mi as I still dey prison bikos of di gospel work." 
Philemon1:14 But I nor won do anytin wey yu nor go like, so dat di good wey yu do, nor go bi by force, but e go kom from yor mind." 
Philemon1:15 May bi na bikos of dis make am nor dey with yu since, but naw, e go dey with yu forever." 
Philemon1:16 Nor bi as slave, but as broda wey wi love, bikos e don big pass slave. E don bikom awa broda naw, bikos God don shange am." 
Philemon1:17 So, if yu si mi as yor broda and patina, make yu asept am as yu go take asept mi." 
Philemon1:18 If e tif or whole yu anytin before, make yu tell mi and I go pay." 
Philemon1:19 Na mi Paul take my hand rite dis leta sey, I go pay back, but I fit still sey, yu yorsef dey whole mi." 
Philemon1:20 So my broda, make yu do dis tin for mi bikos of Christ, so dat belle go sweet mi." 
Philemon1:21 I dey sure sey yu go do wetin I ask yu, so I dey rite give yu, bikos I know sey yu go do pass wetin I ask." 
Philemon1:22 So, make yu prepare where I go stay, bikos I know sey yor prayers go make dem free mi kom meet yu soon." 
Philemon1:23 Epafras, wey dey prison with mi, bikos of Jesus Christ, dey greet yu." 
Philemon1:24 Mark, Aristakus, Demas and Luke, wey bi my ko-workers, dey greet yu too." 
Philemon1:24 Mark, Aristakus, Demas and Luke, wey bi my ko-workers, dey greet yu too." 
Philemon1:24 Mark, Aristakus, Demas and Luke, wey bi my ko-workers, dey greet yu too." 
Philemon1:25 Make awa Oga God Jesus Christ grace dey with yor spirit. 
Hebrews1:1 Before-before, God tok to awa grand-grand papa dem for many ways, thru di profets," 
Hebrews1:2 but naw, E dey tok to us thru en pikin wey get evritin and na thru am, E kreate di world." 
Hebrews1:3 Na dis pikin bi God image and e dey show God glory. Naim dey keep evritin wey dey dis world with en pawa. Afta e don die make God for forgive evribody dia sins, e kon go sidan for God rite side for heaven." 
Hebrews1:4 E big pass di angels, just as di name wey God gi-am big pass angels own too." 
Hebrews1:5 Na wish angel God tell sey, “Yu bi my pikin, today I don bikom yor Papa?” Or as E tok for anoda place sey, “I go bi yor Papa and yu go bi my pikin?”" 
Hebrews1:6 But wen God won send en first-born enter dis world, E sey: “Make all my angels woship am.”" 
Hebrews1:7 God tok about di angels sey, “I make my angels and my savants spirit to dey burn like fire,”" 
Hebrews1:8 but koncerning en pikin, E sey: “Yu bi God! Yor kingdom go dey forever and ever and yu go rule yor pipol with authority." 
Hebrews1:9 Yu love to do good and yu hate wikedness. So God, wey bi yor God don anoint yu with oil wey dey bring joy and E make yu dey above yor mates.”" 
Hebrews1:10 E still tell di pikin sey: “For di biginnin, na God kreate di eart and na with en hand E take make di heavens." 
Hebrews1:11 Dem go skata, but God go dey forever. All of dem go grow kon old like klot" 
Hebrews1:12 and like klot and koat, God go fold and shange dem, but God nor dey shange and en life nor go ever end.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Na wish angel God tell, “Sidan for my rite hand until I go put all yor enemies under yor leg?”" 
Hebrews1:14 All di angels na savants and na dem God send go prish for pipol wey go get salvashon. 
Hebrews2:1 Make wi listin to wetin wi don hear, so dat wi nor go fall komot from di rite road." 
Hebrews2:2 Bikos di message wey God tok thru en angels, na trut and anybody wey disobey di law, God go ponish am." 
Hebrews2:3 Wetin make us sey wi go dey free if wi nor listin to dis korrect salvashon message? Na God first tok am and pipol wey hear am kon show us sey na trut. 
Hebrews2:4 God use signs, mirakles and wetin di Holy Spirit do, take show sey, dia words na true." 
Hebrews2:5 God nor sey make en angels kontrol di world wey dey kom and wey wi dey tok about so. 
Hebrews2:6 Instead, David tok for God word sey: “Wetin human being bi wey make yu dey kare for am and who bi yor pikin wey yu dey kare for like dis?" 
Hebrews2:7 Aldo yu make angels high pass am small. But yu kon gi-am honor and glory. 
Hebrews2:8 Yu don put evritin under am sey make e kontrol dem. Wen God sey na evritin E put under am, E mean sey na evritin and nor-tin remain.” And naw, wi neva si all dis tins dey happen," 
Hebrews2:9 even doh wi si Jesus wey angels big pass small, e nor too tey before God gi-am glory and honor, bikos e sofa and die for evribody, just as God plan am." 
Hebrews2:10 Dis na true, bikos na from am and thru am evritin take kom dis life, so dat salvashon go dey korrect thru en sofa and e go karry many pipol enter en glory." 
Hebrews2:11 True-true, Jesus make pipol dey holy, so en and di pipol wey e make holy, na God kreate dem. Na dis make am nor dey shame to koll dem en brodas and sistas." 
Hebrews2:12 Jesus tell God sey, “I go announce yor name among pipol wey bilive and I go praiz yu for dia present." 
Hebrews2:13 Christ still sey, I go trust my God; both mi and di shidren wey E give mi.”" 
Hebrews2:14 So as di shidren get flesh and blood, en too get flesh and blood like dem, so dat thru deat, e go fit distroy Satan wey get pawa to kill" 
Hebrews2:15 and e go free pipol wey deat don whole. 
Hebrews2:16 Jesus dey koncern about Abraham shidren and nor bi only di angels. 
Hebrews2:17 So God make Christ like us wey bi en brodas and sistas. Like dis, Christ go sorry for us kon bi awa good High Priest. And bikos Christ dey koncern about God matter, e sakrifice ensef to remove awa sins." 
Hebrews2:18 Bikos Jesus sofa and devil tempt am, e don get pawa to save pipol wey devil dey tempt." 
Hebrews3:1 My brodas and sistas wey God choose, make una tink about dis Jesus wey God send kom and na-im bi di High Priest wey wi bilive." 
Hebrews3:2 E obey God wey choose am as High Priest, just as Moses obey God." 
Hebrews3:3 Just as dem dey praiz pesin wey build fine house, pass di house wey e build, na so too Jesus glory betta pass Moses own well-well!" 
Hebrews3:4 Na pesin build evry house, but di pesin wey build evritin, na God." 
Hebrews3:5 True-true, Moses really obey God as savant and e tok about some tins wey God go tok about leta." 
Hebrews3:6 But as God Pikin, Jesus dey faithful for God house. So wi too go get share for di house if wi bilive and get konfident for awa hope wey dey inside Christ." 
Hebrews3:7 As di Holy Spirit tok: “If una hear God vois today, make una listin to am!" 
Hebrews3:8 Make una nor get strong heart for am, bikos na so Israel pipol do wen God test dem for wildaness." 
Hebrews3:9 Na for di wildaness una papa for test and try mi for forty years, even doh dem si di mirakles wey I do." 
Hebrews3:10 I vex well-well for dat generashon, so I kon tell dem, ‘Una heart nor dey with mi and una nor gri obey wetin I tok." 
Hebrews3:11 So, una nor go ever get rest.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Make una make sure sey non of una get bad mind wey go make una nor bilive, so dat una nor go turn against God wey nor dey die." 
Hebrews3:13 But make una dey enkourage one anoda evriday, so dat non of una go get bad mind, bikos of sin." 
Hebrews3:14 Bikos wi go bi Jesus Christ friend, if wi whole awa faith strong go rish di end." 
Hebrews3:15 But as dem rite am, “I wish sey una go do wetin e tok, so dat una nor go get strong heart like Israel pipol wen dem dey wildaness.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Na who bi di pipol wey nor listin to God, even doh dem hear en vois? Nor bi pipol wey Moses lead kom out from Egypt?" 
Hebrews3:17 Na who make God vex well-well for forty years? Nor bi doz sinnas wey dia dead body skata for wildaness? 
Hebrews3:18 Na who God swear for sey, dem nor go ever get rest, nor bi doz wey disobey am?" 
Hebrews3:19 So for dat time, doz pipol nor enter di land wey God promise dem, bikos dem nor bilive am." 
Hebrews4:1 Even doh God promise us rest, e good make wi dey kareful, so dat some among us nor go miss di promise." 
Hebrews4:2 Bikos dem prish God word give us, just as dem prish am give dem too. But dem nor take am sirious, bikos wen dem hear am, dem nor gri bilive am." 
Hebrews4:3 Na only wi wey bilive go fit enter di place where God rest dey, bikos God sey, “I vex kon swear for dem, so ‘Dem nor go ever enter my place where rest dey!’ ”" 
Hebrews4:4 Wi know sey God ready and dey wait, bikos Bible sey, “Afta God don kreate evritin finish, E kon rest for di sevent day.”" 
Hebrews4:5 E still sey, “Dem nor go ever enter my place where rest dey!”" 
Hebrews4:6 God promise sey wi go enter di place where en rest dey, yet doz wey first hear di message, nor enter, bikos dem disobey am." 
Hebrews4:7 But God don plan anoda time wen wi go enter en rest and dat time, “Na today”, bikos E don tok am for en word before thru David." 
Hebrews4:8 Bikos if to sey Joshua give dem rest, God for nor tok about anoda day." 
Hebrews4:9 So, di really “Sabat Day” rest, still dey kom for God pipol." 
Hebrews4:10 Bikos pesin wey enter God rest, don rest from all en work, just as God rest from en own work too." 
Hebrews4:11 So make wi try well-well, so dat wi go enter dat place where rest dey and non of us go fall like di odas wey nor obey." 
Hebrews4:12 God word dey alive, e get pawa and e sharp pass knife wey get two sharp side. Di word dey divide pesin soul from en spirit and e dey divide bone from bone; bikos God know wetin wi dey tink for awa mind." 
Hebrews4:13 Nor-tin wey God kreate fit hide from am and evritin dey naked to God, bikos wi go must tell am how wi live awa life." 
Hebrews4:14 Jesus wey bi God Pikin, na-im bi awa High Priest wey don go heaven. Make wi hold am tait and always dey bilive am." 
Hebrews4:15 Dis awa High Priest undastand us wen wi dey weak, bikos all dis temptashon wey wi dey face so, e face dem too, but e nor sin." 
Hebrews4:16 Make wi nor fear to enter where God throne dey: di place where grace dey, so dat wi go get mesi and God grace go help us wen wi nid help." 
Hebrews5:1 Na God dey choose High Priest wey go ripresent pipol for en present. Di priest dey offa both gift and sakrifice for dia sins. 
Hebrews5:2 Di High Priest fit sorry for doz wey sin, bikos dem nor know wetin dem suppose know, since en ensef dey sin too." 
Hebrews5:3 Bikos of dis, e dey offa sakrifice for en sin and di pipol own." 
Hebrews5:4 Nobody dey fit bi High Priest with en pawa bikos e wont make pipol honor am, but na only doz wey God koll to bi priest, just as E koll Aaron." 
Hebrews5:5 Christ nor praiz ensef wen e bikom High Priest, but na God praiz am wen E sey, “Yu bi my Pikin! Today, I don bikom yor Papa.”" 
Hebrews5:6 God still sey, “Yu bi priest forever as Melkizedek bi.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Wen Jesus still dey dis eart, e pray and kry to God wey go save am from deat. God hear en prayers, bikos e obey God for evritin." 
Hebrews5:8 Even doh e bi God Pikin, na thru all di tins wey e sofa, e take learn how to obey." 
Hebrews5:9 Wen God don make Christ pafet finish, e kon save evribody wey obey am." 
Hebrews5:10 God make Christ to bi High Priest like Melkizedek. 
Hebrews5:11 Wi get many tins to tok about, but dem nor eazy to esplain, bikos una nor dey gri obey." 
Hebrews5:12 E don tey wen una bi Christian, so by naw, una suppose to dey tish odas. Instead, una still wont make pesin kom tish una di first tin wey dey God word. Una still dey drink milk, instead of una to dey chop solid food." 
Hebrews5:13 Anybody wey still dey drink milk, bi like small pikin wey nor know good from bad." 
Hebrews5:14 But solid food na for mature pipol and dem get betta sense to know wetin dey good and bad. 
Hebrews6:1 E don rish wen wi go stop to learn only di first tins wey Christ tell us, so make wi dey grow kon know Christ more-more. Wi nor nid to still dey tish una about tins wey dey kause deat; why wi must bilive God;" 
Hebrews6:2 wetin baptizim mean; to put hand for pipol head; to wake pipol from deat and about God final judgement. 
Hebrews6:3 As God dey help us, na new-new tins wi go dey tish una about di faith." 
Hebrews6:4 Wen pesin don first know di trut; taste God gift from heaven; know di Holy Spirit; 
Hebrews6:5 don taste God good work and di betta wey dey kom," 
Hebrews6:6 den e kon start to sin, dat pesin nor go fit turn from sin kom meet God, since e don kill God Pikin for di sekond time and disgrace am for publik." 
Hebrews6:7 Wen rain don soak groun and e bear betta fruits for di farmer, dat mean sey God don bless di man." 
Hebrews6:8 But if na so-so shuku-shuku and grass di groun dey bear, dat mean sey e dey yuzles. So God go curse and distroy am with fire." 
Hebrews6:9 But as for una wey bi my friends, even doh wi dey tok to una like dis, wi know sey dis tins nor go happen to una, bikos una don undastand God salvashon." 
Hebrews6:10 God nor dey support pipol anyhow. E go remember how una help en pipol before-before and how una still dey help dem naw. Una bi God pipol and E nor go forget di love wey una show en shidren. 
Hebrews6:11 As una still dey dis world, wi wont make una kontinue to love one anoda, so dat wetin una dey hope for, go kom." 
Hebrews6:12 So make any of una nor taya, but make una dey patient and bilive, so dat una go gain God promise." 
Hebrews6:13 Nobody big pass God, bikos God swear with en name wen E promise Abraham sey," 
Hebrews6:14 “Na mi bi Oga God, I go bless yu well-well and yor shidren go plenty.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Bikos Abraham get patient, God kon gi-am wetin E promise am." 
Hebrews6:16 Wen pipol won setol matter, dem dey swear with pesin wey big pass dem and di agriment wey dem make, dey end di matter." 
Hebrews6:17 So wen God won show en pipol sey E nor go break en promise, E kon swear with ensef." 
Hebrews6:18 God nor dey lie! So di promise wey E make and ensef wey E take swear, na two tins wey nor go shange. Since wi don run go meet God make E guide us, e good make awa mind strong, so dat wi nor go fear as wi bilive en promise." 
Hebrews6:19 Dis hope strong for awa heart like ship wey dem tie make e nor for move, bikos di hope wey wi get dey kamkpe and strong gidigba. Di promise go take us pass di curtain for heaven, until wi rish where God dey;" 
Hebrews6:20 di place where Jesus don enter for us and don bikom High Priest forever, just as Melkizedek bi." 
Hebrews7:1 Melkizedek wey bi “Salem king” and “God priest”, na-im bless Abraham, afta Abraham don win di kings for war." 
Hebrews7:2 So Abraham kon gi-am one from evry ten tin wey e bring kom back from war. Melkizedek mean, “King wey dey do wetin dey rite” and Salem mean, “Peace.”" 
Hebrews7:3 E nor get papa or mama, e nor get story at-all, en days nor get where e for start or where e go end, but e bi like Man Pikin and e bi priest forever." 
Hebrews7:4 But si how e big rish, bikos Abraham (awa grand-grand papa wey evribody know) gi-am one out of evry ten tins wey e bring from war." 
Hebrews7:5 Levi shidren wey bi priests, get pawa akordin to di law, to kollect one out of evry ten tins from dia own pipol, even doh di pipol demsef, na Abraham shidren too." 
Hebrews7:6 But Melkizedek wey nor even rilate to Levi pipol, still kollect one out of evry ten tins from Abraham, den e kon bless Abraham wey God don promise." 
Hebrews7:7 True-true, wi know sey pesin wey bless pesin, na-im big pass di pesin wey e bless." 
Hebrews7:8 Evry priests dey kollect one out of evry ten tins wey pipol bring, but dem nor dey stay for di world forever, esept Melkizedek, bikos God word tish us sey, e dey alive." 
Hebrews7:9 Levi shidren dey kollect one out of evry ten tins from pipol, but naw, wi go fit sey, wen Abraham give one out of evry ten to Melkizedek, Levi pay too," 
Hebrews7:10 bikos dat time wen Abraham give one out of evry ten tins wey e bring from war to Melkizedek, dem neva born Levi, but Levi dey inside am." 
Hebrews7:11 Even doh Moses Law sey priest must kom from Levi family, dat kind priest nor fit make pesin dey pafet. So anoda priest like Melkizedek must kom and e nor bi like priest wey kom from Aaron family." 
Hebrews7:12 Since dem don shange di rule to selet priest, di law must shange too." 
Hebrews7:13 Di pesin wey wi dey tok about, na awa Oga God wey kom from di tribe where nobody don ever serve as priest for altar before." 
Hebrews7:14 Evribody know sey na from Judah tribe, Jesus from kom and Moses Law nor sey make priest kom from dat tribe." 
Hebrews7:15 Dis matter klear well-well afta God selet anoda priest like Melkizedek. 
Hebrews7:16 E nor selet dat pesin bikos of en grand-grand papa dem, but na bikos en life nor go ever end." 
Hebrews7:17 God word sey: “Yu bi priest forever, just as Melkizedek bi.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Bikos of dis, God put di old law for korna, since e dey weak and yuzles," 
Hebrews7:19 bikos di law nor fit make anytin dey pafet. But naw, wi get betta hope wey go draw us near God." 
Hebrews7:20 God ensef make promise wen E choose dis priest, wey bi Jesus. E nor make dis kind promise wen E choose di oda priests," 
Hebrews7:21 but Jesus kon bi priest wen God sey, “I don swear and I nor go shange my mind sey yu go bi priest forever.”" 
Hebrews7:22 Bikos God swear like dis, Jesus don make us dey sure of di new kovenant wey betta pass." 
Hebrews7:23 Many priests don dey before and all of dem die," 
Hebrews7:24 but Jesus nor go ever die. So, e go bi priest forever." 
Hebrews7:25 So, di pipol wey Jesus take go meet God, e go save dem for forever and ever, bikos e dey alive to pray for dem." 
Hebrews7:26 Na Jesus bi di High Priest wey wi nid. E nor dey do bad tin; e dey holy; nor dey make mistake and e nor bi like wi, wey bi sinnas. God praiz am pass evritin wey dey heaven" 
Hebrews7:27 and e betta pass any oda high priests. Jesus nor nid to offa sakrifice evriday, like di oda priests wey dey offa for dia own sins and for di pipol own. Bikos na wons and for all e sakrifice ensef for evribody, wen e die for di cross." 
Hebrews7:28 Moses Law choose human being wey get weakness as High Priest, but God promise wey kom afta di law, choose di pikin and na-im bi di korrect Priest forever." 
Hebrews8:1 Wetin I mean bi sey: Wi get High Priest wey sidan for God rite hand side for heaven. 
Hebrews8:2 Na-im bi di priest wey dey di holy Temple wey God build and na der dem for dey woship am. 
Hebrews8:3 Since all High Priest must offa gifts and sakrifice to God, Christ too must offa sometin." 
Hebrews8:4 If to sey e dey dis world, e nor for bi priest at-all, since na thru Moses Law dem take dey choose priest wey go offa sakrifice." 
Hebrews8:5 Di priest work for di temple bi like wetin dey happen for heaven. Bikos wen Moses dey one build God house, God tell am: “Make sure sey evritin bi like di design wey I show yu on-top di mountin.”" 
Hebrews8:6 But Christ ministry big and betta pass dia own and na di new kovenant (wey bi di new agriment) betta pass. Bikos na thru God promise dis kovenant take kom, so Christ don bi di middo-man between wi and God." 
Hebrews8:7 If to sey di first kovenant good well-well, den wi nor for nid anoda one." 
Hebrews8:8 But God si fault for inside, so E kon sey, “Di day wey I go make new agriment with Israel and Judah house, dey kom." 
Hebrews8:9 E nor go bi like di kovenant wey I make with dia grand-grand papa dem wen I take dem komot from Egypt, bikos dem break dat kovenant and I kon turn against dem.”" 
Hebrews8:10 But naw, “Dis na my new kovenant (wey bi di new agriment): Di time dey kom wen I go put my laws for dia mout and rite am for dia heart. I go bi dia God and dem go bi my pipol." 
Hebrews8:11 Dem nor nid to tish one anoda about mi wey bi dia God, bikos all of dem, both small and big, go know mi." 
Hebrews8:12 I go forgive dem for all di wiked tins wey dem don do and I nor go remember dia sins again.” 
Hebrews8:13 Wen God tok about di new kovenant, E mean sey di first one nor matter again. And anytin wey don old and nor get use again, go soon disappear." 
Hebrews9:1 Di first kovenant show how pipol go woship God for dis world. 
Hebrews9:2 Di building get two rooms. Di first one where lantan-stand dey, “Na di Holy Place.” One tabol and di bread wey dem offa give God, dey der too." 
Hebrews9:3 Anoda room wey dem rite, “Holy of Holies”, dey for di curtain back." 
Hebrews9:4 Di gold altar where dem dey burn incense and di Kovenant Box wey dem kover with gold, dey der too. Di gold jug wey dem put manna, Aaron rod wey grow leaf and di flat stone wey dem rite di law put, dey inside dis box." 
Hebrews9:5 God angels wey kover di place where God dey show mesi and forgive sins, dey on-top dis box. But dis nor bi di time for mi to esplain all dis tins give una." 
Hebrews9:6 Wen all dis tins don ready, di priests dey enter di first room evriday go do dia work." 
Hebrews9:7 But na only di High Priest dey enter di Holy Place wons a year. For der, e go first offa blood for en sins, before e go offa for di pipol own, bikos dem nor know wetin dem suppose to know." 
Hebrews9:8 Di Holy Spirit kon esplain sey, “Di way to rish di Holy Place neva open as long as di old tent still dey.”" 
Hebrews9:9 Dis na sign make wi for fit undastand sey: Di gifts and sakrifice wey di priests dey offa for God pipol, nor fit make dia mind klean." 
Hebrews9:10 To chop, drink and to do serimony take klean pesin body, na-im koncern dem. All dis one na rule for dis world, until di time wen God go bring di new law." 
Hebrews9:11 So Christ don bi High Priest for di good tins wey don kom. E don enter di Holy Place for heaven wey dey pafet. Nor bi human being make di place and e nor dey among tins wey God kreate for dis world. 
Hebrews9:12 Na wons Jesus enter di place wey holy pass. E nor enter with goat or ram blood, but na with en own blood, so e don save us forever and ever." 
Hebrews9:13 If goat or ram blood and ashes fit klean pesin akordin to di old tradishon," 
Hebrews9:14 wot of Christ blood wey klean us from deat, so dat wi go fit woship God? Dis na di Christ wey offa ensef to God as di rite sakrifice for awa sins and e do am with di Holy Spirit pawa." 
Hebrews9:15 Na dis make am bi middo-man for di new kovenant, so dat pipol wey e koll go fit receive di propaty wey go dey forever. E promise us dis propaty, wen e die to free us from di bad-bad tins wey wi don do wen di first kovenant still dey." 
Hebrews9:16 Dis kind agriment bi like pesin will. Di pesin must die first, before dem go fit use di will." 
Hebrews9:17 Bikos pesin will nor dey mean anytin wen e still dey alive; e only dey yuzful wen di pesin don die. 
Hebrews9:18 Na dis make di first kovenant nor get pawa to save pipol, unless dem sakrifice blood." 
Hebrews9:19 Wen Moses read all di kommand give Israel pipol, e take goat and ram blood with wota and soap, kon sprinkol di blood on-top di Law Book and all di pipol body, den e sey," 
Hebrews9:20 “Na dis bi di blood for di kovenant wey God kommand sey una must obey.” 
Hebrews9:21 Moses still sprinkol di blood for di tent and all di plate wey dem dey use take woship God. 
Hebrews9:22 True-true, akordin to di law, na almost evritin blood dey make klean and if dem neva pour blood, God nor go forgive dem dia sins." 
Hebrews9:23 Na dis make dem dey klean di Holy Place for dis eart with animal blood, bikos e bi like di one for heaven. But di tins wey dey for heaven, nid sakrifice wey betta pass dat one." 
Hebrews9:24 Christ nor enter di Holy Place wey human being build like di original building for heaven, but na heaven e enter and naw, e stand for God present for awa sake." 
Hebrews9:25 Christ nor nid to offa ensef evry year like di High Priests dey do for di temple with animal blood," 
Hebrews9:26 bikos if na so, Christ for dey kom die for us evry year since di time wey God kreate di world. But nor bi so! E die wons and for all, so dat awa sins go-go forever." 
Hebrews9:27 Bikos God sey, na only wons man go die and afta dat, judgement go kom," 
Hebrews9:28 na so too Christ die wons, as sakrifice to forgive pipol forever and naw, e go bring salvashon to doz wey dey wait for am." 
Hebrews10:1 Moses Law bi like shadow wey dey show good tins wey dey kom. Di shadow nor bi di tins, bikos di sakrifice wey dem dey offa evry year nor fit forgive pipol dia sins." 
Hebrews10:2 If pipol wey dey woship God don free from dia sins, dem nor for dey offa sakrifice again." 
Hebrews10:3 Doz sakrifice dey remind pipol of dia sins evry year," 
Hebrews10:4 since melu and goat blood nor fit really klean pesin from all en sins. 
Hebrews10:5 So wen Christ one kom dis world, e tell God: “Nor bi sakrifice and ofrin yu wont, bikos yu don prepare my body as ofrin," 
Hebrews10:6 since yu nor like animal blood as ofrin for sins again. 
Hebrews10:7 Den I sey, ‘Na mi bi dis, God na wetin yu wont I kom do, just as yor word tok about mi for Moses Law.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Christ first sey, “Yu nor wont animal or sin ofrin, (even wen dem dey offa am akordin to di law).”" 
Hebrews10:9 Den e tok again sey, “Na mi bi dis, God na wetin yu wont I kom do.” So God remove di first sakrifice, so dat E go fit bring di new one, wey bi Christ." 
Hebrews10:10 Bikos Jesus do wetin God wont, all of us don dey holy thru di sakrifice wey e use en body make for us."
