Hebrews10:11 Before-before, di priest dey serve evriday and dey offa di same sakrifice wey nor fit remove sin." 
Hebrews10:12 But naw, Christ offa only one sakrifice for sin wons and for all, den e kon go sidan for God rite hand," 
Hebrews10:13 where e dey wait until God go put en enemies under en leg. 
Hebrews10:14 Na with one sakrifice e take klean pipol from dia sins and dem don dey klean forever. 
Hebrews10:15 Di Holy Spirit dey bear witness about dis tins sey," 
Hebrews10:16 “Dis na di kovenant wey I go make with una and afta dat time," 
Hebrews10:17 e kon sey, ‘I nor go remember dia sins and sturbones again.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:18 Wen God don forgive sins, e get any nid to offa sakrifice again?" 
Hebrews10:19 So my brodas and sistas, wi bilive sey wi go enter God Holy Temple thru Jesus Christ blood," 
Hebrews10:20 bikos e give us dis new life and e go take us pass di curtain wey bi en body. 
Hebrews10:21 And wi get one High Priest wey dey kare for God Temple. 
Hebrews10:22 So make wi draw near God with betta heart and strong faith, bikos God don wosh awa heart and body with klean wota." 
Hebrews10:23 So make wi whole di hope wey wi get strong well-well, bikos God wey promise us dey always keep en promise." 
Hebrews10:24 Make wi always dey tink of how wi go enkourage, love and do good for one anoda." 
Hebrews10:25 Make wi nor stop to dey meet and fellowship togeda, as some pipol dey do, but make wi enkourage one anoda more-more, since wi know sey, “Di Day wen Christ go kom,” don near." 
Hebrews10:26 If wi kontinue to sin afta God don show us di trut, e nor get any oda sakrifice wey go fit forgive us awa sins again." 
Hebrews10:27 But wetin wi go dey fear for na di Judgement Day wey dey kom and hell-fire wey go distroy doz wey bi God enemies. 
Hebrews10:28 Wen two or three pipol bi witness sey somebody rijet Moses Law, dem go kill-am without sey dem sorry for am." 
Hebrews10:29 If pipol wey nor dey obey Man Pikin; dey take di kovenant blood make yeye and dey curse di Spirit wey bring grace, na how dia own ponishment go big rish?" 
Hebrews10:30 Bikos God sey, “I go revensh, I go pay dem back” and en word still sey, “God go judge en pipol.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Na big wahala if pesin fall enter God ponishment! 
Hebrews10:32 But make una remember how tins bi with una before, how una dey sofa afta una don receive God lite, yet una nor allow di sofa shange una mind." 
Hebrews10:33 Dat time, some pipol curse and sofa una and for oda times, una dey help odas wey dey sofa like una too." 
Hebrews10:34 True-true, una sofa like oda prisonas and una dey happy wen dem seize all una propaty, bikos una know sey una get betta tin wey go last forever." 
Hebrews10:35 So make una always dey strong, bikos una go get betta reward." 
Hebrews10:36 Una nid to dey patient, so dat una go fit do wetin God wont and den, una go receive en promise." 
Hebrews10:37 Bikos God word sey: “E nor go tey again before di Pesin wey dey plan to kom, go kom." 
Hebrews10:38 My raitious pipol go live and bilive, but if anybody turn back, I nor go dey happy with am.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Wi nor dey among pipol wey go turn back kon perish, but wi get faith wey go save us forever." 
Hebrews11:1 Faith na wen wi dey sure sey wetin wi dey hope for go happen and wi sure sey, di tins wey wi neva si, go kom." 
Hebrews11:2 Na faith awa grand-grand papa dem take do tins wey make God praiz dem. 
Hebrews11:3 Na thru faith wi take undastand sey, God kreate evritin with en word. So di tins wey wi dey si so, na God make dem from wetin dem nor dey si." 
Hebrews11:4 Na faith make Abel give God sakrifice wey betta pass Kain own and na thru dis faith Abel take know sey God asept en ofrin, bikos God really asept am. Even doh Abel don die, en blood still dey tok for am, bikos of en faith." 
Hebrews11:5 Na faith nor let Enoch die, but God karry am take and nobody si am. God word sey, before God karry am, Enoch don make belle sweet God." 
Hebrews11:6 Nobody fit make belle sweet God without faith, bikos anybody wey dey kom meet am, must bilive sey, E dey alive and E dey reward pipol wey dey find am si." 
Hebrews11:7 Na faith make Noah build ark afta God warn am about wetin go happen. E obey wetin God tok and na di ark save en and en family. Na di same faith Noah take kondemn di world, kon inherit di raitiousness wey dey kom." 
Hebrews11:8 Na faith make Abraham obey wen God koll am make e leave en house, travel go anoda land wey God promise am, even doh e nor know where e dey go." 
Hebrews11:9 Na faith make am stay as strenja for di land wey God promise am. Na inside tent en, Isaak and Jakob wey go inherit di same promise, stay." 
Hebrews11:10 Abraham do like dis, bikos e dey wait for di town wey God ensef go build with strong foundashon." 
Hebrews11:11 Na faith make Abraham born, even doh Sarah don too old to get belle and Abraham don old too, but e know sey di Pesin wey promise am pikin, na Pesin wey e fit trust." 
Hebrews11:12 So from dis one man wey en body don die finish, shidren wey plenty rish stars for sky and san for wotaside kon full evriwhere." 
Hebrews11:13 All of dem faith still strong wen dem die and dem nor get di tins wey God promise dem, but dem si and welkom di tins from far and dem gri sey, dem diasef na strenja for dis world." 
Hebrews11:14 Pipol wey tok like dis, show evribody sey dem dey espect dia own kountry." 
Hebrews11:15 Infact, if to sey dem dey tink of di kountry where dem from kom, dem for get mind to go back." 
Hebrews11:16 But as tins bi so, dem dey espect kountry wey betta pass dia own and e dey kom from heaven. Naim make God nor shame wen dem dey koll am dia God, bikos E don build big town for dem." 
Hebrews11:17 Na faith make Abraham offa Isaak wen God dey test am. Even doh na God gi-am di pikin, e still ready to give di only pikin wey e get, back to God." 
Hebrews11:18 God tell am before sey, “True Isaak, yor family go many well-well.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Dis na bikos Abraham bilive sey, even if Isaak die, God go raiz am from deat and true-true Abraham really kollect Isaak back from deat." 
Hebrews11:20 Na faith make Isaak bless Jakob and Esau about dia future. 
Hebrews11:21 Before Jakob die, na faith e take bless Josef shidren and woship God as e rest on-top en walkin stik." 
Hebrews11:22 Wen Josef life don dey end, na faith e take tok about di long travel wey Israel pipol go-go and e tell dem wetin dem go do with en bones." 
Hebrews11:23 Na faith make Moses papa and mama hide am wen dem born am, bikos dem si sey di pikin fine and dem nor fear to disobey wetin di king kommand." 
Hebrews11:24 Wen Moses kon grow up, na faith make am nor gri make dem koll am Fero dota pikin." 
Hebrews11:25 Instead of am to enjoy tins wey go make am sin, e kon choose to sofa with God shidren." 
Hebrews11:26 E feel sey e betta make dem laf am, bikos of di Mezaya wey dey kom, instead make e dey enjoy di fine-fine tins for Egypt. E do like dis, bikos e put en eye for God reward." 
Hebrews11:27 Na di same faith make Moses komot from Egypt and e nor fear di king vexnashon, bikos e get hope for God wey ordinary eye nor fit si." 
Hebrews11:28 Na faith make Moses do di Passova and pour blood for pipol door-mot, so dat God angel wey dey kill all di first-born for Egypt, nor go tosh dem." 
Hebrews11:29 Na faith make Israel pipol cross di Red Sea like sey na dry land, but wen Egypt pipol try am, di wota swallow all of dem." 
Hebrews11:30 Na faith make Jeriko wall fall afta Israel pipol don mash round am for seven days. 
Hebrews11:31 Na faith make Rahab, wey bi ashawo, eskape wen God distroy pipol wey nor obey am, bikos e welkom di pipol wey kom spy." 
Hebrews11:32 Wetin I go tok again? I nor get time to tok about Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jeftah, David, Samuel and di profets," 
Hebrews11:33 na faith dem take win kingdoms; do wetin good for God eye; kon get di tins wey God promise dem; klose lion mout; 
Hebrews11:34 kwensh fire wey dey burn well-well and eskape wen dem won kill dem with swod. God turn dia weakness to pawa. Dem strong well-well for war front and sojas from oda kountries, dey run from dem." 
Hebrews11:35 Some wimen wey dia pipol don die, na faith make dem receive dem back, alive. Some pipol rijet freedom kon die for sofa, so dat dem go fit wake-up from deat and enter life wey betta pass dis one." 
Hebrews11:36 Pipol laf some; flog some; shain some and put odas for prison. 
Hebrews11:37 Dem stone some; use saw kut some into two; take swod kill some; some wear goat and sheep skin dey hide waka and dem nor get anytin; dem sofa some and trit odas anyhow. 
Hebrews11:38 (Dis world nor good rish for dem); dem just dey waka about for wildaness, on-top mountins, inside rock and holes." 
Hebrews11:39 God praiz all of dem for dia faith, yet dem nor still get wetin God promise." 
Hebrews11:40 Bikos God plan sey, without us, dem nor go fit get di tins wey E promise dem." 
Hebrews12:1 Since wi get many witness wey surround us, e good make wi drop evry load and sin wey dey make us fall, so dat wi go use awa mind live di life wey God wont." 
Hebrews12:2 Make wi dey look Jesus Christ wey give us awa faith and go help us keep am. Bikos of di joy wey Jesus dey espect, e sofa for cross and nor mind di shame wey follow am. But naw, e don sidan for di rite hand side for God throne." 
Hebrews12:3 If una dey tink how Jesus sofa for wiked pipol hand and how dem hate am, una mind go strong for faith." 
Hebrews12:4 As una dey struggol make una nor for sin, una struggol neva rish to kill una as Christ die." 
Hebrews12:5 Abi una don forget di advise wey God tell una as en shidren? “My pikin, make yu listin well-well wen God dey korrect yu and nor vex wen God ponish yu." 
Hebrews12:6 Bikos na di pesin wey God love, na-im E dey korrect and E dey ponish all di shidren wey bi en own.”" 
Hebrews12:7 So make una bear as una dey sofa, since e bi sey na una Papa dey ponish una; dat one go show sey God dey trit una like en shidren. Abi e get pikin wey en papa nor dey ponish?" 
Hebrews12:8 But if God nor ponish yu as e dey ponish all en shidren, dat mean sey yu nor bi betta pikin and yu nor get papa." 
Hebrews12:9 If awa papa for eart ponish us and wi dey respet dem, e nor good make God ponish us, so dat awa life go betta?" 
Hebrews12:10 Awa papa dey ponish us for dis world as e good for dia eye, but God dey ponish us for awa own good, so dat wi go follow am share en holiness." 
Hebrews12:11 No ponishment dey sweet pesin wen dem dey ponish am, bikos e dey pain. But di pesin wey God ponish, go get life wey nor dey end." 
Hebrews12:12 So una hands and knees wey don taya, make una make dem strong." 
Hebrews12:13 And make una waka for strait road, so dat una leg wey don taya, go strong." 
Hebrews12:14 Make una try to live for peace with evribody and dey holy, bikos anybody wey nor dey holy, nor go si God." 
Hebrews12:15 Make una make sure sey nobody turn back from God grace and make nobody get bad belle and kause trobol wey go make pipol sin. 
Hebrews12:16 Make una make sure sey nobody dey do bad tins or nor dey fear God, just like Esau wey sell en rite as first-born, bikos of food." 
Hebrews12:17 Una know how e try to get am back leta, but e nor fit, even doh e beg and kry give en papa." 
Hebrews12:18 Una don rish Mount Sinai, where God for tok to Israel pipol. For der, fire dey burn, darkness dey der and storm and" 
Hebrews12:19 trumpet kon dey make nois. Israel pipol hear God vois, so dem beg am make E stop," 
Hebrews12:20 bikos dem nor fit bear en kommand wey sey, “Make una kill any animal wey tosh di mountin.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Wetin happen dey make pesin fear, so Moses kon sey, “I dey fear and dey shake.”" 
Hebrews12:22 Instead, una don kom Mount Zion; di town where God dey stay; di Jerusalem for heaven where tazon angels dey. Una don enter di assembly," 
Hebrews12:23 di place where all di first-born gada and dis na di pipol wey God rite dia name for heaven. Una don kom meet God wey go judge evribody and na-im dey make pipol pafet. 
Hebrews12:24 Una don kom meet Jesus, di pesin wey God use take start di new kovenant with en pipol and una don kom meet di blood wey dem spray and dis blood dey tok betta word wey pass Abel own." 
Hebrews12:25 Make sure sey una dey obey di Pesin wey dey tok to una! Bikos if Israel pipol wey nor gri hear dia oga Moses word for eart nor eskape, how wi go fit eskape, if wi nor gri hear di Pesin wey dey tok to us from heaven?" 
Hebrews12:26 For dat time, en vois dey shake di eart, but naw, E don promise sey, “Nor bi only dis eart I go shake, but I go shake di heavens too.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Dis mean sey di tins for eart go shake komot and na only di tins wey God nor won shake, go remain." 
Hebrews12:28 Since wi don receive di kingdom wey dem nor fit skata, make wi tank and woship God with respet and fear. Make wi gi-am di kind woship wey go make belle sweet am." 
Hebrews12:29 Bikos awa God na big and strong fire wey dey distroy tins. 
Hebrews13:1 Make una dey love each oda like Christian brodas and sistas. 
Hebrews13:2 Make una always dey welkom strenja for una house, bikos like dis, some pipol don welkom angel enter dia house and dem nor know." 
Hebrews13:3 Make una remember doz wey dey prison, like sey unasef dey der with dem and make una remember doz wey dey sofa, like sey una dey sofa like dem." 
Hebrews13:4 Make evribody respet marriage: una must make sure sey una nor sleep with who nor bi una husband or wife, bikos God go judge pipol wey dey sleep with who dem nor marry and pipol wey don marry, wey dey sleep with oda pipol." 
Hebrews13:5 Make una nor love money and make wetin una get rish una, bikos God sey, “I nor go ever leave or abandon yu.”" 
Hebrews13:6 So make wi get mind wey go make us fit sey, “Na God bi my helpa, so wi nor go fear. Wetin human being go fit do us?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Make una remember una leaders wey tish una God word; make una tink about di kind life wey dem dey live, den make una follow dia faith." 
Hebrews13:8 Jesus Christ na di same yestiday, today and forever, e nor dey shange!" 
Hebrews13:9 Make una nor let difren-difren prishin wey una nor know turn una head. Una spiritual pawa dey kom from God grace, nor bi from food wey dem sakrifice, bikos di sakrifice nor fit help pipol wey dey do am." 
Hebrews13:10 Wi get altar where di workers for di Tabanako nor fit chop from. 
Hebrews13:11 Di High Priest dey karry animal blood enter di Holy Place as ofrin for sins, but di animal body, na outside di kamp dem for dey burn am." 
Hebrews13:12 Derfor, Jesus take en own blood make sakrifice, so dat en pipol go dey holy. So Jesus Christ sofa outside di kamp too." 
Hebrews13:13 Wi must go meet am for outside di kamp kon share di shame with am. 
Hebrews13:14 Bikos for here, wi nor get any town wey go last, but wi dey wait di town wey go kom." 
Hebrews13:15 True Christ, make wi kontinue to dey give God praiz as awa sakrifice. So, make wetin dey kom out from awa mout bi, “Na Jesus, bi Oga God.”" 
Hebrews13:16 Make una nor forget to do good and to share wetin una get with each oda, bikos doz kind sakrifice, dey make belle sweet God." 
Hebrews13:17 Make una obey una leaders and do evritin wey dem tok, bikos na dem dey kare for una soul and dem go ansa God wen E ask dem how dem do dia work. Make una let dem do am with happiness, nor bi with komplain, bikos una nor go get any betta tin from am." 
Hebrews13:18 Make una pray for us, bikos wi dey sure sey awa mind klean and wi won live awa life for di korrect way." 
Hebrews13:19 Abeg, make una pray well-well, so dat dem go free mi and I go fit kom meet una soon." 
Hebrews13:20 God wey get peace, di Pesin wey use di everlastin kovenant blood bring awa Oga God Jesus Christ kom back from deat; awa Oga God wey dey look di sheep," 
Hebrews13:21 make E give una evritin wey una nid to do wetin E wont. Anytin wey good for en eye, make E do am inside us thru Jesus Christ. Make all glory bi Jesus Christ own forever and ever. Amen!" 
Hebrews13:22 My brodas and sistas, I dey beg una, make una get patient and listin to di advise wey dey dis my leta, bikos wetin I rite, nor long." 
Hebrews13:23 Make una know sey dem don release awa broda Timoti from prison. If e kwik kom, e go follow mi kom si una." 
Hebrews13:24 Make una greet all una leaders and all God pipol. God pipol for Italy dey greet una. 
Hebrews13:25 Make God grace dey with all of una. 
James1:1 Mi James, wey bi God and Jesus Christ savant, dey greet una wey bi di twelf tribes wey dey for evriwhere for di world." 
James1:2 My brodas and sistas, make una dey happy wen una dey face temptashon," 
James1:3 bikos una know sey, if una win di temptashon, una patient go strong." 
James1:4 And make una let patient do en work, so dat una go dey pafet and komplete, den una go gain evritin." 
James1:5 But if anybody nid wisdom, make e ask God wey dey gi-am to evribody. E nor go sey, “No,” but E go give yu." 
James1:6 Di pesin wey dey ask, must get faith and make en mind nor shake, bikos anybody wey en mind dey shake, bi like river wey strong breeze dey blow up-and-down." 
James1:7 Make dat pesin nor tink sey e go receive anytin from God," 
James1:8 bikos e get doubol mind and e nor dey stabol for anytin wey e dey do. 
James1:9 Any biliver wey poor, make e happy, bikos God don lift am up." 
James1:10 But pesin wey get money, make e nor proud, bikos e go soon perish like flower wey dey for bush." 
James1:11 As sun dey dry grass and flower and dia beauti dey die forever, na so rish pesin go dry, as e dey porshu and love money." 
James1:12 Di pesin wey fit bear wen problem kom meet am, make e happy, bikos e don show sey en faith strong and e go get di crown wey get life, wey God don promise sey E go give pipol wey love am." 
James1:13 Make nobody tok wen temptashon kom meet am sey, “God dey test mi,” bikos nor-tin fit tempt God and God ensef, nor dey tempt anybody." 
James1:14 But temptashon dey kom meet pesin wey get bad tins for mind. 
James1:15 Wen di bad tins wey e won do, don mature, e go make am sin and wen sin don grow well-well, e go kause deat." 
James1:16 My brodas and sistas, make nor-tin deceive una," 
James1:17 bikos evry betta and pafet gift dey kom from God. E dey kom down from di Papa wey kreate lite and E nor dey shange. 
James1:18 As God wont am, E kon born us with di true message, so dat wi go bi first among all wetin E kreate." 
James1:19 My brodas and sistas, make una undastand dis tins: Make una dey listin well-well and nor dey kwik tok or vex." 
James1:20 Human being vexnashon nor dey make pipol live di life wey God wont. 
James1:21 So make una remove una hand from evry dirty and wiked tins kon put una body down to asept God word wey dem don plant inside una, bikos e get pawa to save una soul." 
James1:22 Make una nor dey deceive unasef as una dey hear God word, but make sure sey una dey do wetin en word tok." 
James1:23 Pesin wey hear God word and e nor dey do wetin e tok, bi like pesin wey dey look en face for mirror." 
James1:24 Wen di pesin look ensef finish kon komot go out, e go kwik-kwik forget how en face bi." 
James1:25 But di pesin wey dey look God pafet law wey dey free pipol; dey do wetin di word tok and e nor dey listin and forget, God go bless am for evritin wey e dey do." 
James1:26 If anybody tink sey en dey follow wetin wi dey tish and e nor fit kontrol en mout, dat pesin dey deceive ensef and en relijon nor mean anytin." 
James1:27 But betta relijon wey nor get stain for God eye, naim bi dis: to kare for shidren wey nor get papa and mama and wimen wey dey sofa bikos dia husband don die. So, make una keep unasef, so dat dis world nor go stain una." 
James2:1 My brodas and sistas, since una get faith for awa Oga God Jesus Christ, make una nor dey do parsha." 
James2:2 If pesin wear gold ring and fine klot enter una church and poor pesin with dirty klot enter too 
James2:3 and una respet di one wey wear fine klot, kon tell am, “Sidan for betta place,” but una tell di poor pesin, “Stand der,” or “Sidan for groun.”" 
James2:4 Dat mean sey una dey do parsha and kondemn pipol from una mind. 
James2:5 My brodas and sistas, make una listin! God nor choose poor pipol for dis world sey, make dem rish for faith and inherit di kingdom wey E promise sey E go give doz wey love am?" 
James2:6 But una nor dey respet poor pipol! Nor bi rish pipol dey opress and drag una go kourt? 
James2:7 Or dem nor dey tok bad about Jesus name wey una bilive? 
James2:8 But if una do wetin dem rite for God word, “Make yu love yor neighbour as yu love yorsef,” una don do good bi dat." 
James2:9 If una do parsha, una dey kommit sin and di law don kondemn una as pipol wey nor dey do wetin dey di law." 
James2:10 Di pesin wey dey do evritin wey dey di law and e break one, don break all of dem bi dat." 
James2:11 Bikos di same God wey sey, “Nor sleep with who yu nor marry,” naim still sey, “Nor kill anybody.” If yu nor sleep with who yu nor marry, but yu kill pesin, yu don break di law bi dat." 
James2:12 Make una tok and do like pipol wey dem go judge with di law wey go free pipol. 
James2:13 Judgement nor get mesi for anybody wey nor dey mesi for odas, bikos mesi betta pass judgement." 
James2:14 My brodas and sistas, wetin dey good if pesin sey e get faith, but e nor dey do anytin? Dat kind faith go fit save am?" 
James2:15 If one broda or sista nor get klot to wear or food to chop 
James2:16 and one pesin among una tell am, “Make peace dey with yu; make kold nor katch yu and make yu go chop beleful, but yu nor gi-am wetin di body wont, na wish kind good bi dat?”" 
James2:17 Na so faith bi too, if yor faith nor dey produce betta result, e go die and dey yuzles." 
James2:18 If anybody sey, “I get faith and yu get work.” I go sey, “Make yu show mi yor faith wey nor get work and I go show yu my faith thru my work.”" 
James2:19 Yu bilive sey na only one good God dey. Demons bilive so too and fear dey katch dem well-well. 
James2:20 Foolish man! Yu wont make I show yu sey faith wey nor get work dey yuzles? 
James2:21 Wen awa papa Abraham put en pikin Isaak for di altar, wetin e do dey good for God eye?" 
James2:22 Yu nor si sey en faith and work dey togeda and na en work make en faith pafet? 
James2:23 And wetin dem rite for God word kon happen, “Abraham bilive wetin God tok and na dat one make am good for God eye, so God kon koll am, en friend.”" 
James2:24 So, pesin work dey make am good too, nor bi only en faith." 
James2:25 Nor bi so e bi for Rahab, wey bi ashawo, wen e welkom di messenjas kon show dem anoda road wey dem go pass run?" 
James2:26 Body wey nor get spirit don die, na so too, faith wey nor get work, don die." 
James3:1 My brodas and sistas, evribody nor go fit bi tisha, bikos yu know sey wi wey dey tish, na awa judgement go big pass," 
James3:2 bikos wi dey make many mistake. If pesin nor dey make mistake for wetin e dey tok, dat mean sey e dey pafet and e go fit kontrol en body." 
James3:3 If wi tie rope for horse mout make e for obey us, dat mean sey wi dey kontrol en body." 
James3:4 Look ship for wota: E big well-well and na strong breeze dey fit push am, but na one small wheel di driver dey use take kontrol am." 
James3:5 Na so di tongue bi too: naim small pass for di body, but di tins wey e fit do big well-well. Make una tink how small fire fit burn big forest rish groun." 
James3:6 Di tongue na fire! Na der bad tins full pass for pesin body. E dey spoil di whole body and kause fire for pesin life and dis kind fire dey kom from hell. 
James3:7 Human being dey fit kontrol bird, animal wey dey creep for groun and animal wey dey stay for wota." 
James3:8 But nobody don ever fit kontrol en tongue well. Di tongue na bad tin wey nor dey stay one place, bikos e get poizin wey fit kill pesin." 
James3:9 Na di tongue wi take dey praiz awa Papa and Oga God Jesus Christ and naim wi still dey use take curse pipol wey God kreate like ensef. 
James3:10 My brodas and sistas, na di same tongue wi dey use take praiz and curse pipol. But e nor suppose bi like dat." 
James3:11 Wota wey dey kom out from groun, nor dey bring out fresh and bitter wota from di same place, abi e dey do so?" 
James3:12 My brodas and sistas, fig tree go fit bear olive, abi vine fit bear fig? So too, wota wey dey kom out from groun and e taste like salt, nor go fit taste like fresh wota at-all." 
James3:13 Who get sense among una? Di way di pesin dey bihave go show di gentolness wey wisdom dey bring. 
James3:14 But if jealousy and sefishnes dey en mind, make e nor boast and lie against di trut." 
James3:15 Dat kind wisdom nor kom from God, but e kom from dis eart wey wiked well-well." 
James3:16 Bikos where jealousy and long-trot dey, wahala and bad tins wey pipol dey do, dey der too." 
James3:17 But God wisdom dey pure; e get peace; dey gentol; dey asept pipol and good fruit and mesi full am; e nor dey do wayo or pritend. 
James3:18 Pipol wey nor like trobol, dey plant fruit wey dey bring raitiousness." 
James4:1 Wetin dey make una kworel and fight? Nor bi di tins wey dey hongry una to do? 
James4:2 Yu wont sometin, but yu nor get am; yu dey kill, dey wont wetin oda pipol get and yu nor dey fit get am; so yu go kon dey kworel and fight. Yu nor get, bikos yu nor ask God make E give yu." 
James4:3 Wen yu ask for sometin, yu nor receive am, bikos yu nor ask well and yu won take am do wetin yu like." 
James4:4 Una wey dey do bad tins for dis world, una nor know sey to bi dis world friend, mean sey una bi God enemy? So anybody wey gri sey en and dis world na friend, don make ensef God enemy." 
James4:5 Abi yu tink sey God nor mean wetin E tok wen E sey, “Di Spirit wey I put inside una dey jealous well-well?”" 
James4:6 But E give us plenty grace. Na dis make God word sey, “God dey against pesin wey dey karry body up, but E dey give grace to pipol wey dey put dia body down.”" 
James4:7 So, make yu give yorsef to God. But rijet di devil and e go run komot from where yu dey." 
James4:8 Draw near God and E go draw near yu. Una wey bi sina, make una wosh una hand and una wey get doubol mind, make una heart dey klean." 
James4:9 Make una kry and make sorrow dey una heart, den una go show sey una nor dey happy." 
James4:10 If una put una body down for God, E go karry una go up." 
James4:11 My brodas and sistas, make una nor tok bad about each oda. Anybody wey tok bad or judge en broda or sista for Christ, e dey tok bad about di law and e dey judge di law. But if una judge di law, den una nor dey obey di law, but una don bikom di law judge bi dat." 
James4:12 Na only one Pesin give di law and na-im bi judge. Na-im dey save and distroy. Yu wey dey judge yor neighbour, na who yu even tink sey yu bi?" 
James4:13 Look, yu wey dey sey, “Today or tumoro, wi go-go dis or dat town go stay der for one year and do business kon get gain,”" 
James4:14 but yu nor know tumoro. Wetin yor life bi like? Yu bi like smoke wey dey kom out from fire. Pipol go si am, den small time e go vanish." 
James4:15 Instead, yu suppose to sey, “If God wont, wi go dey alive and wi go do dis or dat tin.”" 
James4:16 But as e bi so, yu dey boast dey karry body up. All dat kind boastin nor good." 
James4:17 So anybody wey know wetin good and e nor do am, don kommit sin bi dat." 
James5:1 Yu wey get money, make yu listin! Cry make dem hear yor vois, bikos of di bad tins wey go happen to yu." 
James5:2 Yor money don rotin and ants don chop yor klot. 
James5:3 Yor gold and silva don rust, dia ashes go tok against yu and chop yor flesh like fire. For di last days, yu don gada money and fine tins for yorsef!" 
James5:4 Si, di money wey yu nor gri pay di workers wey dey work for yor farm, dey kry against yu and di pipol wey dey gada wetin yu plant, dia kry don rish God ear." 
James5:5 Yu dey live life wey yu dey enjoy and yu dey enjoy for dis eart. Yu don make yorsef fat, dey wait for di day wey dem go kill yu." 
James5:6 Yu don kondemn and kill pipol wey nor do bad, bikos dem nor fit stop yu." 
James5:7 My brodas and sistas, make una get patient till Christ go kom back. Tink how farmer dey wait for wetin e plant until e grow kon bring food wey dear and e dey wait with patient for am, until di first and di last rain go fall put." 
James5:8 So, make una get patient too and make una heart strong, bikos di time wen Christ go kom back, don near." 
James5:9 My brodas and sistas, make una nor dey komplain about each oda, so dat dem nor go judge una, bikos God wey bi di judge, stand near di gate." 
James5:10 Di profets wey God send kom tok to una, make una use dem as ezample to bear sofa and get patient." 
James5:11 Make una tink of how wi dey look pipol wey get patient sey, God don bless dem. Una hear how Job get patient and how God bless am leta. God get mesi and E dey sorry for pesin well-well." 
James5:12 My brodas and sistas, make una remember dis kommand pass oda ones; make una nor swear, weda with heaven or eart or any oda tin. But make una let una “Yes” bi yes, and una “No” bi know, so dat una nor go fall enter God judgement." 
James5:13 If anybody dey sofa among una, make e pray. If anybody dey happy among una, make e sing dey praiz God." 
James5:14 If anybody among una nor well, make e koll di eldas for di church, make dem pray and use oil anoint am for Jesus name." 
James5:15 Di prayer wey dem take faith pray go save di pesin wey nor well and God go make am well. And if e kommit any sin, God go forgi-am." 
James5:16 So make una konfess una sin to each oda. Make una pray for each oda, so dat God go heal una. Di prayer wey pesin wey good for God eye take all en mind pray, dey work well-well." 
James5:17 Elijah na human being like us and e pray with all en mind make rain nor fall. True-true, for three and half years, rain nor fall for dat place." 
James5:18 Den e pray again and di sky kon bring rain and evritin wey dem plant, kon grow." 
James5:19 My brodas and sistas, if anybody among una waka komot from di trut and pesin bring am kom back," 
James5:20 make yu know sey, di pesin wey bring yu wey bi sina kom back from di bad way, don save yor soul from deat and e don make Christ forgive yu all yor sins." 
1Peter1:1 Na mi Pita wey bi Jesus Christ apostle rite dis leta to di strenjas for Pontus, Galatia, Kappadocia, Asia aria and Bitynia wey God choose sey," 
1Peter1:2 make dem dey holy thru en Spirit. Make una dey obey Christ for evritin and en blood go klean una. Make grace and peace bi una own! 
1Peter1:3 Wi tank God wey bi awa Oga God Jesus Christ Papa, for di mesi wey E dey show us. God give us new life thru Jesus Christ wey E wake from deat and naim bi di Pesin wey give us hope." 
1Peter1:4 Dem born us put for inheritance wey nor dey spoil, dirty or fade. God keep di inheritance for heaven for us" 
1Peter1:5 and en pawa dey protet am thru faith and wi dey wait for di salvashon wey go kom for di time wen di world go end. 
1Peter1:6 Aldo una go sofa small, but dis joy go bring happiness for una." 
1Peter1:7 Dis kind sofa go show sey una faith na really one. Gold wey go spoil one day, dem still dey test am for fire, tok-less of una faith wey get value pass gold and e go bring praiz, glory and honor wen Jesus Christ go kom." 
1Peter1:8 Aldo una neva si am, but una love am. Una nor dey si am naw, but una bilive am, una get happiness and glory wey una nor go fit esplain." 
1Peter1:9 Una still get wetin make una faith strong and na dis bi di salvashon wey una soul get. 
1Peter1:10 For dis salvashon matter, di profets wey tok before about di grace wey go kom, try well-well weda dem fit know wetin e mean, but dem nor fit." 
1Peter1:11 Dem one know di time and di pesin wey God Spirit dey tok about. God don tok before about di sofa wey E sey Christ must sofa and di glory wey e go get. 
1Peter1:12 Dem show sey nor bi demsef dem dey work for, but na for una, bikos una hear dis matter from di apostles thru di Holy Spirit pawa wey kom from heaven. Even angels dey wish sey dem know dis tins." 
1Peter1:13 So, make una always dey ready for akshon. Make una shine una eye and put hope for di grace wey Jesus Christ go bring." 
1Peter1:14 Like shidren wey dey obey, make una stop di bad tins wey una dey do wen una neva know di trut." 
1Peter1:15 But for evritin wey una dey do, make una dey holy like di Pesin wey koll una," 
1Peter1:16 bikos God word sey, “Make una dey holy, bikos I dey holy.”" 
1Peter1:17 Since una dey koll God wey dey judge evribody akordin to wetin e do, “Papa”, make una live una life with respet for am." 
1Peter1:18 Una know sey, God free una from di empty life wey una kollect from una grand-grand papa dem and E nor buy una with sometin wey fit spoil like silva or gold," 
1Peter1:19 but na with Christ blood and na dis Christ bi God lamb wey nor get any mark or stain. 
1Peter1:20 God choose am before E kreate dis world, but na for dis last days E show am to una." 
1Peter1:21 True am, una bilive God wey raiz am from deat kon gi-am glory. So, una faith and hope dey for God hand." 
1Peter1:22 Una don klean una soul with di trut wey una dey obey and as brodas and sistas, make una love each oda well-well." 
1Peter1:23 God nor save una with human being body wey fit die, but na thru en word wey get life and dey forever." 
1Peter1:24 Human being bi like grass and wetin make am fine, bi like flower; di grass go dry and di flower go die," 
1Peter1:25 but God word go last forever. And na dis word bi di Good News wey dem prish give una. 
1Peter2:1 Make una stop to do bad tin; dey deceive pipol, pritend; dey jealous and tok bad about pipol." 
1Peter2:2 But make una dey hongry for spiritual milk like pikin wey dem just born, so dat una faith go strong well-well" 
1Peter2:3 and una go know how God salvashon good rish. 
1Peter2:4 Una don kom meet Christ, wey bi di stone wey dey alive. Pipol rijet am, but God choose am and e dey important for God eye." 
1Peter2:5 So unasef too, don bi stone wey dey alive and God dey build una as en spiritual house, so dat una go bi priest wey dey holy and una go offa spiritual sakrifice wey E go asept thru Jesus Christ." 
1Peter2:6 God word sey, “Naw, I don lay one stone for Zion; di main stone wey I choose; no money fit buy am and anybody wey bilive am, nor go shame.”" 
1Peter2:7 So, una wey bilive don know en value, but for di pipol and builders wey nor bilive, dat Stone don kon bi di main stone." 
1Peter2:8 Na-im bi di rock wey dey fall pipol, bikos dem nor fit jump am pass. As dem nor bilive God word, dem bigin fall, bikos na so E plan sey e go bi." 
1Peter2:9 But God don choose una to bi en priest and holy pipol, so dat una go prish di Good News, bikos E koll una from darkness kon enter en brite lite." 
1Peter2:10 Before-before, una nor bi God pipol, but naw, una don bi en pipol. Dat time, God nor get mesi for una, but naw, una don get en mesi." 
1Peter2:11 My friends, I dey beg una, since una bi strenjas for dis world, make una nor follow di tins wey pipol like to do, bikos dem dey distroy pesin soul." 
1Peter2:12 So make una dey live well among pipol wey nor bi Christian, so dat wen dem sey una do bad, dem go si di good tins wey una dey do and dem go praiz God wen E won judge di world." 
1Peter2:13 Make una dey obey una leaders bikos of Christ. Weda dem bi kings wey get pawa 
1Peter2:14 or govnors wey God choose sey, make dem ponish pipol wey do bad and praiz doz wey do good." 
1Peter2:15 Bikos God wont sey, wetin una dey do, go make di pipol wey nor get sense shut up dia mout." 
1Peter2:16 Make una live as free pipol and nor use una freedom as eskuse to do bad tins, but make una use am well as God savant." 
1Peter2:17 Make una respet evribody. Love dis awa family wey bilive Christ. Make una fear God and respet di king. 
1Peter2:18 Una wey bi slave, make una dey obey una oga, both di ones wey good or gentol and doz wey nor good." 
1Peter2:19 If anybody bear pain bikos of God and dey sofa for wetin e nor do, God go favor am." 
1Peter2:20 But why pipol go praiz yu wen dem ponish yu bikos of wetin yu do and yu bear-am? But if yu sofa bikos yu do good, God go favor yu," 
1Peter2:21 bikos na wetin E koll yu to do, bi dat. Christ sofa as ezample wey una go follow" 
1Peter2:22 and e nor kommit any sin or lie. 
1Peter2:23 Wen dem curse am, e nor ansa back; wen e sofa, e nor treaten sey e go pay dem back, but e put ensef for God hand wey nor dey judge kase with parsha." 
1Peter2:24 E karry awa sin for cross, so dat wi go stop to sin and dey do good for God eye. “Na di wound wey dem wound am, naim make us well.”" 
1Peter2:25 Before-before, una waka komot for di rite road like sheep wey lost, but naw, una don turn back go meet di Shepad and Pesin wey dey guide una soul." 
1Peter3:1 Make una wey bi wife, dey obey una husband. Even doh dem nor dey do wetin dem rite for God word, di way una dey bihave, fit make dem shange," 
1Peter3:2 wen dem si una good karata and how una life pure rish. 
1Peter3:3 Make una beauti nor bi di one wey pipol dey only si like: to dey plait hair; dey wear gold or fine klot. 
1Peter3:4 Instead make e show sey Christ dey inside una and una don get gentol and kwayet spirit wey God go value. 
1Peter3:5 Di wimen for olden days dey holy, bikos dem put dia hope for God hand and dem respet dia husband." 
1Peter3:6 As Sarah obey Abraham kon koll am, “My oga,” una go bi God pikin, if una dey do wetin good." 
1Peter3:7 Husbands, make una dey trit una wife with soft hand, bikos una know sey dem nor strong rish una; make una respet dem as pipol wey get God grace and life. If una dey do like dis, nor-tin go block una prayers." 
1Peter3:8 So, make una live for peace togeda, dey sorry for each oda; love one anoda and nor dey karry body up." 
1Peter3:9 Make una nor take bad pay di bad wey pesin do una, instead, make una bless odas, bikos God koll una to bless pipol." 
1Peter3:10 God word sey: Anybody wey won enjoy good life, must kontrol en mout; make e nor dey tok bad-bad tins or lie." 
1Peter3:11 E must turn from di wikedness wey e dey do, kon start to do good and make e live for peace with evribody." 
1Peter3:12 God dey si di pipol wey dey do good and en ear dey open to hear dia prayers. But E dey against pipol wey dey do bad. 
1Peter3:13 Who go fit do yu bad tin, if yu dey do good?" 
1Peter3:14 But if yu sofa bikos yu dey do good, make yu nor fear doz wiked pipol, bikos God don bless yu bi dat." 
1Peter3:15 For una heart, make una make Christ una Oga God and make una ready to ansa anybody wey ask una about di hope wey una get." 
1Peter3:16 But make una do am with gentolness and respet, dey make sure sey una mind klean, so dat pipol wey dey tok bad about di good tins wey una dey do for Christ, go shame for di bad wey dem dey tok." 
1Peter3:17 E betta to sofa for wetin good, dan for bad one if na so God wont am." 
1Peter3:18 Bikos of sin, Christ sofa. En wey nor do bad, sofa for doz wey do bad, so dat e go karry us go meet God. And wen dem kill-am, e wake-up as spirit." 
1Peter3:19 As spirit, e kon go prish give wiked pipol spirits wey dey prison," 
1Peter3:20 bikos dem nor do wetin God tok. God get patient for dem wen Noah dey build di ark, but na only di eight pipol wey dey inside di ark save from di wota." 
1Peter3:21 Dis show how baptizim go save us, nor bi just to wosh dirty komot for pesin body, but na to show sey wi get good mind for God thru di way wey Jesus Christ take raiz-up" 
1Peter3:22 go heaven kon go sidan for God rite hand, where e dey rule di angels and doz wey get pawa." 
1Peter4:1 Since Christ don sofa for us, make wi do like am, bikos di pesin wey sofa for us nor get anytin to do with sin again," 
1Peter4:2 bikos e don do wetin God wont and nor bi wetin pipol wont. 
1Peter4:3 Di time wey una dey bihave like unbilivers, don pass. Dat time una live bad life; dey do bad tins; dey drink; dey do anyhow and serve juju." 
1Peter4:4 Naw, doz unbilivers dey sopraiz and curse una, bikos una nor dey follow dem do bad and wiked tins again." 
1Peter4:5 For di day wen Christ go judge pipol wey dey alive and doz wey don die, e go ponish dem." 
1Peter4:6 Na dis make Christ prish di gospel for doz wey don die, so dat even doh e go judge dem as human being, dem go live forever as spirit thru God judgement." 
1Peter4:7 Di time wen evritin go end don near. So make una dey kontrol unasef and shine una eye wen una dey pray. 
1Peter4:8 As una dey do so, make una love for each oda dey strong, bikos love dey kover plenty sins." 
1Peter4:9 Make una welkom pipol for una house without komplain. 
1Peter4:10 God don give evribody en own gift, so make una use di gift take help each oda as good savant wey get God grace." 
1Peter4:11 Pesin wey dey prish; make e prish God word well. Pesin wey dey help odas, make e do am with di pawa wey God gi-am, so dat for evritin, God go get glory thru Jesus Christ. Make all glory and pawa bi Christ own forever and ever. Amen!" 
1Peter4:12 My friends, make una nor sopraiz sey una dey pass thru trobol like pesin wey fire dey burn, bikos tins wey go make una fear, go must happen." 
1Peter4:13 Instead, make una dey happy as una dey sofa for Christ, so dat wen God go show una en glory, belle go sweet una." 
1Peter4:14 If dem curse una bikos of Christ, God don bless una bi dat, bikos God Spirit wey get glory, rest on-top una life." 
1Peter4:15 But make anybody among una nor sofa, bikos e kill, tif or curse trobol." 
1Peter4:16 But if yu sofa bikos yu bi Christian, make yu nor shame, but dey praiz God, bikos yu dey ansa Jesus name." 
1Peter4:17 Di time for judgement don rish and e go start with God pipol. And if e start with us, wetin go happen to pipol wey nor dey obey God?" 
1Peter4:18 If e go hard for God pipol to dey save, den e nor go eazy for doz wey nor dey fear God." 
1Peter4:19 So if yu dey sofa as God wont am, make yu trust God wey kreate yu and E nor go ever fail yu." 
1Peter5:1 Mi wey bi una fellow elder, wey si how Christ sofa and go share for God glory wey go soon kom, dey beg di eldas among una sey:" 
1Peter5:2 Make una kare for di sheep wey God give una whole, just as shepad dey kare for dia sheep. Make e nor bi like sey dem force una do am, but na as God wont am. Una nor dey do am bikos of money, but na bikos una won do am." 
1Peter5:3 And make una nor dey opress God pipol wey dey under una, instead make una bi ezample to dem." 
1Peter5:4 So wen di big shepad, Jesus Christ go kom, e go give una crown wey en glory nor go ever fade." 
1Peter5:5 For di same way, make una wey yong put body down for di eldas. Make una nor dey karry body up for each oda, bikos God dey oppoz proud pipol, but E dey favor doz wey dey honbol." 
1Peter5:6 Make una put una body for groun bikos of God and wen di rite time rish, E go karry una up." 
1Peter5:7 Make una karry all una trobol give God, bikos E kare for una." 
1Peter5:8 Make una shine una eye well-well, bikos devil wey bi una enemy, bi like hongry lion wey dey shaut and dey find who e go chop." 
1Peter5:9 Make una nor gi-am shance, but make una faith strong, bikos una know sey na di same tin una brodas and sistas for evriwhere for dis world, dey sofa." 
1Peter5:10 Afta una don sofa small, God wey koll una with en grace enter en glory for Christ, go make una komplete, una leg go strong and una go get pawa." 
1Peter5:11 Make all pawa bi God own forever and ever. Amen!

2Peter1:1 Na mi Pita wey bi Jesus Christ savant and apostle, rite dis leta to di pipol wey get di same faith wey wi get. God give una dis faith, bikos of en raitiousness wey kom thru awa Oga God and Savior, Jesus Christ." 
2Peter1:2 Make God give una betta peace and grace as una dey grow for en word and inside Jesus, wey bi awa Oga God!" 
2Peter1:3 I pray make God pawa give us evritin wey wi nid, so dat wi go fit live di kind life wey E wont, as wi don know di trut about Jesus wey koll us with en glory and goodness." 
2Peter1:4 Like dis too, wi don get betta promise and bikos of dat, wi go get God karata wey go free us from di bad tins wey dey for dis world." 
2Peter1:5 So, make una try to make una faith strong and know God word. As una dey know God word more-more," 
2Peter1:6 una go fit kontrol unasef; get patient; dey live holy life 
2Peter1:7 and love una brodas and sistas without parsha. 
2Peter1:8 Bikos if una really get dis tins, dem go dey grow inside una, so una nor go dey yuzles, but una go bear good fruits as una dey try to know Christ more-more." 
2Peter1:9 But di pesin wey nor get dis tins, dey blind. Dis show sey, e nor dey si far and e don forget sey God don forgi-am en sins." 
2Peter1:10 So my brodas and sistas, make una do evritin to show sey, God koll and choose una. As una dey do so, una nor go ever fall inside sin." 
2Peter1:11 Di door to enter awa Oga God and Savior Jesus Christ kingdom, wey nor go ever end, go open wide for una." 
2Peter1:12 I go dey remind una dis tins evritime, even doh I know sey una know dem and naw, una leg don strong for di trut wey una bilive." 
2Peter1:13 As long as I dey, I look am sey e good make I dey remind una," 
2Peter1:14 as I know sey di time wey I go die don near, bikos awa Oga God Jesus Christ don show mi." 
2Peter1:15 I go try do evritin wey I fit do, so dat afta I don go, una go fit tok about dis tins." 
2Peter1:16 Bikos, wi nor use awa brain take tell una lie-lie story about Christ pawa and how E go kom back."

2Peter1:18 Wen dis vois tok from heaven, wi awasef hear am, bikos wi dey with am on-top di mountin." 
2Peter1:19 Afta dat one, wi bilive wetin di profets prish. Una go do well if una hear and follow di lite wey dey shine for darkness and wen day break, di star wey dey kom for morning, go shine for una heart."

2Peter2:1 As fake profets dey among di pipol before, na so fake tishas go dey among una too. Dis fake tishas go tish lie-lie tins wey fit distroy pesin and dem go sey dem nor know di Masta. Like dis, dem go distroy demsef." 
2Peter2:2 Many pipol go follow dem live dia yeye life. Bikos of dis fake tishas, pipol go tok bad about di trut," 
2Peter2:3 and dis tishas go deceive una with dia wayo. God don kondemn dem tey-tey and Christ wey go distroy dem, nor dey sleep." 
2Peter2:4 God nor sorry for di angels wey sin, E trow dem for hell and tie dem for darkness until di day wen E go judge di world." 
2Peter2:5 God nor sorry for di world wey dey before and E distroy am with wota, but save Noah wey prish make pipol do wetin good for God eye and di seven pipol wey dey with am." 
2Peter2:6 E still turn Sodom and Gomorrah to ashes wen E distroy dem, den E use dem as ezample for di pipol wey dey live bad life," 
2Peter2:7 but E save Lot wey nor like wiked pipol life," 
2Peter2:8 (bikos di time wey Lot dey dat town, e vex for di bad tins wey di pipol dey do)." 
2Peter2:9 If God do all dis tins, den E know how to save en pipol from trobol kon tie wiked pipol keep, so dat E go ponish dem wen E go judge di world." 
2Peter2:10 Dis na di pipol wey dey do wetin dia body wont and dem nor dey respet pipol wey get authority. Dem nor dey fear; dem dey karry body up; dey tok bad about tins wey God kreate for heaven," 
2Peter2:11 even angels wey get pawa pass dem, nor dey tok about dis tins for God present." 
2Peter2:12 But dis men bi like animal wey nor dey tink; animals wey pipol fit kill anyhow and dem just dey do as dem like. Dis pipol dey tok anyhow and na distroshon go end dia life. 
2Peter2:13 Dem go sofa for dis tins wey dem dey do, bikos dem feel sey dem fit do anytin wey dia body wont for day time and wen ever dem follow una chop, dem dey kause trobol among una." 
2Peter2:14 Wetin dem like pass, na to sleep with who dem nor marry; dem nor dey taya to sin and dem dey draw doz wey dia faith nor strong, follow body. Dem don train dia mind to get long-trot and God don curse dem." 
2Peter2:15 Since dem komot from di rite way, dem don miss road, bikos dem dey follow Balaam, Beor pikin, wey love bad tins!" 
2Peter2:16 As God dey korrect Balaam for en sin (donkey wey nor suppose tok kon tok to di profet, so dat e go stop di bad tins wey e dey do)." 
2Peter2:17 Dis pipol bi like river wey nor get wota, dem bi like kloud wey breeze dey blow anyhow and na dem God dey keep di place wey dark pass, dey wait." 
2Peter2:18 Dem dey use dia big-big grammar wey nor mean anytin, take deceive pipol wey just dey won komot hand for bad tins." 
2Peter2:19 Even doh dis fake tishas dey promise dis pipol sey, dem go dey free, di fake tisha na slave dem bi to sin. Bikos pesin na slave to anytin wey masta am." 
2Peter2:20 Afta dem don free from sin thru awa Oga God and Savior Jesus Christ and dem kon let sin masta dem again, dia kondishon for di end, go worse pass as e bi before." 
2Peter2:21 Bikos e for betta sey, dem nor know God at-all, dan sey afta dem don know am, dem kon turn back from di kommandment wey God give dem." 
2Peter2:22 Na dem bi ezample for dis word wey pipol tok, “Dog dey go back go chop en vomit,” and “Pig wey dem don wosh en body, go still go liedan for portor-portor.”" 
2Peter3:1 My friends, dis na di sekond leta wey I dey rite to una, so dat una go dey tink about di tins wey I tell una." 
2Peter3:2 I wont make una remember all di word wey di profets tok before and di kommandment wey awa Oga God and Savior give us thru di apostles. 
2Peter3:3 Afta dis, make una undastand sey: for di last days, yeye pipol go kom and dem go dey do bad tins wey dey hongry dem." 
2Peter3:4 Dem go sey, “I tink sey Jesus promise sey E go kom back? Awa grand-grand papa dem don die since, but evritin still bi as dem bi since God kreate di world.”" 
2Peter3:5 Dem don forget sey, na with word God take kreate di heaven before E kreate di eart from wota and na with wota, E take make dis world." 
2Peter3:6 And na with di same wota, E take distroy di eart wey dey before." 
2Peter3:7 Na di same word God take keep dis heaven and eart dey wait for fire wey go kom. E keep dem dey wait Judgement day. Di day wen E go distroy di pipol wey nor dey fear am. 
2Peter3:8 Naw, my friends, make una nor let dis tin pass una, bikos one day bi like 1,000 years for God eye and 1,000 years bi like one day." 
2Peter3:9 Nor bi sey God nor fit do wetin E promise as some pipol dey tink, but E dey patient dey wait for una, bikos E nor wont make anybody die trowey, but E wont make evribody turn from sin kom meet am." 
2Peter3:10 Di day wen God go kom, go bi like wen tif dey kom for nite. Wen E kom, di heaven go disappear with loud nois and di stars for up go melt, di whole eart and evritin wey dey inside, go vanish." 
2Peter3:11 Since evritin go melt like dis, wish kind pipol wi suppose to bi? E good make wi dey live awa life for holiness and dey do wetin God wont." 
2Peter3:12 Since wi dey wait for di day wey Christ go kom, make wi dey do wetin wi fit do to make Christ kwik kom. Bikos for dat day, evritin wey dey for heaven go burn kon skata and di stars, go melt." 
2Peter3:13 But as God promise, wi dey wait for di new heaven and eart, di place where raitiousness dey." 
2Peter3:14 So, my friends, as una dey wait for dis tins, make una do wetin una fit do, so dat una go get peace and una go dey without stain or fault wen una go enter en kingdom." 
2Peter3:15 God dey wait with patient, so dat una go turn from sin kom meet am, just as awa broda Paul rite give una akordin to di wisdom wey God gi-am." 
2Peter3:16 E tok about dis tins for all en letas. Aldo some tins for di leta dey hard to undastand and doz wey nor know di trut or dey stabol, don turn dem to wetin go kill dem. Na so dem take distroy all di oda part for God word too." 
2Peter3:17 So, my friends, as una don know wetin go happen, make una shine una eye, so dat una nor go miss di way and fall from di trut wey una get, bikos na so pipol wey nor sirious, dey do." 
2Peter3:18 But make una grow inside di grace wey awa Oga God and Savior, Jesus Christ give una, so dat una go know am more-more. Make glory bi en own, naw and forever! Amen."

Jude1:5 So I won remind una even doh una don already know dis tins. Afta God don first save Israel pipol from Egypt, e kon distroy doz wey nor bilive am." 
Jude1:6 And I still dey remind una about di angels wey nor stay for where God put dem, but kon komot for where dem suppose dey. God don shain dem tie for darkness until wen E go judge di world." 
Jude1:7 Make una use Sodom and Gomorrah and di towns wey dey near dem, as ezample. God ponish dem with fire wey nor dey end, bikos both men and wimen dey sleep with each oda anyhow, dem even dey sleep with animals and dem dey do oda wiked tins wey dey dia mind." 
Jude1:8 Like dis too, dis men wey sey dem dey dream; dey live bad life; dem nor dey obey God authority and dem even dey curse angels wey get glory." 
Jude1:9 But wen Mikael, di big angel dey kworel with devil bikos of Moses body, e nor curse am, but instead, e sey, “Na God go judge yu!”" 
Jude1:10 But dis pipol nor undastand wetin dem dey tok and dis na wetin dem suppose to undastand without sey pesin tish dem. As animals nor dey tink before dem do tins, na so dis pipol dey bihave." 
Jude1:11 Curse dey dia head! Bikos dem dey bihave like Kain and bikos of long-trot, dem dey do di mistake wey Balaam do. So dem go must die like Korah, wey disobey God." 
Jude1:12 Wen dis pipol dey follow una chop di fellowship food wey God don bless, dem bi like shuku-shuku for una body. Dem bi like shepad wey nor dey shame, bikos e kare for only ensef. Dem bi like kloud wey just dey blow, but rain nor dey fall. Dem bi like tree wey nor get fruits and God don rut dem komot from groun." 
Jude1:13 Dem bi like wave for sea wey dey foam kom out. Dem bi like star wey nor dey stay one place and God don keep di place wey deep pass for darkness, dey wait dem." 
Jude1:14 Enoch wey bi di nomba seven pesin afta Adam, profesai about dis pipol. E sey, “Listin! God dey kom with en holy pipol wey nobody fit kount and" 
Jude1:15 e dey kom judge evribody, so dat pipol go know di bad tins wey dem dey do and di wiked words wey sinnas don tok against God.”" 
Jude1:16 Dis pipol dey komplain waka and dey find fault. Dem dey go anywhere wey dia body karry dem go and dem dey boast. Dem dey tok wetin pipol like to hear, so dat odas go praiz dem." 
Jude1:17 But my friends wey I love, make una remember wetin awa Oga God Jesus apostles tell una." 
Jude1:18 Dem sey, “For di time wen dis world won end, some pipol go dey laf una and di tins wey God hate wey dey hongry dem to do, naim go dey push dem.”" 
Jude1:19 Dis kind pipol dey divide God pipol; dem like dis world tins and dem nor get God Spirit. 
Jude1:20 My friends, make una dey build unasef up with faith wey holy well-well and dey pray with di Holy Spirit." 
Jude1:21 Make una keep unasef inside God love as una dey wait for awa Oga God Jesus Christ, wey go bring life wey nor go end." 
Jude1:22 And make wi help doz wey dia faith dey shake. 
Jude1:23 Make una help odas make dem nor enter hell-fire, so dat una go fit save dem and as una dey help odas, make una dey fear God kon hate di tins wey go make una sin." 
Jude1:24 Naw, make all glory bi God own, bikos E nor let una fall and E go bring una kom en present with betta joy wey nor get fault." 
Jude1:25 Make all glory, majesty, pawa and authority, bi God own, naw and forever thru Christ wey bi awa Oga God. Amen!"

Revelation1:2 and John bear witness for evritin wey e si. Dis na wetin John tok koncerning God word and about Jesus Christ.

Revelation1:4 Na John rite dis leta go give di seven church wey dey Asia aria. Make grace and peace dey with una from di Pesin wey dey since, wey dey naw and wey go still kom. From di seven spirits wey dey en throne front"
